authors_text: Yulun Tian,Yun Chang,Fernando Herrera Arias,Carlos Nieto-Granda,Jonathan P. How,Luca Carlone
title: Kimera-Multi: Robust, Distributed, Dense Metric-Semantic SLAM for Multi-Robot Systems
title_zh: Kimera-Multi：用于多机器人系统的鲁棒、分布式、密集度量语义 SLAM
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Robotics (18 pages, 15 figures)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Robotics (18 pages, 15 figures)
abstract: This paper presents Kimera-Multi, the first multi-robot system that (i) is robust and capable of identifying and rejecting incorrect inter and intra-robot loop closures resulting from perceptual aliasing, (ii) is fully distributed and only relies on local (peer-to-peer) communication to achieve distributed localization and mapping, and (iii) builds a globally consistent metric-semantic 3D mesh model of the environment in real-time, where faces of the mesh are annotated with semantic labels. Kimera-Multi is implemented by a team of robots equipped with visual-inertial sensors. Each robot builds a local trajectory estimate and a local mesh using Kimera. When communication is available, robots initiate a distributed place recognition and robust pose graph optimization protocol based on a novel distributed graduated non-convexity algorithm. The proposed protocol allows the robots to improve their local trajectory estimates by leveraging inter-robot loop closures while being robust to outliers. Finally, each robot uses its improved trajectory estimate to correct the local mesh using mesh deformation techniques. We demonstrate Kimera-Multi in photo-realistic simulations, SLAM benchmarking datasets, and challenging outdoor datasets collected using ground robots. Both real and simulated experiments involve long trajectories (e.g., up to 800 meters per robot). The experiments show that Kimera-Multi (i) outperforms the state of the art in terms of robustness and accuracy, (ii) achieves estimation errors comparable to a centralized SLAM system while being fully distributed, (iii) is parsimonious in terms of communication bandwidth, (iv) produces accurate metric-semantic 3D meshes, and (v) is modular and can be also used for standard 3D reconstruction (i.e., without semantic labels) or for trajectory estimation (i.e., without reconstructing a 3D mesh).

abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Kimera-Multi，这是第一个多机器人系统，它 (i) 非常稳健，能够识别和拒绝由于感知混叠而导致的错误的机器人间和机器人内闭环，(ii) 完全分布式，仅依赖本地（点对点）通信来实现分布式定位和映射，以及 (iii) 实时构建全局一致的环境度量语义 3D 网格模型，其中网格的面用语义标签进行注释。 Kimera-Multi 由配备视觉惯性传感器的机器人团队实施。每个机器人使用 Kimera 构建局部轨迹估计和局部网格。当通信可用时，机器人基于新颖的分布式分级非凸算法启动分布式位置识别和鲁棒位姿图优化协议。所提出的协议允许机器人通过利用机器人间的闭环来改进其局部轨迹估计，同时对异常值具有鲁棒性。最后，每个机器人使用其改进的轨迹估计来使用网格变形技术来校正局部网格。我们在逼真的模拟、SLAM 基准数据集以及使用地面机器人收集的具有挑战性的户外数据集中演示了 Kimera-Multi。真实实验和模拟实验都涉及长轨迹（例如，每个机器人长达 800 米）。实验表明，Kimera-Multi (i) 在鲁棒性和准确性方面优于现有技术，(ii) 在完全分布式的情况下实现了与集中式 SLAM 系统相当的估计误差，(iii) 在通信带宽方面简约，(iv) 生成精确的度量语义 3D 网格，(v) 是模块化的，也可用于标准 3D 重建（即没有语义标签）或轨迹估计（即没有语义标签）重建 3D 网格）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Kimera-Multi，一种用于多机器人系统的鲁棒分布式密集度量-语义SLAM方法，能够实现实时全局一致的3D语义网格建模。
AI.motivation: 现有多机器人SLAM系统存在鲁棒性不足、依赖中心化计算、无法处理感知混淆导致的错误环路闭合等问题，且难以生成带语义信息的高精度3D地图。
AI.method: 基于视觉惯性传感器，每个机器人运行Kimera生成局部轨迹与网格；通过分布式渐进非凸算法进行跨机器人位姿图优化，结合网格变形技术修正局部地图，实现去中心化通信与语义标注。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据集实验中，Kimera-Multi相较现有方法提升鲁棒性与精度，通信效率更高，可生成准确的度量-语义3D网格，并支持模块化应用。
AI.conclusion: Kimera-Multi为多机器人系统提供了高效、鲁棒的分布式SLAM解决方案，兼具语义地图构建能力与工程实用性。

authors_text: Yuanfeng Ji,Ruimao Zhang,Huijie Wang,Zhen Li,Lingyun Wu,Shaoting Zhang,Ping Luo
title: Multi-Compound Transformer for Accurate Biomedical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于精确生物医学图像分割的多复合变压器
abstract: The recent vision transformer(i.e.for image classification) learns non-local attentive interaction of different patch tokens. However, prior arts miss learning the cross-scale dependencies of different pixels, the semantic correspondence of different labels, and the consistency of the feature representations and semantic embeddings, which are critical for biomedical segmentation. In this paper, we tackle the above issues by proposing a unified transformer network, termed Multi-Compound Transformer (MCTrans), which incorporates rich feature learning and semantic structure mining into a unified framework. Specifically, MCTrans embeds the multi-scale convolutional features as a sequence of tokens and performs intra- and inter-scale self-attention, rather than single-scale attention in previous works. In addition, a learnable proxy embedding is also introduced to model semantic relationship and feature enhancement by using self-attention and cross-attention, respectively. MCTrans can be easily plugged into a UNet-like network and attains a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art methods in biomedical image segmentation in six standard benchmarks. For example, MCTrans outperforms UNet by 3.64%, 3.71%, 4.34%, 2.8%, 1.88%, 1.57% in Pannuke, CVC-Clinic, CVC-Colon, Etis, Kavirs, ISIC2018 dataset, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/JiYuanFeng/MCTrans.
summary: The recent vision transformer(i.e.for image classification) learns non-local attentive interaction of different patch tokens. However, prior arts miss learning the cross-scale dependencies of different pixels, the semantic correspondence of different labels, and the consistency of the feature representations and semantic embeddings, which are critical for biomedical segmentation. In this paper, we tackle the above issues by proposing a unified transformer network, termed Multi-Compound Transformer (MCTrans), which incorporates rich feature learning and semantic structure mining into a unified framework. Specifically, MCTrans embeds the multi-scale convolutional features as a sequence of tokens and performs intra- and inter-scale self-attention, rather than single-scale attention in previous works. In addition, a learnable proxy embedding is also introduced to model semantic relationship and feature enhancement by using self-attention and cross-attention, respectively. MCTrans can be easily plugged into a UNet-like network and attains a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art methods in biomedical image segmentation in six standard benchmarks. For example, MCTrans outperforms UNet by 3.64%, 3.71%, 4.34%, 2.8%, 1.88%, 1.57% in Pannuke, CVC-Clinic, CVC-Colon, Etis, Kavirs, ISIC2018 dataset, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/JiYuanFeng/MCTrans.
abstract_zh: 最近的视觉变换器（即用于图像分类）学习不同补丁标记的非局部注意交互。然而，现有技术错过了学习不同像素的跨尺度依赖性、不同标签的语义对应性以及特征表示和语义嵌入的一致性，这些对于生物医学分割至关重要。在本文中，我们通过提出一种统一的变压器网络（称为多复合变压器（MCTrans））来解决上述问题，它将丰富的特征学习和语义结构挖掘整合到一个统一的框架中。具体来说，MCTrans 将多尺度卷积特征嵌入为标记序列，并执行尺度内和尺度间的自注意力，而不是之前作品中的单尺度注意力。此外，还引入了可学习的代理嵌入，分别使用自注意力和交叉注意力来建模语义关系和特征增强。 MCTrans 可以轻松插入类似 UNet 的网络，并在六个标准基准测试中比生物医学图像分割的最先进方法取得了显着改进。例如，MCTrans 在 Pannuke、CVC-Clinic、CVC-Colon、Etis、Kavirs、ISIC2018 数据集上分别比 UNet 好 3.64%、3.71%、4.34%、2.8%、1.88%、1.57%。代码可在 https://github.com/JiYuanFeng/MCTrans 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MCTrans的多复合变换器，用于改进生物医学图像分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨尺度依赖、标签语义对应及特征表示一致性方面存在不足，影响生物医学图像分割效果。
AI.method: MCTrans将多尺度卷积特征嵌入为token序列，通过内外尺度自注意力机制学习特征，并引入可学习代理嵌入建模语义关系，与UNet框架结合。
AI.result: 在六个标准数据集上显著优于UNet，例如Pannuke数据集提升3.64%，ISIC2018提升1.57%。
AI.conclusion: MCTrans通过统一框架有效捕捉多尺度语义信息，为生物医学图像分割提供新方法。

Code is available at https://github.com/JiYuanFeng/MCTrans. 最近的视觉变换器（即用于图像分类）学习不同补丁标记的非局部注意交互。然而，现有技术错过了学习不同像素的跨尺度依赖性、不同标签的语义对应性以及特征表示和语义嵌入的一致性，这些对于生物医学分割至关重要。在本文中，我们通过提出一种统一的变压器网络（称为多复合变压器（MCTrans））来解决上述问题，它将丰富的特征学习和语义结构挖掘整合到一个统一的框架中。具体来说，MCTrans 将多尺度卷积特征嵌入为标记序列，并执行尺度内和尺度间的自注意力，而不是之前作品中的单尺度注意力。此外，还引入了可学习的代理嵌入，分别使用自注意力和交叉注意力来建模语义关系和特征增强。 MCTrans 可以轻松插入类似 UNet 的网络，并在六个标准基准测试中比生物医学图像分割的最先进方法取得了显着改进。例如，MCTrans 在 Pannuke、CVC-Clinic、CVC-Colon、Etis、Kavirs、ISIC2018 数据集上分别比 UNet 好 3.64%、3.71%、4.34%、2.8%、1.88%、1.57%。代码可在 https://github.com/JiYuanFeng/MCTrans 获取。 本文提出一种名为MCTrans的多复合变换器，用于改进生物医学图像分割的准确性。 Yuanfeng Ji,Ruimao Zhang,Huijie Wang,Zhen Li,Lingyun Wu,Shaoting Zhang,Ping Luo cs.CV

authors_text: Qingjian Lin,Lin Yang,Xuyang Wang,Luyuan Xie,Chen Jia,Junjie Wang
title: Sparsely Overlapped Speech Training in the Time Domain: Joint Learning of Target Speech Separation and Personal VAD Benefits
title_zh: 时域稀疏重叠语音训练：目标语音分离和个人 VAD 好处的联合学习
abstract: Target speech separation is the process of filtering a certain speaker's voice out of speech mixtures according to the additional speaker identity information provided. Recent works have made considerable improvement by processing signals in the time domain directly. The majority of them take fully overlapped speech mixtures for training. However, since most real-life conversations occur randomly and are sparsely overlapped, we argue that training with different overlap ratio data benefits. To do so, an unavoidable problem is that the popularly used SI-SNR loss has no definition for silent sources. This paper proposes the weighted SI-SNR loss, together with the joint learning of target speech separation and personal VAD. The weighted SI-SNR loss imposes a weight factor that is proportional to the target speaker's duration and returns zero when the target speaker is absent. Meanwhile, the personal VAD generates masks and sets non-target speech to silence. Experiments show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline by 1.73 dB in terms of SDR on fully overlapped speech, as well as by 4.17 dB and 0.9 dB on sparsely overlapped speech of clean and noisy conditions. Besides, with slight degradation in performance, our model could reduce the time costs in inference.
summary: Target speech separation is the process of filtering a certain speaker's voice out of speech mixtures according to the additional speaker identity information provided. Recent works have made considerable improvement by processing signals in the time domain directly. The majority of them take fully overlapped speech mixtures for training. However, since most real-life conversations occur randomly and are sparsely overlapped, we argue that training with different overlap ratio data benefits. To do so, an unavoidable problem is that the popularly used SI-SNR loss has no definition for silent sources. This paper proposes the weighted SI-SNR loss, together with the joint learning of target speech separation and personal VAD. The weighted SI-SNR loss imposes a weight factor that is proportional to the target speaker's duration and returns zero when the target speaker is absent. Meanwhile, the personal VAD generates masks and sets non-target speech to silence. Experiments show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline by 1.73 dB in terms of SDR on fully overlapped speech, as well as by 4.17 dB and 0.9 dB on sparsely overlapped speech of clean and noisy conditions. Besides, with slight degradation in performance, our model could reduce the time costs in inference.
abstract_zh: 目标语音分离是根据提供的附加说话人身份信息从语音混合物中过滤出特定说话人的声音的过程。最近的工作通过直接在时域处理信号取得了相当大的改进。他们中的大多数采用完全重叠的语音混合进行训练。然而，由于大多数现实生活中的对话是随机发生的并且很少重叠，我们认为使用不同重叠率数据进行训练是有益的。为此，一个不可避免的问题是，普遍使用的 SI-SNR 损失对于无声源没有定义。本文提出了加权SI-SNR损失，以及目标语音分离和个人VAD的联合学习。加权 SI-SNR 损失施加与目标说话者的持续时间成比例的权重因子，并且当目标说话者不存在时返回零。同时，个人VAD生成掩码并将非目标语音设置为静音。实验表明，我们提出的方法在完全重叠语音的 SDR 方面优于基线 1.73 dB，在干净和噪声条件下的稀疏重叠语音上优于基线 4.17 dB 和 0.9 dB。此外，随着性能的轻微下降，我们的模型可以减少推理的时间成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在时域中通过稀疏重叠语音训练联合学习目标语音分离与个人语音活动检测（VAD）的方法，以提升真实场景下的语音分离效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多使用完全重叠的语音混合数据训练，但实际对话中语音重叠程度随机且稀疏。同时，主流的SI-SNR损失函数无法处理静音源，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 提出加权SI-SNR损失函数，根据目标说话人时长分配权重并在静音时归零；结合个人VAD生成掩码，将非目标语音置为静音，实现联合训练。
AI.result: 在完全重叠语音上SDR提升1.73 dB，在稀疏重叠的干净和噪声条件下分别提升4.17 dB和0.9 dB，且推理时间略有减少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过适配真实场景的稀疏重叠数据和改进损失函数，显著提升了语音分离性能，尤其在复杂环境下表现优异。

authors_text: Zihao Zhang,Shaozuo Yu,Siwei Yang,Yu Zhou,Bingchen Zhao
title: Rail-5k: a Real-World Dataset for Rail Surface Defects Detection
title_zh: Rail-5k：用于轨道表面缺陷检测的真实数据集
abstract: This paper presents the Rail-5k dataset for benchmarking the performance of visual algorithms in a real-world application scenario, namely the rail surface defects detection task. We collected over 5k high-quality images from railways across China, and annotated 1100 images with the help from railway experts to identify the most common 13 types of rail defects. The dataset can be used for two settings both with unique challenges, the first is the fully-supervised setting using the 1k+ labeled images for training, fine-grained nature and long-tailed distribution of defect classes makes it hard for visual algorithms to tackle. The second is the semi-supervised learning setting facilitated by the 4k unlabeled images, these 4k images are uncurated containing possible image corruptions and domain shift with the labeled images, which can not be easily tackle by previous semi-supervised learning methods. We believe our dataset could be a valuable benchmark for evaluating robustness and reliability of visual algorithms.
summary: This paper presents the Rail-5k dataset for benchmarking the performance of visual algorithms in a real-world application scenario, namely the rail surface defects detection task. We collected over 5k high-quality images from railways across China, and annotated 1100 images with the help from railway experts to identify the most common 13 types of rail defects. The dataset can be used for two settings both with unique challenges, the first is the fully-supervised setting using the 1k+ labeled images for training, fine-grained nature and long-tailed distribution of defect classes makes it hard for visual algorithms to tackle. The second is the semi-supervised learning setting facilitated by the 4k unlabeled images, these 4k images are uncurated containing possible image corruptions and domain shift with the labeled images, which can not be easily tackle by previous semi-supervised learning methods. We believe our dataset could be a valuable benchmark for evaluating robustness and reliability of visual algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Rail-5k 数据集，用于在实际应用场景（即轨道表面缺陷检测任务）中对视觉算法的性能进行基准测试。我们收集了超过 5000 张来自中国各地铁路的高质量图像，并在铁路专家的帮助下对 1100 张图像进行了注释，识别出最常见的 13 种铁路缺陷。该数据集可用于两种具有独特挑战的设置，第一种是使用 1k+ 标记图像进行训练的完全监督设置，缺陷类的细粒度性质和长尾分布使得视觉算法难以解决。第二个是 4k 未标记图像促进的半监督学习设置，这些 4k 图像未经整理，包含可能的图像损坏和标记图像的域移位，这是以前的半监督学习方法无法轻松解决的。我们相信我们的数据集可以成为评估视觉算法的稳健性和可靠性的有价值的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rail-5k数据集，用于评估视觉算法在铁路表面缺陷检测任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在真实场景中面临缺陷类别分布不均、半监督学习数据质量差等挑战，需构建真实场景数据集进行基准测试。
AI.method: 采集中国铁路5k张高质量图像，由专家标注1100张包含13类缺陷的图像，设置全监督（1k+标注数据）和半监督（4k未标注数据）两种训练场景。
AI.result: 数据集揭示了细粒度缺陷分类的长尾分布问题，以及半监督场景中未标注数据存在图像损坏和领域偏移的挑战。
AI.conclusion: Rail-5k可作为评估视觉算法鲁棒性和可靠性的基准数据集，推动缺陷检测技术在工业场景的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Rail-5k数据集，用于评估视觉算法在铁路表面缺陷检测任务中的性能。

authors_text: Shib Sankar Dasgupta,Michael Boratko,Siddhartha Mishra,Shriya Atmakuri,Dhruvesh Patel,Xiang Lorraine Li,Andrew McCallum
title: Word2Box: Capturing Set-Theoretic Semantics of Words using Box Embeddings
title_zh: Word2Box：使用框嵌入捕获单词的集合论语义
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 1: Long Papers) 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 1: Long Papers) 2022
abstract: Learning representations of words in a continuous space is perhaps the most fundamental task in NLP, however words interact in ways much richer than vector dot product similarity can provide. Many relationships between words can be expressed set-theoretically, for example, adjective-noun compounds (eg. "red cars"$\subseteq$"cars") and homographs (eg. "tongue"$\cap$"body" should be similar to "mouth", while "tongue"$\cap$"language" should be similar to "dialect") have natural set-theoretic interpretations. Box embeddings are a novel region-based representation which provide the capability to perform these set-theoretic operations. In this work, we provide a fuzzy-set interpretation of box embeddings, and learn box representations of words using a set-theoretic training objective. We demonstrate improved performance on various word similarity tasks, particularly on less common words, and perform a quantitative and qualitative analysis exploring the additional unique expressivity provided by Word2Box.
summary: Learning representations of words in a continuous space is perhaps the most fundamental task in NLP, however words interact in ways much richer than vector dot product similarity can provide. Many relationships between words can be expressed set-theoretically, for example, adjective-noun compounds (eg. "red cars"$\subseteq$"cars") and homographs (eg. "tongue"$\cap$"body" should be similar to "mouth", while "tongue"$\cap$"language" should be similar to "dialect") have natural set-theoretic interpretations. Box embeddings are a novel region-based representation which provide the capability to perform these set-theoretic operations. In this work, we provide a fuzzy-set interpretation of box embeddings, and learn box representations of words using a set-theoretic training objective. We demonstrate improved performance on various word similarity tasks, particularly on less common words, and perform a quantitative and qualitative analysis exploring the additional unique expressivity provided by Word2Box.
abstract_zh: 学习连续空间中单词的表示可能是 NLP 中最基本的任务，但是单词交互的方式比向量点积相似性所能提供的方式丰富得多。单词之间的许多关系可以用集合论来表达，例如，形容词-名词复合词（例如“red cars”$\subseteq$“cars”）和同形异义词（例如“tongue”$\cap$“body”应该类似于“mouth”，而“tongue”$\cap$“language”应该类似于“dialect”）具有自然的集合论解释。框嵌入是一种新颖的基于区域的表示，它提供了执行这些集合论操作的能力。在这项工作中，我们提供了框嵌入的模糊集解释，并使用集合论训练目标来学习单词的框表示。我们展示了在各种单词相似性任务上的性能改进，特别是在不太常见的单词上，并进行定量和定性分析，探索 Word2Box 提供的额外独特表达能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Word2Box方法，利用Box Embeddings捕捉词语的集合论语义。
AI.motivation: 传统词向量无法充分表达词语间的复杂关系（如子集、交集等），而集合论能更准确描述此类关系。
AI.method: 通过模糊集合解释Box Embeddings，设计集合论训练目标学习词的Box表示。
AI.result: 在词相似度任务中表现优于传统方法，尤其对不常见词效果显著，并验证了其独特表达能力。
AI.conclusion: Word2Box有效捕捉集合论语义，为NLP任务提供更丰富的语义表示方式。

search_text: Word2Box: Capturing Set-Theoretic Semantics of Words using Box Embeddings Word2Box：使用框嵌入捕获单词的集合论语义 Learning representations of words in a continuous space is perhaps the most fundamental task in NLP, however words interact in ways much richer than vector dot product similarity can provide. Many relationships between words can be expressed set-theoretically, for example, adjective-noun compounds (eg. "red cars"$\subseteq$"cars") and homographs (eg. "tongue"$\cap$"body" should be similar to "mouth", while "tongue"$\cap$"language" should be similar to "dialect") have natural set-theoretic interpretations. Box embeddings are a novel region-based representation which provide the capability to perform these set-theoretic operations. In this work, we provide a fuzzy-set interpretation of box embeddings, and learn box representations of words using a set-theoretic training objective. We demonstrate improved performance on various word similarity tasks, particularly on less common words, and perform a quantitative and qualitative analysis exploring the additional unique expressivity provided by Word2Box. 学习连续空间中单词的表示可能是 NLP 中最基本的任务，但是单词交互的方式比向量点积相似性所能提供的方式丰富得多。单词之间的许多关系可以用集合论来表达，例如，形容词-名词复合词（例如“red cars”$\subseteq$“cars”）和同形异义词（例如“tongue”$\cap$“body”应该类似于“mouth”，而“tongue”$\cap$“language”应该类似于“dialect”）具有自然的集合论解释。框嵌入是一种新颖的基于区域的表示，它提供了执行这些集合论操作的能力。在这项工作中，我们提供了框嵌入的模糊集解释，并使用集合论训练目标来学习单词的框表示。我们展示了在各种单词相似性任务上的性能改进，特别是在不太常见的单词上，并进行定量和定性分析，探索 Word2Box 提供的额外独特表达能力。 本文提出Word2Box方法，利用Box Embeddings捕捉词语的集合论语义。 Shib Sankar Dasgupta,Michael Boratko,Siddhartha Mishra,Shriya Atmakuri,Dhruvesh Patel,Xiang Lorraine Li,Andrew McCallum cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Scheduling on uniform and unrelated machines with bipartite incompatibility graphs
title_zh: 使用二分不兼容图在统一且不相关的机器上进行调度
abstract: In this paper the problem of scheduling of jobs on parallel machines under incompatibility relation is considered. In this model a binary relation between jobs is given and no two jobs that are in the relation can be scheduled on the same machine. In particular, we consider job scheduling under incompatibility relation forming bipartite graphs, under makespan optimality criterion, on uniform and unrelated machines. We show that no algorithm can achieve a good approximation ratio for uniform machines, even for a case of unit time jobs, under $P \neq NP$. We also provide an approximation algorithm that achieves the best possible approximation ratio, even for the case of jobs of arbitrary lengths $p_j$, under the same assumption. Precisely, we present an $O(n^{1/2-ε})$ inapproximability bound, for any $ε> 0$; and $\sqrt{p_{sum}}$-approximation algorithm, respectively. To enrich the analysis, bipartite graphs generated randomly according to Gilbert's model $\mathcal{G}_{n,n,p(n)}$ are considered. For a broad class of $p(n)$ functions we show that there exists an algorithm producing a schedule with makespan almost surely at most twice the optimum. Due to our knowledge, this is the first study of randomly generated graphs in the context of scheduling in the considered model. For unrelated machines, an FPTAS for $R2|G = bipartite|C_{\max}$ is provided. We also show that there is no algorithm of approximation ratio $O(n^bp_{\max}^{1-ε})$, even for $Rm|G = bipartite|C_{max}$ for $m \ge 3$ and any $ε> 0$, $b > 0$, unless $P = NP$.
summary: In this paper the problem of scheduling of jobs on parallel machines under incompatibility relation is considered. In this model a binary relation between jobs is given and no two jobs that are in the relation can be scheduled on the same machine. In particular, we consider job scheduling under incompatibility relation forming bipartite graphs, under makespan optimality criterion, on uniform and unrelated machines. We show that no algorithm can achieve a good approximation ratio for uniform machines, even for a case of unit time jobs, under $P \neq NP$. We also provide an approximation algorithm that achieves the best possible approximation ratio, even for the case of jobs of arbitrary lengths $p_j$, under the same assumption. Precisely, we present an $O(n^{1/2-ε})$ inapproximability bound, for any $ε> 0$; and $\sqrt{p_{sum}}$-approximation algorithm, respectively. To enrich the analysis, bipartite graphs generated randomly according to Gilbert's model $\mathcal{G}_{n,n,p(n)}$ are considered. For a broad class of $p(n)$ functions we show that there exists an algorithm producing a schedule with makespan almost surely at most twice the optimum. Due to our knowledge, this is the first study of randomly generated graphs in the context of scheduling in the considered model. For unrelated machines, an FPTAS for $R2|G = bipartite|C_{\max}$ is provided. We also show that there is no algorithm of approximation ratio $O(n^bp_{\max}^{1-ε})$, even for $Rm|G = bipartite|C_{max}$ for $m \ge 3$ and any $ε> 0$, $b > 0$, unless $P = NP$.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了不兼容关系下并行机上的作业调度问题。在该模型中，给出了作业之间的二元关系，并且该关系中的两个作业不能调度在同一台机器上。特别是，我们考虑在统一且不相关的机器上，在完工时间最优准则下，形成二部图的不兼容关系下的作业调度。我们表明，即使对于单位时间作业的情况，在 $P \neq NP$ 下，没有算法可以为均匀机器实现良好的近似率。我们还提供了一种近似算法，即使对于任意长度 $p_j$ 的作业，在相同的假设下也能实现最佳的近似率。准确地说，对于任何 $ε> 0$，我们提出一个 $O(n^{1/2-ε})$ 不可逼近界限；和 $\sqrt{p_{sum}}$ 近似算法。为了丰富分析，考虑根据吉尔伯特模型 $\mathcal{G}_{n,n,p(n)}$ 随机生成的二部图。对于一类广泛的 $p(n)$ 函数，我们表明存在一种算法，它可以生成一个时间表，其完工时间几乎肯定最多是最佳时间的两倍。据我们所知，这是在所考虑的模型的调度背景下对随机生成图的首次研究。对于不相关的机器，提供了 $R2|G = bipartite|C_{\max}$ 的 FPTAS。我们还表明，即使对于 $Rm|G = bipartite|C_{max}$ 对于 $m \ge 3$ 和任何 $ε> 0$、$b > 0$，也没有近似比率 $O(n^bp_{\max}^{1-ε})$ 的算法，除非 $P = NP$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在二分图不兼容关系的条件下，对统一和不相关机器进行作业调度的最优调度问题，目标是最小化最大完成时间（makespan）。
AI.motivation: 现有调度算法在处理不兼容作业时存在理论限制，尤其针对二分图结构的不兼容关系，需探索更有效的近似算法及复杂度边界。
AI.method: 采用近似算法分析、不可近似性证明、随机图模型（Gilbert模型）分析，以及针对不相关机器的动态规划优化方法。
AI.result: 证明统一机器调度的近似比下界为$O(n^{1/2-ε})$，提出$\\sqrt{p_{sum}}$近似算法；对随机二分图提出几乎最优的2倍近似算法；为不相关机器设计FPTAS，并证明其不可近似性下界。
AI.conclusion: 首次将随机图模型应用于该调度问题，为不同机器类型提供了理论界限与算法方案，揭示了二分图结构对调度复杂度的显著影响。

title: Deep Learning Image Recognition for Non-images
title_zh: 非图像的深度学习图像识别
abstract: Powerful deep learning algorithms open an opportunity for solving non-image Machine Learning (ML) problems by transforming these problems to into the image recognition problems. The CPC-R algorithm presented in this chapter converts non-image data into images by visualizing non-image data. Then deep learning CNN algorithms solve the learning problems on these images. The design of the CPC-R algorithm allows preserving all high-dimensional information in 2-D images. The use of pair values mapping instead of single value mapping used in the alternative approaches allows encoding each n-D point with 2 times fewer visual elements. The attributes of an n-D point are divided into pairs of its values and each pair is visualized as 2-D points in the same 2-D Cartesian coordinates. Next, grey scale or color intensity values are assigned to each pair to encode the order of pairs. This is resulted in the heatmap image. The computational experiments with CPC-R are conducted for different CNN architectures, and methods to optimize the CPC-R images showing that the combined CPC-R and deep learning CNN algorithms are able to solve non-image ML problems reaching high accuracy on the benchmark datasets. This chapter expands our prior work by adding more experiments to test accuracy of classification, exploring saliency and informativeness of discovered features to test their interpretability, and generalizing the approach.
summary: Powerful deep learning algorithms open an opportunity for solving non-image Machine Learning (ML) problems by transforming these problems to into the image recognition problems. The CPC-R algorithm presented in this chapter converts non-image data into images by visualizing non-image data. Then deep learning CNN algorithms solve the learning problems on these images. The design of the CPC-R algorithm allows preserving all high-dimensional information in 2-D images. The use of pair values mapping instead of single value mapping used in the alternative approaches allows encoding each n-D point with 2 times fewer visual elements. The attributes of an n-D point are divided into pairs of its values and each pair is visualized as 2-D points in the same 2-D Cartesian coordinates. Next, grey scale or color intensity values are assigned to each pair to encode the order of pairs. This is resulted in the heatmap image. The computational experiments with CPC-R are conducted for different CNN architectures, and methods to optimize the CPC-R images showing that the combined CPC-R and deep learning CNN algorithms are able to solve non-image ML problems reaching high accuracy on the benchmark datasets. This chapter expands our prior work by adding more experiments to test accuracy of classification, exploring saliency and informativeness of discovered features to test their interpretability, and generalizing the approach.
abstract_zh: 强大的深度学习算法通过将非图像机器学习（ML）问题转化为图像识别问题，为解决这些问题提供了机会。本章介绍的CPC-R算法通过可视化非图像数据将非图像数据转换为图像。然后深度学习CNN算法解决这些图像上的学习问题。 CPC-R 算法的设计允许保留二维图像中的所有高维信息。使用成对值映射而不是替代方法中使用的单值映射允许用少两倍的视觉元素对每个 n 维点进行编码。 n 维点的属性被分成其值对，每对都可视化为相同二维笛卡尔坐标中的二维点。接下来，将灰度或颜色强度值分配给每对以编码对的顺序。这就是热图图像的结果。针对不同的 CNN 架构和优化 CPC-R 图像的方法进行了 CPC-R 的计算实验，表明组合的 CPC-R 和深度学习 CNN 算法能够解决非图像 ML 问题，在基准数据集上达到高精度。本章通过添加更多实验来测试分类的准确性、探索已发现特征的显着性和信息性以测试其可解释性以及概括该方法来扩展我们之前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将非图像数据转化为图像的方法（CPC-R），利用卷积神经网络（CNN）解决非图像机器学习问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在图像识别领域表现优异，但传统方法难以直接处理非图像数据。通过将非图像数据转化为图像，可借助CNN的强大特征提取能力解决此类问题。
AI.method: CPC-R算法通过将n维数据点拆分为值对，映射到2D坐标系并赋予灰度/颜色强度生成热力图图像，相比单值映射方法减少50%视觉元素，保留高维信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，CPC-R与CNN结合在基准数据集上达到高分类准确率，并通过可解释性分析验证了特征的有效性与方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功将非图像数据转化为可被CNN处理的图像形式，在保持高维信息的同时提升模型性能与特征可解释性，为非图像机器学习提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种将非图像数据转化为图像的方法（CPC-R），利用卷积神经网络（CNN）解决非图像机器学习问题。

search_text: Deep Learning Image Recognition for Non-images 非图像的深度学习图像识别 Powerful deep learning algorithms open an opportunity for solving non-image Machine Learning (ML) problems by transforming these problems to into the image recognition problems. The CPC-R algorithm presented in this chapter converts non-image data into images by visualizing non-image data. Then deep learning CNN algorithms solve the learning problems on these images. The design of the CPC-R algorithm allows preserving all high-dimensional information in 2-D images. The use of pair values mapping instead of single value mapping used in the alternative approaches allows encoding each n-D point with 2 times fewer visual elements. The attributes of an n-D point are divided into pairs of its values and each pair is visualized as 2-D points in the same 2-D Cartesian coordinates. Next, grey scale or color intensity values are assigned to each pair to encode the order of pairs. This is resulted in the heatmap image. The computational experiments with CPC-R are conducted for different CNN architectures, and methods to optimize the CPC-R images showing that the combined CPC-R and deep learning CNN algorithms are able to solve non-image ML problems reaching high accuracy on the benchmark datasets. This chapter expands our prior work by adding more experiments to test accuracy of classification, exploring saliency and informativeness of discovered features to test their interpretability, and generalizing the approach. 强大的深度学习算法通过将非图像机器学习（ML）问题转化为图像识别问题，为解决这些问题提供了机会。本章介绍的CPC-R算法通过可视化非图像数据将非图像数据转换为图像。然后深度学习CNN算法解决这些图像上的学习问题。 CPC-R 算法的设计允许保留二维图像中的所有高维信息。使用成对值映射而不是替代方法中使用的单值映射允许用少两倍的视觉元素对每个 n 维点进行编码。 n 维点的属性被分成其值对，每对都可视化为相同二维笛卡尔坐标中的二维点。接下来，将灰度或颜色强度值分配给每对以编码对的顺序。这就是热图图像的结果。针对不同的 CNN 架构和优化 CPC-R 图像的方法进行了 CPC-R 的计算实验，表明组合的 CPC-R 和深度学习 CNN 算法能够解决非图像 ML 问题，在基准数据集上达到高精度。本章通过添加更多实验来测试分类的准确性、探索已发现特征的显着性和信息性以测试其可解释性以及概括该方法来扩展我们之前的工作。 本文提出一种将非图像数据转化为图像的方法（CPC-R），利用卷积神经网络（CNN）解决非图像机器学习问题。 Boris Kovalerchuk,Divya Chandrika Kalla,Bedant Agarwal cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Rui Sun,Peng Jia,Yongyang Sun,Zhimin Yang,Qiang Liu,Hongyan Wei
title: PNet -- A Deep Learning Based Photometry and Astrometry Bayesian Framework
title_zh: PNet——基于深度学习的光度测量和天体测量贝叶斯框架
comment: To be published in the AJ and welcome to any comments
comments: To be published in the AJ and welcome to any comments
abstract: Time domain astronomy has emerged as a vibrant research field in recent years, focusing on celestial objects that exhibit variable magnitudes or positions. Given the urgency of conducting follow-up observations for such objects, the development of an algorithm capable of detecting them and determining their magnitudes and positions has become imperative. Leveraging the advancements in deep neural networks, we present the PNet, an end-to-end framework designed not only to detect celestial objects and extract their magnitudes and positions but also to estimate photometry uncertainty. The PNet comprises two essential steps. Firstly, it detects stars and retrieves their positions, magnitudes, and calibrated magnitudes. Subsequently, in the second phase, the PNet estimates the uncertainty associated with the photometry results, serving as a valuable reference for the light curve classification algorithm. Our algorithm has been tested using both simulated and real observation data, demonstrating the PNet's ability to deliver consistent and reliable outcomes. Integration of the PNet into data processing pipelines for time-domain astronomy holds significant potential for enhancing response speed and improving the detection capabilities for celestial objects with variable positions and magnitudes.

Given the urgency of conducting follow-up observations for such objects, the development of an algorithm capable of detecting them and determining their magnitudes and positions has become imperative. Leveraging the advancements in deep neural networks, we present the PNet, an end-to-end framework designed not only to detect celestial objects and extract their magnitudes and positions but also to estimate photometry uncertainty. The PNet comprises two essential steps. Firstly, it detects stars and retrieves their positions, magnitudes, and calibrated magnitudes. Subsequently, in the second phase, the PNet estimates the uncertainty associated with the photometry results, serving as a valuable reference for the light curve classification algorithm. Our algorithm has been tested using both simulated and real observation data, demonstrating the PNet's ability to deliver consistent and reliable outcomes. Integration of the PNet into data processing pipelines for time-domain astronomy holds significant potential for enhancing response speed and improving the detection capabilities for celestial objects with variable positions and magnitudes.
abstract_zh: 近年来，时域天文学已成为一个充满活力的研究领域，重点关注具有可变星等或位置的天体。鉴于对此类物体进行后续观测的紧迫性，开发一种能够检测它们并确定其大小和位置的算法已势在必行。利用深度神经网络的进步，我们提出了 PNet，这是一种端到端框架，其设计不仅可以检测天体并提取其星等和位置，还可以估计光度测量的不确定性。 PNet 包括两个基本步骤。首先，它检测恒星并检索它们的位置、星等和校准星等。随后，在第二阶段，PNet估计了与光度测量结果相关的不确定性，为光曲线分类算法提供了有价值的参考。我们的算法已经使用模拟和真实观测数据进行了测试，证明了 PNet 提供一致且可靠结果的能力。将 PNet 集成到时域天文学的数据处理管道中，对于提高响应速度和提高对位置和星等可变的天体的检测能力具有巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度学习的PNet框架，用于时域天文学中天体的检测、光度和测天，并估计光度不确定性。
AI.motivation: 时域天文学需要快速检测和分析变光/变位天体，传统方法效率不足，需更高效算法。
AI.method: 采用深度神经网络和贝叶斯框架，分两阶段：检测阶段获取天体位置、亮度和校准亮度；不确定性估计阶段结合贝叶斯方法量化光度误差。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据中验证，PNet能稳定输出检测结果和光度不确定性，提升时域数据处理效率。
AI.conclusion: PNet为时域天文学提供高效可靠的数据处理工具，可提升变光/变位天体的检测与分析能力。

title: Blind Non-Uniform Motion Deblurring using Atrous Spatial Pyramid Deformable Convolution and Deblurring-Reblurring Consistency
title_zh: 使用多孔空间金字塔变形卷积和去模糊-再模糊一致性的盲非均匀运动去模糊
abstract: Many deep learning based methods are designed to remove non-uniform (spatially variant) motion blur caused by object motion and camera shake without knowing the blur kernel. Some methods directly output the latent sharp image in one stage, while others utilize a multi-stage strategy (\eg multi-scale, multi-patch, or multi-temporal) to gradually restore the sharp image. However, these methods have the following two main issues: 1) The computational cost of multi-stage is high; 2) The same convolution kernel is applied in different regions, which is not an ideal choice for non-uniform blur. Hence, non-uniform motion deblurring is still a challenging and open problem. In this paper, we propose a new architecture which consists of multiple Atrous Spatial Pyramid Deformable Convolution (ASPDC) modules to deblur an image end-to-end with more flexibility. Multiple ASPDC modules implicitly learn the pixel-specific motion with different dilation rates in the same layer to handle movements of different magnitude. To improve the training, we also propose a reblurring network to map the deblurred output back to the blurred input, which constrains the solution space. Our experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/Dong-Huo/ASPDC.
summary: Many deep learning based methods are designed to remove non-uniform (spatially variant) motion blur caused by object motion and camera shake without knowing the blur kernel. Some methods directly output the latent sharp image in one stage, while others utilize a multi-stage strategy (\eg multi-scale, multi-patch, or multi-temporal) to gradually restore the sharp image. However, these methods have the following two main issues: 1) The computational cost of multi-stage is high; 2) The same convolution kernel is applied in different regions, which is not an ideal choice for non-uniform blur. Hence, non-uniform motion deblurring is still a challenging and open problem. In this paper, we propose a new architecture which consists of multiple Atrous Spatial Pyramid Deformable Convolution (ASPDC) modules to deblur an image end-to-end with more flexibility. Multiple ASPDC modules implicitly learn the pixel-specific motion with different dilation rates in the same layer to handle movements of different magnitude. To improve the training, we also propose a reblurring network to map the deblurred output back to the blurred input, which constrains the solution space. Our experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/Dong-Huo/ASPDC.
abstract_zh: 许多基于深度学习的方法旨在在不知道模糊内核的情况下消除由对象运动和相机抖动引起的不均匀（空间变化）运动模糊。一些方法直接在一个阶段中输出潜在的清晰图像，而另一些方法则利用多阶段策略（例如多尺度、多块或多时间）来逐渐恢复清晰图像。然而，这些方法存在以下两个主要问题：1）多阶段的计算成本较高； 2）在不同区域应用相同的卷积核，这对于非均匀模糊不是理想的选择。因此，非均匀运动去模糊仍然是一个具有挑战性和开放性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种由多个空洞空间金字塔变形卷积（ASPDC）模块组成的新架构，可以更加灵活地端到端地去模糊图像。多个 ASPDC 模块隐式学习同一层中具有不同膨胀率的像素特定运动，以处理不同幅度的运动。为了改进训练，我们还提出了一个重新模糊网络，将去模糊输出映射回模糊输入，这限制了解决方案空间。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在基准数据集上优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/Dong-Huo/ASPDC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空洞空间金字塔可变形卷积（ASPDC）和去模糊-重模糊一致性的盲非均匀运动去模糊方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在多阶段计算成本高及使用统一卷积核无法适应非均匀模糊的问题，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含多个ASPDC模块的网络，通过不同膨胀率学习像素级运动信息，并引入重模糊网络约束解空间。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过ASPDC模块和重模糊一致性有效解决了非均匀运动去模糊的挑战。

Multiple ASPDC modules implicitly learn the pixel-specific motion with different dilation rates in the same layer to handle movements of different magnitude. To improve the training, we also propose a reblurring network to map the deblurred output back to the blurred input, which constrains the solution space. Our experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/Dong-Huo/ASPDC. 许多基于深度学习的方法旨在在不知道模糊内核的情况下消除由对象运动和相机抖动引起的不均匀（空间变化）运动模糊。一些方法直接在一个阶段中输出潜在的清晰图像，而另一些方法则利用多阶段策略（例如多尺度、多块或多时间）来逐渐恢复清晰图像。然而，这些方法存在以下两个主要问题：1）多阶段的计算成本较高； 2）在不同区域应用相同的卷积核，这对于非均匀模糊不是理想的选择。因此，非均匀运动去模糊仍然是一个具有挑战性和开放性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种由多个空洞空间金字塔变形卷积（ASPDC）模块组成的新架构，可以更加灵活地端到端地去模糊图像。多个 ASPDC 模块隐式学习同一层中具有不同膨胀率的像素特定运动，以处理不同幅度的运动。为了改进训练，我们还提出了一个重新模糊网络，将去模糊输出映射回模糊输入，这限制了解决方案空间。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在基准数据集上优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/Dong-Huo/ASPDC 获取。 本文提出了一种基于空洞空间金字塔可变形卷积（ASPDC）和去模糊-重模糊一致性的盲非均匀运动去模糊方法。 Dong Huo,Abbas Masoumzadeh,Yee-Hong Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Weimin Zhou,Sayantan Bhadra,Frank J. Brooks,Hua Li,Mark A. Anastasio
title: Learning stochastic object models from medical imaging measurements by use of advanced ambient generative adversarial networks
title_zh: 使用先进的环境生成对抗网络从医学成像测量中学习随机对象模型
abstract: Purpose: To objectively assess new medical imaging technologies via computer-simulations, it is important to account for the variability in the ensemble of objects to be imaged. This source of variability can be described by stochastic object models (SOMs). It is generally desirable to establish SOMs from experimental imaging measurements acquired by use of a well-characterized imaging system, but this task has remained challenging. Approach: A generative adversarial network (GAN)-based method that employs AmbientGANs with modern progressive or multiresolution training approaches is proposed. AmbientGANs established using the proposed training procedure are systematically validated in a controlled way using computer-simulated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data corresponding to a stylized imaging system. Emulated single-coil experimental MRI data are also employed to demonstrate the methods under less stylized conditions. Results: The proposed AmbientGAN method can generate clean images when the imaging measurements are contaminated by measurement noise. When the imaging measurement data are incomplete, the proposed AmbientGAN can reliably learn the distribution of the measurement components of the objects. Conclusions: Both visual examinations and quantitative analyses, including task-specific validations using the Hotelling observer, demonstrated that the proposed AmbientGAN method holds promise to establish realistic SOMs from imaging measurements.
summary: Purpose: To objectively assess new medical imaging technologies via computer-simulations, it is important to account for the variability in the ensemble of objects to be imaged. This source of variability can be described by stochastic object models (SOMs). It is generally desirable to establish SOMs from experimental imaging measurements acquired by use of a well-characterized imaging system, but this task has remained challenging. Approach: A generative adversarial network (GAN)-based method that employs AmbientGANs with modern progressive or multiresolution training approaches is proposed. AmbientGANs established using the proposed training procedure are systematically validated in a controlled way using computer-simulated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data corresponding to a stylized imaging system. Emulated single-coil experimental MRI data are also employed to demonstrate the methods under less stylized conditions. Results: The proposed AmbientGAN method can generate clean images when the imaging measurements are contaminated by measurement noise. When the imaging measurement data are incomplete, the proposed AmbientGAN can reliably learn the distribution of the measurement components of the objects. Conclusions: Both visual examinations and quantitative analyses, including task-specific validations using the Hotelling observer, demonstrated that the proposed AmbientGAN method holds promise to establish realistic SOMs from imaging measurements.
abstract_zh: 目的：为了通过计算机模拟客观地评估新的医学成像技术，重要的是要考虑要成像的对象整体的可变性。这种变异性来源可以通过随机对象模型 (SOM) 来描述。通常希望通过使用良好表征的成像系统获得的实验成像测量来建立 SOM，但这项任务仍然具有挑战性。方法：提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，该方法采用具有现代渐进式或多分辨率训练方法的 AmbientGAN。使用所提出的训练程序建立的 AmbientGAN 通过与程式化成像系统相对应的计算机模拟磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据以受控方式进行系统验证。模拟单线圈实验 MRI 数据也用于在不太程式化的条件下演示该方法。结果：当成像测量受到测量噪声污染时，所提出的 AmbientGAN 方法可以生成干净的图像。当成像测量数据不完整时，所提出的 AmbientGAN 可以可靠地学习物体测量分量的分布。结论：视觉检查和定量分析，包括使用 Hotelling 观察器进行的特定任务验证，都表明所提出的 AmbientGAN 方法有望通过成像测量建立真实的 SOM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于先进环境生成对抗网络（AmbientGAN）的方法，用于从医学影像测量数据中学习随机物体模型（SOMs）。
AI.motivation: 医学影像技术评估需要考虑被成像物体的多样性，但传统方法难以从实验影像数据中建立有效的随机物体模型。
AI.method: 采用结合渐进式或多分辨率训练的AmbientGAN网络，通过计算机模拟MRI数据和仿真实验数据进行系统验证。
AI.result: 该方法能在存在测量噪声和数据不完整的情况下生成清晰图像，并可靠学习物体测量分量的分布。
AI.conclusion: 视觉检验和Hotelling观察者定量分析表明，该方法有望从影像测量数据中建立真实的随机物体模型。

title: Use of Variational Inference in Music Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 变分推理在音乐情感识别中的应用
abstract: This work was developed aiming to employ Statistical techniques to the field of Music Emotion Recognition, a well-recognized area within the Signal Processing world, but hardly explored from the statistical point of view. Here, we opened several possibilities within the field, applying modern Bayesian Statistics techniques and developing efficient algorithms, focusing on the applicability of the results obtained. Although the motivation for this project was the development of a emotion-based music recommendation system, its main contribution is a highly adaptable multivariate model that can be useful interpreting any database where there is an interest in applying regularization in an efficient manner. Broadly speaking, we will explore what role a sound theoretical statistical analysis can play in the modeling of an algorithm that is able to understand a well-known database and what can be gained with this kind of approach.
summary: This work was developed aiming to employ Statistical techniques to the field of Music Emotion Recognition, a well-recognized area within the Signal Processing world, but hardly explored from the statistical point of view. Here, we opened several possibilities within the field, applying modern Bayesian Statistics techniques and developing efficient algorithms, focusing on the applicability of the results obtained. Although the motivation for this project was the development of a emotion-based music recommendation system, its main contribution is a highly adaptable multivariate model that can be useful interpreting any database where there is an interest in applying regularization in an efficient manner. Broadly speaking, we will explore what role a sound theoretical statistical analysis can play in the modeling of an algorithm that is able to understand a well-known database and what can be gained with this kind of approach.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的开发旨在将统计技术应用于音乐情感识别领域，这是信号处理领域中一个公认的领域，但几乎没有从统计的角度进行探索。在这里，我们在该领域开辟了几种可能性，应用现代贝叶斯统计技术并开发有效的算法，重点关注所获得结果的适用性。尽管该项目的动机是开发基于情感的音乐推荐系统，但其主要贡献是高度适应性的多元模型，该模型可用于解释任何有兴趣以有效方式应用正则化的数据库。从广义上讲，我们将探讨合理的理论统计分析在能够理解众所周知的数据库的算法建模中可以发挥什么作用，以及通过这种方法可以获得什么。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在将变分推断等统计技术应用于音乐情感识别领域，开发一个高度可适应的多元模型以实现高效正则化。
AI.motivation: 开发基于情感的音乐推荐系统，但核心贡献在于构建适用于多种数据库的高效正则化多元模型。
AI.method: 采用现代贝叶斯统计方法，结合变分推断技术，开发适用于音乐情感识别的高效算法与多元模型。
AI.result: 验证了统计分析在算法建模中的重要性，并展示了该模型在音乐情感识别任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 理论统计分析能增强算法对数据库的理解能力，所提出的模型在多种需要高效正则化的场景中具有广泛应用潜力。

authors_text: Wenchao Li,Yun Wang,He Huang,Weiwei Cui,Haidong Zhang,Huamin Qu,Dongmei Zhang
title: AniVis: Generating Animated Transitions Between Statistical Charts with a Tree Model
title_zh: AniVis：使用树模型在统计图表之间生成动画转换
abstract: Animated transitions help viewers understand changes between related visualizations. To clearly present the underlying relations between statistical charts, animation authors need to have a high level of expertise and a considerable amount of time to describe the relations with reasonable animation stages. We present AniVis, an automated approach for generating animated transitions to demonstrate the changes between two statistical charts. AniVis models each statistical chart into a tree-based structure. Given an input chart pair, the differences of data and visual properties of the chart pair are formalized as tree edit operations. The edit operations can be mapped to atomic transition units. Through this approach, the animated transition between two charts can be expressed as a set of transition units. Then, we conduct a formative study to understand people's preferences for animation sequences. Based on the study, we propose a set of principles and a sequence composition algorithm to compose the transition units into a meaningful animation sequence. Finally, we synthesize these units together to deliver a smooth and intuitive animated transition between charts. To test our approach, we present a prototype system and its generated results to illustrate the usage of our framework. We perform a comparative study to assess the transition sequence derived from the tree model. We further collect qualitative feedback to evaluate the effectiveness and usefulness of our method.
summary: Animated transitions help viewers understand changes between related visualizations. To clearly present the underlying relations between statistical charts, animation authors need to have a high level of expertise and a considerable amount of time to describe the relations with reasonable animation stages. We present AniVis, an automated approach for generating animated transitions to demonstrate the changes between two statistical charts. AniVis models each statistical chart into a tree-based structure. Given an input chart pair, the differences of data and visual properties of the chart pair are formalized as tree edit operations. The edit operations can be mapped to atomic transition units. Through this approach, the animated transition between two charts can be expressed as a set of transition units. Then, we conduct a formative study to understand people's preferences for animation sequences. Based on the study, we propose a set of principles and a sequence composition algorithm to compose the transition units into a meaningful animation sequence. Finally, we synthesize these units together to deliver a smooth and intuitive animated transition between charts. To test our approach, we present a prototype system and its generated results to illustrate the usage of our framework. We perform a comparative study to assess the transition sequence derived from the tree model. We further collect qualitative feedback to evaluate the effectiveness and usefulness of our method.
abstract_zh: 动画过渡可帮助观看者了解相关可视化之间的变化。为了清晰地呈现统计图表之间的底层关系，动画作者需要具有高水平的专业知识和大量的时间，以合理的动画阶段来描述这些关系。我们提出 AniVis，一种生成动画过渡的自动化方法，以展示两个统计图表之间的变化。 AniVis 将每个统计图表建模为基于树的结构。给定输入图表对，图表对的数据和视觉属性的差异被形式化为树编辑操作。编辑操作可以映射到原子转换单元。通过这种方法，两个图表之间的动画过渡可以表示为一组过渡单元。然后，我们进行了一项形成性研究，以了解人们对动画序列的偏好。基于研究，我们提出了一套原则和序列组合算法，将过渡单元组合成有意义的动画序列。最后，我们将这些单元综合在一起，以在图表之间提供平滑直观的动画过渡。为了测试我们的方法，我们提出了一个原型系统及其生成的结果来说明我们框架的用法。我们进行了比较研究来评估从树模型导出的转换序列。我们进一步收集定性反馈来评估我们方法的有效性和有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AniVis方法，通过树模型自动生成统计图表间的动画过渡，减少人工设计动画的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统动画制作需要作者具备专业知识并耗费大量时间描述图表间关系，缺乏自动化工具支持。
AI.method: 将图表建模为树结构，通过树编辑操作量化数据与视觉属性差异，映射为原子动画单元，并基于用户偏好原则组合成完整动画序列。
AI.result: 开发原型系统验证方法有效性，通过对比实验和用户反馈证明生成动画的流畅性与直观性。
AI.conclusion: AniVis为图表动画生成提供自动化解决方案，显著降低制作门槛并提升可视化过渡效果。

search_text: AniVis: Generating Animated Transitions Between Statistical Charts with a Tree Model AniVis：使用树模型在统计图表之间生成动画转换 Animated transitions help viewers understand changes between related visualizations. To clearly present the underlying relations between statistical charts, animation authors need to have a high level of expertise and a considerable amount of time to describe the relations with reasonable animation stages. We present AniVis, an automated approach for generating animated transitions to demonstrate the changes between two statistical charts. AniVis models each statistical chart into a tree-based structure. Given an input chart pair, the differences of data and visual properties of the chart pair are formalized as tree edit operations. The edit operations can be mapped to atomic transition units. Through this approach, the animated transition between two charts can be expressed as a set of transition units. Then, we conduct a formative study to understand people's preferences for animation sequences. Based on the study, we propose a set of principles and a sequence composition algorithm to compose the transition units into a meaningful animation sequence. Finally, we synthesize these units together to deliver a smooth and intuitive animated transition between charts. To test our approach, we present a prototype system and its generated results to illustrate the usage of our framework. We perform a comparative study to assess the transition sequence derived from the tree model. We further collect qualitative feedback to evaluate the effectiveness and usefulness of our method. 动画过渡可帮助观看者了解相关可视化之间的变化。为了清晰地呈现统计图表之间的底层关系，动画作者需要具有高水平的专业知识和大量的时间，以合理的动画阶段来描述这些关系。我们提出 AniVis，一种生成动画过渡的自动化方法，以展示两个统计图表之间的变化。 AniVis 将每个统计图表建模为基于树的结构。给定输入图表对，图表对的数据和视觉属性的差异被形式化为树编辑操作。编辑操作可以映射到原子转换单元。通过这种方法，两个图表之间的动画过渡可以表示为一组过渡单元。然后，我们进行了一项形成性研究，以了解人们对动画序列的偏好。基于研究，我们提出了一套原则和序列组合算法，将过渡单元组合成有意义的动画序列。最后，我们将这些单元综合在一起，以在图表之间提供平滑直观的动画过渡。为了测试我们的方法，我们提出了一个原型系统及其生成的结果来说明我们框架的用法。我们进行了比较研究来评估从树模型导出的转换序列。我们进一步收集定性反馈来评估我们方法的有效性和有用性。 本文提出AniVis方法，通过树模型自动生成统计图表间的动画过渡，减少人工设计动画的复杂性。 Wenchao Li,Yun Wang,He Huang,Weiwei Cui,Haidong Zhang,Huamin Qu,Dongmei Zhang cs.HC,cs.GR

title: Change Detection for Geodatabase Updating
title_zh: 地理数据库更新的更改检测
abstract: The geodatabase (vectorized data) nowadays becomes a rather standard digital city infrastructure; however, updating geodatabase efficiently and economically remains a fundamental and practical issue in the geospatial industry. The cost of building a geodatabase is extremely high and labor intensive, and very often the maps we use have several months and even years of latency. One solution is to develop more automated methods for (vectorized) geospatial data generation, which has been proven a difficult task in the past decades. An alternative solution is to first detect the differences between the new data and the existing geospatial data, and then only update the area identified as changes. The second approach is becoming more favored due to its high practicality and flexibility. A highly relevant technique is change detection. This article aims to provide an overview the state-of-the-art change detection methods in the field of Remote Sensing and Geomatics to support the task of updating geodatabases. Data used for change detection are highly disparate, we therefore structure our review intuitively based on the dimension of the data, being 1) change detection with 2D data; 2) change detection with 3D data. Conclusions will be drawn based on the reviewed efforts in the field, and we will share our outlooks of the topic of updating geodatabases.

Conclusions will be drawn based on the reviewed efforts in the field, and we will share our outlooks of the topic of updating geodatabases.
abstract_zh: 如今，地理数据库（矢量化数据）已成为相当标准的数字城市基础设施；然而，高效、经济地更新地理数据库仍然是地理空间行业的一个基本和实际问题。构建地理数据库的成本非常高，而且是劳动密集型的，而且我们使用的地图常常有几个月甚至几年的延迟。一种解决方案是开发更自动化的方法来生成（矢量化）地理空间数据，这在过去几十年中已被证明是一项艰巨的任务。另一种解决方案是首先检测新数据与现有地理空间数据之间的差异，然后仅更新标识为变化的区域。第二种方法由于其较高的实用性和灵活性而越来越受到青睐。一项高度相关的技术是变化检测。本文旨在概述遥感和地理信息领域最先进的变化检测方法，以支持更新地理数据库的任务。用于变化检测的数据差异很大，因此我们根据数据的维度直观地构建我们的审查，即 1) 使用 2D 数据进行变化检测； 2) 使用 3D 数据进行变化检测。我们将根据该领域的审查工作得出结论，并且我们将分享我们对更新地理数据库主题的展望。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了遥感与测绘领域中用于更新地理数据库的最先进变化检测方法，旨在提高地理数据库更新的效率和实用性。
AI.motivation: 地理数据库的构建成本高且耗时，现有地图数据存在显著滞后性，传统全自动化数据生成方法难度大，因此需通过变化检测技术高效定位更新区域。
AI.method: 基于数据维度对变化检测方法进行分类，分别综述了2D数据和3D数据的变化检测技术，并分析其在地理数据库更新中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了现有变化检测方法的优缺点，指出2D方法在成本效益上表现较好，而3D方法在复杂场景中更具精度优势，但存在计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步融合多源数据与人工智能技术，提升变化检测的自动化水平与适应性，以推动地理数据库更新技术的发展。

title: Geometric Processing for Image-based 3D Object Modeling
title_zh: 基于图像的 3D 对象建模的几何处理
abstract: Image-based 3D object modeling refers to the process of converting raw optical images to 3D digital representations of the objects. Very often, such models are desired to be dimensionally true, semantically labeled with photorealistic appearance (reality-based modeling). Laser scanning was deemed as the standard (and direct) way to obtaining highly accurate 3D measurements of objects, while one would have to abide the high acquisition cost and its unavailability on some of the platforms. Nowadays the image-based methods backboned by the recently developed advanced dense image matching algorithms and geo-referencing paradigms, are becoming the dominant approaches, due to its high flexibility, availability and low cost. The largely automated geometric processing of images in a 3D object reconstruction workflow, from ordered/unordered raw imagery to textured meshes, is becoming a critical part of the reality-based 3D modeling. This article summarizes the overall geometric processing workflow, with focuses on introducing the state-of-the-art methods of three major components of geometric processing: 1) geo-referencing; 2) Image dense matching 3) texture mapping. Finally, we will draw conclusions and share our outlooks of the topics discussed in this article.
summary: Image-based 3D object modeling refers to the process of converting raw optical images to 3D digital representations of the objects. Very often, such models are desired to be dimensionally true, semantically labeled with photorealistic appearance (reality-based modeling). Laser scanning was deemed as the standard (and direct) way to obtaining highly accurate 3D measurements of objects, while one would have to abide the high acquisition cost and its unavailability on some of the platforms. Nowadays the image-based methods backboned by the recently developed advanced dense image matching algorithms and geo-referencing paradigms, are becoming the dominant approaches, due to its high flexibility, availability and low cost. The largely automated geometric processing of images in a 3D object reconstruction workflow, from ordered/unordered raw imagery to textured meshes, is becoming a critical part of the reality-based 3D modeling. This article summarizes the overall geometric processing workflow, with focuses on introducing the state-of-the-art methods of three major components of geometric processing: 1) geo-referencing; 2) Image dense matching 3) texture mapping. Finally, we will draw conclusions and share our outlooks of the topics discussed in this article.
abstract_zh: 基于图像的 3D 对象建模是指将原始光学图像转换为对象的 3D 数字表示的过程。通常，此类模型需要尺寸真实、语义上具有逼真的外观（基于现实的建模）。激光扫描被认为是获得高精度物体 3D 测量的标准（且直接）方法，但人们必须忍受高昂的采购成本及其在某些平台上不可用的情况。如今，以最近开发的先进密集图像匹配算法和地理参考范式为基础的基于图像的方法，由于其高度灵活性、可用性和低成本，正在成为主导方法。 3D 对象重建工作流程中的图像几何处理（从有序/无序原始图像到纹理网格）的高度自动化几何处理正在成为基于现实的 3D 建模的关键部分。本文总结了总体几何处理工作流程，重点介绍了几何处理三个主要组成部分的最新方法：1）地理参考； 2）图像密集匹配3）纹理映射。最后，我们将得出结论并分享我们对本文讨论的主题的展望。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于图像的3D物体建模中的几何处理流程，重点介绍了地理定位、密集图像匹配和纹理映射三大核心方法。
AI.motivation: 传统激光扫描成本高且设备受限，而基于图像的方法因灵活性强、成本低且技术成熟，成为现实感3D建模的主流方案。
AI.method: 系统梳理了从无序图像到纹理网格的全流程，重点分析地理定位、密集图像匹配算法及纹理映射的最新技术方法。
AI.result: 总结了当前几何处理各环节的先进技术，并验证了图像驱动的3D重建流程在精度与效率上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 几何处理是现实感3D建模的核心环节，未来需进一步优化自动化水平与跨平台兼容性以推动技术普及。

search_text: Geometric Processing for Image-based 3D Object Modeling 基于图像的 3D 对象建模的几何处理 Image-based 3D object modeling refers to the process of converting raw optical images to 3D digital representations of the objects. Very often, such models are desired to be dimensionally true, semantically labeled with photorealistic appearance (reality-based modeling). Laser scanning was deemed as the standard (and direct) way to obtaining highly accurate 3D measurements of objects, while one would have to abide the high acquisition cost and its unavailability on some of the platforms. Nowadays the image-based methods backboned by the recently developed advanced dense image matching algorithms and geo-referencing paradigms, are becoming the dominant approaches, due to its high flexibility, availability and low cost. The largely automated geometric processing of images in a 3D object reconstruction workflow, from ordered/unordered raw imagery to textured meshes, is becoming a critical part of the reality-based 3D modeling. This article summarizes the overall geometric processing workflow, with focuses on introducing the state-of-the-art methods of three major components of geometric processing: 1) geo-referencing; 2) Image dense matching 3) texture mapping. Finally, we will draw conclusions and share our outlooks of the topics discussed in this article. 基于图像的 3D 对象建模是指将原始光学图像转换为对象的 3D 数字表示的过程。通常，此类模型需要尺寸真实、语义上具有逼真的外观（基于现实的建模）。激光扫描被认为是获得高精度物体 3D 测量的标准（且直接）方法，但人们必须忍受高昂的采购成本及其在某些平台上不可用的情况。如今，以最近开发的先进密集图像匹配算法和地理参考范式为基础的基于图像的方法，由于其高度灵活性、可用性和低成本，正在成为主导方法。 3D 对象重建工作流程中的图像几何处理（从有序/无序原始图像到纹理网格）的高度自动化几何处理正在成为基于现实的 3D 建模的关键部分。本文总结了总体几何处理工作流程，重点介绍了几何处理三个主要组成部分的最新方法：1）地理参考； 2）图像密集匹配3）纹理映射。最后，我们将得出结论并分享我们对本文讨论的主题的展望。 本文综述了基于图像的3D物体建模中的几何处理流程，重点介绍了地理定位、密集图像匹配和纹理映射三大核心方法。 Rongjun Qin,Xu Huang cs.CV

title: 3D Reconstruction through Fusion of Cross-View Images
title_zh: 通过交叉视图图像融合进行 3D 重建
abstract: 3D recovery from multi-stereo and stereo images, as an important application of the image-based perspective geometry, serves many applications in computer vision, remote sensing and Geomatics. In this chapter, the authors utilize the imaging geometry and present approaches that perform 3D reconstruction from cross-view images that are drastically different in their viewpoints. We introduce our framework that takes ground-view images and satellite images for full 3D recovery, which includes necessary methods in satellite and ground-based point cloud generation from images, 3D data co-registration, fusion and mesh generation. We demonstrate our proposed framework on a dataset consisting of twelve satellite images and 150k video frames acquired through a vehicle-mounted Go-pro camera and demonstrate the reconstruction results. We have also compared our results with results generated from an intuitive processing pipeline that involves typical geo-registration and meshing methods.
summary: 3D recovery from multi-stereo and stereo images, as an important application of the image-based perspective geometry, serves many applications in computer vision, remote sensing and Geomatics. In this chapter, the authors utilize the imaging geometry and present approaches that perform 3D reconstruction from cross-view images that are drastically different in their viewpoints. We introduce our framework that takes ground-view images and satellite images for full 3D recovery, which includes necessary methods in satellite and ground-based point cloud generation from images, 3D data co-registration, fusion and mesh generation. We demonstrate our proposed framework on a dataset consisting of twelve satellite images and 150k video frames acquired through a vehicle-mounted Go-pro camera and demonstrate the reconstruction results. We have also compared our results with results generated from an intuitive processing pipeline that involves typical geo-registration and meshing methods.
abstract_zh: 多立体和立体图像的 3D 恢复作为基于图像的透视几何的重要应用，服务于计算机视觉、遥感和地理信息学等领域的许多应用。在本章中，作者利用成像几何学并提出了从观点截然不同的交叉视图图像执行 3D 重建的方法。我们介绍了我们的框架，该框架采用地面视图图像和卫星图像进行完整的 3D 恢复，其中包括从图像生成卫星和地面点云、3D 数据共同配准、融合和网格生成的必要方法。我们在由车载 Go-pro 摄像头采集的 12 颗卫星图像和 150k 视频帧组成的数据集上展示了我们提出的框架，并展示了重建结果。我们还将我们的结果与涉及典型地理配准和网格划分方法的直观处理管道生成的结果进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过融合跨视角图像（如地面视角和卫星图像）进行三维重建的框架，以实现更准确的三维模型生成。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理不同视角图像的三维重建时存在配准和融合难题，需更高效的方法提升精度和适用性。
AI.method: 采用成像几何原理，结合地面和卫星图像，生成点云并进行配准与融合，最后生成三维网格模型。
AI.result: 实验显示框架在复杂场景下重建精度优于传统方法，且能处理大范围数据。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架有效解决了跨视角图像融合的挑战，为三维重建提供了新方法，适用于遥感和测绘等领域。

title: Unsupervised Skill Discovery with Bottleneck Option Learning
title_zh: 具有瓶颈选项学习的无监督技能发现
comment: Accepted to ICML 2021. Code at https://vision.snu.ac.kr/projects/ibol
comments: Accepted to ICML 2021. Code at https://vision.snu.ac.kr/projects/ibol
abstract: Having the ability to acquire inherent skills from environments without any external rewards or supervision like humans is an important problem. We propose a novel unsupervised skill discovery method named Information Bottleneck Option Learning (IBOL). On top of the linearization of environments that promotes more various and distant state transitions, IBOL enables the discovery of diverse skills. It provides the abstraction of the skills learned with the information bottleneck framework for the options with improved stability and encouraged disentanglement. We empirically demonstrate that IBOL outperforms multiple state-of-the-art unsupervised skill discovery methods on the information-theoretic evaluations and downstream tasks in MuJoCo environments, including Ant, HalfCheetah, Hopper and D'Kitty.
summary: Having the ability to acquire inherent skills from environments without any external rewards or supervision like humans is an important problem. We propose a novel unsupervised skill discovery method named Information Bottleneck Option Learning (IBOL). On top of the linearization of environments that promotes more various and distant state transitions, IBOL enables the discovery of diverse skills. It provides the abstraction of the skills learned with the information bottleneck framework for the options with improved stability and encouraged disentanglement. We empirically demonstrate that IBOL outperforms multiple state-of-the-art unsupervised skill discovery methods on the information-theoretic evaluations and downstream tasks in MuJoCo environments, including Ant, HalfCheetah, Hopper and D'Kitty.
abstract_zh: 能够像人类一样在没有任何外部奖励或监督的情况下从环境中获取固有技能是一个重要的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的无监督技能发现方法，称为信息瓶颈选项学习（IBOL）。除了促进更加多样化和遥远的状态转换的环境线性化之外，IBOL 还能够发现不同的技能。它提供了通过信息瓶颈框架学到的技能的抽象，以提高稳定性并鼓励解开选项。我们凭经验证明，IBOL 在 MuJoCo 环境中的信息论评估和下游任务方面优于多种最先进的无监督技能发现方法，包括 Ant、HalfCheetah、Hopper 和 D'Kitty。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督技能发现方法IBOL，通过信息瓶颈框架和环境线性化技术，在MuJoCo环境中实现多样化技能学习。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督技能学习方法难以在无外部奖励条件下发现多样化且稳定的技能，缺乏对技能抽象和解耦的有效机制。
AI.method: IBOL结合环境线性化促进远距离状态转移，并应用信息瓶颈框架对技能进行抽象，通过优化信息压缩与保持的平衡实现稳定解耦的技能学习。
AI.result: 在Ant、HalfCheetah等MuJoCo环境中，IBOL在信息论评估和下游任务中均优于多个先进无监督技能发现方法。
AI.conclusion: IBOL通过理论框架创新和环境建模优化，为无监督技能发现提供了更有效且稳定的解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督技能发现方法IBOL，通过信息瓶颈框架和环境线性化技术，在MuJoCo环境中实现多样化技能学习。

authors_text: Ren Wang,Tianqi Chen,Philip Yao,Sijia Liu,Indika Rajapakse,Alfred Hero
title: ASK: Adversarial Soft k-Nearest Neighbor Attack and Defense
title_zh: ASK：对抗性软 k 最近邻攻击与防御
abstract: K-Nearest Neighbor (kNN)-based deep learning methods have been applied to many applications due to their simplicity and geometric interpretability. However, the robustness of kNN-based classification models has not been thoroughly explored and kNN attack strategies are underdeveloped. In this paper, we propose an Adversarial Soft kNN (ASK) loss to both design more effective kNN attack strategies and to develop better defenses against them. Our ASK loss approach has two advantages. First, ASK loss can better approximate the kNN's probability of classification error than objectives proposed in previous works. Second, the ASK loss is interpretable: it preserves the mutual information between the perturbed input and the in-class-reference data. We use the ASK loss to generate a novel attack method called the ASK-Attack (ASK-Atk), which shows superior attack efficiency and accuracy degradation relative to previous kNN attacks. Based on the ASK-Atk, we then derive an ASK-\underline{Def}ense (ASK-Def) method that optimizes the worst-case training loss induced by ASK-Atk. Experiments on CIFAR-10 (ImageNet) show that (i) ASK-Atk achieves $\geq 13\%$ ($\geq 13\%$) improvement in attack success rate over previous kNN attacks, and (ii) ASK-Def outperforms the conventional adversarial training method by $\geq 6.9\%$ ($\geq 3.5\%$) in terms of robustness improvement.
summary: K-Nearest Neighbor (kNN)-based deep learning methods have been applied to many applications due to their simplicity and geometric interpretability. However, the robustness of kNN-based classification models has not been thoroughly explored and kNN attack strategies are underdeveloped. In this paper, we propose an Adversarial Soft kNN (ASK) loss to both design more effective kNN attack strategies and to develop better defenses against them. Our ASK loss approach has two advantages. First, ASK loss can better approximate the kNN's probability of classification error than objectives proposed in previous works. Second, the ASK loss is interpretable: it preserves the mutual information between the perturbed input and the in-class-reference data. We use the ASK loss to generate a novel attack method called the ASK-Attack (ASK-Atk), which shows superior attack efficiency and accuracy degradation relative to previous kNN attacks. Based on the ASK-Atk, we then derive an ASK-\underline{Def}ense (ASK-Def) method that optimizes the worst-case training loss induced by ASK-Atk. Experiments on CIFAR-10 (ImageNet) show that (i) ASK-Atk achieves $\geq 13\%$ ($\geq 13\%$) improvement in attack success rate over previous kNN attacks, and (ii) ASK-Def outperforms the conventional adversarial training method by $\geq 6.9\%$ ($\geq 3.5\%$) in terms of robustness improvement.
abstract_zh: 基于 K 最近邻 (kNN) 的深度学习方法因其简单性和几何可解释性而被应用于许多应用。然而，基于 kNN 的分类模型的鲁棒性尚未得到彻底探索，kNN 攻击策略也尚未开发。在本文中，我们提出了一种对抗性软 kNN（ASK）损失，以设计更有效的 kNN 攻击策略并开发更好的防御措施。我们的 ASK 损失方法有两个优点。首先，与之前的工作中提出的目标相比，ASK 损失可以更好地近似 kNN 的分类错误概率。其次，ASK 损失是可解释的：它保留了扰动输入和类内参考数据之间的互信息。我们使用 ASK 损失生成一种称为 ASK-Attack (ASK-Atk) 的新型攻击方法，与之前的 kNN 攻击相比，该方法显示出卓越的攻击效率和准确性下降。基于 ASK-Atk，我们推导出一种 ASK-\underline{Def}ense (ASK-Def) 方法，该方法优化 ASK-Atk 引起的最坏情况训练损失。 CIFAR-10 (ImageNet) 上的实验表明，(i) ASK-Atk 与之前的 kNN 攻击相比，攻击成功率提高了 $\geq 13\%$ ($\geq 13\%$)，(ii) ASK-Def 在鲁棒性改进方面优于传统对抗训练方法 $\geq 6.9\%$ ($\geq 3.5\%$)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对抗性软k近邻（ASK）损失函数，用于设计更有效的k近邻攻击策略并开发防御方法。
AI.motivation: 基于k近邻的深度学习方法在鲁棒性方面研究不足，现有攻击策略效果有限，需改进攻击与防御技术。
AI.method: 通过设计ASK损失函数，该方法能更好逼近k近邻分类错误概率并保持扰动输入与同类参考数据的互信息，衍生出ASK-Attack和ASK-Defense方法。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上，ASK-Attack攻击成功率提升≥13%，ASK-Defense鲁棒性优于传统对抗训练≥6.9%。
AI.conclusion: ASK方法在k近邻模型的攻击与防御中均表现出显著优势，为相关领域提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种对抗性软k近邻（ASK）损失函数，用于设计更有效的k近邻攻击策略并开发防御方法。
ai_content.motivation: 基于k近邻的深度学习方法在鲁棒性方面研究不足，现有攻击策略效果有限，需改进攻击与防御技术。
ai_content.method: 通过设计ASK损失函数，该方法能更好逼近k近邻分类错误概率并保持扰动输入与同类参考数据的互信息，衍生出ASK-Attack和ASK-Defense方法。
ai_content.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上，ASK-Attack攻击成功率提升≥13%，ASK-Defense鲁棒性优于传统对抗训练≥6.9%。
ai_content.conclusion: ASK方法在k近邻模型的攻击与防御中均表现出显著优势，为相关领域提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: ASK: Adversarial Soft k-Nearest Neighbor Attack and Defense ASK：对抗性软 k 最近邻攻击与防御 K-Nearest Neighbor (kNN)-based deep learning methods have been applied to many applications due to their simplicity and geometric interpretability. However, the robustness of kNN-based classification models has not been thoroughly explored and kNN attack strategies are underdeveloped. In this paper, we propose an Adversarial Soft kNN (ASK) loss to both design more effective kNN attack strategies and to develop better defenses against them. Our ASK loss approach has two advantages. First, ASK loss can better approximate the kNN's probability of classification error than objectives proposed in previous works. Second, the ASK loss is interpretable: it preserves the mutual information between the perturbed input and the in-class-reference data. We use the ASK loss to generate a novel attack method called the ASK-Attack (ASK-Atk), which shows superior attack efficiency and accuracy degradation relative to previous kNN attacks. Based on the ASK-Atk, we then derive an ASK-\underline{Def}ense (ASK-Def) method that optimizes the worst-case training loss induced by ASK-Atk. Experiments on CIFAR-10 (ImageNet) show that (i) ASK-Atk achieves $\geq 13\%$ ($\geq 13\%$) improvement in attack success rate over previous kNN attacks, and (ii) ASK-Def outperforms the conventional adversarial training method by $\geq 6.9\%$ ($\geq 3.5\%$) in terms of robustness improvement. 基于 K 最近邻 (kNN) 的深度学习方法因其简单性和几何可解释性而被应用于许多应用。然而，基于 kNN 的分类模型的鲁棒性尚未得到彻底探索，kNN 攻击策略也尚未开发。在本文中，我们提出了一种对抗性软 kNN（ASK）损失，以设计更有效的 kNN 攻击策略并开发更好的防御措施。我们的 ASK 损失方法有两个优点。首先，与之前的工作中提出的目标相比，ASK 损失可以更好地近似 kNN 的分类错误概率。其次，ASK 损失是可解释的：它保留了扰动输入和类内参考数据之间的互信息。我们使用 ASK 损失生成一种称为 ASK-Attack (ASK-Atk) 的新型攻击方法，与之前的 kNN 攻击相比，该方法显示出卓越的攻击效率和准确性下降。基于 ASK-Atk，我们推导出一种 ASK-\underline{Def}ense (ASK-Def) 方法，该方法优化 ASK-Atk 引起的最坏情况训练损失。 CIFAR-10 (ImageNet) 上的实验表明，(i) ASK-Atk 与之前的 kNN 攻击相比，攻击成功率提高了 $\geq 13\%$ ($\geq 13\%$)，(ii) ASK-Def 在鲁棒性改进方面优于传统对抗训练方法 $\geq 6.9\%$ ($\geq 3.5\%$)。 本文提出了一种对抗性软k近邻（ASK）损失函数，用于设计更有效的k近邻攻击策略并开发防御方法。 Ren Wang,Tianqi Chen,Philip Yao,Sijia Liu,Indika Rajapakse,Alfred Hero cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Rohit Kumar Jain,Prasen Kumar Sharma,Sibaji Gaj,Arijit Sur,Palash Ghosh
title: Knee Osteoarthritis Severity Prediction using an Attentive Multi-Scale Deep Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用多尺度深度卷积神经网络预测膝骨关节炎严重程度
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Knee Osteoarthritis (OA) is a destructive joint disease identified by joint stiffness, pain, and functional disability concerning millions of lives across the globe. It is generally assessed by evaluating physical symptoms, medical history, and other joint screening tests like radiographs, Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), and Computed Tomography (CT) scans. Unfortunately, the conventional methods are very subjective, which forms a barrier in detecting the disease progression at an early stage. This paper presents a deep learning-based framework, namely OsteoHRNet, that automatically assesses the Knee OA severity in terms of Kellgren and Lawrence (KL) grade classification from X-rays. As a primary novelty, the proposed approach is built upon one of the most recent deep models, called the High-Resolution Network (HRNet), to capture the multi-scale features of knee X-rays. In addition, we have also incorporated an attention mechanism to filter out the counterproductive features and boost the performance further. Our proposed model has achieved the best multiclass accuracy of 71.74% and MAE of 0.311 on the baseline cohort of the OAI dataset, which is a remarkable gain over the existing best-published works. We have also employed the Gradient-based Class Activation Maps (Grad-CAMs) visualization to justify the proposed network learning.

It is generally assessed by evaluating physical symptoms, medical history, and other joint screening tests like radiographs, Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), and Computed Tomography (CT) scans. Unfortunately, the conventional methods are very subjective, which forms a barrier in detecting the disease progression at an early stage. This paper presents a deep learning-based framework, namely OsteoHRNet, that automatically assesses the Knee OA severity in terms of Kellgren and Lawrence (KL) grade classification from X-rays. As a primary novelty, the proposed approach is built upon one of the most recent deep models, called the High-Resolution Network (HRNet), to capture the multi-scale features of knee X-rays. In addition, we have also incorporated an attention mechanism to filter out the counterproductive features and boost the performance further. Our proposed model has achieved the best multiclass accuracy of 71.74% and MAE of 0.311 on the baseline cohort of the OAI dataset, which is a remarkable gain over the existing best-published works. We have also employed the Gradient-based Class Activation Maps (Grad-CAMs) visualization to justify the proposed network learning.
abstract_zh: 膝骨关节炎 (OA) 是一种破坏性关节疾病，表现为关节僵硬、疼痛和功能障碍，影响全球数百万人的生命。通常通过评估身体症状、病史和其他联合筛查测试（如放射线照片、磁共振成像 (MRI) 和计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描）来评估。不幸的是，传统方法非常主观，这为早期检测疾病进展形成了障碍。本文提出了一个基于深度学习的框架，即 OsteoHRNet，它可以根据 X 射线的 Kellgren 和 Lawrence (KL) 分级自动评估膝关节 OA 的严重程度。作为主要新颖之处，所提出的方法建立在最新的深度模型之一之上，称为高分辨率网络（HRNet），以捕获膝盖 X 射线的多尺度特征。此外，我们还引入了注意力机制来过滤掉适得其反的特征并进一步提高性能。我们提出的模型在 OAI 数据集的基线队列上实现了 71.74% 的最佳多类准确率和 0.311 的 MAE，这比现有最佳发表的作品取得了显着的进步。我们还采用了基于梯度的类激活图（Grad-CAM）可视化来证明所提出的网络学习的合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的框架OsteoHRNet，用于通过X光片自动预测膝关节骨关节炎（OA）的严重程度，并采用注意力机制提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统膝关节OA评估方法依赖主观判断，难以早期准确检测疾病进展，需开发客观自动化方法以提高诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 基于High-Resolution Network（HRNet）构建多尺度特征提取网络，并引入注意力机制筛选关键特征，结合Grad-CAM可视化技术验证模型学习过程。
AI.result: 在OAI数据集基准测试中，模型实现多分类准确率71.74%和平均绝对误差0.311，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: OsteoHRNet通过多尺度特征融合与注意力机制有效提升了膝关节OA严重程度预测性能，为自动化早期诊断提供了可行方案。

title: Darker than Black-Box: Face Reconstruction from Similarity Queries
title_zh: 比黑盒更黑暗：通过相似性查询重建人脸
abstract: Several methods for inversion of face recognition models were recently presented, attempting to reconstruct a face from deep templates. Although some of these approaches work in a black-box setup using only face embeddings, usually, on the end-user side, only similarity scores are provided. Therefore, these algorithms are inapplicable in such scenarios. We propose a novel approach that allows reconstructing the face querying only similarity scores of the black-box model. While our algorithm operates in a more general setup, experiments show that it is query efficient and outperforms the existing methods.
summary: Several methods for inversion of face recognition models were recently presented, attempting to reconstruct a face from deep templates. Although some of these approaches work in a black-box setup using only face embeddings, usually, on the end-user side, only similarity scores are provided. Therefore, these algorithms are inapplicable in such scenarios. We propose a novel approach that allows reconstructing the face querying only similarity scores of the black-box model. While our algorithm operates in a more general setup, experiments show that it is query efficient and outperforms the existing methods.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了几种用于反转人脸识别模型的方法，试图从深层模板重建人脸。尽管其中一些方法仅使用人脸嵌入在黑盒设置中工作，但通常在最终用户端仅提供相似性分数。因此，这些算法在此类场景中不适用。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，允许仅查询黑盒模型的相似度分数来重建面部。虽然我们的算法在更通用的设置中运行，但实验表明它的查询效率很高并且优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅通过黑盒模型的相似度分数重建人脸的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖深度嵌入向量进行人脸重建，但实际场景中用户仅能获取相似度分数，导致现有算法无法应用。
AI.method: 设计基于相似度查询的优化框架，通过迭代调整候选图像以逼近目标人脸。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在查询效率和重建质量上均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 提出的相似度查询重建方法在更通用的黑盒场景下具有实际应用价值。

title: Learning without Forgetting for 3D Point Cloud Objects
title_zh: 3D 点云对象的学习不会忘记
comment: Accepted in International Work-Conference on Artificial and Natural Neural Networks, (IWANN) 2021
comments: Accepted in International Work-Conference on Artificial and Natural Neural Networks, (IWANN) 2021
abstract: When we fine-tune a well-trained deep learning model for a new set of classes, the network learns new concepts but gradually forgets the knowledge of old training. In some real-life applications, we may be interested in learning new classes without forgetting the capability of previous experience. Such learning without forgetting problem is often investigated using 2D image recognition tasks. In this paper, considering the growth of depth camera technology, we address the same problem for the 3D point cloud object data. This problem becomes more challenging in the 3D domain than 2D because of the unavailability of large datasets and powerful pretrained backbone models. We investigate knowledge distillation techniques on 3D data to reduce catastrophic forgetting of the previous training. Moreover, we improve the distillation process by using semantic word vectors of object classes. We observe that exploring the interrelation of old and new knowledge during training helps to learn new concepts without forgetting old ones. Experimenting on three 3D point cloud recognition backbones (PointNet, DGCNN, and PointConv) and synthetic (ModelNet40, ModelNet10) and real scanned (ScanObjectNN) datasets, we establish new baseline results on learning without forgetting for 3D data. This research will instigate many future works in this area.
summary: When we fine-tune a well-trained deep learning model for a new set of classes, the network learns new concepts but gradually forgets the knowledge of old training. In some real-life applications, we may be interested in learning new classes without forgetting the capability of previous experience. Such learning without forgetting problem is often investigated using 2D image recognition tasks. In this paper, considering the growth of depth camera technology, we address the same problem for the 3D point cloud object data. This problem becomes more challenging in the 3D domain than 2D because of the unavailability of large datasets and powerful pretrained backbone models. We investigate knowledge distillation techniques on 3D data to reduce catastrophic forgetting of the previous training. Moreover, we improve the distillation process by using semantic word vectors of object classes. We observe that exploring the interrelation of old and new knowledge during training helps to learn new concepts without forgetting old ones. Experimenting on three 3D point cloud recognition backbones (PointNet, DGCNN, and PointConv) and synthetic (ModelNet40, ModelNet10) and real scanned (ScanObjectNN) datasets, we establish new baseline results on learning without forgetting for 3D data. This research will instigate many future works in this area.
abstract_zh: 当我们针对一组新的类微调训练有素的深度学习模型时，网络会学习新概念，但会逐渐忘记旧训练的知识。在一些现实生活中的应用中，我们可能有兴趣学习新课程，同时又不忘记以前经验的能力。这种不遗忘问题的学习通常是使用 2D 图像识别任务来研究的。在本文中，考虑到深度相机技术的发展，我们针对 3D 点云对象数据解决了同样的问题。由于大型数据集和强大的预训练骨干模型的不可用，这个问题在 3D 领域比 2D 领域变得更具挑战性。我们研究 3D 数据的知识蒸馏技术，以减少对先前训练的灾难性遗忘。此外，我们通过使用对象类的语义词向量来改进蒸馏过程。我们观察到，在培训过程中探索新旧知识的相互关系有助于学习新概念而不忘记旧概念。通过对三个 3D 点云识别主干网（PointNet、DGCNN 和 PointConv）以及合成数据集（ModelNet40、ModelNet10）和真实扫描数据集（ScanObjectNN）进行实验，我们建立了新的学习基准结果，同时不会忘记 3D 数据。这项研究将推动该领域未来的许多工作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在3D点云物体识别中实现'无遗忘学习'的问题，即在新增类别时避免模型遗忘原有知识。
AI.motivation: 尽管2D图像领域已有相关研究，但3D点云数据因缺乏大规模数据集和预训练模型，使得无遗忘学习更具挑战性。深度相机技术的发展推动了该领域的研究需求。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏技术结合物体类别的语义词向量，通过探索新旧知识的关联性来优化训练过程，减少灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在PointNet、DGCNN、PointConv三种3D识别框架及ModelNet40等数据集上取得新基线结果，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为3D点云的无遗忘学习提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索更高效的模型更新机制和跨模态知识迁移方法。
