title: Learning Mesh Representations via Binary Space Partitioning Tree Networks
title_zh: 通过二元空间划分树网络学习网格表示
comment: Accepted to TPAMI. This is the extended journal version of BSP-Net (arXiv:1911.06971) from CVPR 2020
comments: Accepted to TPAMI. This is the extended journal version of BSP-Net (arXiv:1911.06971) from CVPR 2020
abstract: Polygonal meshes are ubiquitous, but have only played a relatively minor role in the deep learning revolution. State-of-the-art neural generative models for 3D shapes learn implicit functions and generate meshes via expensive iso-surfacing. We overcome these challenges by employing a classical spatial data structure from computer graphics, Binary Space Partitioning (BSP), to facilitate 3D learning. The core operation of BSP involves recursive subdivision of 3D space to obtain convex sets. By exploiting this property, we devise BSP-Net, a network that learns to represent a 3D shape via convex decomposition without supervision. The network is trained to reconstruct a shape using a set of convexes obtained from a BSP-tree built over a set of planes, where the planes and convexes are both defined by learned network weights. BSP-Net directly outputs polygonal meshes from the inferred convexes. The generated meshes are watertight, compact (i.e., low-poly), and well suited to represent sharp geometry. We show that the reconstruction quality by BSP-Net is competitive with those from state-of-the-art methods while using much fewer primitives. We also explore variations to BSP-Net including using a more generic decoder for reconstruction, more general primitives than planes, as well as training a generative model with variational auto-encoders. Code is available at https://github.com/czq142857/BSP-NET-original.
summary: Polygonal meshes are ubiquitous, but have only played a relatively minor role in the deep learning revolution. State-of-the-art neural generative models for 3D shapes learn implicit functions and generate meshes via expensive iso-surfacing. We overcome these challenges by employing a classical spatial data structure from computer graphics, Binary Space Partitioning (BSP), to facilitate 3D learning. The core operation of BSP involves recursive subdivision of 3D space to obtain convex sets. By exploiting this property, we devise BSP-Net, a network that learns to represent a 3D shape via convex decomposition without supervision. The network is trained to reconstruct a shape using a set of convexes obtained from a BSP-tree built over a set of planes, where the planes and convexes are both defined by learned network weights. BSP-Net directly outputs polygonal meshes from the inferred convexes. The generated meshes are watertight, compact (i.e., low-poly), and well suited to represent sharp geometry. We show that the reconstruction quality by BSP-Net is competitive with those from state-of-the-art methods while using much fewer primitives. We also explore variations to BSP-Net including using a more generic decoder for reconstruction, more general primitives than planes, as well as training a generative model with variational auto-encoders. Code is available at https://github.com/czq142857/BSP-NET-original.
abstract_zh: 多边形网格无处不在，但在深度学习革命中只发挥了相对较小的作用。最先进的 3D 形状神经生成模型可以学习隐式函数并通过昂贵的等值曲面生成网格。我们通过采用计算机图形学中的经典空间数据结构、二进制空间分区 (BSP) 来促进 3D 学习，从而克服了这些挑战。 BSP的核心操作涉及3D空间的递归细分以获得凸集。通过利用这一特性，我们设计了 BSP-Net，这是一种无需监督即可通过凸分解学习表示 3D 形状的网络。网络经过训练，可以使用从在一组平面上构建的 BSP 树获得的一组凸面来重建形状，其中平面和凸面均由学习到的网络权重定义。 BSP-Net 直接从推断的凸面输出多边形网格。生成的网格是防水的、紧凑的（即低多边形），并且非常适合表示锐利的几何体。我们表明，BSP-Net 的重建质量与最先进的方法相比具有竞争力，同时使用的基元少得多。我们还探索了 BSP-Net 的变体，包括使用更通用的解码器进行重建、比平面更通用的原语，以及使用变分自动编码器训练生成模型。代码可在 https://github.com/czq142857/BSP-NET-original 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二叉空间分割树（BSP）的神经网络BSP-Net，用于无监督学习3D形状的凸分解表示，直接生成紧凑且精确的多边形网格。
AI.motivation: 传统3D形状生成方法依赖隐式函数和耗时的等值面提取，而多边形网格在深度学习中应用有限。本文旨在通过计算机图形学中的BSP结构，实现高效且无需监督的3D网格表示学习。
AI.method: 设计BSP-Net网络，利用BSP树递归分割空间为凸集，通过学习平面参数和凸集权重直接生成网格。采用无监督训练策略，探索通用解码器、非平面基元及变分自编码器的扩展方法。
AI.result: 生成的网格具有watertight特性且低多边形数量，重建质量与现有方法相当但使用更少基元。实验验证了方法在尖锐几何表示上的有效性，并展示了扩展方法的潜力。
AI.conclusion: BSP-Net通过凸分解实现了高效的3D网格表示，为无监督学习提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化基元类型和生成多样性。

authors_text: Sidra Zafar,Mohsin Nazir,Taimur Bakhshi,Hasan Ali Khattak,Sarmadullah Khan,Muhammad Bilal,Kim-Kwang Raymond Choo,Kyung-Sup Kwak7,Aneeqa Sabah
title: A Systematic Review of Bio-Cyber Interface Technologies and Security Issues for Internet of Bio-Nano Things
title_zh: 生物网络接口技术和生物纳米物联网安全问题的系统综述
abstract: Advances in synthetic biology and nanotechnology have contributed to the design of tools that can be used to control, reuse, modify, and re-engineer cells' structure, as well as enabling engineers to effectively use biological cells as programmable substrates to realize Bio-Nano Things (biological embedded computing devices). Bio-NanoThings are generally tiny, non-intrusive, and concealable devices that can be used for in-vivo applications such as intra-body sensing and actuation networks, where the use of artificial devices can be detrimental. Such (nano-scale) devices can be used in various healthcare settings such as continuous health monitoring, targeted drug delivery, and nano-surgeries. These services can also be grouped to form a collaborative network (i.e., nanonetwork), whose performance can potentially be improved when connected to higher bandwidth external networks such as the Internet, say via 5G. However, to realize the IoBNT paradigm, it is also important to seamlessly connect the biological environment with the technological landscape by having a dynamic interface design to convert biochemical signals from the human body into an equivalent electromagnetic signal (and vice versa). This, unfortunately, risks the exposure of internal biological mechanisms to cyber-based sensing and medical actuation, with potential security and privacy implications. This paper comprehensively reviews bio-cyber interface for IoBNT architecture, focusing on bio-cyber interfacing options for IoBNT like biologically inspired bio-electronic devices, RFID enabled implantable chips, and electronic tattoos. This study also identifies known and potential security and privacy vulnerabilities and mitigation strategies for consideration in future IoBNT designs and implementations.
summary: Advances in synthetic biology and nanotechnology have contributed to the design of tools that can be used to control, reuse, modify, and re-engineer cells' structure, as well as enabling engineers to effectively use biological cells as programmable substrates to realize Bio-Nano Things (biological embedded computing devices). Bio-NanoThings are generally tiny, non-intrusive, and concealable devices that can be used for in-vivo applications such as intra-body sensing and actuation networks, where the use of artificial devices can be detrimental. Such (nano-scale) devices can be used in various healthcare settings such as continuous health monitoring, targeted drug delivery, and nano-surgeries. These services can also be grouped to form a collaborative network (i.e., nanonetwork), whose performance can potentially be improved when connected to higher bandwidth external networks such as the Internet, say via 5G. However, to realize the IoBNT paradigm, it is also important to seamlessly connect the biological environment with the technological landscape by having a dynamic interface design to convert biochemical signals from the human body into an equivalent electromagnetic signal (and vice versa). This, unfortunately, risks the exposure of internal biological mechanisms to cyber-based sensing and medical actuation, with potential security and privacy implications. This paper comprehensively reviews bio-cyber interface for IoBNT architecture, focusing on bio-cyber interfacing options for IoBNT like biologically inspired bio-electronic devices, RFID enabled implantable chips, and electronic tattoos. This study also identifies known and potential security and privacy vulnerabilities and mitigation strategies for consideration in future IoBNT designs and implementations.
abstract_zh: 合成生物学和纳米技术的进步促进了可用于控制、重复使用、修改和重新设计细胞结构的工具的设计，并使工程师能够有效地使用生物细胞作为可编程基质来实现生物纳米物（生物嵌入式计算设备）。 Bio-NanoThings 通常是微小、非侵入式且可隐藏的设备，可用于体内应用，例如体内传感和驱动网络，在这些应用中使用人工设备可能是有害的。这种（纳米级）设备可用于各种医疗保健环境，例如连续健康​​监测、靶向药物输送和纳米手术。这些服务还可以分组形成一个协作网络（即纳米网络），当通过 5G 连接到更高带宽的外部网络（例如互联网）时，其性能可能会得到改善。然而，要实现IoBNT范式，通过动态接口设计将人体的生化信号转换为等效的电磁信号（反之亦然），将生物环境与技术景观无缝连接也很重要。不幸的是，这存在内部生物机制暴露于基于网络的传感和医疗驱动的风险，并具有潜在的安全和隐私影响。本文全面回顾了 IoBNT 架构的生物网络接口，重点关注 IoBNT 的生物网络接口选项，例如受生物启发的生物电子设备、支持 RFID 的可植入芯片和电子纹身。这项研究还确定了已知和潜在的安全和隐私漏洞以及缓解策略，以供未来 IoBNT 设计和实施时考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了生物-网络接口技术及其在物联网生物纳米事物（IoBNT）中的安全问题，分析了生物信号与电磁信号转换的接口设计及潜在风险。
AI.motivation: 随着合成生物学和纳米技术的发展，生物纳米设备（BNT）在医疗领域的应用增加，但其与网络连接时面临生物机制暴露和隐私安全风险，需系统梳理接口技术与安全挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，聚焦生物电子设备、RFID植入芯片和电子纹身等生物-网络接口技术，分析其安全漏洞及缓解策略。
AI.result: 识别了生物-网络接口在信号转换、数据传输和隐私保护中的已知及潜在安全风险，并提出了未来设计中需考虑的防护措施。
AI.conclusion: IoBNT的实现需平衡生物接口的动态性与网络安全需求，未来研究应重点关注接口设计的隐私保护机制与跨领域安全标准制定。

authors_text: Shuo Jiang,Jie Hu,Christopher L. Magee,Jianxi Luo
title: Deep Learning for Technical Document Classification
title_zh: 技术文档分类的深度学习
abstract: In large technology companies, the requirements for managing and organizing technical documents created by engineers and managers have increased dramatically in recent years, which has led to a higher demand for more scalable, accurate, and automated document classification. Prior studies have only focused on processing text for classification, whereas technical documents often contain multimodal information. To leverage multimodal information for document classification to improve the model performance, this paper presents a novel multimodal deep learning architecture, TechDoc, which utilizes three types of information, including natural language texts and descriptive images within documents and the associations among the documents. The architecture synthesizes the convolutional neural network, recurrent neural network, and graph neural network through an integrated training process. We applied the architecture to a large multimodal technical document database and trained the model for classifying documents based on the hierarchical International Patent Classification system. Our results show that TechDoc presents a greater classification accuracy than the unimodal methods and other state-of-the-art benchmarks. The trained model can potentially be scaled to millions of real-world multimodal technical documents, which is useful for data and knowledge management in large technology companies and organizations.
summary: In large technology companies, the requirements for managing and organizing technical documents created by engineers and managers have increased dramatically in recent years, which has led to a higher demand for more scalable, accurate, and automated document classification. Prior studies have only focused on processing text for classification, whereas technical documents often contain multimodal information. To leverage multimodal information for document classification to improve the model performance, this paper presents a novel multimodal deep learning architecture, TechDoc, which utilizes three types of information, including natural language texts and descriptive images within documents and the associations among the documents. The architecture synthesizes the convolutional neural network, recurrent neural network, and graph neural network through an integrated training process. We applied the architecture to a large multimodal technical document database and trained the model for classifying documents based on the hierarchical International Patent Classification system. Our results show that TechDoc presents a greater classification accuracy than the unimodal methods and other state-of-the-art benchmarks. The trained model can potentially be scaled to millions of real-world multimodal technical documents, which is useful for data and knowledge management in large technology companies and organizations.
abstract_zh: 近年来，在大型科技公司中，管理和组织工程师和经理创建的技术文档的要求急剧增加，这导致对更可扩展、更准确和自动化的文档分类的需求更高。先前的研究仅集中于处理文本以进行分类，而技术文档通常包含多模式信息。为了利用多模态信息进行文档分类来提高模型性能，本文提出了一种新颖的多模态深度学习架构 TechDoc，它利用三种类型的信息，包括文档中的自然语言文本和描述性图像以及文档之间的关联。该架构通过集成训练过程综合了卷积神经网络、循环神经网络和图神经网络。我们将该架构应用于大型多模式技术文档数据库，并训练基于分层国际专利分类系统的文档分类模型。我们的结果表明，TechDoc 比单峰方法和其他最先进的基准具有更高的分类准确性。经过训练的模型有可能扩展到数百万个现实世界的多模式技术文档，这对于大型技术公司和组织的数据和知识管理非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态深度学习架构TechDoc，用于提升技术文档分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖文本分类，但技术文档包含文本、图像及关联信息，需利用多模态数据提升分类效果。
AI.method: 融合卷积神经网络（CNN）、循环神经网络（RNN）和图神经网络（GNN），通过集成训练处理文本、图像及文档关联性。
AI.result: TechDoc在国际专利分类体系下分类准确率优于单模态方法及其他先进基准，且可扩展至数百万级真实技术文档。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效利用多模态信息提升分类性能，可为大型科技企业知识管理提供支持。

title: SDOF-Tracker: Fast and Accurate Multiple Human Tracking by Skipped-Detection and Optical-Flow
title_zh: SDOF-Tracker：通过跳过检测和光流进行快速、准确的多人跟踪
abstract: Multiple human tracking is a fundamental problem for scene understanding. Although both accuracy and speed are required in real-world applications, recent tracking methods based on deep learning have focused on accuracy and require substantial running time. This study aims to improve running speed by performing human detection at a certain frame interval because it accounts for most of the running time. The question is how to maintain accuracy while skipping human detection. In this paper, we propose a method that complements the detection results with optical flow, based on the fact that someone's appearance does not change much between adjacent frames. To maintain the tracking accuracy, we introduce robust interest point selection within human regions and a tracking termination metric calculated by the distribution of the interest points. On the MOT20 dataset in the MOTChallenge, the proposed SDOF-Tracker achieved the best performance in terms of the total running speed while maintaining the MOTA metric. Our code is available at https://github.com/hitottiez/sdof-tracker.
summary: Multiple human tracking is a fundamental problem for scene understanding. Although both accuracy and speed are required in real-world applications, recent tracking methods based on deep learning have focused on accuracy and require substantial running time. This study aims to improve running speed by performing human detection at a certain frame interval because it accounts for most of the running time. The question is how to maintain accuracy while skipping human detection. In this paper, we propose a method that complements the detection results with optical flow, based on the fact that someone's appearance does not change much between adjacent frames. To maintain the tracking accuracy, we introduce robust interest point selection within human regions and a tracking termination metric calculated by the distribution of the interest points. On the MOT20 dataset in the MOTChallenge, the proposed SDOF-Tracker achieved the best performance in terms of the total running speed while maintaining the MOTA metric. Our code is available at https://github.com/hitottiez/sdof-tracker.
abstract_zh: 多人跟踪是场景理解的一个基本问题。尽管在现实应用中精度和速度都需要，但最近基于深度学习的跟踪方法都注重精度并且需要大量的运行时间。本研究旨在通过以一定的帧间隔进行人体检测来提高运行速度，因为它占据了大部分运行时间。问题是如何在跳过人体检测的同时保持准确性。在本文中，我们基于某人的外观在相邻帧之间没有太大变化的事实，提出了一种用光流补充检测结果的方法。为了保持跟踪精度，我们在人体区域内引入了鲁棒的兴趣点选择，并通过兴趣点的分布计算出跟踪终止度量。在 MOTChallenge 的 MOT20 数据集上，所提出的 SDOF-Tracker 在保持 MOTA 指标的同时，在总运行速度方面实现了最佳性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hitottiez/sdof-tracker 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDOF-Tracker方法，通过跳过检测和光流技术实现快速且准确的多人跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习跟踪方法虽准确但速度慢，检测过程消耗大量时间，需在减少检测频率的同时保持跟踪精度。
AI.method: 采用跳帧检测结合光流估计，利用人体区域的鲁棒兴趣点选择及基于兴趣点分布的跟踪终止度量。
AI.result: 在MOT20数据集上以最佳总运行速度保持MOTA指标，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SDOF-Tracker通过跳过检测与光流互补，在速度与准确性间取得平衡，适用于实时场景。

search_text: SDOF-Tracker: Fast and Accurate Multiple Human Tracking by Skipped-Detection and Optical-Flow SDOF-Tracker：通过跳过检测和光流进行快速、准确的多人跟踪 Multiple human tracking is a fundamental problem for scene understanding. Although both accuracy and speed are required in real-world applications, recent tracking methods based on deep learning have focused on accuracy and require substantial running time. This study aims to improve running speed by performing human detection at a certain frame interval because it accounts for most of the running time. The question is how to maintain accuracy while skipping human detection. In this paper, we propose a method that complements the detection results with optical flow, based on the fact that someone's appearance does not change much between adjacent frames. To maintain the tracking accuracy, we introduce robust interest point selection within human regions and a tracking termination metric calculated by the distribution of the interest points. On the MOT20 dataset in the MOTChallenge, the proposed SDOF-Tracker achieved the best performance in terms of the total running speed while maintaining the MOTA metric. Our code is available at https://github.com/hitottiez/sdof-tracker. 多人跟踪是场景理解的一个基本问题。尽管在现实应用中精度和速度都需要，但最近基于深度学习的跟踪方法都注重精度并且需要大量的运行时间。本研究旨在通过以一定的帧间隔进行人体检测来提高运行速度，因为它占据了大部分运行时间。问题是如何在跳过人体检测的同时保持准确性。在本文中，我们基于某人的外观在相邻帧之间没有太大变化的事实，提出了一种用光流补充检测结果的方法。为了保持跟踪精度，我们在人体区域内引入了鲁棒的兴趣点选择，并通过兴趣点的分布计算出跟踪终止度量。在 MOTChallenge 的 MOT20 数据集上，所提出的 SDOF-Tracker 在保持 MOTA 指标的同时，在总运行速度方面实现了最佳性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hitottiez/sdof-tracker 获取。 本文提出SDOF-Tracker方法，通过跳过检测和光流技术实现快速且准确的多人跟踪。 Hitoshi Nishimura,Satoshi Komorita,Yasutomo Kawanishi,Hiroshi Murase cs.CV

authors_text: Bojing Liu,Yinxi Wang,Philippe Weitz,Johan Lindberg,Johan Hartman,Lars Egevad,Henrik Grönberg,Martin Eklund,Mattias Rantalainen
title: Using deep learning to detect patients at risk for prostate cancer despite benign biopsies
title_zh: 使用深度学习来检测尽管活检结果为良性但仍存在患前列腺癌风险的患者
abstract: Background: Transrectal ultrasound guided systematic biopsies of the prostate is a routine procedure to establish a prostate cancer diagnosis. However, the 10-12 prostate core biopsies only sample a relatively small volume of the prostate, and tumour lesions in regions between biopsy cores can be missed, leading to a well-known low sensitivity to detect clinically relevant cancer. As a proof-of-principle, we developed and validated a deep convolutional neural network model to distinguish between morphological patterns in benign prostate biopsy whole slide images from men with and without established cancer. Methods: This study included 14,354 hematoxylin and eosin stained whole slide images from benign prostate biopsies from 1,508 men in two groups: men without an established prostate cancer (PCa) diagnosis and men with at least one core biopsy diagnosed with PCa. 80% of the participants were assigned as training data and used for model optimization (1,211 men), and the remaining 20% (297 men) as a held-out test set used to evaluate model performance. An ensemble of 10 deep convolutional neural network models was optimized for classification of biopsies from men with and without established cancer. Hyperparameter optimization and model selection was performed by cross-validation in the training data . Results: Area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (ROC-AUC) was estimated as 0.727 (bootstrap 95% CI: 0.708-0.745) on biopsy level and 0.738 (bootstrap 95% CI: 0.682 - 0.796) on man level. At a specificity of 0.9 the model had an estimated sensitivity of 0.348. Conclusion: The developed model has the ability to detect men with risk of missed PCa due to under-sampling of the prostate. The proposed model has the potential to reduce the number of false negative cases in routine systematic prostate biopsies and to indicate men who could benefit from MRI-guided re-biopsy.

However, the 10-12 prostate core biopsies only sample a relatively small volume of the prostate, and tumour lesions in regions between biopsy cores can be missed, leading to a well-known low sensitivity to detect clinically relevant cancer. As a proof-of-principle, we developed and validated a deep convolutional neural network model to distinguish between morphological patterns in benign prostate biopsy whole slide images from men with and without established cancer. Methods: This study included 14,354 hematoxylin and eosin stained whole slide images from benign prostate biopsies from 1,508 men in two groups: men without an established prostate cancer (PCa) diagnosis and men with at least one core biopsy diagnosed with PCa. 80% of the participants were assigned as training data and used for model optimization (1,211 men), and the remaining 20% (297 men) as a held-out test set used to evaluate model performance. An ensemble of 10 deep convolutional neural network models was optimized for classification of biopsies from men with and without established cancer. Hyperparameter optimization and model selection was performed by cross-validation in the training data . Results: Area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (ROC-AUC) was estimated as 0.727 (bootstrap 95% CI: 0.708-0.745) on biopsy level and 0.738 (bootstrap 95% CI: 0.682 - 0.796) on man level. At a specificity of 0.9 the model had an estimated sensitivity of 0.348. Conclusion: The developed model has the ability to detect men with risk of missed PCa due to under-sampling of the prostate. The proposed model has the potential to reduce the number of false negative cases in routine systematic prostate biopsies and to indicate men who could benefit from MRI-guided re-biopsy.
abstract_zh: 背景：经直肠超声引导下的前列腺系统活检是建立前列腺癌诊断的常规程序。然而，10-12个前列腺核心活检仅对相对较小体积的前列腺进行采样，并且活检核心之间区域的肿瘤病变可能会被遗漏，导致众所周知的检测临床相关癌症的灵敏度较低。作为原理验证，我们开发并验证了一种深度卷积神经网络模型，用于区分患有和未患有癌症的男性的良性前列腺活检全切片图像中的形态模式。方法：本研究纳入了 14,354 张苏木精和伊红染色的完整切片图像，这些图像来自两组 1,508 名男性的良性前列腺活检：未确诊前列腺癌 (PCa) 的男性和至少进行一次核心活检诊断为 PCa 的男性。 80% 的参与者被分配为训练数据并用于模型优化（1,211 名男性），其余 20%（297 名男性）作为保留测试集，用于评估模型性能。对 10 个深度卷积神经网络模型的集合进行了优化，用于对患有和未患有癌症的男性活检进行分类。通过训练数据的交叉验证来执行超参数优化和模型选择。结果：活检水平的受试者工作特征曲线下面积 (ROC-AUC) 估计为 0.727（引导 95% CI：0.708-0.745），人体水平估计为 0.738（引导 95% CI：0.682 - 0.796）。当特异性为 0.9 时，模型的估计灵敏度为 0.348。结论：所开发的模型能够检测出由于前列腺采样不足而有漏检 PCa 风险的男性。所提出的模型有可能减少常规系统前列腺活检中假阴性病例的数量，并表明男性可以从 MRI 引导的再次活检中受益。

AI.tldr: 本研究开发并验证了深度卷积神经网络模型，用于识别前列腺活检结果为良性但实际存在前列腺癌风险的患者。
AI.motivation: 传统前列腺活检因取样局限存在漏诊风险，需开发新型方法辅助检测潜在癌症病例。
AI.method: 基于14,354张良性前列腺活检图像，构建包含1,508名患者的训练集与测试集，采用10模型集成的深度卷积神经网络进行分类优化。
AI.result: 模型在活检层面ROC-AUC为0.727，在个体层面为0.738，特异性达0.9时敏感度为0.348。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可有效识别因取样不足导致的前列腺癌漏诊风险，有望减少假阴性并指导MRI引导复检。

title: Pairing Conceptual Modeling with Machine Learning
title_zh: 将概念建模与机器学习结合起来
abstract: Both conceptual modeling and machine learning have long been recognized as important areas of research. With the increasing emphasis on digitizing and processing large amounts of data for business and other applications, it would be helpful to consider how these areas of research can complement each other. To understand how they can be paired, we provide an overview of machine learning foundations and development cycle. We then examine how conceptual modeling can be applied to machine learning and propose a framework for incorporating conceptual modeling into data science projects. The framework is illustrated by applying it to a healthcare application. For the inverse pairing, machine learning can impact conceptual modeling through text and rule mining, as well as knowledge graphs. The pairing of conceptual modeling and machine learning in this this way should help lay the foundations for future research.
summary: Both conceptual modeling and machine learning have long been recognized as important areas of research. With the increasing emphasis on digitizing and processing large amounts of data for business and other applications, it would be helpful to consider how these areas of research can complement each other. To understand how they can be paired, we provide an overview of machine learning foundations and development cycle. We then examine how conceptual modeling can be applied to machine learning and propose a framework for incorporating conceptual modeling into data science projects. The framework is illustrated by applying it to a healthcare application. For the inverse pairing, machine learning can impact conceptual modeling through text and rule mining, as well as knowledge graphs. The pairing of conceptual modeling and machine learning in this this way should help lay the foundations for future research.
abstract_zh: 概念建模和机器学习长期以来一直被认为是重要的研究领域。随着人们越来越重视商业和其他应用程序的大量数据的数字化和处理，考虑这些研究领域如何相互补充将很有帮助。为了了解如何将它们配对，我们概述了机器学习基础和开发周期。然后，我们研究如何将概念建模应用于机器学习，并提出一个将概念建模纳入数据科学项目的框架。通过将该框架应用于医疗保健应用程序来说明该框架。对于反向配对，机器学习可以通过文本和规则挖掘以及知识图来影响概念建模。以这种方式将概念建模和机器学习结合起来应该有助于为未来的研究奠定基础。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将概念建模与机器学习结合，提出框架并分析其在医疗健康等领域的应用。
AI.motivation: 随着数据数字化需求增长，概念建模与机器学习的协同潜力亟待挖掘，以推动数据科学项目发展。
AI.method: 通过梳理机器学习基础与开发周期，分析概念建模在机器学习中的应用，提出整合框架并以医疗场景为例验证，同时探讨机器学习对概念建模的反向影响。
AI.result: 构建了概念建模与机器学习结合的框架，验证了其在医疗领域的可行性，并揭示了机器学习通过文本挖掘等技术对概念建模的促进作用。
AI.conclusion: 概念建模与机器学习的融合为未来研究提供了理论基础和实践路径，有助于提升数据科学项目的系统性与智能化水平。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨如何将概念建模与机器学习结合，提出框架并分析其在医疗健康等领域的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 随着数据数字化需求增长，概念建模与机器学习的协同潜力亟待挖掘，以推动数据科学项目发展。
ai_content.method: 通过梳理机器学习基础与开发周期，分析概念建模在机器学习中的应用，提出整合框架并以医疗场景为例验证，同时探讨机器学习对概念建模的反向影响。
ai_content.result: 构建了概念建模与机器学习结合的框架，验证了其在医疗领域的可行性，并揭示了机器学习通过文本挖掘等技术对概念建模的促进作用。
ai_content.conclusion: 概念建模与机器学习的融合为未来研究提供了理论基础和实践路径，有助于提升数据科学项目的系统性与智能化水平。

search_text: Pairing Conceptual Modeling with Machine Learning 将概念建模与机器学习结合起来 Both conceptual modeling and machine learning have long been recognized as important areas of research. With the increasing emphasis on digitizing and processing large amounts of data for business and other applications, it would be helpful to consider how these areas of research can complement each other. To understand how they can be paired, we provide an overview of machine learning foundations and development cycle. We then examine how conceptual modeling can be applied to machine learning and propose a framework for incorporating conceptual modeling into data science projects. The framework is illustrated by applying it to a healthcare application. For the inverse pairing, machine learning can impact conceptual modeling through text and rule mining, as well as knowledge graphs. The pairing of conceptual modeling and machine learning in this this way should help lay the foundations for future research. 概念建模和机器学习长期以来一直被认为是重要的研究领域。随着人们越来越重视商业和其他应用程序的大量数据的数字化和处理，考虑这些研究领域如何相互补充将很有帮助。为了了解如何将它们配对，我们概述了机器学习基础和开发周期。然后，我们研究如何将概念建模应用于机器学习，并提出一个将概念建模纳入数据科学项目的框架。通过将该框架应用于医疗保健应用程序来说明该框架。对于反向配对，机器学习可以通过文本和规则挖掘以及知识图来影响概念建模。以这种方式将概念建模和机器学习结合起来应该有助于为未来的研究奠定基础。 本文探讨如何将概念建模与机器学习结合，提出框架并分析其在医疗健康等领域的应用。 Wolfgang Maass,Veda C. Storey cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chun-Mei Feng,Yunlu Yan,Geng Chen,Yong Xu,Ling Shao,Huazhu Fu
title: Multi-Modal Transformer for Accelerated MR Imaging
title_zh: 用于加速 MR 成像的多模态变压器
abstract: Accelerated multi-modal magnetic resonance (MR) imaging is a new and effective solution for fast MR imaging, providing superior performance in restoring the target modality from its undersampled counterpart with guidance from an auxiliary modality. However, existing works simply combine the auxiliary modality as prior information, lacking in-depth investigations on the potential mechanisms for fusing different modalities. Further, they usually rely on the convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which is limited by the intrinsic locality in capturing the long-distance dependency. To this end, we propose a multi-modal transformer (MTrans), which is capable of transferring multi-scale features from the target modality to the auxiliary modality, for accelerated MR imaging. To capture deep multi-modal information, our MTrans utilizes an improved multi-head attention mechanism, named cross attention module, which absorbs features from the auxiliary modality that contribute to the target modality. Our framework provides three appealing benefits: (i) Our MTrans use an improved transformers for multi-modal MR imaging, affording more global information compared with existing CNN-based methods. (ii) A new cross attention module is proposed to exploit the useful information in each modality at different scales. The small patch in the target modality aims to keep more fine details, the large patch in the auxiliary modality aims to obtain high-level context features from the larger region and supplement the target modality effectively. (iii) We evaluate MTrans with various accelerated multi-modal MR imaging tasks, e.g., MR image reconstruction and super-resolution, where MTrans outperforms state-of-the-art methods on fastMRI and real-world clinical datasets.
summary: Accelerated multi-modal magnetic resonance (MR) imaging is a new and effective solution for fast MR imaging, providing superior performance in restoring the target modality from its undersampled counterpart with guidance from an auxiliary modality. However, existing works simply combine the auxiliary modality as prior information, lacking in-depth investigations on the potential mechanisms for fusing different modalities. Further, they usually rely on the convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which is limited by the intrinsic locality in capturing the long-distance dependency. To this end, we propose a multi-modal transformer (MTrans), which is capable of transferring multi-scale features from the target modality to the auxiliary modality, for accelerated MR imaging. To capture deep multi-modal information, our MTrans utilizes an improved multi-head attention mechanism, named cross attention module, which absorbs features from the auxiliary modality that contribute to the target modality. Our framework provides three appealing benefits: (i) Our MTrans use an improved transformers for multi-modal MR imaging, affording more global information compared with existing CNN-based methods. (ii) A new cross attention module is proposed to exploit the useful information in each modality at different scales. The small patch in the target modality aims to keep more fine details, the large patch in the auxiliary modality aims to obtain high-level context features from the larger region and supplement the target modality effectively. (iii) We evaluate MTrans with various accelerated multi-modal MR imaging tasks, e.g., MR image reconstruction and super-resolution, where MTrans outperforms state-of-the-art methods on fastMRI and real-world clinical datasets.
abstract_zh: 加速多模态磁共振 (MR) 成像是一种新的、有效的快速 MR 成像解决方案，在辅助模态的指导下，在从欠采样对应物恢复目标模态方面提供了卓越的性能。然而，现有的工作只是将辅助模态作为先验信息结合起来，缺乏对融合不同模态的潜在机制的深入研究。此外，它们通常依赖于卷积神经网络（CNN），而卷积神经网络在捕获长距离依赖性方面受到内在局部性的限制。为此，我们提出了一种多模态转换器（MTrans），它能够将多尺度特征从目标模态转移到辅助模态，以用于加速MR成像。为了捕获深层多模态信息，我们的 MTrans 采用改进的多头注意力机制，称为交叉注意力模块，它吸收辅助模态中对目标模态有贡献的特征。我们的框架提供了三个吸引人的好处：（i）我们的 MTrans 使用改进的变压器进行多模态 MR 成像，与现有的基于 CNN 的方法相比，可以提供更多的全局信息。 （ii）提出了一个新的交叉注意模块来利用不同尺度的每种模态中的有用信息。目标模态中的小补丁旨在保留更精细的细节，辅助模态中的大补丁旨在从较大区域获取高级上下文特征并有效补充目标模态。 (iii) 我们通过各种加速多模态 MR 成像任务（例如 MR 图像重建和超分辨率）来评估 MTrans，其中 MTrans 在 fastMRI 和真实临床数据集上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态Transformer（MTrans）模型，用于加速磁共振（MR）成像，通过融合目标模态与辅助模态的信息提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖CNN处理多模态MR成像，存在局部性限制且未深入研究模态融合机制，难以有效捕捉长距离依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计改进的多头注意力机制（交叉注意力模块），通过不同尺度的图像块（小块保留细节，大块提取上下文）实现跨模态特征迁移，并基于Transformer架构构建MTrans框架。
AI.result: MTrans在fastMRI和临床数据集的加速MR重建与超分辨率任务中优于现有方法，验证了其全局信息捕捉与多模态融合优势。
AI.conclusion: MTrans通过Transformer架构和交叉注意力机制有效解决了多模态加速MR成像中的关键问题，为后续研究提供了新方向。

title: AI based Presentation Creator With Customized Audio Content Delivery
title_zh: 基于人工智能的演示创建器，具有定制的音频内容交付功能
abstract: In this paper, we propose an architecture to solve a novel problem statement that has stemmed more so in recent times with an increase in demand for virtual content delivery due to the COVID-19 pandemic. All educational institutions, workplaces, research centers, etc. are trying to bridge the gap of communication during these socially distanced times with the use of online content delivery. The trend now is to create presentations, and then subsequently deliver the same using various virtual meeting platforms. The time being spent in such creation of presentations and delivering is what we try to reduce and eliminate through this paper which aims to use Machine Learning (ML) algorithms and Natural Language Processing (NLP) modules to automate the process of creating a slides-based presentation from a document, and then use state-of-the-art voice cloning models to deliver the content in the desired author's voice. We consider a structured document such as a research paper to be the content that has to be presented. The research paper is first summarized using BERT summarization techniques and condensed into bullet points that go into the slides. Tacotron inspired architecture with Encoder, Synthesizer, and a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based vocoder, is used to convey the contents of the slides in the author's voice (or any customized voice). Almost all learning has now been shifted to online mode, and professionals are now working from the comfort of their homes. Due to the current situation, teachers and professionals have shifted to presentations to help them in imparting information. In this paper, we aim to reduce the considerable amount of time that is taken in creating a presentation by automating this process and subsequently delivering this presentation in a customized voice, using a content delivery mechanism that can clone any voice using a short audio clip.

abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种架构来解决一个新的问题陈述，该问题近年来随着 COVID-19 大流行导致虚拟内容交付需求的增加而更加严重。所有教育机构、工作场所、研究中心等都试图通过使用在线内容交付来弥合社交距离时代的沟通鸿沟。现在的趋势是创建演示文稿，然后使用各种虚拟会议平台进行演示。我们试图通过本文来减少和消除创建演示文稿和交付所花费的时间，该论文旨在使用机器学习 (ML) 算法和自然语言处理 (NLP) 模块来自动执行从文档创建基于幻灯片的演示文稿的过程，然后使用最先进的语音克隆模型以所需作者的声音交付内容。我们将研究论文等结构化文档视为必须呈现的内容。首先使用 BERT 总结技术对研究论文进行总结，然后将其浓缩为幻灯片中的要点。 Tacotron 启发的架构包含编码器、合成器和基于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的声码器，用于以作者的声音（或任何定制的声音）传达幻灯片的内容。几乎所有学习现在都已转移到在线模式，专业人士现在可以在舒适的家中工作。鉴于目前的情况，教师和专业人士已转向通过演示来帮助他们传递信息。在本文中，我们的目标是通过自动化此过程并随后使用可以使用短音频剪辑克隆任何语音的内容交付机制以自定义语音交付此演示文稿，从而减少创建演示文稿所需的大量时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AI的自动化演示文稿生成与定制语音播报系统，通过机器学习和自然语言处理技术实现从文档到幻灯片的自动转换，并利用语音克隆技术生成定制化语音播报。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致线上内容交付需求激增，传统人工制作演示文稿和语音播报流程耗时且效率低下，亟需自动化解决方案以节省时间并提升远程教学与工作效率。
AI.method: 采用BERT模型对研究论文进行摘要生成并转化为幻灯片要点，结合Tacotron架构与GAN声码器实现语音克隆，通过编码器-合成器-声码器流程生成目标作者或定制化语音。
AI.result: 系统成功实现了从结构化文档到自动化演示文稿的生成，并可通过短音频样本克隆任意语音进行内容播报，显著减少人工制作与交付时间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了线上内容交付中的效率瓶颈，为教育和远程工作场景提供了智能化、个性化的演示文稿生成与语音播报解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AI的自动化演示文稿生成与定制语音播报系统，通过机器学习和自然语言处理技术实现从文档到幻灯片的自动转换，并利用语音克隆技术生成定制化语音播报。

search_text: AI based Presentation Creator With Customized Audio Content Delivery 基于人工智能的演示创建器，具有定制的音频内容交付功能 In this paper, we propose an architecture to solve a novel problem statement that has stemmed more so in recent times with an increase in demand for virtual content delivery due to the COVID-19 pandemic. All educational institutions, workplaces, research centers, etc. are trying to bridge the gap of communication during these socially distanced times with the use of online content delivery. The trend now is to create presentations, and then subsequently deliver the same using various virtual meeting platforms. The time being spent in such creation of presentations and delivering is what we try to reduce and eliminate through this paper which aims to use Machine Learning (ML) algorithms and Natural Language Processing (NLP) modules to automate the process of creating a slides-based presentation from a document, and then use state-of-the-art voice cloning models to deliver the content in the desired author's voice. We consider a structured document such as a research paper to be the content that has to be presented. The research paper is first summarized using BERT summarization techniques and condensed into bullet points that go into the slides. Tacotron inspired architecture with Encoder, Synthesizer, and a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based vocoder, is used to convey the contents of the slides in the author's voice (or any customized voice). Almost all learning has now been shifted to online mode, and professionals are now working from the comfort of their homes. Due to the current situation, teachers and professionals have shifted to presentations to help them in imparting information. In this paper, we aim to reduce the considerable amount of time that is taken in creating a presentation by automating this process and subsequently delivering this presentation in a customized voice, using a content delivery mechanism that can clone any voice using a short audio clip. 在本文中，我们提出了一种架构来解决一个新的问题陈述，该问题近年来随着 COVID-19 大流行导致虚拟内容交付需求的增加而更加严重。所有教育机构、工作场所、研究中心等都试图通过使用在线内容交付来弥合社交距离时代的沟通鸿沟。现在的趋势是创建演示文稿，然后使用各种虚拟会议平台进行演示。我们试图通过本文来减少和消除创建演示文稿和交付所花费的时间，该论文旨在使用机器学习 (ML) 算法和自然语言处理 (NLP) 模块来自动执行从文档创建基于幻灯片的演示文稿的过程，然后使用最先进的语音克隆模型以所需作者的声音交付内容。我们将研究论文等结构化文档视为必须呈现的内容。首先使用 BERT 总结技术对研究论文进行总结，然后将其浓缩为幻灯片中的要点。 Tacotron 启发的架构包含编码器、合成器和基于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的声码器，用于以作者的声音（或任何定制的声音）传达幻灯片的内容。几乎所有学习现在都已转移到在线模式，专业人士现在可以在舒适的家中工作。鉴于目前的情况，教师和专业人士已转向通过演示来帮助他们传递信息。在本文中，我们的目标是通过自动化此过程并随后使用可以使用短音频剪辑克隆任何语音的内容交付机制以自定义语音交付此演示文稿，从而减少创建演示文稿所需的大量时间。 本文提出一种基于AI的自动化演示文稿生成与定制语音播报系统，通过机器学习和自然语言处理技术实现从文档到幻灯片的自动转换，并利用语音克隆技术生成定制化语音播报。 Muvazima Mansoor,Srikanth Chandar,Ramamoorthy Srinath cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR

title: Representation Based Regression for Object Distance Estimation
title_zh: 用于物体距离估计的基于表示的回归
abstract: In this study, we propose a novel approach to predict the distances of the detected objects in an observed scene. The proposed approach modifies the recently proposed Convolutional Support Estimator Networks (CSENs). CSENs are designed to compute a direct mapping for the Support Estimation (SE) task in a representation-based classification problem. We further propose and demonstrate that representation-based methods (sparse or collaborative representation) can be used in well-designed regression problems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first representation-based method proposed for performing a regression task by utilizing the modified CSENs; and hence, we name this novel approach as Representation-based Regression (RbR). The initial version of CSENs has a proxy mapping stage (i.e., a coarse estimation for the support set) that is required for the input. In this study, we improve the CSEN model by proposing Compressive Learning CSEN (CL-CSEN) that has the ability to jointly optimize the so-called proxy mapping stage along with convolutional layers. The experimental evaluations using the KITTI 3D Object Detection distance estimation dataset show that the proposed method can achieve a significantly improved distance estimation performance over all competing methods. Finally, the software implementations of the methods are publicly shared at https://github.com/meteahishali/CSENDistance.
summary: In this study, we propose a novel approach to predict the distances of the detected objects in an observed scene. The proposed approach modifies the recently proposed Convolutional Support Estimator Networks (CSENs). CSENs are designed to compute a direct mapping for the Support Estimation (SE) task in a representation-based classification problem. We further propose and demonstrate that representation-based methods (sparse or collaborative representation) can be used in well-designed regression problems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first representation-based method proposed for performing a regression task by utilizing the modified CSENs; and hence, we name this novel approach as Representation-based Regression (RbR). The initial version of CSENs has a proxy mapping stage (i.e., a coarse estimation for the support set) that is required for the input. In this study, we improve the CSEN model by proposing Compressive Learning CSEN (CL-CSEN) that has the ability to jointly optimize the so-called proxy mapping stage along with convolutional layers. The experimental evaluations using the KITTI 3D Object Detection distance estimation dataset show that the proposed method can achieve a significantly improved distance estimation performance over all competing methods. Finally, the software implementations of the methods are publicly shared at https://github.com/meteahishali/CSENDistance.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新方法来预测观察场景中检测到的物体的距离。所提出的方法修改了最近提出的卷积支持估计网络（CSEN）。 CSEN 旨在计算基于表示的分类问题中支持估计 (SE) 任务的直接映射。我们进一步提出并证明基于表示的方法（稀疏或协作表示）可以用于精心设计的回归问题。据我们所知，这是第一个提出的基于表示的方法，用于利用修改后的 CSEN 执行回归任务；因此，我们将这种新颖的方法命名为基于表示的回归（RbR）。 CSEN 的初始版本具有输入所需的代理映射阶段（即对支持集的粗略估计）。在本研究中，我们通过提出压缩学习 CSEN (CL-CSEN) 来改进 CSEN 模型，它能够与卷积层一起联合优化所谓的代理映射阶段。使用 KITTI 3D 物体检测距离估计数据集的实验评估表明，与所有竞争方法相比，所提出的方法可以实现显着提高的距离估计性能。最后，这些方法的软件实现在 https://github.com/meteahishali/CSENDistance 上公开共享。

AI.tldr: 提出基于表示的回归方法（RbR）用于场景中检测物体的距离估计，通过改进CSEN网络实现更精确的预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在回归任务中应用表示方法较少，且CSEN主要用于分类，需改进以适应回归并提高距离估计精度。
AI.method: 改进CSEN为CL-CSEN，联合优化代理映射和卷积层，结合稀疏/协作表示进行回归。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，RbR方法在距离估计上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RbR方法有效，开源代码促进应用，为基于表示的回归提供新方向。

authors_text: Amith Khandakar,Muhammad E. H. Chowdhury,Mamun Bin Ibne Reaz,Sawal Hamid Md Ali,Md Anwarul Hasan,Serkan Kiranyaz,Tawsifur Rahman,Rashad Alfkey,Ahmad Ashrif A. Bakar,Rayaz A. Malik
title: A Machine Learning Model for Early Detection of Diabetic Foot using Thermogram Images
title_zh: 使用热成像图像早期检测糖尿病足的机器学习模型
abstract: Diabetes foot ulceration (DFU) and amputation are a cause of significant morbidity. The prevention of DFU may be achieved by the identification of patients at risk of DFU and the institution of preventative measures through education and offloading. Several studies have reported that thermogram images may help to detect an increase in plantar temperature prior to DFU. However, the distribution of plantar temperature may be heterogeneous, making it difficult to quantify and utilize to predict outcomes. We have compared a machine learning-based scoring technique with feature selection and optimization techniques and learning classifiers to several state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) on foot thermogram images and propose a robust solution to identify the diabetic foot. A comparatively shallow CNN model, MobilenetV2 achieved an F1 score of ~95% for a two-feet thermogram image-based classification and the AdaBoost Classifier used 10 features and achieved an F1 score of 97 %. A comparison of the inference time for the best-performing networks confirmed that the proposed algorithm can be deployed as a smartphone application to allow the user to monitor the progression of the DFU in a home setting.
summary: Diabetes foot ulceration (DFU) and amputation are a cause of significant morbidity. The prevention of DFU may be achieved by the identification of patients at risk of DFU and the institution of preventative measures through education and offloading. Several studies have reported that thermogram images may help to detect an increase in plantar temperature prior to DFU. However, the distribution of plantar temperature may be heterogeneous, making it difficult to quantify and utilize to predict outcomes. We have compared a machine learning-based scoring technique with feature selection and optimization techniques and learning classifiers to several state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) on foot thermogram images and propose a robust solution to identify the diabetic foot. A comparatively shallow CNN model, MobilenetV2 achieved an F1 score of ~95% for a two-feet thermogram image-based classification and the AdaBoost Classifier used 10 features and achieved an F1 score of 97 %. A comparison of the inference time for the best-performing networks confirmed that the proposed algorithm can be deployed as a smartphone application to allow the user to monitor the progression of the DFU in a home setting.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病足溃疡（DFU）和截肢是导致严重发病的原因。 DFU 的预防可以通过识别有 DFU 风险的患者并通过教育和卸载采取预防措施来实现。几项研究报告称，热成像图像可能有助于在 DFU 之前检测足底温度的升高。然而，足底温度的分布可能是不均匀的，因此难以量化和利用来预测结果。我们将基于机器学习的评分技术、特征选择和优化技术以及学习分类器与足部热像图图像上的几种最先进的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行了比较，并提出了一种稳健的解决方案来识别糖尿病足。 MobilenetV2 是一个相对较浅的 CNN 模型，对于基于两英尺热成像图像的分类，F1 得分约为 95%，而 AdaBoost 分类器使用 10 个特征，F1 得分为 97%。对性能最佳网络的推理时间进行比较证实，所提出的算法可以部署为智能手机应用程序，以允许用户在家庭环境中监控 DFU 的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于热成像图像的机器学习模型，用于早期检测糖尿病足。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病足溃疡（DFU）和截肢是导致重大发病率的原因，而热成像图像可能有助于在DFU发生前检测足部温度的变化。然而，足部温度分布的异质性使得量化和预测结果变得困难。
AI.method: 本文比较了基于特征选择和优化技术的机器学习评分技术与最先进的卷积神经网络（CNN）在足部热成像图像上的表现，并提出了一个鲁棒的解决方案来识别糖尿病足。
AI.result: 较浅的CNN模型MobilenetV2在基于双足热成像图像的分类中实现了约95%的F1分数，而AdaBoost分类器使用了10个特征，F1分数达到了97%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法可以部署为智能手机应用程序，使用户能够在家庭环境中监测DFU的进展。

ai_content_json.result: 较浅的CNN模型MobilenetV2在基于双足热成像图像的分类中实现了约95%的F1分数，而AdaBoost分类器使用了10个特征，F1分数达到了97%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文提出的算法可以部署为智能手机应用程序，使用户能够在家庭环境中监测DFU的进展。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于热成像图像的机器学习模型，用于早期检测糖尿病足。
motivation: 糖尿病足溃疡（DFU）和截肢是导致重大发病率的原因，而热成像图像可能有助于在DFU发生前检测足部温度的变化。然而，足部温度分布的异质性使得量化和预测结果变得困难。
method: 本文比较了基于特征选择和优化技术的机器学习评分技术与最先进的卷积神经网络（CNN）在足部热成像图像上的表现，并提出了一个鲁棒的解决方案来识别糖尿病足。

search_text: A Machine Learning Model for Early Detection of Diabetic Foot using Thermogram Images 使用热成像图像早期检测糖尿病足的机器学习模型 Diabetes foot ulceration (DFU) and amputation are a cause of significant morbidity. The prevention of DFU may be achieved by the identification of patients at risk of DFU and the institution of preventative measures through education and offloading. Several studies have reported that thermogram images may help to detect an increase in plantar temperature prior to DFU. However, the distribution of plantar temperature may be heterogeneous, making it difficult to quantify and utilize to predict outcomes. We have compared a machine learning-based scoring technique with feature selection and optimization techniques and learning classifiers to several state-of-the-art Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) on foot thermogram images and propose a robust solution to identify the diabetic foot. A comparatively shallow CNN model, MobilenetV2 achieved an F1 score of ~95% for a two-feet thermogram image-based classification and the AdaBoost Classifier used 10 features and achieved an F1 score of 97 %. A comparison of the inference time for the best-performing networks confirmed that the proposed algorithm can be deployed as a smartphone application to allow the user to monitor the progression of the DFU in a home setting. 糖尿病足溃疡（DFU）和截肢是导致严重发病的原因。 DFU 的预防可以通过识别有 DFU 风险的患者并通过教育和卸载采取预防措施来实现。几项研究报告称，热成像图像可能有助于在 DFU 之前检测足底温度的升高。然而，足底温度的分布可能是不均匀的，因此难以量化和利用来预测结果。我们将基于机器学习的评分技术、特征选择和优化技术以及学习分类器与足部热像图图像上的几种最先进的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行了比较，并提出了一种稳健的解决方案来识别糖尿病足。 MobilenetV2 是一个相对较浅的 CNN 模型，对于基于两英尺热成像图像的分类，F1 得分约为 95%，而 AdaBoost 分类器使用 10 个特征，F1 得分为 97%。对性能最佳网络的推理时间进行比较证实，所提出的算法可以部署为智能手机应用程序，以允许用户在家庭环境中监控 DFU 的进展。 本文提出了一种基于热成像图像的机器学习模型，用于早期检测糖尿病足。 Amith Khandakar,Muhammad E. H. Chowdhury,Mamun Bin Ibne Reaz,Sawal Hamid Md Ali,Md Anwarul Hasan,Serkan Kiranyaz,Tawsifur Rahman,Rashad Alfkey,Ahmad Ashrif A. Bakar,Rayaz A. Malik eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: J. Macke,J. Sedlar,M. Olsak,J. Urban,J. Sivic
title: Learning to solve geometric construction problems from images
title_zh: 学习从图像中解决几何构造问题
abstract: We describe a purely image-based method for finding geometric constructions with a ruler and compass in the Euclidea geometric game. The method is based on adapting the Mask R-CNN state-of-the-art image processing neural architecture and adding a tree-based search procedure to it. In a supervised setting, the method learns to solve all 68 kinds of geometric construction problems from the first six level packs of Euclidea with an average 92% accuracy. When evaluated on new kinds of problems, the method can solve 31 of the 68 kinds of Euclidea problems. We believe that this is the first time that a purely image-based learning has been trained to solve geometric construction problems of this difficulty.
summary: We describe a purely image-based method for finding geometric constructions with a ruler and compass in the Euclidea geometric game. The method is based on adapting the Mask R-CNN state-of-the-art image processing neural architecture and adding a tree-based search procedure to it. In a supervised setting, the method learns to solve all 68 kinds of geometric construction problems from the first six level packs of Euclidea with an average 92% accuracy. When evaluated on new kinds of problems, the method can solve 31 of the 68 kinds of Euclidea problems. We believe that this is the first time that a purely image-based learning has been trained to solve geometric construction problems of this difficulty.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种纯粹基于图像的方法，用于在欧几里得几何游戏中使用尺子和指南针寻找几何构造。该方法基于采用 Mask R-CNN 最先进的图像处理神经架构并添加基于树的搜索过程。在监督环境中，该方法学习解决 Euclidea 前 6 个关卡包中的所有 68 种几何构造问题，平均准确度为 92%。当评估新类型问题时，该方法可以解决 68 种欧几里得问题中的 31 种。我们相信，这是第一次训练纯粹基于图像的学习来解决这种困难的几何构造问题。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于图像的深度学习方法，用于解决欧几里得几何游戏中的尺规作图问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖符号计算，难以处理复杂几何问题，而图像方法可直接处理视觉信息。
AI.method: 结合改进的Mask R-CNN和树搜索算法，通过监督学习识别几何元素并规划作图步骤。
AI.result: 在训练集上达到92%平均准确率，新问题解决31种，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次纯图像方法解决复杂几何构造问题，展示了深度学习在几何推理中的潜力。

authors_text: Haitao Lin,Zichang Liu,Chilam Cheang,Yanwei Fu,Guodong Guo,Xiangyang Xue
title: SAR-Net: Shape Alignment and Recovery Network for Category-level 6D Object Pose and Size Estimation
title_zh: SAR-Net：用于类别级 6D 物体姿态和大小估计的形状对齐和恢复网络
abstract: Given a single scene image, this paper proposes a method of Category-level 6D Object Pose and Size Estimation (COPSE) from the point cloud of the target object, without external real pose-annotated training data. Specifically, beyond the visual cues in RGB images, we rely on the shape information predominately from the depth (D) channel. The key idea is to explore the shape alignment of each instance against its corresponding category-level template shape, and the symmetric correspondence of each object category for estimating a coarse 3D object shape. Our framework deforms the point cloud of the category-level template shape to align the observed instance point cloud for implicitly representing its 3D rotation. Then we model the symmetric correspondence by predicting symmetric point cloud from the partially observed point cloud. The concatenation of the observed point cloud and symmetric one reconstructs a coarse object shape, thus facilitating object center (3D translation) and 3D size estimation. Extensive experiments on the category-level NOCS benchmark demonstrate that our lightweight model still competes with state-of-the-art approaches that require labeled real-world images. We also deploy our approach to a physical Baxter robot to perform grasping tasks on unseen but category-known instances, and the results further validate the efficacy of our proposed model. Code and pre-trained models are available on the project webpage.
summary: Given a single scene image, this paper proposes a method of Category-level 6D Object Pose and Size Estimation (COPSE) from the point cloud of the target object, without external real pose-annotated training data. Specifically, beyond the visual cues in RGB images, we rely on the shape information predominately from the depth (D) channel. The key idea is to explore the shape alignment of each instance against its corresponding category-level template shape, and the symmetric correspondence of each object category for estimating a coarse 3D object shape. Our framework deforms the point cloud of the category-level template shape to align the observed instance point cloud for implicitly representing its 3D rotation. Then we model the symmetric correspondence by predicting symmetric point cloud from the partially observed point cloud. The concatenation of the observed point cloud and symmetric one reconstructs a coarse object shape, thus facilitating object center (3D translation) and 3D size estimation. Extensive experiments on the category-level NOCS benchmark demonstrate that our lightweight model still competes with state-of-the-art approaches that require labeled real-world images. We also deploy our approach to a physical Baxter robot to perform grasping tasks on unseen but category-known instances, and the results further validate the efficacy of our proposed model. Code and pre-trained models are available on the project webpage.
abstract_zh: 给定单个场景图像，本文提出了一种从目标对象的点云进行类别级 6D 对象姿态和大小估计（COPSE）的方法，无需外部真实姿态注释的训练数据。具体来说，除了 RGB 图像中的视觉线索之外，我们主要依赖于来自深度 (D) 通道的形状信息。关键思想是探索每个实例与其相应类别级模板形状的形状对齐，以及每个对象类别的对称对应关系，以估计粗略的 3D 对象形状。我们的框架对类别级模板形状的点云进行变形，以对齐观察到的实例点云，以隐式表示其 3D 旋转。然后，我们通过从部分观察的点云预测对称点云来对对称对应进行建模。观察到的点云和对称点云的串联重建了粗糙的物体形状，从而有利于物体中心（3D 平移）和 3D 尺寸估计。对类别级 NOCS 基准的大量实验表明，我们的轻量级模型仍然可以与需要标记的真实世界图像的最先进方法竞争。我们还将我们的方法部署到物理 Baxter 机器人上，以在看不见但类别已知的实例上执行抓取任务，结果进一步验证了我们提出的模型的有效性。项目网页上提供了代码和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAR-Net网络，通过深度信息和形状对齐实现无需真实姿态标注的类别级6D物体姿态和尺寸估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖RGB图像和真实姿态标注数据，而本文旨在利用深度信息和形状对齐技术，无需外部真实姿态标注即可完成类别级物体估计。
AI.method: 基于类别级模板形状进行点云对齐，通过预测对称点云建模对称对应关系，结合观测点云与对称点云重建粗略物体形状，从而估计3D位姿和尺寸。
AI.result: 在NOCS基准测试中，轻量级模型性能接近最先进方法，并成功部署于Baxter机器人实现未知实例的抓取任务验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过深度引导的形状对齐和对称建模，有效解决了类别级6D姿态估计问题，验证了模型在无真实标注数据下的可行性。

authors_text: Kai Yi,Jianye Pang,Yungeng Zhang,Xiangrui Zeng,Min Xu
title: Disentangling semantic features of macromolecules in Cryo-Electron Tomography
title_zh: 解开冷冻电子断层扫描中大分子的语义特征
abstract: Cryo-electron tomography (Cryo-ET) is a 3D imaging technique that enables the systemic study of shape, abundance, and distribution of macromolecular structures in single cells in near-atomic resolution. However, the systematic and efficient $\textit{de novo}$ recognition and recovery of macromolecular structures captured by Cryo-ET are very challenging due to the structural complexity and imaging limits. Even macromolecules with identical structures have various appearances due to different orientations and imaging limits, such as noise and the missing wedge effect. Explicitly disentangling the semantic features of macromolecules is crucial for performing several downstream analyses on the macromolecules. This paper has addressed the problem by proposing a 3D Spatial Variational Autoencoder that explicitly disentangle the structure, orientation, and shift of macromolecules. Extensive experiments on both synthesized and real cryo-ET datasets and cross-domain evaluations demonstrate the efficacy of our method.
summary: Cryo-electron tomography (Cryo-ET) is a 3D imaging technique that enables the systemic study of shape, abundance, and distribution of macromolecular structures in single cells in near-atomic resolution. However, the systematic and efficient $\textit{de novo}$ recognition and recovery of macromolecular structures captured by Cryo-ET are very challenging due to the structural complexity and imaging limits. Even macromolecules with identical structures have various appearances due to different orientations and imaging limits, such as noise and the missing wedge effect. Explicitly disentangling the semantic features of macromolecules is crucial for performing several downstream analyses on the macromolecules. This paper has addressed the problem by proposing a 3D Spatial Variational Autoencoder that explicitly disentangle the structure, orientation, and shift of macromolecules. Extensive experiments on both synthesized and real cryo-ET datasets and cross-domain evaluations demonstrate the efficacy of our method.
abstract_zh: 冷冻电子断层扫描 (Cryo-ET) 是一种 3D 成像技术，能够以近原子分辨率系统研究单细胞中大分子结构的形状、丰度和分布。然而，由于结构复杂性和成像限制，对 Cryo-ET 捕获的大分子结构进行系统且高效的 $\textit{de novo}$ 识别和恢复非常具有挑战性。即使具有相同结构的大分子也会由于不同的方向和成像限制（例如噪声和缺失的楔形效应）而具有不同的外观。明确地解开大分子的语义特征对于对大分子进行一些下游分析至关重要。本文通过提出一种 3D 空间变分自动编码器来解决这个问题，该编码器可以明确地解开大分子的结构、方向和移动。对合成和真实冷冻电子发射数据集和跨领域评估的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种3D空间变分自编码器，用于从低温电子断层扫描数据中分离大分子的语义特征。
AI.motivation: 低温电子断层扫描技术面临结构复杂性和成像限制导致的大分子系统识别与恢复难题，相同结构的大分子因取向和成像缺陷呈现多样化外观。
AI.method: 设计3D空间变分自编码器，显式分离大分子的结构、取向和位移特征。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实低温电子断层扫描数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性，跨领域评估进一步证明其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了大分子语义特征的解耦，为后续分析提供了基础，推动了低温电子断层扫描数据的系统研究。

authors_text: Nidhi Gowdra,Roopak Sinha,Stephen MacDonell,Wei Qi Yan
title: Mitigating severe over-parameterization in deep convolutional neural networks through forced feature abstraction and compression with an entropy-based heuristic
title_zh: 通过基于熵的启发式强制特征抽象和压缩，缓解深度卷积神经网络中严重的过度参数化
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) such as ResNet-50, DenseNet-40 and ResNeXt-56 are severely over-parameterized, necessitating a consequent increase in the computational resources required for model training which scales exponentially for increments in model depth. In this paper, we propose an Entropy-Based Convolutional Layer Estimation (EBCLE) heuristic which is robust and simple, yet effective in resolving the problem of over-parameterization with regards to network depth of CNN model. The EBCLE heuristic employs a priori knowledge of the entropic data distribution of input datasets to determine an upper bound for convolutional network depth, beyond which identity transformations are prevalent offering insignificant contributions for enhancing model performance. Restricting depth redundancies by forcing feature compression and abstraction restricts over-parameterization while decreasing training time by 24.99% - 78.59% without degradation in model performance. We present empirical evidence to emphasize the relative effectiveness of broader, yet shallower models trained using the EBCLE heuristic, which maintains or outperforms baseline classification accuracies of narrower yet deeper models. The EBCLE heuristic is architecturally agnostic and EBCLE based CNN models restrict depth redundancies resulting in enhanced utilization of the available computational resources. The proposed EBCLE heuristic is a compelling technique for researchers to analytically justify their HyperParameter (HP) choices for CNNs. Empirical validation of the EBCLE heuristic in training CNN models was established on five benchmarking datasets (ImageNet32, CIFAR-10/100, STL-10, MNIST) and four network architectures (DenseNet, ResNet, ResNeXt and EfficientNet B0-B2) with appropriate statistical tests employed to infer any conclusive claims presented in this paper.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) such as ResNet-50, DenseNet-40 and ResNeXt-56 are severely over-parameterized, necessitating a consequent increase in the computational resources required for model training which scales exponentially for increments in model depth. In this paper, we propose an Entropy-Based Convolutional Layer Estimation (EBCLE) heuristic which is robust and simple, yet effective in resolving the problem of over-parameterization with regards to network depth of CNN model. The EBCLE heuristic employs a priori knowledge of the entropic data distribution of input datasets to determine an upper bound for convolutional network depth, beyond which identity transformations are prevalent offering insignificant contributions for enhancing model performance. Restricting depth redundancies by forcing feature compression and abstraction restricts over-parameterization while decreasing training time by 24.99% - 78.59% without degradation in model performance. We present empirical evidence to emphasize the relative effectiveness of broader, yet shallower models trained using the EBCLE heuristic, which maintains or outperforms baseline classification accuracies of narrower yet deeper models. The EBCLE heuristic is architecturally agnostic and EBCLE based CNN models restrict depth redundancies resulting in enhanced utilization of the available computational resources. The proposed EBCLE heuristic is a compelling technique for researchers to analytically justify their HyperParameter (HP) choices for CNNs. Empirical validation of the EBCLE heuristic in training CNN models was established on five benchmarking datasets (ImageNet32, CIFAR-10/100, STL-10, MNIST) and four network architectures (DenseNet, ResNet, ResNeXt and EfficientNet B0-B2) with appropriate statistical tests employed to infer any conclusive claims presented in this paper.
abstract_zh: ResNet-50、DenseNet-40 和 ResNeXt-56 等卷积神经网络 (CNN) 严重过度参数化，因此需要增加模型训练所需的计算资源，而模型训练所需的计算资源会随着模型深度的增加而呈指数级增长。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于熵的卷积层估计（EBCLE）启发式算法，该算法稳健且简单，但可以有效解决 CNN 模型网络深度的过度参数化问题。 EBCLE 启发式利用输入数据集的熵数据分布的先验知识来确定卷积网络深度的上限，超过该上限，恒等变换很普遍，对增强模型性能的贡献微不足道。通过强制特征压缩和抽象来限制深度冗余，从而限制过度参数化，同时将训练时间减少 24.99% - 78.59%，而不会降低模型性能。我们提供经验证据来强调使用 EBCLE 启发式训练的更广泛但更浅层模型的相对有效性，该模型保持或优于更窄但更深模型的基线分类精度。 EBCLE 启发式在架构上是不可知的，并且基于 EBCLE 的 CNN 模型限制了深度冗余，从而提高了可用计算资源的利用率。所提出的 EBCLE 启发式方法对于研究人员来说是一种引人注目的技术，可以通过分析证明他们对 CNN 的超参数 (HP) 选择的合理性。 EBCLE 启发式训练 CNN 模型的经验验证是在五个基准数据集（ImageNet32、CIFAR-10/100、STL-10、MNIST）和四个网络架构（DenseNet、ResNet、ResNeXt 和 EfficientNet B0-B2）上建立的，并采用适当的统计测试来推断本文中提出的任何结论性主张。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于熵的卷积层估计（EBCLE）启发式方法，通过强制特征抽象和压缩来缓解深度卷积神经网络的严重过参数化问题。
AI.motivation: 深度CNN模型（如ResNet-50）因参数过多导致计算资源需求呈指数级增长，需在保持性能的同时减少冗余参数以提高效率。
AI.method: 利用输入数据集的熵分布先验知识确定卷积网络深度上限，通过强制特征压缩和抽象消除冗余深度，结合熵值启发式策略优化模型结构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet32、CIFAR-10/100等5个数据集和4种网络架构上验证，训练时间减少24.99%-78.59%，模型性能无下降，宽而浅模型优于窄而深模型。
AI.conclusion: EBCLE方法有效解决CNN过参数化问题，提升计算资源利用率，为超参数选择提供理论依据，且对网络架构具有通用性。

title: An XAI Approach to Deep Learning Models in the Detection of DCIS
title_zh: 用于 DCIS 检测的深度学习模型的 XAI 方法
abstract: The results showed that XAI could indeed be used as a proof of concept to begin discussions on the implementation of assistive AI systems within the clinical community.
summary: The results showed that XAI could indeed be used as a proof of concept to begin discussions on the implementation of assistive AI systems within the clinical community.
abstract_zh: 结果表明，XAI 确实可以用作概念验证，以开始讨论在临床社区内实施辅助人工智能系统。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在DCIS检测中使用可解释人工智能（XAI）方法对深度学习模型的应用。
AI.motivation: 为了推动辅助AI系统在临床环境中的实施，需要一种可解释的方法来增强深度学习模型的可信度和透明度。
AI.method: 本文采用XAI方法来分析和解释深度学习模型在DCIS检测中的决策过程。
AI.result: 结果表明，XAI可以作为概念验证，用于在临床社区中讨论辅助AI系统的实施。
AI.conclusion: XAI方法为深度学习模型在临床应用中的可解释性提供了可行的解决方案，有助于促进其在医疗领域的接受和使用。

ai_content.method: 本文采用XAI方法来分析和解释深度学习模型在DCIS检测中的决策过程。
ai_content.result: 结果表明，XAI可以作为概念验证，用于在临床社区中讨论辅助AI系统的实施。
ai_content.conclusion: XAI方法为深度学习模型在临床应用中的可解释性提供了可行的解决方案，有助于促进其在医疗领域的接受和使用。

search_text: An XAI Approach to Deep Learning Models in the Detection of DCIS 用于 DCIS 检测的深度学习模型的 XAI 方法 The results showed that XAI could indeed be used as a proof of concept to begin discussions on the implementation of assistive AI systems within the clinical community. 结果表明，XAI 确实可以用作概念验证，以开始讨论在临床社区内实施辅助人工智能系统。 本文探讨了在DCIS检测中使用可解释人工智能（XAI）方法对深度学习模型的应用。 Michele La Ferla,Matthew Montebello,Dylan Seychell eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Memory Guided Road Detection
title_zh: 记忆引导道路检测
abstract: In self driving car applications, there is a requirement to predict the location of the lane given an input RGB front facing image. In this paper, we propose an architecture that allows us to increase the speed and robustness of road detection without a large hit in accuracy by introducing an underlying shared feature space that is propagated over time, which serves as a flowing dynamic memory. By utilizing the gist of previous frames, we train the network to predict the current road with a greater accuracy and lesser deviation from previous frames.
summary: In self driving car applications, there is a requirement to predict the location of the lane given an input RGB front facing image. In this paper, we propose an architecture that allows us to increase the speed and robustness of road detection without a large hit in accuracy by introducing an underlying shared feature space that is propagated over time, which serves as a flowing dynamic memory. By utilizing the gist of previous frames, we train the network to predict the current road with a greater accuracy and lesser deviation from previous frames.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶汽车应用中，需要在给定输入 RGB 正面图像的情况下预测车道位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种架构，通过引入随时间传播的底层共享特征空间（充当流动的动态内存），可以提高道路检测的速度和鲁棒性，而不会严重影响准确性。通过利用先前帧的要点，我们训练网络以更高的精度和更小的与先前帧的偏差来预测当前道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态内存机制的架构，用于自动驾驶中通过RGB图像更准确地检测道路位置。
AI.motivation: 传统道路检测方法在复杂场景下存在速度慢、鲁棒性差的问题，需在不显著牺牲准确率的前提下提升性能。
AI.method: 构建共享特征空间作为动态内存，通过跨帧传播历史信息，结合当前帧特征进行道路预测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在提升检测速度和鲁棒性的同时，保持了较高的检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 动态内存机制有效增强了道路检测的时序一致性，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的道路识别方案。

title: The Story in Your Eyes: An Individual-difference-aware Model for Cross-person Gaze Estimation
title_zh: 你眼中的故事：用于跨人注视估计的个体差异感知模型
abstract: We propose a novel method on refining cross-person gaze prediction task with eye/face images only by explicitly modelling the person-specific differences. Specifically, we first assume that we can obtain some initial gaze prediction results with existing method, which we refer to as InitNet, and then introduce three modules, the Validity Module (VM), Self-Calibration (SC) and Person-specific Transform (PT)) Module. By predicting the reliability of current eye/face images, our VM is able to identify invalid samples, e.g. eye blinking images, and reduce their effects in our modelling process. Our SC and PT module then learn to compensate for the differences on valid samples only. The former models the translation offsets by bridging the gap between initial predictions and dataset-wise distribution. And the later learns more general person-specific transformation by incorporating the information from existing initial predictions of the same person. We validate our ideas on three publicly available datasets, EVE, XGaze and MPIIGaze and demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the SOTA methods significantly on all of them, e.g. respectively 21.7%, 36.0% and 32.9% relative performance improvements. We won the GAZE 2021 Competition on the EVE dataset. Our code can be found here https://github.com/bjj9/EVE_SCPT.
summary: We propose a novel method on refining cross-person gaze prediction task with eye/face images only by explicitly modelling the person-specific differences. Specifically, we first assume that we can obtain some initial gaze prediction results with existing method, which we refer to as InitNet, and then introduce three modules, the Validity Module (VM), Self-Calibration (SC) and Person-specific Transform (PT)) Module. By predicting the reliability of current eye/face images, our VM is able to identify invalid samples, e.g. eye blinking images, and reduce their effects in our modelling process. Our SC and PT module then learn to compensate for the differences on valid samples only. The former models the translation offsets by bridging the gap between initial predictions and dataset-wise distribution. And the later learns more general person-specific transformation by incorporating the information from existing initial predictions of the same person. We validate our ideas on three publicly available datasets, EVE, XGaze and MPIIGaze and demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the SOTA methods significantly on all of them, e.g. respectively 21.7%, 36.0% and 32.9% relative performance improvements. We won the GAZE 2021 Competition on the EVE dataset. Our code can be found here https://github.com/bjj9/EVE_SCPT.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，仅通过显式建模特定于人的差异来细化眼睛/面部图像的跨人凝视预测任务。具体来说，我们首先假设我们可以使用现有方法获得一些初始注视预测结果，我们将其称为InitNet，然后引入三个模块，有效性模块（VM）、自校准（SC）和特定于人的变换（PT）模块。通过预测当前眼睛/面部图像的可靠性，我们的虚拟机能够识别无效样本，例如眨眼图像，并减少它们对我们建模过程的影响。然后，我们的 SC 和 PT 模块学会仅补偿有效样本的差异。前者通过弥合初始预测和数据集分布之间的差距来对平移偏移进行建模。后者通过合并来自同一个人的现有初始预测的信息来学习更一般的特定于个人的转换。我们在三个公开可用的数据集 EVE、XGaze 和 MPIIGaze 上验证了我们的想法，并证明我们提出的方法在所有数据集上都显着优于 SOTA 方法，例如相对性能分别提高了 21.7%、36.0% 和 32.9%。我们赢得了 EVE 数据集的 GAZE 2021 竞赛。我们的代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/bjj9/EVE_SCPT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于个体差异建模的跨人眼动估计方法，通过引入有效性模块、自校准模块和个性化变换模块提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨人眼动估计方法未充分考虑个体差异导致预测偏差，需通过建模个体特征差异提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出包含有效性模块（VM）筛选无效样本、自校准模块（SC）对齐预测分布、个性化变换模块（PT）学习个体特征的三阶段框架。
AI.result: 在EVE/XGaze/MPIIGaze数据集上分别实现21.7%/36.0%/32.9%的相对性能提升，并获得GAZE 2021竞赛冠军。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模个体差异可显著提升跨人眼动估计精度，方法在公开数据集上验证了有效性且代码已开源。

authors_text: Quanziang Wang,Renzhen Wang,Yuexiang Li,Kai Ma,Yefeng Zheng,Deyu Meng
title: Residual Moment Loss for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 医学图像分割的残余矩损失
abstract: Location information is proven to benefit the deep learning models on capturing the manifold structure of target objects, and accordingly boosts the accuracy of medical image segmentation. However, most existing methods encode the location information in an implicit way, e.g. the distance transform maps, which describe the relative distance from each pixel to the contour boundary, for the network to learn. These implicit approaches do not fully exploit the position information (i.e. absolute location) of targets. In this paper, we propose a novel loss function, namely residual moment (RM) loss, to explicitly embed the location information of segmentation targets during the training of deep learning networks. Particularly, motivated by image moments, the segmentation prediction map and ground-truth map are weighted by coordinate information. Then our RM loss encourages the networks to maintain the consistency between the two weighted maps, which promotes the segmentation networks to easily locate the targets and extract manifold-structure-related features. We validate the proposed RM loss by conducting extensive experiments on two publicly available datasets, i.e., 2D optic cup and disk segmentation and 3D left atrial segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our RM loss, which significantly boosts the accuracy of segmentation networks.
summary: Location information is proven to benefit the deep learning models on capturing the manifold structure of target objects, and accordingly boosts the accuracy of medical image segmentation. However, most existing methods encode the location information in an implicit way, e.g. the distance transform maps, which describe the relative distance from each pixel to the contour boundary, for the network to learn. These implicit approaches do not fully exploit the position information (i.e. absolute location) of targets. In this paper, we propose a novel loss function, namely residual moment (RM) loss, to explicitly embed the location information of segmentation targets during the training of deep learning networks. Particularly, motivated by image moments, the segmentation prediction map and ground-truth map are weighted by coordinate information. Then our RM loss encourages the networks to maintain the consistency between the two weighted maps, which promotes the segmentation networks to easily locate the targets and extract manifold-structure-related features. We validate the proposed RM loss by conducting extensive experiments on two publicly available datasets, i.e., 2D optic cup and disk segmentation and 3D left atrial segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our RM loss, which significantly boosts the accuracy of segmentation networks.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，位置信息有利于深度学习模型捕获目标对象的流形结构，从而提高医学图像分割的准确性。然而，大多数现有方法以隐式方式编码位置信息，例如距离变换图，描述每个像素到轮廓边界的相对距离，供网络学习。这些隐式方法没有充分利用目标的位置信息（即绝对位置）。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，即残差矩（RM）损失，以在深度学习网络的训练过程中显式嵌入分割目标的位置信息。特别是，在图像矩的推动下，分割预测图和地面实况图通过坐标信息进行加权。然后，我们的 RM 损失鼓励网络保持两个加权图之间的一致性，从而促进分割网络轻松定位目标并提取流形结构相关的特征。我们通过对两个公开可用的数据集（即 2D 视杯和视盘分割以及 3D 左心房分割）进行广泛的实验来验证所提出的 RM 损失。实验结果证明了 RM 损失的有效性，它显着提高了分割网络的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为残差矩（RM）损失的新损失函数，用于在医学图像分割中显式嵌入目标的位置信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过隐式方式编码位置信息，未能充分利用目标的绝对位置信息，因此本文提出显式嵌入位置信息以提升分割精度。
AI.method: 受图像矩的启发，通过坐标信息对分割预测图和真实图进行加权，并通过RM损失鼓励网络保持加权图之间的一致性。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明RM损失显著提升了分割网络的精度。
AI.conclusion: RM损失能够有效提升医学图像分割的准确性，通过显式嵌入位置信息促进网络更好地定位目标并提取相关特征。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为残差矩（RM）损失的新损失函数，用于在医学图像分割中显式嵌入目标的位置信息。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法通过隐式方式编码位置信息，未能充分利用目标的绝对位置信息，因此本文提出显式嵌入位置信息以提升分割精度。
ai_content.method: 受图像矩的启发，通过坐标信息对分割预测图和真实图进行加权，并通过RM损失鼓励网络保持加权图之间的一致性。
ai_content.result: 在两个公开数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明RM损失显著提升了分割网络的精度。
ai_content.conclusion: RM损失能够有效提升医学图像分割的准确性，通过显式嵌入位置信息促进网络更好地定位目标并提取相关特征。

search_text: Residual Moment Loss for Medical Image Segmentation 医学图像分割的残余矩损失 Location information is proven to benefit the deep learning models on capturing the manifold structure of target objects, and accordingly boosts the accuracy of medical image segmentation. However, most existing methods encode the location information in an implicit way, e.g. the distance transform maps, which describe the relative distance from each pixel to the contour boundary, for the network to learn. These implicit approaches do not fully exploit the position information (i.e. absolute location) of targets. In this paper, we propose a novel loss function, namely residual moment (RM) loss, to explicitly embed the location information of segmentation targets during the training of deep learning networks. Particularly, motivated by image moments, the segmentation prediction map and ground-truth map are weighted by coordinate information. Then our RM loss encourages the networks to maintain the consistency between the two weighted maps, which promotes the segmentation networks to easily locate the targets and extract manifold-structure-related features. We validate the proposed RM loss by conducting extensive experiments on two publicly available datasets, i.e., 2D optic cup and disk segmentation and 3D left atrial segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our RM loss, which significantly boosts the accuracy of segmentation networks. 事实证明，位置信息有利于深度学习模型捕获目标对象的流形结构，从而提高医学图像分割的准确性。然而，大多数现有方法以隐式方式编码位置信息，例如距离变换图，描述每个像素到轮廓边界的相对距离，供网络学习。这些隐式方法没有充分利用目标的位置信息（即绝对位置）。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，即残差矩（RM）损失，以在深度学习网络的训练过程中显式嵌入分割目标的位置信息。特别是，在图像矩的推动下，分割预测图和地面实况图通过坐标信息进行加权。然后，我们的 RM 损失鼓励网络保持两个加权图之间的一致性，从而促进分割网络轻松定位目标并提取流形结构相关的特征。我们通过对两个公开可用的数据集（即 2D 视杯和视盘分割以及 3D 左心房分割）进行广泛的实验来验证所提出的 RM 损失。实验结果证明了 RM 损失的有效性，它显着提高了分割网络的准确性。 本文提出了一种名为残差矩（RM）损失的新损失函数，用于在医学图像分割中显式嵌入目标的位置信息。 Quanziang Wang,Renzhen Wang,Yuexiang Li,Kai Ma,Yefeng Zheng,Deyu Meng eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Linear-Time Approximation Scheme for k-Means Clustering of Affine Subspaces
title_zh: 仿射子空间 k 均值聚类的线性时间近似方案
abstract: In this paper, we present a linear-time approximation scheme for $k$-means clustering of \emph{incomplete} data points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space. An \emph{incomplete} data point with $Δ>0$ unspecified entries is represented as an axis-parallel affine subspaces of dimension $Δ$. The distance between two incomplete data points is defined as the Euclidean distance between two closest points in the axis-parallel affine subspaces corresponding to the data points. We present an algorithm for $k$-means clustering of axis-parallel affine subspaces of dimension $Δ$ that yields an $(1+ε)$-approximate solution in $O(nd)$ time. The constants hidden behind $O(\cdot)$ depend only on $Δ, ε$ and $k$. This improves the $O(n^2 d)$-time algorithm by Eiben et al.[SODA'21] by a factor of $n$.
summary: In this paper, we present a linear-time approximation scheme for $k$-means clustering of \emph{incomplete} data points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space. An \emph{incomplete} data point with $Δ>0$ unspecified entries is represented as an axis-parallel affine subspaces of dimension $Δ$. The distance between two incomplete data points is defined as the Euclidean distance between two closest points in the axis-parallel affine subspaces corresponding to the data points. We present an algorithm for $k$-means clustering of axis-parallel affine subspaces of dimension $Δ$ that yields an $(1+ε)$-approximate solution in $O(nd)$ time. The constants hidden behind $O(\cdot)$ depend only on $Δ, ε$ and $k$. This improves the $O(n^2 d)$-time algorithm by Eiben et al.[SODA'21] by a factor of $n$.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种线性时间近似方案，用于$d$维欧几里德空间中\emph{不完整}数据点的$k$均值聚类。具有 $Δ>0$ 未指定条目的 \emph{不完整} 数据点表示为维度 $Δ$ 的轴平行仿射子空间。两个不完整数据点之间的距离定义为数据点对应的轴平行仿射子空间中两个最近点之间的欧氏距离。我们提出了一种对维度 $Δ$ 的轴平行仿射子空间进行 $k$ 均值聚类的算法，该算法在 $O(nd)$ 时间内产生 $(1+ε)$ 近似解。 $O(\cdot)$ 后面隐藏的常数仅取决于 $Δ、ε$ 和 $k$。这将 Eiben 等人[SODA'21] 的 $O(n^2 d)$ 时间算法改进了 $n$ 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于处理不完整数据点的k-均值聚类的线性时间近似方案，其中不完整数据点被表示为轴对齐的仿射子空间。
AI.motivation: 传统k-均值聚类算法在处理高维不完整数据时效率低下，而现有方法的时间复杂度较高，需改进以适应大规模数据集。
AI.method: 通过将不完整数据点建模为轴对齐的Δ维仿射子空间，并定义其距离为子空间间最近点的欧氏距离，设计了一种基于几何特性的线性时间近似算法。
AI.result: 算法在O(nd)时间内实现(1+ε)近似解，且常数因子仅依赖Δ、ε和k，相比先前O(n²d)算法提升了n倍效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理高维不完整数据的聚类问题提供了更高效的解决方案，显著降低了计算复杂度。

title: $α$-approximate Reductions: a Novel Source of Heuristics for Better Approximation Algorithms
title_zh: $α$-近似约简：更好的近似算法的启发式新来源
abstract: Lokshtanov et al.~[STOC 2017] introduced \emph{lossy kernelization} as a mathematical framework for quantifying the effectiveness of preprocessing algorithms in preserving approximation ratios. \emph{$α$-approximate reduction rules} are a central notion of this framework. We propose that carefully crafted $α$-approximate reduction rules can yield improved approximation ratios in practice, while being easy to implement as well. This is distinctly different from the (theoretical) purpose for which Lokshtanov et al. designed $α$-approximate Reduction Rules. As evidence in support of this proposal we present a new 2-approximate reduction rule for the \textsc{Dominating Set} problem. This rule, when combined with an approximation algorithm for \textsc{Dominating Set}, yields significantly better approximation ratios on a variety of benchmark instances as compared to the latter algorithm alone. The central thesis of this work is that $α$-approximate reduction rules can be used as a tool for designing approximation algorithms which perform better in practice. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first exploration of the use of $α$-approximate reduction rules as a design technique for practical approximation algorithms. We believe that this technique could be useful in coming up with improved approximation algorithms for other optimization problems as well.
summary: Lokshtanov et al.~[STOC 2017] introduced \emph{lossy kernelization} as a mathematical framework for quantifying the effectiveness of preprocessing algorithms in preserving approximation ratios. \emph{$α$-approximate reduction rules} are a central notion of this framework. We propose that carefully crafted $α$-approximate reduction rules can yield improved approximation ratios in practice, while being easy to implement as well. This is distinctly different from the (theoretical) purpose for which Lokshtanov et al. designed $α$-approximate Reduction Rules. As evidence in support of this proposal we present a new 2-approximate reduction rule for the \textsc{Dominating Set} problem. This rule, when combined with an approximation algorithm for \textsc{Dominating Set}, yields significantly better approximation ratios on a variety of benchmark instances as compared to the latter algorithm alone. The central thesis of this work is that $α$-approximate reduction rules can be used as a tool for designing approximation algorithms which perform better in practice. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first exploration of the use of $α$-approximate reduction rules as a design technique for practical approximation algorithms. We believe that this technique could be useful in coming up with improved approximation algorithms for other optimization problems as well.
abstract_zh: Lokshtanov 等人~[STOC 2017] 引入了 \emph{有损核化} 作为数学框架，用于量化预处理算法在保持近似比率方面的有效性。 \emph{$α$-近似归约规则}是该框架的核心概念。我们建议精心设计的 $α$ 近似约简规则可以在实践中产生改进的近似比率，同时也易于实现。这与 Lokshtanov 等人的（理论）目的明显不同。设计了$α$-近似的缩减规则。作为支持该提案的证据，我们针对 \textsc{Dominate Set} 问题提出了一个新的 2 近似约简规则。当与 \textsc{Dominate Set} 的近似算法结合使用时，与单独使用后一种算法相比，该规则在各种基准实例上产生明显更好的近似率。这项工作的中心论点是，$α$-近似约简规则可以用作设计在实践中表现更好的近似算法的工具。据我们所知，我们首次探索使用 $α$ 近似约简规则作为实用近似算法的设计技术。我们相信，这种技术对于为其他优化问题提出改进的近似算法也很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用α近似约简规则作为设计更优近似算法的实用工具，通过实例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有α近似约简规则主要用于理论分析，而本文旨在探索其在实际算法设计中的应用潜力，以提升近似算法的实际表现。
AI.method: 提出新的2近似约简规则用于支配集问题，将其与近似算法结合并在基准实例上进行测试。
AI.result: 实验显示结合新规则后，近似算法在多种基准实例上的表现显著优于原有算法。
AI.conclusion: α近似约简规则可作为实用近似算法设计的新方法，未来有望推广至其他优化问题。
