title: PeCoQ: A Dataset for Persian Complex Question Answering over Knowledge Graph
title_zh: PeCoQ：知识图谱上的波斯语复杂问答数据集
abstract: Question answering systems may find the answers to users' questions from either unstructured texts or structured data such as knowledge graphs. Answering questions using supervised learning approaches including deep learning models need large training datasets. In recent years, some datasets have been presented for the task of Question answering over knowledge graphs, which is the focus of this paper. Although many datasets in English were proposed, there have been a few question-answering datasets in Persian. This paper introduces \textit{PeCoQ}, a dataset for Persian question answering. This dataset contains 10,000 complex questions and answers extracted from the Persian knowledge graph, FarsBase. For each question, the SPARQL query and two paraphrases that were written by linguists are provided as well. There are different types of complexities in the dataset, such as multi-relation, multi-entity, ordinal, and temporal constraints. In this paper, we discuss the dataset's characteristics and describe our methodology for building it.
summary: Question answering systems may find the answers to users' questions from either unstructured texts or structured data such as knowledge graphs. Answering questions using supervised learning approaches including deep learning models need large training datasets. In recent years, some datasets have been presented for the task of Question answering over knowledge graphs, which is the focus of this paper. Although many datasets in English were proposed, there have been a few question-answering datasets in Persian. This paper introduces \textit{PeCoQ}, a dataset for Persian question answering. This dataset contains 10,000 complex questions and answers extracted from the Persian knowledge graph, FarsBase. For each question, the SPARQL query and two paraphrases that were written by linguists are provided as well. There are different types of complexities in the dataset, such as multi-relation, multi-entity, ordinal, and temporal constraints. In this paper, we discuss the dataset's characteristics and describe our methodology for building it.
abstract_zh: 问答系统可以从非结构化文本或知识图谱等结构化数据中找到用户问题的答案。使用监督学习方法（包括深度学习模型）回答问题需要大量训练数据集。近年来，一些数据集被提出用于知识图谱问答任务，这是本文的重点。尽管提出了许多英语数据集，但也出现了一些波斯语问答数据集。本文介绍了波斯语问答数据集 \textit{PeCoQ}。该数据集包含从波斯语知识图 FarsBase 中提取的 10,000 个复杂问题和答案。对于每个问题，还提供了 SPARQL 查询和由语言学家编写的两个释义。数据集中存在不同类型的复杂性，例如多关系、多实体、序数和时间约束。在本文中，我们讨论了数据集的特征并描述了我们构建它的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PeCoQ数据集，用于波斯语复杂知识图谱问答任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管英语知识图谱问答数据集丰富，但缺乏波斯语相关资源，限制了该语言的问答系统研究。
AI.method: 从波斯语知识图谱FarsBase提取10,000个复杂问题，由语言学家生成SPARQL查询及同义句，并包含多关系、多实体等复杂类型。
AI.result: 构建包含10,000个问题、SPARQL查询及同义句的PeCoQ数据集，涵盖多种复杂约束类型。
AI.conclusion: PeCoQ为波斯语复杂问答研究提供关键资源，促进相关模型与方法的开发。

authors_text: Cheng Sun,Chi-Wei Hsiao,Ning-Hsu Wang,Min Sun,Hwann-Tzong Chen
title: Indoor Panorama Planar 3D Reconstruction via Divide and Conquer
title_zh: 通过分而治之的室内全景平面 3D 重建
abstract: Indoor panorama typically consists of human-made structures parallel or perpendicular to gravity. We leverage this phenomenon to approximate the scene in a 360-degree image with (H)orizontal-planes and (V)ertical-planes. To this end, we propose an effective divide-and-conquer strategy that divides pixels based on their plane orientation estimation; then, the succeeding instance segmentation module conquers the task of planes clustering more easily in each plane orientation group. Besides, parameters of V-planes depend on camera yaw rotation, but translation-invariant CNNs are less aware of the yaw change. We thus propose a yaw-invariant V-planar reparameterization for CNNs to learn. We create a benchmark for indoor panorama planar reconstruction by extending existing 360 depth datasets with ground truth H\&V-planes (referred to as PanoH&V dataset) and adopt state-of-the-art planar reconstruction methods to predict H\&V-planes as our baselines. Our method outperforms the baselines by a large margin on the proposed dataset.
summary: Indoor panorama typically consists of human-made structures parallel or perpendicular to gravity. We leverage this phenomenon to approximate the scene in a 360-degree image with (H)orizontal-planes and (V)ertical-planes. To this end, we propose an effective divide-and-conquer strategy that divides pixels based on their plane orientation estimation; then, the succeeding instance segmentation module conquers the task of planes clustering more easily in each plane orientation group. Besides, parameters of V-planes depend on camera yaw rotation, but translation-invariant CNNs are less aware of the yaw change. We thus propose a yaw-invariant V-planar reparameterization for CNNs to learn. We create a benchmark for indoor panorama planar reconstruction by extending existing 360 depth datasets with ground truth H\&V-planes (referred to as PanoH&V dataset) and adopt state-of-the-art planar reconstruction methods to predict H\&V-planes as our baselines. Our method outperforms the baselines by a large margin on the proposed dataset.
abstract_zh: 室内全景通常由平行或垂直于重力的人造结构组成。我们利用这种现象来近似具有 (H) 水平平面和 (V) 垂直平面的 360 度图像中的场景。为此，我们提出了一种有效的分而治之策略，根据像素的平面方向估计来划分像素；然后，后续的实例分割模块可以更轻松地完成每个平面方向组中的平面聚类任务。此外，V 平面的参数取决于相机偏航旋转，但平移不变 CNN 不太了解偏航变化。因此，我们提出了一种偏航不变的 V 平面重新参数化供 CNN 学习。我们通过使用地面真实 H\&V 平面（称为 PanoH&V 数据集）扩展现有的 360 深度数据集，创建室内全景平面重建的基准，并采用最先进的平面重建方法来预测 H\&V 平面作为我们的基线。我们的方法在建议的数据集上大大优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分而治之策略的室内全景平面三维重建方法，通过水平面和垂直面的划分实现高效重建。
AI.motivation: 室内场景普遍存在水平与垂直结构，但现有方法难以有效利用这一特性进行全景重建。
AI.method: 通过平面方向估计划分像素，结合实例分割模块进行分组聚类，并提出旋转不变的垂直平面重参数化方法以增强CNN对相机旋转的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在自建的PanoH&V数据集上，该方法显著优于现有平面重建基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 分而治之策略与旋转不变重参数化有效提升了室内全景平面重建的准确性。

authors_text: Jian Cheng,Tian Zhang,Shuang Zhang,Huimin Ren,Guo Yu,Xiliang Zhang,Shangce Gao,Lianbo Ma
title: A Cascade Dual-Decoder Model for Joint Entity and Relation Extraction
title_zh: 用于联合实体和关系提取的级联双解码器模型
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence, 2024
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence, 2024
abstract: In knowledge graph construction, a challenging issue is how to extract complex (e.g., overlapping) entities and relationships from a small amount of unstructured historical data. The traditional pipeline methods are to divide the extraction into two separate subtasks, which misses the potential interaction between the two subtasks and may lead to error propagation. In this work, we propose an effective cascade dual-decoder method to extract overlapping relational triples, which includes a text-specific relation decoder and a relation-corresponded entity decoder. Our approach is straightforward and it includes a text-specific relation decoder and a relation-corresponded entity decoder. The text-specific relation decoder detects relations from a sentence at the text level. That is, it does this according to the semantic information of the whole sentence. For each extracted relation, which is with trainable embedding, the relation-corresponded entity decoder detects the corresponding head and tail entities using a span-based tagging scheme. In this way, the overlapping triple problem can be tackled naturally. We conducted experiments on a real-world open-pit mine dataset and two public datasets to verify the method's generalizability. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and competitiveness of our proposed method and achieve better F1 scores under strict evaluation metrics. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/prastunlp/DualDec.
summary: In knowledge graph construction, a challenging issue is how to extract complex (e.g., overlapping) entities and relationships from a small amount of unstructured historical data. The traditional pipeline methods are to divide the extraction into two separate subtasks, which misses the potential interaction between the two subtasks and may lead to error propagation. In this work, we propose an effective cascade dual-decoder method to extract overlapping relational triples, which includes a text-specific relation decoder and a relation-corresponded entity decoder. Our approach is straightforward and it includes a text-specific relation decoder and a relation-corresponded entity decoder. The text-specific relation decoder detects relations from a sentence at the text level. That is, it does this according to the semantic information of the whole sentence. For each extracted relation, which is with trainable embedding, the relation-corresponded entity decoder detects the corresponding head and tail entities using a span-based tagging scheme. In this way, the overlapping triple problem can be tackled naturally. We conducted experiments on a real-world open-pit mine dataset and two public datasets to verify the method's generalizability. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and competitiveness of our proposed method and achieve better F1 scores under strict evaluation metrics. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/prastunlp/DualDec.
abstract_zh: 在知识图谱构建中，一个具有挑战性的问题是如何从少量非结构化历史数据中提取复杂（例如重叠）的实体和关系。传统的管道方法是将提取分为两个独立的子任务，这错过了两个子任务之间潜在的交互，并可能导致错误传播。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的级联双解码器方法来提取重叠的关系三元组，其中包括特定于文本的关系解码器和关系对应的实体解码器。我们的方法很简单，它包括特定于文本的关系解码器和关系对应的实体解码器。文本特定关系解码器在文本级别检测句子中的关系。也就是说，它根据整个句子的语义信息来执行此操作。对于每个提取的具有可训练嵌入的关系，关系对应实体解码器使用基于跨度的标记方案检测相应的头和尾实体。这样，重叠三重问题就可以自然解决了。我们在现实世界的露天矿数据集和两个公共数据集上进行了实验，以验证该方法的通用性。实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性和竞争力，并在严格的评估指标下取得了更好的F1分数。我们的实现可在 https://github.com/prastunlp/DualDec 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种级联双解码器模型，用于从非结构化历史数据中联合提取重叠实体和关系。
AI.motivation: 传统流水线方法将实体和关系提取分为独立子任务，忽略了两者间的潜在交互并可能导致误差传播。
AI.method: 设计包含文本特定关系解码器和关系对应实体解码器的级联系统，通过语义级关系检测与基于跨度的实体识别解决重叠三元组问题。
AI.result: 在实际露天矿数据集和两个公开数据集上实验验证，严格评估指标下F1分数优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过联合建模有效提升了重叠实体关系抽取性能，具有良好的通用性。

The traditional pipeline methods are to divide the extraction into two separate subtasks, which misses the potential interaction between the two subtasks and may lead to error propagation. In this work, we propose an effective cascade dual-decoder method to extract overlapping relational triples, which includes a text-specific relation decoder and a relation-corresponded entity decoder. Our approach is straightforward and it includes a text-specific relation decoder and a relation-corresponded entity decoder. The text-specific relation decoder detects relations from a sentence at the text level. That is, it does this according to the semantic information of the whole sentence. For each extracted relation, which is with trainable embedding, the relation-corresponded entity decoder detects the corresponding head and tail entities using a span-based tagging scheme. In this way, the overlapping triple problem can be tackled naturally. We conducted experiments on a real-world open-pit mine dataset and two public datasets to verify the method's generalizability. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and competitiveness of our proposed method and achieve better F1 scores under strict evaluation metrics. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/prastunlp/DualDec. 在知识图谱构建中，一个具有挑战性的问题是如何从少量非结构化历史数据中提取复杂（例如重叠）的实体和关系。传统的管道方法是将提取分为两个独立的子任务，这错过了两个子任务之间潜在的交互，并可能导致错误传播。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的级联双解码器方法来提取重叠的关系三元组，其中包括特定于文本的关系解码器和关系对应的实体解码器。我们的方法很简单，它包括特定于文本的关系解码器和关系对应的实体解码器。文本特定关系解码器在文本级别检测句子中的关系。也就是说，它根据整个句子的语义信息来执行此操作。对于每个提取的具有可训练嵌入的关系，关系对应实体解码器使用基于跨度的标记方案检测相应的头和尾实体。这样，重叠三重问题就可以自然解决了。我们在现实世界的露天矿数据集和两个公共数据集上进行了实验，以验证该方法的通用性。实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性和竞争力，并在严格的评估指标下取得了更好的F1分数。我们的实现可在 https://github.com/prastunlp/DualDec 获取。 本文提出一种级联双解码器模型，用于从非结构化历史数据中联合提取重叠实体和关系。 Jian Cheng,Tian Zhang,Shuang Zhang,Huimin Ren,Guo Yu,Xiliang Zhang,Shangce Gao,Lianbo Ma cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Few-Shot Domain Expansion for Face Anti-Spoofing
title_zh: 用于人脸反欺骗的少量域扩展
abstract: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) is an indispensable and widely used module in face recognition systems. Although high accuracy has been achieved, a FAS system will never be perfect due to the non-stationary applied environments and the potential emergence of new types of presentation attacks in real-world applications. In practice, given a handful of labeled samples from a new deployment scenario (target domain) and abundant labeled face images in the existing source domain, the FAS system is expected to perform well in the new scenario without sacrificing the performance on the original domain. To this end, we identify and address a more practical problem: Few-Shot Domain Expansion for Face Anti-Spoofing (FSDE-FAS). This problem is challenging since with insufficient target domain training samples, the model may suffer from both overfitting to the target domain and catastrophic forgetting of the source domain. To address the problem, this paper proposes a Style transfer-based Augmentation for Semantic Alignment (SASA) framework. We propose to augment the target data by generating auxiliary samples based on photorealistic style transfer. With the assistant of the augmented data, we further propose a carefully designed mechanism to align different domains from both instance-level and distribution-level, and then stabilize the performance on the source domain with a less-forgetting constraint. Two benchmarks are proposed to simulate the FSDE-FAS scenarios, and the experimental results show that the proposed SASA method outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) is an indispensable and widely used module in face recognition systems. Although high accuracy has been achieved, a FAS system will never be perfect due to the non-stationary applied environments and the potential emergence of new types of presentation attacks in real-world applications. In practice, given a handful of labeled samples from a new deployment scenario (target domain) and abundant labeled face images in the existing source domain, the FAS system is expected to perform well in the new scenario without sacrificing the performance on the original domain. To this end, we identify and address a more practical problem: Few-Shot Domain Expansion for Face Anti-Spoofing (FSDE-FAS). This problem is challenging since with insufficient target domain training samples, the model may suffer from both overfitting to the target domain and catastrophic forgetting of the source domain. To address the problem, this paper proposes a Style transfer-based Augmentation for Semantic Alignment (SASA) framework. We propose to augment the target data by generating auxiliary samples based on photorealistic style transfer. With the assistant of the augmented data, we further propose a carefully designed mechanism to align different domains from both instance-level and distribution-level, and then stabilize the performance on the source domain with a less-forgetting constraint. Two benchmarks are proposed to simulate the FSDE-FAS scenarios, and the experimental results show that the proposed SASA method outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗（FAS）是人脸识别系统中不可或缺且广泛使用的模块。尽管已经实现了高精度，但由于应用环境的非平稳性以及实际应用中可能出现的新型演示攻击，FAS 系统永远不会是完美的。在实践中，给定来自新部署场景（目标域）的少量标记样本和现有源域中丰富的标记人脸图像，FAS 系统有望在新场景中表现良好，而不会牺牲原始域上的性能。为此，我们确定并解决了一个更实际的问题：用于人脸反欺骗的少镜头域扩展（FSDE-FAS）。这个问题具有挑战性，因为如果目标域训练样本不足，模型可能会过度拟合目标域和源域的灾难性遗忘。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于风格迁移的语义对齐增强（SASA）框架。我们建议通过基于真实感风格迁移生成辅助样本来增强目标数据。在增强数据的帮助下，我们进一步提出了一种精心设计的机制，从实例级和分布级对齐不同的域，然后以较少忘记的约束来稳定源域上的性能。提出了两个基准来模拟 FSDE-FAS 场景，实验结果表明，所提出的 SASA 方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向少量样本域扩展的活体检测方法（FSDE-FAS），旨在解决在新部署场景下仅有少量标注样本时，如何保持原有性能并适应新场景的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有活体检测系统在非静态环境和新型攻击出现时性能下降，且新场景下样本稀缺导致模型易过拟合或遗忘源域知识，需开发一种高效适应新域的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于风格迁移的语义对齐增强框架（SASA），通过生成辅助样本增强目标域数据，并从实例级和分布级对齐域间差异，结合遗忘约束稳定源域性能。
AI.result: 在两个自建基准数据集上验证，SASA方法在少量样本场景下优于现有最先进方法，有效平衡了新旧域性能。
AI.conclusion: SASA通过域对齐与数据增强机制，成功解决了少量样本域扩展问题，为实际应用中动态环境下的活体检测提供了有效方案。

title: DenseTNT: Waymo Open Dataset Motion Prediction Challenge 1st Place Solution
title_zh: DenseTNT：Waymo 开放数据集运动预测挑战赛第一名解决方案
comment: This is a technical report. ICCV paper is at arXiv:2108.09640 and project page is at https://github.com/Tsinghua-MARS-Lab/DenseTNT
comments: This is a technical report. ICCV paper is at arXiv:2108.09640 and project page is at https://github.com/Tsinghua-MARS-Lab/DenseTNT
abstract: In autonomous driving, goal-based multi-trajectory prediction methods are proved to be effective recently, where they first score goal candidates, then select a final set of goals, and finally complete trajectories based on the selected goals. However, these methods usually involve goal predictions based on sparse predefined anchors. In this work, we propose an anchor-free model, named DenseTNT, which performs dense goal probability estimation for trajectory prediction. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance, and ranks 1st on the Waymo Open Dataset Motion Prediction Challenge. Project page is at https://github.com/Tsinghua-MARS-Lab/DenseTNT.
summary: In autonomous driving, goal-based multi-trajectory prediction methods are proved to be effective recently, where they first score goal candidates, then select a final set of goals, and finally complete trajectories based on the selected goals. However, these methods usually involve goal predictions based on sparse predefined anchors. In this work, we propose an anchor-free model, named DenseTNT, which performs dense goal probability estimation for trajectory prediction. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance, and ranks 1st on the Waymo Open Dataset Motion Prediction Challenge. Project page is at https://github.com/Tsinghua-MARS-Lab/DenseTNT.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶中，基于目标的多轨迹预测方法最近被证明是有效的，它们首先对候选目标进行评分，然后选择一组最终目标，最后根据所选目标完成轨迹。然而，这些方法通常涉及基于稀疏预定义锚的目标预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 DenseTNT 的无锚模型，它为轨迹预测执行密集目标概率估计。我们的模型实现了最先进的性能，并在 Waymo 开放数据集运动预测挑战赛中排名第一。项目页面位于https://github.com/Tsinghua-MARS-Lab/DenseTNT。

AI.tldr: 提出DenseTNT模型，在Waymo数据集运动预测挑战赛中取得第一名，解决自动驾驶中的多轨迹预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖稀疏预定义锚点进行目标预测，限制了模型性能，需更密集的目标预测方法。
AI.method: 提出无锚点模型DenseTNT，通过密集目标概率估计进行轨迹预测，替代传统稀疏锚点方法。
AI.result: 模型在Waymo数据集挑战赛中排名第一，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 证明密集目标概率估计在轨迹预测中的有效性，为自动驾驶运动预测提供新方向。

authors_text: Chang Cheng,Yadong Yan,Mingjun Guan,Jianan Zhang,Yu Wang
title: The Grasps Under Varied Object Orientation Dataset: Relation Between Grasps and Object Orientation
title_zh: 不同物体方向数据集下的抓握：抓握与物体方向之间的关系
abstract: After a grasp has been planned, if the object orientation changes, the initial grasp may not have to be modified to accommodate the orientation change. For example, rotation of a cylinder by any amount around its centerline does not change its geometric shape relative to the grasper. Objects that can be approximated to solids of revolution or contain other geometric symmetries are prevalent in everyday life, and this information can be employed to improve the efficiency of existing grasp planning models. This paper experimentally investigates change in human-planned grasps under varied object orientations. With 13,440 recorded human grasps, our results indicate that during pick-and-place task of ordinary objects, stable grasps can be achieved with a small subset of grasp types, and the wrist-related parameters follow normal distribution.
summary: After a grasp has been planned, if the object orientation changes, the initial grasp may not have to be modified to accommodate the orientation change. For example, rotation of a cylinder by any amount around its centerline does not change its geometric shape relative to the grasper. Objects that can be approximated to solids of revolution or contain other geometric symmetries are prevalent in everyday life, and this information can be employed to improve the efficiency of existing grasp planning models. This paper experimentally investigates change in human-planned grasps under varied object orientations. With 13,440 recorded human grasps, our results indicate that during pick-and-place task of ordinary objects, stable grasps can be achieved with a small subset of grasp types, and the wrist-related parameters follow normal distribution.
abstract_zh: 在计划了抓取之后，如果对象方向发生变化，则可以不必修改初始抓取来适应方向变化。例如，圆柱体绕其中心线旋转任何量都不会改变其相对于抓紧器的几何形状。可以近似为旋转实体或包含其他几何对称性的物体在日常生活中很常见，并且可以利用这些信息来提高现有抓取规划模型的效率。本文通过实验研究了不同物体方向下人类计划抓取的变化。通过 13,440 次记录的人类抓取，我们的结果表明，在普通物体的拾取和放置任务中，可以通过一小部分抓取类型实现稳定的抓取，并且与手腕相关的参数遵循正态分布。

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了一个包含不同物体方向抓取数据的数据集，研究抓取方式与物体方向之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 物体方向变化时，初始抓取可能无需调整，利用对称性可提升抓取规划效率。
AI.method: 记录13,440个人类抓取样本，分析不同方向下抓取方式的变化规律及腕部参数分布。
AI.result: 普通物体抓取任务中，少量抓取类型即可实现稳定抓取，腕部参数符合正态分布。
AI.conclusion: 物体对称性信息可优化现有抓取规划模型，减少冗余计算并提升效率。

search_text: The Grasps Under Varied Object Orientation Dataset: Relation Between Grasps and Object Orientation 不同物体方向数据集下的抓握：抓握与物体方向之间的关系 After a grasp has been planned, if the object orientation changes, the initial grasp may not have to be modified to accommodate the orientation change. For example, rotation of a cylinder by any amount around its centerline does not change its geometric shape relative to the grasper. Objects that can be approximated to solids of revolution or contain other geometric symmetries are prevalent in everyday life, and this information can be employed to improve the efficiency of existing grasp planning models. This paper experimentally investigates change in human-planned grasps under varied object orientations. With 13,440 recorded human grasps, our results indicate that during pick-and-place task of ordinary objects, stable grasps can be achieved with a small subset of grasp types, and the wrist-related parameters follow normal distribution. 在计划了抓取之后，如果对象方向发生变化，则可以不必修改初始抓取来适应方向变化。例如，圆柱体绕其中心线旋转任何量都不会改变其相对于抓紧器的几何形状。可以近似为旋转实体或包含其他几何对称性的物体在日常生活中很常见，并且可以利用这些信息来提高现有抓取规划模型的效率。本文通过实验研究了不同物体方向下人类计划抓取的变化。通过 13,440 次记录的人类抓取，我们的结果表明，在普通物体的拾取和放置任务中，可以通过一小部分抓取类型实现稳定的抓取，并且与手腕相关的参数遵循正态分布。 该论文构建了一个包含不同物体方向抓取数据的数据集，研究抓取方式与物体方向之间的关系。 Chang Cheng,Yadong Yan,Mingjun Guan,Jianan Zhang,Yu Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Zhenhua Liu,Yunhe Wang,Kai Han,Siwei Ma,Wen Gao
title: Post-Training Quantization for Vision Transformer
title_zh: Vision Transformer 的训练后量化
abstract: Recently, transformer has achieved remarkable performance on a variety of computer vision applications. Compared with mainstream convolutional neural networks, vision transformers are often of sophisticated architectures for extracting powerful feature representations, which are more difficult to be developed on mobile devices. In this paper, we present an effective post-training quantization algorithm for reducing the memory storage and computational costs of vision transformers. Basically, the quantization task can be regarded as finding the optimal low-bit quantization intervals for weights and inputs, respectively. To preserve the functionality of the attention mechanism, we introduce a ranking loss into the conventional quantization objective that aims to keep the relative order of the self-attention results after quantization. Moreover, we thoroughly analyze the relationship between quantization loss of different layers and the feature diversity, and explore a mixed-precision quantization scheme by exploiting the nuclear norm of each attention map and output feature. The effectiveness of the proposed method is verified on several benchmark models and datasets, which outperforms the state-of-the-art post-training quantization algorithms. For instance, we can obtain an 81.29\% top-1 accuracy using DeiT-B model on ImageNet dataset with about 8-bit quantization.
summary: Recently, transformer has achieved remarkable performance on a variety of computer vision applications. Compared with mainstream convolutional neural networks, vision transformers are often of sophisticated architectures for extracting powerful feature representations, which are more difficult to be developed on mobile devices. In this paper, we present an effective post-training quantization algorithm for reducing the memory storage and computational costs of vision transformers. Basically, the quantization task can be regarded as finding the optimal low-bit quantization intervals for weights and inputs, respectively. To preserve the functionality of the attention mechanism, we introduce a ranking loss into the conventional quantization objective that aims to keep the relative order of the self-attention results after quantization. Moreover, we thoroughly analyze the relationship between quantization loss of different layers and the feature diversity, and explore a mixed-precision quantization scheme by exploiting the nuclear norm of each attention map and output feature. The effectiveness of the proposed method is verified on several benchmark models and datasets, which outperforms the state-of-the-art post-training quantization algorithms. For instance, we can obtain an 81.29\% top-1 accuracy using DeiT-B model on ImageNet dataset with about 8-bit quantization.
abstract_zh: 最近，Transformer在各种计算机视觉应用中取得了显着的性能。与主流的卷积神经网络相比，视觉变换器通常具有复杂的架构，用于提取强大的特征表示，这在移动设备上开发起来更加困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的训练后量化算法，用于减少视觉变压器的内存存储和计算成本。基本上，量化任务可以被视为分别为权重和输入找到最佳的低位量化间隔。为了保留注意力机制的功能，我们在传统的量化目标中引入了排名损失，旨在保持量化后自注意力结果的相对顺序。此外，我们深入分析了不同层的量化损失与特征多样性之间的关系，并通过利用每个注意力图和输出特征的核范数探索混合精度量化方案。该方法的有效性在多个基准模型和数据集上得到了验证，其性能优于最先进的训练后量化算法。例如，我们可以使用 DeiT-B 模型在 ImageNet 数据集上使用大约 8 位量化获得 81.29% top-1 准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种有效的后训练量化算法，以降低视觉Transformer的内存和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer结构复杂，难以在移动端部署，需通过量化技术减少计算资源消耗。
AI.method: 引入排序损失保持注意力机制功能，结合核范数分析提出混合精度量化方案。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，使用8位量化DeiT-B模型达到81.29%的top-1准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了视觉Transformer的计算效率与性能，提升了移动端部署可行性。

title: Image content dependent semi-fragile watermarking with localized tamper detection
title_zh: 具有局部篡改检测功能的图像内容相关半脆弱水印
abstract: Content-independent watermarks and block-wise independency can be considered as vulnerabilities in semi-fragile watermarking methods. In this paper to achieve the objectives of semi-fragile watermarking techniques, a method is proposed to not have the mentioned shortcomings. In the proposed method, the watermark is generated by relying on image content and a key. Furthermore, the embedding scheme causes the watermarked blocks to become dependent on each other, using a key. In the embedding phase, the image is partitioned into non-overlapping blocks. In order to detect and separate the different types of attacks more precisely, the proposed method embeds three copies of each watermark bit into LWT coefficients of each 4x4 block. In the authentication phase, by voting between the extracted bits the error maps are created; these maps indicate image authenticity and reveal the modified regions. Also, in order to automate the authentication, the images are classified into four categories using seven features. Classification accuracy in the experiments is 97.97 percent. It is noted that our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is robust against JPEG compression and is competitive with a state-of-the-art semi-fragile watermarking method, in terms of robustness and semi-fragility.
summary: Content-independent watermarks and block-wise independency can be considered as vulnerabilities in semi-fragile watermarking methods. In this paper to achieve the objectives of semi-fragile watermarking techniques, a method is proposed to not have the mentioned shortcomings. In the proposed method, the watermark is generated by relying on image content and a key. Furthermore, the embedding scheme causes the watermarked blocks to become dependent on each other, using a key. In the embedding phase, the image is partitioned into non-overlapping blocks. In order to detect and separate the different types of attacks more precisely, the proposed method embeds three copies of each watermark bit into LWT coefficients of each 4x4 block. In the authentication phase, by voting between the extracted bits the error maps are created; these maps indicate image authenticity and reveal the modified regions. Also, in order to automate the authentication, the images are classified into four categories using seven features. Classification accuracy in the experiments is 97.97 percent. It is noted that our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is robust against JPEG compression and is competitive with a state-of-the-art semi-fragile watermarking method, in terms of robustness and semi-fragility.
abstract_zh: 内容无关水印和块独立性可以被视为半脆弱水印方法中的漏洞。本文为了实现半脆弱水印技术的目标，提出了一种不存在上述缺点的方法。在所提出的方法中，水印是依靠图像内容和密钥生成的。此外，嵌入方案使用密钥使带水印的块变得相互依赖。在嵌入阶段，图像被分割成不重叠的块。为了更精确地检测和区分不同类型的攻击，所提出的方法将每个水印位的三个副本嵌入到每个 4x4 块的 LWT 系数中。在认证阶段，通过在提取的位之间投票来创建错误图；这些地图表明图像的真实性并揭示了修改的区域。此外，为了实现身份验证的自动化，使用七个特征将图像分为四类。实验中的分类准确率为97.97%。值得注意的是，我们的实验表明，所提出的方法对 JPEG 压缩具有鲁棒性，并且在鲁棒性和半脆弱性方面与最先进的半脆弱水印方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像内容的半脆弱水印方法，通过块间依赖性和多副本嵌入实现精准的局部篡改检测。
AI.motivation: 现有半脆弱水印方法存在内容无关性和块独立性缺陷，导致篡改检测不精确且易受攻击。
AI.method: 利用图像内容和密钥生成水印，将图像分块后在每个4x4块的LWT系数中嵌入三个水印位副本；通过提取位投票生成错误图，结合七种特征将图像分为四类实现自动化认证。
AI.result: 实验显示分类准确率达97.97%，对JPEG压缩具有鲁棒性，且在鲁棒性和半脆弱性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过内容依赖性和块间关联性有效解决了传统半脆弱水印的缺陷，在篡改检测和抗攻击能力上表现优异。

title: Machine Learning Detection Algorithm for Large Barkhausen Jumps in Cluttered Environment
title_zh: 杂乱环境中大巴克豪森跳跃的机器学习检测算法
abstract: Modern magnetic sensor arrays conventionally utilize state of the art low power magnetometers such as parallel and orthogonal fluxgates. Low power fluxgates tend to have large Barkhausen jumps that appear as a dc jump in the fluxgate output. This phenomenon deteriorates the signal fidelity and effectively increases the internal sensor noise. Even if sensors that are more prone to dc jumps can be screened during production, the conventional noise measurement does not always catch the dc jump because of its sparsity. Moreover, dc jumps persist in almost all the sensor cores although at a slower but still intolerable rate. Even if dc jumps can be easily detected in a shielded environment, when deployed in presence of natural noise and clutter, it can be hard to positively detect them. This work fills this gap and presents algorithms that distinguish dc jumps embedded in natural magnetic field data. To improve robustness to noise, we developed two machine learning algorithms that employ temporal and statistical physical-based features of a pre-acquired and well-known experimental data set. The first algorithm employs a support vector machine classifier, while the second is based on a neural network architecture. We compare these new approaches to a more classical kernel-based method. To that purpose, the receiver operating characteristic curve is generated, which allows diagnosis ability of the different classifiers by comparing their performances across various operation points. The accuracy of the machine learning-based algorithms over the classic method is highly emphasized. In addition, high generalization and robustness of the neural network can be concluded, based on the rapid convergence of the corresponding receiver operating characteristic curves.
summary: Modern magnetic sensor arrays conventionally utilize state of the art low power magnetometers such as parallel and orthogonal fluxgates. Low power fluxgates tend to have large Barkhausen jumps that appear as a dc jump in the fluxgate output. This phenomenon deteriorates the signal fidelity and effectively increases the internal sensor noise. Even if sensors that are more prone to dc jumps can be screened during production, the conventional noise measurement does not always catch the dc jump because of its sparsity. Moreover, dc jumps persist in almost all the sensor cores although at a slower but still intolerable rate. Even if dc jumps can be easily detected in a shielded environment, when deployed in presence of natural noise and clutter, it can be hard to positively detect them. This work fills this gap and presents algorithms that distinguish dc jumps embedded in natural magnetic field data. To improve robustness to noise, we developed two machine learning algorithms that employ temporal and statistical physical-based features of a pre-acquired and well-known experimental data set. The first algorithm employs a support vector machine classifier, while the second is based on a neural network architecture. We compare these new approaches to a more classical kernel-based method. To that purpose, the receiver operating characteristic curve is generated, which allows diagnosis ability of the different classifiers by comparing their performances across various operation points. The accuracy of the machine learning-based algorithms over the classic method is highly emphasized. In addition, high generalization and robustness of the neural network can be concluded, based on the rapid convergence of the corresponding receiver operating characteristic curves.
abstract_zh: 现代磁传感器阵列通常利用最先进的低功率磁力计，例如平行和正交磁通门。低功率磁通门往往具有较大的巴克豪森跳跃，表现为磁通门输出中的直流跳跃。这种现象会降低信号保真度并有效增加内部传感器噪声。即使可以在生产过程中筛选出更容易出现直流跳变的传感器，但由于其稀疏性，传统的噪声测量并不总能捕获直流跳变。此外，几乎所有传感器核心都存在直流跳变，尽管速度较慢但仍然令人无法忍受。即使在屏蔽环境中可以轻松检测到直流跳变，但在存在自然噪声和杂波的情况下部署时，也很难积极检测到它们。这项工作填补了这一空白，并提出了区分自然磁场数据中嵌入的直流跳变的算法。为了提高对噪声的鲁棒性，我们开发了两种机器学习算法，它们采用预先获取的众所周知的实验数据集的基于时间和统计物理的特征。第一个算法采用支持向量机分类器，而第二个算法则基于神经网络架构。我们将这些新方法与更经典的基于内核的方法进行比较。为此，生成了接收器操作特征曲线，该曲线允许通过比较不同分类器在不同操作点上的性能来诊断不同分类器的能力。高度强调基于机器学习的算法相对于经典方法的准确性。此外，基于相应接收器工作特性曲线的快速收敛，可以得出神经网络的高度泛化性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种机器学习算法用于在杂乱环境中检测大 Barkhausen 跳变，以提高磁传感器信号保真度。
AI.motivation: 传统低功耗磁通门传感器易产生直流跳变，导致信号失真且常规噪声测量难以捕捉，需在复杂环境中提升检测能力。
AI.method: 基于时序和统计物理特征，开发支持向量机和神经网络算法，并通过ROC曲线与经典核方法对比性能。
AI.result: 机器学习算法显著优于经典方法，神经网络展现高泛化能力和快速收敛的ROC曲线。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习尤其是神经网络为杂乱环境中检测 Barkhausen 跳变提供了鲁棒解决方案。

authors_text: Noorul Wahab,Islam M Miligy,Katherine Dodd,Harvir Sahota,Michael Toss,Wenqi Lu,Mostafa Jahanifar,Mohsin Bilal,Simon Graham,Young Park,Giorgos Hadjigeorghiou,Abhir Bhalerao,Ayat Lashen,Asmaa Ibrahim,Ayaka Katayama,Henry O Ebili,Matthew Parkin,Tom Sorell,Shan E Ahmed Raza,Emily Hero,Hesham Eldaly,Yee Wah Tsang,Kishore Gopalakrishnan,David Snead,Emad Rakha, et al. title: Semantic annotation for computational pathology: Multidisciplinary experience and best practice recommendations
title_zh: 计算病理学的语义注释：多学科经验和最佳实践建议
abstract: Recent advances in whole slide imaging (WSI) technology have led to the development of a myriad of computer vision and artificial intelligence (AI) based diagnostic, prognostic, and predictive algorithms. Computational Pathology (CPath) offers an integrated solution to utilize information embedded in pathology WSIs beyond what we obtain through visual assessment. For automated analysis of WSIs and validation of machine learning (ML) models, annotations at the slide, tissue and cellular levels are required. The annotation of important visual constructs in pathology images is an important component of CPath projects. Improper annotations can result in algorithms which are hard to interpret and can potentially produce inaccurate and inconsistent results. Despite the crucial role of annotations in CPath projects, there are no well-defined guidelines or best practices on how annotations should be carried out. In this paper, we address this shortcoming by presenting the experience and best practices acquired during the execution of a large-scale annotation exercise involving a multidisciplinary team of pathologists, ML experts and researchers as part of the Pathology image data Lake for Analytics, Knowledge and Education (PathLAKE) consortium. We present a real-world case study along with examples of different types of annotations, diagnostic algorithm, annotation data dictionary and annotation constructs. The analyses reported in this work highlight best practice recommendations that can be used as annotation guidelines over the lifecycle of a CPath project.
summary: Recent advances in whole slide imaging (WSI) technology have led to the development of a myriad of computer vision and artificial intelligence (AI) based diagnostic, prognostic, and predictive algorithms. Computational Pathology (CPath) offers an integrated solution to utilize information embedded in pathology WSIs beyond what we obtain through visual assessment. In this paper, we address this shortcoming by presenting the experience and best practices acquired during the execution of a large-scale annotation exercise involving a multidisciplinary team of pathologists, ML experts and researchers as part of the Pathology image data Lake for Analytics, Knowledge and Education (PathLAKE) consortium. We present a real-world case study along with examples of different types of annotations, diagnostic algorithm, annotation data dictionary and annotation constructs. The analyses reported in this work highlight best practice recommendations that can be used as annotation guidelines over the lifecycle of a CPath project.
abstract_zh: 全切片成像 (WSI) 技术的最新进展促进了无数基于计算机视觉和人工智能 (AI) 的诊断、预后和预测算法的发展。计算病理学 (CPath) 提供了一个集成的解决方案，可以利用病理学 WSI 中嵌入的信息，超出我们通过视觉评估获得的信息。为了自动分析 WSI 和验证机器学习 (ML) 模型，需要在载玻片、组织和细胞级别进行注释。病理图像中重要视觉结构的注释是 CPath 项目的重要组成部分。不正确的注释可能会导致算法难以解释，并可能产生不准确和不一致的结果。尽管注释在 CPath 项目中发挥着至关重要的作用，但对于如何进行注释还没有明确定义的指南或最佳实践。在本文中，我们通过介绍在执行大规模注释活动期间获得的经验和最佳实践来解决这一缺点，该活动涉及由病理学家、机器学习专家和研究人员组成的多学科团队，作为分析、知识和教育病理图像数据湖 (PathLAKE) 联盟的一部分。我们提供了一个真实的案例研究以及不同类型的注释、诊断算法、注释数据字典和注释结构的示例。这项工作中报告的分析重点介绍了可用作 CPath 项目生命周期注释指南的最佳实践建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为计算病理学项目中的语义标注提供最佳实践指南，通过多学科团队的经验总结提出标注标准。
AI.motivation: 当前计算病理学缺乏明确的标注规范，导致算法可解释性差且结果不一致，亟需建立标准化流程。
AI.method: 基于PathLAKE联盟的多学科团队协作，通过大规模标注实践案例，结合诊断算法与数据字典构建标注体系。
AI.result: 提出包含标注数据字典、构造规范及案例的完整指南，为CPath项目全生命周期提供标注标准参考。
AI.conclusion: 标准化标注流程能显著提升计算病理学算法可靠性，建议在CPath项目中系统采用所述最佳实践。

authors_text: Jianrong Wang,Ziyue Tang,Xuewei Li,Mei Yu,Qiang Fang,Li Liu
title: Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation Method for Automatic Cued Speech Recognition
title_zh: 自动提示语音识别的跨模态知识蒸馏方法
abstract: Cued Speech (CS) is a visual communication system for the deaf or hearing impaired people. It combines lip movements with hand cues to obtain a complete phonetic repertoire. Current deep learning based methods on automatic CS recognition suffer from a common problem, which is the data scarcity. Until now, there are only two public single speaker datasets for French (238 sentences) and British English (97 sentences). In this work, we propose a cross-modal knowledge distillation method with teacher-student structure, which transfers audio speech information to CS to overcome the limited data problem. Firstly, we pretrain a teacher model for CS recognition with a large amount of open source audio speech data, and simultaneously pretrain the feature extractors for lips and hands using CS data. Then, we distill the knowledge from teacher model to the student model with frame-level and sequence-level distillation strategies. Importantly, for frame-level, we exploit multi-task learning to weigh losses automatically, to obtain the balance coefficient. Besides, we establish a five-speaker British English CS dataset for the first time. The proposed method is evaluated on French and British English CS datasets, showing superior CS recognition performance to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) by a large margin.
summary: Cued Speech (CS) is a visual communication system for the deaf or hearing impaired people. It combines lip movements with hand cues to obtain a complete phonetic repertoire. Current deep learning based methods on automatic CS recognition suffer from a common problem, which is the data scarcity. Until now, there are only two public single speaker datasets for French (238 sentences) and British English (97 sentences). In this work, we propose a cross-modal knowledge distillation method with teacher-student structure, which transfers audio speech information to CS to overcome the limited data problem. Firstly, we pretrain a teacher model for CS recognition with a large amount of open source audio speech data, and simultaneously pretrain the feature extractors for lips and hands using CS data. Then, we distill the knowledge from teacher model to the student model with frame-level and sequence-level distillation strategies. Importantly, for frame-level, we exploit multi-task learning to weigh losses automatically, to obtain the balance coefficient. Besides, we establish a five-speaker British English CS dataset for the first time. The proposed method is evaluated on French and British English CS datasets, showing superior CS recognition performance to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 提示语音 (CS) 是一种针对聋哑人或听力障碍人士的视觉通信系统。它将嘴唇动作与手部提示相结合，以获得完整的语音库。当前基于深度学习的自动CS识别方法存在一个普遍的问题，那就是数据稀缺。到目前为止，只有法语（238 个句子）和英式英语（97 个句子）两个公开的单说话者数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有师生结构的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，将音频语音信息传输到CS以克服数据有限的问题。首先，我们使用大量开源音频语音数据预训练用于 CS 识别的教师模型，并同时使用 CS 数据预训练嘴唇和手的特征提取器。然后，我们使用框架级和序列级蒸馏策略将知识从教师模型蒸馏到学生模型。重要的是，对于帧级，我们利用多任务学习自动权衡损失，以获得平衡系数。此外，我们首次建立了五人英式英语 CS 数据集。所提出的方法在法语和英国英语 CS 数据集上进行了评估，显示出比现有技术 (SOTA) 大幅优越的 CS 识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态知识蒸馏方法，通过音频与视觉模态间的知识迁移解决提示语音识别中的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的提示语音识别方法受限于公开数据集样本量过小（法语238句、英式英语97句），难以获得良好性能。
AI.method: 构建教师-学生框架：1) 用大量开源音频数据预训练教师模型，同时用CS数据预训练唇部/手部特征提取器；2) 通过帧级（多任务学习自动平衡损失权重）和序列级蒸馏策略进行知识迁移；3) 首次建立五说话人英式英语CS数据集。
AI.result: 在法语和英式英语CS数据集上均显著超越现有最优方法，识别性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态知识蒸馏有效缓解了CS识别的数据稀缺问题，新数据集的建立进一步推动了该领域的研究进展。

search_text: Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation Method for Automatic Cued Speech Recognition 自动提示语音识别的跨模态知识蒸馏方法 Cued Speech (CS) is a visual communication system for the deaf or hearing impaired people. It combines lip movements with hand cues to obtain a complete phonetic repertoire. Current deep learning based methods on automatic CS recognition suffer from a common problem, which is the data scarcity. Until now, there are only two public single speaker datasets for French (238 sentences) and British English (97 sentences). In this work, we propose a cross-modal knowledge distillation method with teacher-student structure, which transfers audio speech information to CS to overcome the limited data problem. Firstly, we pretrain a teacher model for CS recognition with a large amount of open source audio speech data, and simultaneously pretrain the feature extractors for lips and hands using CS data. Then, we distill the knowledge from teacher model to the student model with frame-level and sequence-level distillation strategies. Importantly, for frame-level, we exploit multi-task learning to weigh losses automatically, to obtain the balance coefficient. Besides, we establish a five-speaker British English CS dataset for the first time. The proposed method is evaluated on French and British English CS datasets, showing superior CS recognition performance to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) by a large margin. 提示语音 (CS) 是一种针对聋哑人或听力障碍人士的视觉通信系统。它将嘴唇动作与手部提示相结合，以获得完整的语音库。当前基于深度学习的自动CS识别方法存在一个普遍的问题，那就是数据稀缺。到目前为止，只有法语（238 个句子）和英式英语（97 个句子）两个公开的单说话者数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有师生结构的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，将音频语音信息传输到CS以克服数据有限的问题。首先，我们使用大量开源音频语音数据预训练用于 CS 识别的教师模型，并同时使用 CS 数据预训练嘴唇和手的特征提取器。然后，我们使用框架级和序列级蒸馏策略将知识从教师模型蒸馏到学生模型。重要的是，对于帧级，我们利用多任务学习自动权衡损失，以获得平衡系数。此外，我们首次建立了五人英式英语 CS 数据集。所提出的方法在法语和英国英语 CS 数据集上进行了评估，显示出比现有技术 (SOTA) 大幅优越的 CS 识别性能。 本文提出一种跨模态知识蒸馏方法，通过音频与视觉模态间的知识迁移解决提示语音识别中的数据稀缺问题。 Jianrong Wang,Ziyue Tang,Xuewei Li,Mei Yu,Qiang Fang,Li Liu cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Giovanni Trappolini,Luca Cosmo,Luca Moschella,Riccardo Marin,Simone Melzi,Emanuele Rodolà
title: Shape registration in the time of transformers
title_zh: 变形金刚时代的形状登记
abstract: In this paper, we propose a transformer-based procedure for the efficient registration of non-rigid 3D point clouds. The proposed approach is data-driven and adopts for the first time the transformer architecture in the registration task. Our method is general and applies to different settings. Given a fixed template with some desired properties (e.g. skinning weights or other animation cues), we can register raw acquired data to it, thereby transferring all the template properties to the input geometry. Alternatively, given a pair of shapes, our method can register the first onto the second (or vice-versa), obtaining a high-quality dense correspondence between the two. In both contexts, the quality of our results enables us to target real applications such as texture transfer and shape interpolation. Furthermore, we also show that including an estimation of the underlying density of the surface eases the learning process. By exploiting the potential of this architecture, we can train our model requiring only a sparse set of ground truth correspondences ($10\sim20\%$ of the total points). The proposed model and the analysis that we perform pave the way for future exploration of transformer-based architectures for registration and matching applications. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our pipeline outperforms state-of-the-art methods for deformable and unordered 3D data registration on different datasets and scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we propose a transformer-based procedure for the efficient registration of non-rigid 3D point clouds. The proposed approach is data-driven and adopts for the first time the transformer architecture in the registration task. Our method is general and applies to different settings. Given a fixed template with some desired properties (e.g. skinning weights or other animation cues), we can register raw acquired data to it, thereby transferring all the template properties to the input geometry. Alternatively, given a pair of shapes, our method can register the first onto the second (or vice-versa), obtaining a high-quality dense correspondence between the two. In both contexts, the quality of our results enables us to target real applications such as texture transfer and shape interpolation. Furthermore, we also show that including an estimation of the underlying density of the surface eases the learning process. By exploiting the potential of this architecture, we can train our model requiring only a sparse set of ground truth correspondences ($10\sim20\%$ of the total points). The proposed model and the analysis that we perform pave the way for future exploration of transformer-based architectures for registration and matching applications. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our pipeline outperforms state-of-the-art methods for deformable and unordered 3D data registration on different datasets and scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的程序，用于有效配准非刚性 3D 点云。所提出的方法是数据驱动的，并且首次在注册任务中采用变压器架构。我们的方法是通用的，适用于不同的设置。给定具有一些所需属性（例如蒙皮权重或其他动画提示）的固定模板，我们可以将原始获取的数据注册到其中，从而将所有模板属性传输到输入几何体。或者，给定一对形状，我们的方法可以将第一个形状注册到第二个形状上（反之亦然），从而获得两者之间的高质量密集对应关系。在这两种情况下，我们的结果质量使我们能够针对实际应用，例如纹理传输和形状插值。此外，我们还表明，包括表面底层密度的估计可以简化学习过程。通过利用这种架构的潜力，我们可以训练我们的模型，只需要一组稀疏的地面真实对应（总点的 $10\sim20\%$）。所提出的模型和我们执行的分析为未来探索基于变压器的注册和匹配应用程序架构铺平了道路。定性和定量评估表明，我们的管道在不同数据集和场景上的可变形和无序 3D 数据配准方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的非刚性3D点云配准方法，通过数据驱动的方式实现高效配准。
AI.motivation: 传统配准方法难以处理非结构化且变形严重的3D数据，而Transformer架构在处理长距离依赖和无序数据方面具有优势，亟需探索其在配准任务中的应用。
AI.method: 首次将Transformer架构应用于配准任务，通过固定模板或形状对进行配准，结合表面密度估计优化学习过程，仅需稀疏真实对应点（10~20%）即可训练模型。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和场景中，该方法在可变形和无序3D数据配准任务中优于现有最先进的方法，支持纹理迁移和形状插值等实际应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了Transformer在配准任务中的潜力，为未来基于Transformer的配准与匹配研究奠定了基础。

By exploiting the potential of this architecture, we can train our model requiring only a sparse set of ground truth correspondences ($10\sim20\%$ of the total points). The proposed model and the analysis that we perform pave the way for future exploration of transformer-based architectures for registration and matching applications. authors_text: Sanskar Jethi,Avinash Kumar Choudhary,Yash Gupta,Abhishek Chaudhary
title: Creating and Implementing a Smart Speaker
title_zh: 创建和实现智能扬声器
abstract: We have seen significant advancements in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning in the 21st century. It has enabled a new technology where we can have a human-like conversation with the machines. The most significant use of this speech recognition and contextual understanding technology exists in the form of a Smart Speaker. We have a wide variety of Smart Speaker products available to us. This paper aims to decode its creation and explain the technology that makes these Speakers, "Smart."
summary: We have seen significant advancements in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning in the 21st century. It has enabled a new technology where we can have a human-like conversation with the machines. The most significant use of this speech recognition and contextual understanding technology exists in the form of a Smart Speaker. We have a wide variety of Smart Speaker products available to us. This paper aims to decode its creation and explain the technology that makes these Speakers, "Smart."
abstract_zh: 我们已经看到 21 世纪人工智能和机器学习取得了显着进步。它实现了一项新技术，我们可以与机器进行类似人类的对话。这种语音识别和上下文理解技术最重要的用途是以智能扬声器的形式出现。我们有各种各样的智能音箱产品可供选择。本文旨在解读其创造并解释使这些扬声器变得“智能”的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解析智能音箱的制作过程并解释其核心技术。
AI.motivation: 人工智能和机器学习的进步推动了智能音箱的发展，使其成为日常生活中重要的智能交互设备。
AI.method: 通过分析现有智能音箱产品，结合语音识别、自然语言处理等技术，探讨其硬件与软件的整合实现方式。
AI.result: 详细阐述了智能音箱的运作原理及关键技术构成，包括语音交互、上下文理解等模块。
AI.conclusion: 智能音箱的智能化依赖于多项前沿技术的融合，未来需进一步优化交互体验与场景适配能力。

tldr: 本文旨在解析智能音箱的制作过程并解释其核心技术。
motivation: 人工智能和机器学习的进步推动了智能音箱的发展，使其成为日常生活中重要的智能交互设备。
method: 通过分析现有智能音箱产品，结合语音识别、自然语言处理等技术，探讨其硬件与软件的整合实现方式。
result: 详细阐述了智能音箱的运作原理及关键技术构成，包括语音交互、上下文理解等模块。
conclusion: 智能音箱的智能化依赖于多项前沿技术的融合，未来需进一步优化交互体验与场景适配能力。
search_text: Creating and Implementing a Smart Speaker 创建和实现智能扬声器 We have seen significant advancements in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning in the 21st century. It has enabled a new technology where we can have a human-like conversation with the machines. The most significant use of this speech recognition and contextual understanding technology exists in the form of a Smart Speaker. We have a wide variety of Smart Speaker products available to us. This paper aims to decode its creation and explain the technology that makes these Speakers, "Smart." 我们已经看到 21 世纪人工智能和机器学习取得了显着进步。它实现了一项新技术，我们可以与机器进行类似人类的对话。这种语音识别和上下文理解技术最重要的用途是以智能扬声器的形式出现。我们有各种各样的智能音箱产品可供选择。本文旨在解读其创造并解释使这些扬声器变得“智能”的技术。 本文旨在解析智能音箱的制作过程并解释其核心技术。 Sanskar Jethi,Avinash Kumar Choudhary,Yash Gupta,Abhishek Chaudhary cs.HC

title: Move Beyond Trajectories: Distribution Space Coupling for Crowd Navigation
title_zh: 超越轨迹：人群导航的分布空间耦合
abstract: Cooperatively avoiding collision is a critical functionality for robots navigating in dense human crowds, failure of which could lead to either overaggressive or overcautious behavior. A necessary condition for cooperative collision avoidance is to couple the prediction of the agents' trajectories with the planning of the robot's trajectory. However, it is unclear that trajectory based cooperative collision avoidance captures the correct agent attributes. In this work we migrate from trajectory based coupling to a formalism that couples agent preference distributions. In particular, we show that preference distributions (probability density functions representing agents' intentions) can capture higher order statistics of agent behaviors, such as willingness to cooperate. Thus, coupling in distribution space exploits more information about inter-agent cooperation than coupling in trajectory space. We thus introduce a general objective for coupled prediction and planning in distribution space, and propose an iterative best response optimization method based on variational analysis with guaranteed sufficient decrease. Based on this analysis, we develop a sampling-based motion planning framework called DistNav that runs in real time on a laptop CPU. We evaluate our approach on challenging scenarios from both real world datasets and simulation environments, and benchmark against a wide variety of model based and machine learning based approaches. The safety and efficiency statistics of our approach outperform all other models. Finally, we find that DistNav is competitive with human safety and efficiency performance.
summary: Cooperatively avoiding collision is a critical functionality for robots navigating in dense human crowds, failure of which could lead to either overaggressive or overcautious behavior. A necessary condition for cooperative collision avoidance is to couple the prediction of the agents' trajectories with the planning of the robot's trajectory. However, it is unclear that trajectory based cooperative collision avoidance captures the correct agent attributes. In this work we migrate from trajectory based coupling to a formalism that couples agent preference distributions. In particular, we show that preference distributions (probability density functions representing agents' intentions) can capture higher order statistics of agent behaviors, such as willingness to cooperate. Thus, coupling in distribution space exploits more information about inter-agent cooperation than coupling in trajectory space. We thus introduce a general objective for coupled prediction and planning in distribution space, and propose an iterative best response optimization method based on variational analysis with guaranteed sufficient decrease. Based on this analysis, we develop a sampling-based motion planning framework called DistNav that runs in real time on a laptop CPU. We evaluate our approach on challenging scenarios from both real world datasets and simulation environments, and benchmark against a wide variety of model based and machine learning based approaches. The safety and efficiency statistics of our approach outperform all other models. Finally, we find that DistNav is competitive with human safety and efficiency performance.
abstract_zh: 合作避免碰撞是机器人在密集人群中导航的一项关键功能，如果失败可能会导致过度攻击或过度谨慎的行为。协作避碰的必要条件是将智能体轨迹的预测与机器人轨迹的规划结合起来。然而，目前尚不清楚基于轨迹的协作避碰能否捕获正确的代理属性。在这项工作中，我们从基于轨迹的耦合迁移到耦合代理偏好分布的形式主义。特别是，我们表明偏好分布（代表代理意图的概率密度函数）可以捕获代理行为的高阶统计数据，例如合作意愿。因此，分布空间中的耦合比轨迹空间中的耦合利用了更多关于智能体间合作的信息。因此，我们引入了分布空间中耦合预测和规划的总体目标，并提出了一种基于变分分析的迭代最佳响应优化方法，并保证了足够的下降。基于此分析，我们开发了一个名为 DistNav 的基于采样的运动规划框架，该框架在笔记本电脑 CPU 上实时运行。我们评估来自现实世界数据集和模拟环境的挑战性场景的方法，并针对各种基于模型和基于机器学习的方法进行基准测试。我们方法的安全性和效率统计数据优于所有其他模型。最后，我们发现 DistNav 在人类安全和效率表现方面具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布空间耦合的群体导航方法，通过结合智能体的偏好分布来提升机器人在密集人群中的避障能力。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹耦合方法难以准确捕捉人类代理的协作属性，导致机器人行为过于激进或保守，需通过更高级的行为统计信息（如协作意愿）改进避障策略。
AI.method: 引入分布空间耦合框架，利用变分分析构建预测与规划的联合目标函数，提出迭代最佳响应优化算法，并开发实时运动规划框架DistNav。
AI.result: 在真实数据集和仿真环境中，DistNav在安全性和效率上优于多种基于模型和机器学习的方法，且性能接近人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 分布空间耦合能更有效地建模代理间协作关系，DistNav验证了该方法在实时性和导航性能上的有效性。

authors_text: Jianchuan Chen,Ying Zhang,Di Kang,Xuefei Zhe,Linchao Bao,Xu Jia,Huchuan Lu
title: Animatable Neural Radiance Fields from Monocular RGB Videos
title_zh: 来自单眼 RGB 视频的可动画神经辐射场
abstract: We present animatable neural radiance fields (animatable NeRF) for detailed human avatar creation from monocular videos. Our approach extends neural radiance fields (NeRF) to the dynamic scenes with human movements via introducing explicit pose-guided deformation while learning the scene representation network. In particular, we estimate the human pose for each frame and learn a constant canonical space for the detailed human template, which enables natural shape deformation from the observation space to the canonical space under the explicit control of the pose parameters. To compensate for inaccurate pose estimation, we introduce the pose refinement strategy that updates the initial pose during the learning process, which not only helps to learn more accurate human reconstruction but also accelerates the convergence. In experiments we show that the proposed approach achieves 1) implicit human geometry and appearance reconstruction with high-quality details, 2) photo-realistic rendering of the human from novel views, and 3) animation of the human with novel poses.
summary: We present animatable neural radiance fields (animatable NeRF) for detailed human avatar creation from monocular videos. Our approach extends neural radiance fields (NeRF) to the dynamic scenes with human movements via introducing explicit pose-guided deformation while learning the scene representation network. In particular, we estimate the human pose for each frame and learn a constant canonical space for the detailed human template, which enables natural shape deformation from the observation space to the canonical space under the explicit control of the pose parameters. To compensate for inaccurate pose estimation, we introduce the pose refinement strategy that updates the initial pose during the learning process, which not only helps to learn more accurate human reconstruction but also accelerates the convergence. In experiments we show that the proposed approach achieves 1) implicit human geometry and appearance reconstruction with high-quality details, 2) photo-realistic rendering of the human from novel views, and 3) animation of the human with novel poses.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了可动画化的神经辐射场（可动画化的 NeRF），用于从单眼视频创建详细的人类头像。我们的方法通过在学习场景表示网络的同时引入显式姿势引导变形，将神经辐射场（NeRF）扩展到具有人体运动的动态场景。特别是，我们估计每一帧的人体姿势，并为详细的人体模板学习恒定的规范空间，这使得在姿势参数的显式控制下能够从观察空间到规范空间进行自然形状变形。为了补偿不准确的姿态估计，我们引入了姿态细化策略，在学习过程中更新初始姿态，这不仅有助于学习更准确的人体重建，而且还加速了收敛。在实验中，我们表明，所提出的方法实现了 1）具有高质量细节的隐式人体几何和外观重建，2）从新颖的视角对人体进行逼真的渲染，以及 3）具有新颖姿势的人体动画。

AI.tldr: 从单目RGB视频生成可动画的神经辐射场（animatable NeRF），用于创建高细节的人类化身。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF难以处理动态人体运动，需扩展其能力以支持姿态可控的动画生成，并从单目视频中重建高细节的人体模型。
AI.method: 通过显式姿态引导变形，结合规范空间学习与姿态优化策略，实现从单目视频中重建人体几何与外观，并支持新姿态动画生成。
AI.result: 实现了高精度人体几何与外观重建、新视角逼真渲染及基于新姿态的动画生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态人体建模与动画生成问题，姿态优化策略提升了重建精度与收敛速度。

authors_text: Francesco Bongini,Lorenzo Berlincioni,Marco Bertini,Alberto Del Bimbo
title: Partially fake it till you make it: mixing real and fake thermal images for improved object detection
title_zh: 部分伪造直到成功：混合真实和伪造的热图像以改进对象检测
abstract: In this paper we propose a novel data augmentation approach for visual content domains that have scarce training datasets, compositing synthetic 3D objects within real scenes. We show the performance of the proposed system in the context of object detection in thermal videos, a domain where 1) training datasets are very limited compared to visible spectrum datasets and 2) creating full realistic synthetic scenes is extremely cumbersome and expensive due to the difficulty in modeling the thermal properties of the materials of the scene. We compare different augmentation strategies, including state of the art approaches obtained through RL techniques, the injection of simulated data and the employment of a generative model, and study how to best combine our proposed augmentation with these other techniques.Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, and our single-modality detector achieves state-of-the-art results on the FLIR ADAS dataset.
summary: In this paper we propose a novel data augmentation approach for visual content domains that have scarce training datasets, compositing synthetic 3D objects within real scenes. We show the performance of the proposed system in the context of object detection in thermal videos, a domain where 1) training datasets are very limited compared to visible spectrum datasets and 2) creating full realistic synthetic scenes is extremely cumbersome and expensive due to the difficulty in modeling the thermal properties of the materials of the scene. We compare different augmentation strategies, including state of the art approaches obtained through RL techniques, the injection of simulated data and the employment of a generative model, and study how to best combine our proposed augmentation with these other techniques.Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, and our single-modality detector achieves state-of-the-art results on the FLIR ADAS dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们针对训练数据集稀缺的视觉内容领域提出了一种新颖的数据增强方法，在真实场景中合成合成 3D 对象。我们展示了所提出的系统在热视频中的目标检测背景下的性能，在该领域中：1）与可见光谱数据集相比，训练数据集非常有限；2）由于场景材料的热特性建模困难，创建完全真实的合成场景极其繁琐且昂贵。我们比较了不同的增强策略，包括通过 RL 技术获得的最先进的方法、模拟数据的注入和生成模型的使用，并研究如何最好地将我们提出的增强与这些其他技术结合起来。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性，我们的单模态探测器在 FLIR ADAS 数据集上实现了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合真实与合成热成像数据的数据增强方法，以提升热成像视频中的目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 热成像领域训练数据稀缺且生成真实合成场景成本高昂，限制了目标检测模型的性能提升。
AI.method: 通过将合成3D物体嵌入真实场景生成混合数据，并对比多种增强策略（如强化学习、模拟数据注入及生成模型）的组合效果。
AI.result: 在FLIR ADAS数据集上，单模态检测器达到当时最先进的检测效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合真实与合成数据的增强策略能有效弥补热成像领域数据不足问题，优于现有技术。

title: $\mathcal{N}$IPM-HLSP: An Efficient Interior-Point Method for Hierarchical Least-Squares Programs
title_zh: $\mathcal{N}$IPM-HLSP：分层最小二乘法的有效内点方法
abstract: Hierarchical least-squares programs with linear constraints (HLSP) are a type of optimization problem very common in robotics. Each priority level contains an objective in least-squares form which is subject to the linear constraints of the higher priority levels. Active-set methods are a popular choice for solving them. However, they can perform poorly in terms of computational time if there are large changes of the active set. We therefore propose a computationally efficient primal-dual interior-point method (IPM) for dense HLSP's which is able to maintain constant numbers of solver iterations in these situations. We base our IPM on the computationally efficient nullspace method as it requires only a single matrix factorization per solver iteration instead of two as it is the case for other IPM formulations. We show that the resulting normal equations can be expressed in least-squares form. This avoids the formation of the quadratic Lagrangian Hessian and can possibly maintain high levels of sparsity. Our solver reliably solves ill-posed instantaneous hierarchical robot control problems without exhibiting the large variations in computation time seen in active-set methods.
summary: Hierarchical least-squares programs with linear constraints (HLSP) are a type of optimization problem very common in robotics. Each priority level contains an objective in least-squares form which is subject to the linear constraints of the higher priority levels. Active-set methods are a popular choice for solving them. However, they can perform poorly in terms of computational time if there are large changes of the active set. We therefore propose a computationally efficient primal-dual interior-point method (IPM) for dense HLSP's which is able to maintain constant numbers of solver iterations in these situations. We base our IPM on the computationally efficient nullspace method as it requires only a single matrix factorization per solver iteration instead of two as it is the case for other IPM formulations. We show that the resulting normal equations can be expressed in least-squares form. This avoids the formation of the quadratic Lagrangian Hessian and can possibly maintain high levels of sparsity. Our solver reliably solves ill-posed instantaneous hierarchical robot control problems without exhibiting the large variations in computation time seen in active-set methods.
abstract_zh: 具有线性约束的分层最小二乘程序（HLSP）是机器人技术中非常常见的一种优化问题。每个优先级都包含一个最小二乘形式的目标，该目标受到较高优先级的线性约束。主动集方法是解决这些问题的流行选择。然而，如果活动集发生较大变化，它们在计算时间方面可能表现不佳。因此，我们针对密集 HLSP 提出了一种计算高效的原对偶内点方法 (IPM)，该方法能够在这些情况下保持求解器迭代次数恒定。我们的 IPM 基于计算高效的零空间方法，因为它每次求解器迭代只需要一次矩阵分解，而不是像其他 IPM 公式那样需要两次。我们证明所得到的正规方程可以用最小二乘形式表示。这避免了二次拉格朗日海森矩阵的形成，并且可以保持高水平的稀疏性。我们的求解器可靠地解决了不适定的瞬时分层机器人控制问题，而没有表现出活动集方法中计算时间的巨大变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的内点法（IPM），用于解决具有线性约束的分层最小二乘问题（HLSP），特别针对机器人控制中的瞬时问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的主动集方法在处理活跃集频繁变化的HLSP时计算效率低下，导致计算时间波动较大，需更稳定的求解方法。
AI.method: 基于计算高效的空空间方法，仅需每次迭代一次矩阵分解，避免二次拉格朗日Hessian矩阵构造，保持稀疏性并维持恒定迭代次数。
AI.result: 提出的求解器能可靠解决病态瞬时分层机器人控制问题，且计算时间无显著波动，优于主动集方法。
AI.conclusion: 该内点法在处理HLSP时具有计算效率高、稳定性好的优势，适用于机器人控制等实际场景。

title: Bayesian Neural Networks: Essentials
title_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络：要点
abstract: Bayesian neural networks utilize probabilistic layers that capture uncertainty over weights and activations, and are trained using Bayesian inference. Since these probabilistic layers are designed to be drop-in replacement of their deterministic counter parts, Bayesian neural networks provide a direct and natural way to extend conventional deep neural networks to support probabilistic deep learning. However, it is nontrivial to understand, design and train Bayesian neural networks due to their complexities. We discuss the essentials of Bayesian neural networks including duality (deep neural networks, probabilistic models), approximate Bayesian inference, Bayesian priors, Bayesian posteriors, and deep variational learning. We use TensorFlow Probability APIs and code examples for illustration. The main problem with Bayesian neural networks is that the architecture of deep neural networks makes it quite redundant, and costly, to account for uncertainty for a large number of successive layers. Hybrid Bayesian neural networks, which use few probabilistic layers judicially positioned in the networks, provide a practical solution.
summary: Bayesian neural networks utilize probabilistic layers that capture uncertainty over weights and activations, and are trained using Bayesian inference. Since these probabilistic layers are designed to be drop-in replacement of their deterministic counter parts, Bayesian neural networks provide a direct and natural way to extend conventional deep neural networks to support probabilistic deep learning. However, it is nontrivial to understand, design and train Bayesian neural networks due to their complexities. We discuss the essentials of Bayesian neural networks including duality (deep neural networks, probabilistic models), approximate Bayesian inference, Bayesian priors, Bayesian posteriors, and deep variational learning. We use TensorFlow Probability APIs and code examples for illustration. The main problem with Bayesian neural networks is that the architecture of deep neural networks makes it quite redundant, and costly, to account for uncertainty for a large number of successive layers. Hybrid Bayesian neural networks, which use few probabilistic layers judicially positioned in the networks, provide a practical solution.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络利用概率层来捕获权重和激活的不确定性，并使用贝叶斯推理进行训练。由于这些概率层被设计为直接替换其确定性对应部分，因此贝叶斯神经网络提供了一种直接且自然的方式来扩展传统深度神经网络以支持概率深度学习。然而，由于贝叶斯神经网络的复杂性，理解、设计和训练贝叶斯神经网络并非易事。我们讨论贝叶斯神经网络的本质，包括对偶性（深度神经网络、概率模型）、近似贝叶斯推理、贝叶斯先验、贝叶斯后验和深度变分学习。我们使用 TensorFlow Probability API 和代码示例进行说明。贝叶斯神经网络的主要问题是，深度神经网络的架构使得计算大量连续层的不确定性变得非常冗余且成本高昂。混合贝叶斯神经网络在网络中使用少量概率层，提供了一种实用的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了贝叶斯神经网络的核心概念与关键技术，并提出通过混合贝叶斯神经网络解决其冗余与成本问题的方案。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯神经网络虽能扩展深度学习的不确定性建模能力，但其复杂性导致设计与训练困难，需寻找高效实现方法。
AI.method: 通过分析贝叶斯神经网络的对偶性、近似推断、先验与后验分布等核心要素，并结合TensorFlow Probability进行示例演示，提出混合结构以减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 混合贝叶斯神经网络通过在关键层引入概率层，有效降低了计算成本并保留了不确定性建模能力。
AI.conclusion: 混合贝叶斯神经网络为深度学习中的不确定性建模提供了实用且高效的实现路径。

search_text: Bayesian Neural Networks: Essentials 贝叶斯神经网络：要点 Bayesian neural networks utilize probabilistic layers that capture uncertainty over weights and activations, and are trained using Bayesian inference. Since these probabilistic layers are designed to be drop-in replacement of their deterministic counter parts, Bayesian neural networks provide a direct and natural way to extend conventional deep neural networks to support probabilistic deep learning. However, it is nontrivial to understand, design and train Bayesian neural networks due to their complexities. We discuss the essentials of Bayesian neural networks including duality (deep neural networks, probabilistic models), approximate Bayesian inference, Bayesian priors, Bayesian posteriors, and deep variational learning. We use TensorFlow Probability APIs and code examples for illustration. The main problem with Bayesian neural networks is that the architecture of deep neural networks makes it quite redundant, and costly, to account for uncertainty for a large number of successive layers. Hybrid Bayesian neural networks, which use few probabilistic layers judicially positioned in the networks, provide a practical solution. 贝叶斯神经网络利用概率层来捕获权重和激活的不确定性，并使用贝叶斯推理进行训练。由于这些概率层被设计为直接替换其确定性对应部分，因此贝叶斯神经网络提供了一种直接且自然的方式来扩展传统深度神经网络以支持概率深度学习。然而，由于贝叶斯神经网络的复杂性，理解、设计和训练贝叶斯神经网络并非易事。我们讨论贝叶斯神经网络的本质，包括对偶性（深度神经网络、概率模型）、近似贝叶斯推理、贝叶斯先验、贝叶斯后验和深度变分学习。我们使用 TensorFlow Probability API 和代码示例进行说明。贝叶斯神经网络的主要问题是，深度神经网络的架构使得计算大量连续层的不确定性变得非常冗余且成本高昂。混合贝叶斯神经网络在网络中使用少量概率层，提供了一种实用的解决方案。 本文介绍了贝叶斯神经网络的核心概念与关键技术，并提出通过混合贝叶斯神经网络解决其冗余与成本问题的方案。 Daniel T. Chang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Fostering Diversity in Spatial Evolutionary Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 促进空间进化生成对抗网络的多样性
comment: Accepted to be presented during Conference of the Spanish Association of Artificial Intelligence (CAEPIA 2021). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1905.12702
comments: Accepted to be presented during Conference of the Spanish Association of Artificial Intelligence (CAEPIA 2021). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1905.12702
abstract: Generative adversary networks (GANs) suffer from training pathologies such as instability and mode collapse, which mainly arise from a lack of diversity in their adversarial interactions. Co-evolutionary GAN (CoE-GAN) training algorithms have shown to be resilient to these pathologies. This article introduces Mustangs, a spatially distributed CoE-GAN, which fosters diversity by using different loss functions during the training. Experimental analysis on MNIST and CelebA demonstrated that Mustangs trains statistically more accurate generators.
summary: Generative adversary networks (GANs) suffer from training pathologies such as instability and mode collapse, which mainly arise from a lack of diversity in their adversarial interactions. Co-evolutionary GAN (CoE-GAN) training algorithms have shown to be resilient to these pathologies. This article introduces Mustangs, a spatially distributed CoE-GAN, which fosters diversity by using different loss functions during the training. Experimental analysis on MNIST and CelebA demonstrated that Mustangs trains statistically more accurate generators.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）遭受不稳定和模式崩溃等训练病症的困扰，这主要是由于其对抗交互缺乏多样性造成的。协同进化 GAN (CoE-GAN) 训练算法已被证明能够适应这些病症。本文介绍了 Mustangs，一种空间分布式 CoE-GAN，它通过在训练过程中使用不同的损失函数来促进多样性。对 MNIST 和 CelebA 的实验分析表明，Mustangs 训练的生成器在统计上更加准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mustangs，一种空间分布的协同进化GAN，通过多样化损失函数提升生成器准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN存在训练不稳定和模式崩溃问题，协同进化算法虽能缓解但仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 设计空间分布的Mustangs框架，在训练中采用差异化的损失函数促进对抗多样性。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CelebA数据集上验证，Mustangs生成器的统计准确性显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过空间分布与损失函数多样化，Mustangs有效缓解了GAN训练病理问题，提升了生成质量。

title: Learning Gradual Argumentation Frameworks using Genetic Algorithms
title_zh: 使用遗传算法学习渐进论证框架
abstract: Gradual argumentation frameworks represent arguments and their relationships in a weighted graph. Their graphical structure and intuitive semantics makes them a potentially interesting tool for interpretable machine learning. It has been noted recently that their mechanics are closely related to neural networks, which allows learning their weights from data by standard deep learning frameworks. As a first proof of concept, we propose a genetic algorithm to simultaneously learn the structure of argumentative classification models. To obtain a well interpretable model, the fitness function balances sparseness and accuracy of the classifier. We discuss our algorithm and present first experimental results on standard benchmarks from the UCI machine learning repository. Our prototype learns argumentative classification models that are comparable to decision trees in terms of learning performance and interpretability.
summary: Gradual argumentation frameworks represent arguments and their relationships in a weighted graph. Their graphical structure and intuitive semantics makes them a potentially interesting tool for interpretable machine learning. It has been noted recently that their mechanics are closely related to neural networks, which allows learning their weights from data by standard deep learning frameworks. As a first proof of concept, we propose a genetic algorithm to simultaneously learn the structure of argumentative classification models. To obtain a well interpretable model, the fitness function balances sparseness and accuracy of the classifier. We discuss our algorithm and present first experimental results on standard benchmarks from the UCI machine learning repository. Our prototype learns argumentative classification models that are comparable to decision trees in terms of learning performance and interpretability.
abstract_zh: 渐进论证框架在加权图中表示论点及其关系。它们的图形结构和直观的语义使它们成为可解释机器学习的潜在有趣工具。最近有人指出，它们的机制与神经网络密切相关，神经网络允许通过标准深度学习框架从数据中学习它们的权重。作为第一个概念证明，我们提出了一种遗传算法来同时学习争论分类模型的结构。为了获得可良好解释的模型，适应度函数平衡了分类器的稀疏性和准确性。我们讨论了我们的算法，并展示了 UCI 机器学习存储库中标准基准的第一个实验结果。我们的原型学习论证分类模型，在学习性能和可解释性方面与决策树相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用遗传算法学习渐进论点框架的结构与权重，以构建可解释的分类模型。
AI.motivation: 渐进论点框架的图结构与直观语义使其成为可解释机器学习的潜在工具，但需通过算法学习其参数以提升实用性。
AI.method: 设计遗传算法同时优化论点框架的结构与权重，适应度函数平衡模型稀疏性与分类准确性。
AI.result: 在UCI基准数据集上，原型模型在性能与可解释性方面达到与决策树相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了遗传算法在渐进论点框架学习中的可行性，为可解释AI提供了新思路，未来需进一步优化算法效率与扩展应用场景。

title: Multiview Video Compression Using Advanced HEVC Screen Content Coding
title_zh: 使用高级 HEVC 屏幕内容编码的多视图视频压缩
abstract: The paper presents a new approach to multiview video coding using Screen Content Coding. It is assumed that for a time instant the frames corresponding to all views are packed into a single frame, i.e. the frame-compatible approach to multiview coding is applied. For such coding scenario, the paper demonstrates that Screen Content Coding can be efficiently used for multiview video coding. Two approaches are considered: the first using standard HEVC Screen Content Coding, and the second using Advanced Screen Content Coding. The latter is the original proposal of the authors that exploits quarter-pel motion vectors and other nonstandard extensions of HEVC Screen Content Coding. The experimental results demonstrate that multiview video coding even using standard HEVC Screen Content Coding is much more efficient than simulcast HEVC coding. The proposed Advanced Screen Content Coding provides virtually the same coding efficiency as MV-HEVC, which is the state-of-the-art multiview video compression technique. The authors suggest that Advanced Screen Content Coding can be efficiently used within the new Versatile Video Coding (VVC) technology. Nevertheless a reference multiview extension of VVC does not exist yet, therefore, for VVC-based coding, the experimental comparisons are left for future work.
summary: The paper presents a new approach to multiview video coding using Screen Content Coding. It is assumed that for a time instant the frames corresponding to all views are packed into a single frame, i.e. the frame-compatible approach to multiview coding is applied. For such coding scenario, the paper demonstrates that Screen Content Coding can be efficiently used for multiview video coding. Two approaches are considered: the first using standard HEVC Screen Content Coding, and the second using Advanced Screen Content Coding. The latter is the original proposal of the authors that exploits quarter-pel motion vectors and other nonstandard extensions of HEVC Screen Content Coding. The experimental results demonstrate that multiview video coding even using standard HEVC Screen Content Coding is much more efficient than simulcast HEVC coding. The proposed Advanced Screen Content Coding provides virtually the same coding efficiency as MV-HEVC, which is the state-of-the-art multiview video compression technique. The authors suggest that Advanced Screen Content Coding can be efficiently used within the new Versatile Video Coding (VVC) technology. Nevertheless a reference multiview extension of VVC does not exist yet, therefore, for VVC-based coding, the experimental comparisons are left for future work.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用屏幕内容编码进行多视图视频编码的新方法。假设在某个时刻，与所有视图相对应的帧被打包成单个帧，即应用帧兼容方法来进行多视图编码。对于这种编码场景，本文证明了屏幕内容编码可以有效地用于多视图视频编码。考虑两种方法：第一种使用标准 HEVC 屏幕内容编码，第二种使用高级屏幕内容编码。后者是作者的原始提议，它利用了四分之一像素运动矢量和 HEVC 屏幕内容编码的其他非标准扩展。实验结果表明，即使使用标准 HEVC 屏幕内容编码，多视图视频编码也比联播 HEVC 编码高效得多。所提出的高级屏幕内容编码提供了与 MV-HEVC 几乎相同的编码效率，MV-HEVC 是最先进的多视图视频压缩技术。作者建议，高级屏幕内容编码可以在新的多功能视频编码 (VVC) 技术中有效使用。然而，VVC 的参考多视图扩展尚不存在，因此，对于基于 VVC 的编码，实验比较留待将来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高级HEVC屏幕内容编码的多视图视频压缩方法，并比较了标准与改进方案的编码效率。
AI.motivation: 传统多视图视频编码方法（如 simulcast HEVC）效率不足，需探索更高效的屏幕内容编码技术以提升压缩性能。
AI.method: 采用帧兼容的多视图编码框架，分别基于标准HEVC屏幕内容编码和作者提出的高级方案（含四分之一像素运动矢量等非标准扩展）进行实验对比。
AI.result: 标准HEVC屏幕内容编码已显著优于simulcast HEVC；高级方案编码效率接近当前最先进的MV-HEVC技术，且适配VVC标准。
AI.conclusion: 高级屏幕内容编码可有效提升多视图视频压缩效率，建议纳入VVC技术体系，但需后续针对VVC的多视图扩展进行验证。
