conclusion: 高级屏幕内容编码可有效提升多视图视频压缩效率，建议纳入VVC技术体系，但需后续针对VVC的多视图扩展进行验证。
search_text: Multiview Video Compression Using Advanced HEVC Screen Content Coding 使用高级 HEVC 屏幕内容编码的多视图视频压缩 The paper presents a new approach to multiview video coding using Screen Content Coding. It is assumed that for a time instant the frames corresponding to all views are packed into a single frame, i.e. the frame-compatible approach to multiview coding is applied. For such coding scenario, the paper demonstrates that Screen Content Coding can be efficiently used for multiview video coding. Two approaches are considered: the first using standard HEVC Screen Content Coding, and the second using Advanced Screen Content Coding. The latter is the original proposal of the authors that exploits quarter-pel motion vectors and other nonstandard extensions of HEVC Screen Content Coding. The experimental results demonstrate that multiview video coding even using standard HEVC Screen Content Coding is much more efficient than simulcast HEVC coding. The proposed Advanced Screen Content Coding provides virtually the same coding efficiency as MV-HEVC, which is the state-of-the-art multiview video compression technique. The authors suggest that Advanced Screen Content Coding can be efficiently used within the new Versatile Video Coding (VVC) technology. Nevertheless a reference multiview extension of VVC does not exist yet, therefore, for VVC-based coding, the experimental comparisons are left for future work. 本文提出了一种使用屏幕内容编码进行多视图视频编码的新方法。假设在某个时刻，与所有视图相对应的帧被打包成单个帧，即应用帧兼容方法来进行多视图编码。对于这种编码场景，本文证明了屏幕内容编码可以有效地用于多视图视频编码。考虑两种方法：第一种使用标准 HEVC 屏幕内容编码，第二种使用高级屏幕内容编码。后者是作者的原始提议，它利用了四分之一像素运动矢量和 HEVC 屏幕内容编码的其他非标准扩展。实验结果表明，即使使用标准 HEVC 屏幕内容编码，多视图视频编码也比联播 HEVC 编码高效得多。所提出的高级屏幕内容编码提供了与 MV-HEVC 几乎相同的编码效率，MV-HEVC 是最先进的多视图视频压缩技术。作者建议，高级屏幕内容编码可以在新的多功能视频编码 (VVC) 技术中有效使用。然而，VVC 的参考多视图扩展尚不存在，因此，对于基于 VVC 的编码，实验比较留待将来的工作。 本文提出了一种基于高级HEVC屏幕内容编码的多视图视频压缩方法，并比较了标准与改进方案的编码效率。 Jarosław Samelak,Marek Domański cs.MM,cs.CV

title: Video Moment Retrieval with Text Query Considering Many-to-Many Correspondence Using Potentially Relevant Pair
title_zh: 使用潜在相关对考虑多对多对应的文本查询视频时刻检索
abstract: In this paper we undertake the task of text-based video moment retrieval from a corpus of videos. To train the model, text-moment paired datasets were used to learn the correct correspondences. In typical training methods, ground-truth text-moment pairs are used as positive pairs, whereas other pairs are regarded as negative pairs. However, aside from the ground-truth pairs, some text-moment pairs should be regarded as positive. In this case, one text annotation can be positive for many video moments. Conversely, one video moment can be corresponded to many text annotations. Thus, there are many-to-many correspondences between the text annotations and video moments. Based on these correspondences, we can form potentially relevant pairs, which are not given as ground truth yet are not negative; effectively incorporating such relevant pairs into training can improve the retrieval performance. The text query should describe what is happening in a video moment. Hence, different video moments annotated with similar texts, which contain a similar action, are likely to hold the similar action, thus these pairs can be considered as potentially relevant pairs. In this paper, we propose a novel training method that takes advantage of potentially relevant pairs, which are detected based on linguistic analysis about text annotation. Experiments on two benchmark datasets revealed that our method improves the retrieval performance both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: In this paper we undertake the task of text-based video moment retrieval from a corpus of videos. To train the model, text-moment paired datasets were used to learn the correct correspondences. In typical training methods, ground-truth text-moment pairs are used as positive pairs, whereas other pairs are regarded as negative pairs. However, aside from the ground-truth pairs, some text-moment pairs should be regarded as positive. In this case, one text annotation can be positive for many video moments. Conversely, one video moment can be corresponded to many text annotations. Thus, there are many-to-many correspondences between the text annotations and video moments. Based on these correspondences, we can form potentially relevant pairs, which are not given as ground truth yet are not negative; effectively incorporating such relevant pairs into training can improve the retrieval performance. The text query should describe what is happening in a video moment. Hence, different video moments annotated with similar texts, which contain a similar action, are likely to hold the similar action, thus these pairs can be considered as potentially relevant pairs. In this paper, we propose a novel training method that takes advantage of potentially relevant pairs, which are detected based on linguistic analysis about text annotation. Experiments on two benchmark datasets revealed that our method improves the retrieval performance both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们承担了从视频语料库中基于文本的视频时刻检索的任务。为了训练模型，使用文本时刻配对数据集来学习正确的对应关系。在典型的训练方法中，真实文本时刻对被用作正对，而其他对被视为负对。然而，除了真实值对之外，一些文本时刻对应该被视为积极的。在这种情况下，一个文本注释可以对许多视频时刻产生积极的影响。相反，一个视频时刻可以对应多个文本注释。因此，文本注释和视频时刻之间存在多对多的对应关系。基于这些对应关系，我们可以形成潜在的相关对，这些对没有作为基本事实给出，但也不是负面的；有效地将此类相关对纳入训练中可以提高检索性能。文本查询应该描述视频时刻发生的事情。因此，用相似文本注释的包含相似动作的不同视频时刻很可能包含相似的动作，因此这些对可以被视为潜在相关对。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练方法，该方法利用潜在相关对，这些潜在相关对是基于文本注释的语言分析而检测到的。对两个基准数据集的实验表明，我们的方法在数量和质量上都提高了检索性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本查询的视频片段检索方法，通过考虑文本与视频片段间的多对多对应关系来提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统训练方法仅将标注的文本-视频片段对视为正样本，忽略了一段文本可能对应多个视频片段、一个视频片段也可能对应多个文本的多对多关系，导致潜在相关样本未被有效利用。
AI.method: 通过语言学分析检测文本注释间的语义相似性，构建潜在相关文本-视频片段对作为训练样本，结合这些对提升模型学习效果。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在定量和定性指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用潜在相关对进行训练能有效捕捉文本与视频片段的多对多对应关系，从而提升视频片段检索性能。

In typical training methods, ground-truth text-moment pairs are used as positive pairs, whereas other pairs are regarded as negative pairs. However, aside from the ground-truth pairs, some text-moment pairs should be regarded as positive. In this case, one text annotation can be positive for many video moments. Conversely, one video moment can be corresponded to many text annotations. Thus, there are many-to-many correspondences between the text annotations and video moments. The text query should describe what is happening in a video moment. Hence, different video moments annotated with similar texts, which contain a similar action, are likely to hold the similar action, thus these pairs can be considered as potentially relevant pairs. In this paper, we propose a novel training method that takes advantage of potentially relevant pairs, which are detected based on linguistic analysis about text annotation. authors_text: Gabriel García,Anna Esteve,Adrián Colomer,David Ramos,Valery Naranjo
title: A Novel Self-Learning Framework for Bladder Cancer Grading Using Histopathological Images
title_zh: 使用组织病理学图像进行膀胱癌分级的新型自学框架
abstract: Recently, bladder cancer has been significantly increased in terms of incidence and mortality. Currently, two subtypes are known based on tumour growth: non-muscle invasive (NMIBC) and muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC). In this work, we focus on the MIBC subtype because it is of the worst prognosis and can spread to adjacent organs. We present a self-learning framework to grade bladder cancer from histological images stained via immunohistochemical techniques. Specifically, we propose a novel Deep Convolutional Embedded Attention Clustering (DCEAC) which allows classifying histological patches into different severity levels of the disease, according to the patterns established in the literature. The proposed DCEAC model follows a two-step fully unsupervised learning methodology to discern between non-tumour, mild and infiltrative patterns from high-resolution samples of 512x512 pixels. Our system outperforms previous clustering-based methods by including a convolutional attention module, which allows refining the features of the latent space before the classification stage. The proposed network exceeds state-of-the-art approaches by 2-3% across different metrics, achieving a final average accuracy of 0.9034 in a multi-class scenario. Furthermore, the reported class activation maps evidence that our model is able to learn by itself the same patterns that clinicians consider relevant, without incurring prior annotation steps. This fact supposes a breakthrough in muscle-invasive bladder cancer grading which bridges the gap with respect to train the model on labelled data.
summary: Recently, bladder cancer has been significantly increased in terms of incidence and mortality. Currently, two subtypes are known based on tumour growth: non-muscle invasive (NMIBC) and muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC). In this work, we focus on the MIBC subtype because it is of the worst prognosis and can spread to adjacent organs. We present a self-learning framework to grade bladder cancer from histological images stained via immunohistochemical techniques. Specifically, we propose a novel Deep Convolutional Embedded Attention Clustering (DCEAC) which allows classifying histological patches into different severity levels of the disease, according to the patterns established in the literature. The proposed DCEAC model follows a two-step fully unsupervised learning methodology to discern between non-tumour, mild and infiltrative patterns from high-resolution samples of 512x512 pixels. Our system outperforms previous clustering-based methods by including a convolutional attention module, which allows refining the features of the latent space before the classification stage. The proposed network exceeds state-of-the-art approaches by 2-3% across different metrics, achieving a final average accuracy of 0.9034 in a multi-class scenario. Furthermore, the reported class activation maps evidence that our model is able to learn by itself the same patterns that clinicians consider relevant, without incurring prior annotation steps. This fact supposes a breakthrough in muscle-invasive bladder cancer grading which bridges the gap with respect to train the model on labelled data.
abstract_zh: 近年来，膀胱癌的发病率和死亡率显着增加。目前，根据肿瘤生长已知有两种亚型：非肌层浸润性膀胱癌（NMIBC）和肌层浸润性膀胱癌（MIBC）。在这项工作中，我们重点关注 MIBC 亚型，因为它的预后最差，并且可以扩散到邻近器官。我们提出了一个自学习框架，可以根据通过免疫组织化学技术染色的组织学图像对膀胱癌进行分级。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的深度卷积嵌入式注意力聚类（DCEAC），它允许根据文献中建立的模式将组织学斑块分类为疾病的不同严重程度。所提出的 DCEAC 模型遵循两步完全无监督学习方法，从 512x512 像素的高分辨率样本中辨别非肿​​瘤、轻度和浸润模式。我们的系统通过包含卷积注意模块来优于以前的基于聚类的方法，该模块允许在分类阶段之前细化潜在空间的特征。所提出的网络在不同指标上都超过了最先进的方法 2-3%，在多类场景中实现了 0.9034 的最终平均准确度。此外，报告的类激活映射证据表明我们的模型能够自行学习临床医生认为相关的相同模式，而无需事先进行注释步骤。这一事实预示着肌肉浸润性膀胱癌分级的突破，弥补了在标记数据上训练模型方面的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注数据的自学习框架，通过组织病理学图像对肌层浸润性膀胱癌（MIBC）进行分级，利用深度卷积嵌入注意力聚类（DCEAC）模型实现高精度分类。
AI.motivation: 膀胱癌发病率和死亡率上升，MIBC预后差且缺乏有效分级方法，传统方法依赖标注数据且耗时耗力，需开发无需人工标注的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计DCEAC模型，采用两阶段无监督学习：首先通过卷积神经网络提取高分辨率图像特征，再结合注意力机制优化潜在空间表示，最终通过聚类区分非肿瘤、轻度和浸润性病变区域。
AI.result: 在多分类任务中达到0.9034的平均准确率，较现有方法提升2-3%，类激活图验证模型自主学习到与临床相关的关键病理模式，无需人工标注即可实现高精度分级。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过自学习机制突破了传统标注数据依赖的限制，为MIBC分级提供了高效且可解释的解决方案，具有重要的临床应用价值。

search_text: A Novel Self-Learning Framework for Bladder Cancer Grading Using Histopathological Images 使用组织病理学图像进行膀胱癌分级的新型自学框架 Recently, bladder cancer has been significantly increased in terms of incidence and mortality. Currently, two subtypes are known based on tumour growth: non-muscle invasive (NMIBC) and muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC). In this work, we focus on the MIBC subtype because it is of the worst prognosis and can spread to adjacent organs. We present a self-learning framework to grade bladder cancer from histological images stained via immunohistochemical techniques. Specifically, we propose a novel Deep Convolutional Embedded Attention Clustering (DCEAC) which allows classifying histological patches into different severity levels of the disease, according to the patterns established in the literature. The proposed DCEAC model follows a two-step fully unsupervised learning methodology to discern between non-tumour, mild and infiltrative patterns from high-resolution samples of 512x512 pixels. Our system outperforms previous clustering-based methods by including a convolutional attention module, which allows refining the features of the latent space before the classification stage. The proposed network exceeds state-of-the-art approaches by 2-3% across different metrics, achieving a final average accuracy of 0.9034 in a multi-class scenario. Furthermore, the reported class activation maps evidence that our model is able to learn by itself the same patterns that clinicians consider relevant, without incurring prior annotation steps. This fact supposes a breakthrough in muscle-invasive bladder cancer grading which bridges the gap with respect to train the model on labelled data. 近年来，膀胱癌的发病率和死亡率显着增加。目前，根据肿瘤生长已知有两种亚型：非肌层浸润性膀胱癌（NMIBC）和肌层浸润性膀胱癌（MIBC）。在这项工作中，我们重点关注 MIBC 亚型，因为它的预后最差，并且可以扩散到邻近器官。我们提出了一个自学习框架，可以根据通过免疫组织化学技术染色的组织学图像对膀胱癌进行分级。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的深度卷积嵌入式注意力聚类（DCEAC），它允许根据文献中建立的模式将组织学斑块分类为疾病的不同严重程度。所提出的 DCEAC 模型遵循两步完全无监督学习方法，从 512x512 像素的高分辨率样本中辨别非肿​​瘤、轻度和浸润模式。我们的系统通过包含卷积注意模块来优于以前的基于聚类的方法，该模块允许在分类阶段之前细化潜在空间的特征。所提出的网络在不同指标上都超过了最先进的方法 2-3%，在多类场景中实现了 0.9034 的最终平均准确度。此外，报告的类激活映射证据表明我们的模型能够自行学习临床医生认为相关的相同模式，而无需事先进行注释步骤。这一事实预示着肌肉浸润性膀胱癌分级的突破，弥补了在标记数据上训练模型方面的差距。 本文提出了一种无需标注数据的自学习框架，通过组织病理学图像对肌层浸润性膀胱癌（MIBC）进行分级，利用深度卷积嵌入注意力聚类（DCEAC）模型实现高精度分类。 Gabriel García,Anna Esteve,Adrián Colomer,David Ramos,Valery Naranjo eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: SRPN: similarity-based region proposal networks for nuclei and cells detection in histology images
title_zh: SRPN：基于相似性的区域提议网络，用于组织学图像中的细胞核和细胞检测
comment: Accepted by Medical Image Analysis for publication
comments: Accepted by Medical Image Analysis for publication
abstract: The detection of nuclei and cells in histology images is of great value in both clinical practice and pathological studies. However, multiple reasons such as morphological variations of nuclei or cells make it a challenging task where conventional object detection methods cannot obtain satisfactory performance in many cases. A detection task consists of two sub-tasks, classification and localization. Under the condition of dense object detection, classification is a key to boost the detection performance. Considering this, we propose similarity based region proposal networks (SRPN) for nuclei and cells detection in histology images. In particular, a customized convolution layer termed as embedding layer is designed for network building. The embedding layer is added into the region proposal networks, enabling the networks to learn discriminative features based on similarity learning. Features obtained by similarity learning can significantly boost the classification performance compared to conventional methods. SRPN can be easily integrated into standard convolutional neural networks architectures such as the Faster R-CNN and RetinaNet. We test the proposed approach on tasks of multi-organ nuclei detection and signet ring cells detection in histological images. Experimental results show that networks applying similarity learning achieved superior performance on both tasks when compared to their counterparts. In particular, the proposed SRPN achieve state-of-the-art performance on the MoNuSeg benchmark for nuclei segmentation and detection while compared to previous methods, and on the signet ring cell detection benchmark when compared with baselines. The sourcecode is publicly available at: https://github.com/sigma10010/nuclei_cells_det.

However, multiple reasons such as morphological variations of nuclei or cells make it a challenging task where conventional object detection methods cannot obtain satisfactory performance in many cases. A detection task consists of two sub-tasks, classification and localization. Under the condition of dense object detection, classification is a key to boost the detection performance. Considering this, we propose similarity based region proposal networks (SRPN) for nuclei and cells detection in histology images. In particular, a customized convolution layer termed as embedding layer is designed for network building. The embedding layer is added into the region proposal networks, enabling the networks to learn discriminative features based on similarity learning. Features obtained by similarity learning can significantly boost the classification performance compared to conventional methods. SRPN can be easily integrated into standard convolutional neural networks architectures such as the Faster R-CNN and RetinaNet. We test the proposed approach on tasks of multi-organ nuclei detection and signet ring cells detection in histological images. Experimental results show that networks applying similarity learning achieved superior performance on both tasks when compared to their counterparts. In particular, the proposed SRPN achieve state-of-the-art performance on the MoNuSeg benchmark for nuclei segmentation and detection while compared to previous methods, and on the signet ring cell detection benchmark when compared with baselines. The sourcecode is publicly available at: https://github.com/sigma10010/nuclei_cells_det.
abstract_zh: 组织学图像中细胞核和细胞的检测在临床实践和病理研究中都具有重要价值。然而，由于细胞核或细胞的形态变化等多种原因，传统的目标检测方法在许多情况下无法获得令人满意的性能，这使其成为一项具有挑战性的任务。检测任务由两个子任务组成：分类和定位。在密集目标检测的情况下，分类是提高检测性能的关键。考虑到这一点，我们提出了基于相似性的区域提议网络（SRPN），用于组织学图像中的细胞核和细胞检测。特别是，被称为嵌入层的定制卷积层是为网络构建而设计的。嵌入层被添加到区域提议网络中，使网络能够基于相似性学习来学习判别特征。与传统方法相比，通过相似性学习获得的特征可以显着提高分类性能。 SRPN 可以轻松集成到标准卷积神经网络架构中，例如 Faster R-CNN 和 RetinaNet。我们在组织学图像中的多器官核检测和印戒细胞检测任务上测试了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，与同类网络相比，应用相似性学习的网络在这两项任务上都取得了优异的性能。特别是，与以前的方法相比，所提出的 SRPN 在用于细胞核分割和检测的 MoNuSeg 基准上实现了最先进的性能，与基线相比，在印戒细胞检测基准上实现了最先进的性能。源代码可公开获取：https://github.com/sigma10010/nuclei_cells_det。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相似度的区域提议网络（SRPN），用于在组织学图像中检测细胞和细胞核。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测方法在处理组织学图像中形态多变的细胞和细胞核时表现不佳，分类性能是提升检测效果的关键。
AI.method: 设计了一种嵌入层（embedding layer）集成到区域提议网络中，通过相似度学习提取判别性特征，提升分类性能，并可与Faster R-CNN等标准网络架构兼容。
AI.result: 在多器官细胞核检测和印戒细胞检测任务中，SRPN在MoNuSeg基准和印戒细胞检测基准上均达到优于现有方法的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: SRPN通过相似度学习有效提升了组织学图像中细胞和细胞核检测的性能，且具有良好的网络兼容性。

title: Graph Pattern Loss based Diversified Attention Network for Cross-Modal Retrieval
title_zh: 基于图模式损失的跨模态检索多样化注意力网络
abstract: Cross-modal retrieval aims to enable flexible retrieval experience by combining multimedia data such as image, video, text, and audio. One core of unsupervised approaches is to dig the correlations among different object representations to complete satisfied retrieval performance without requiring expensive labels. In this paper, we propose a Graph Pattern Loss based Diversified Attention Network(GPLDAN) for unsupervised cross-modal retrieval to deeply analyze correlations among representations. First, we propose a diversified attention feature projector by considering the interaction between different representations to generate multiple representations of an instance. Then, we design a novel graph pattern loss to explore the correlations among different representations, in this graph all possible distances between different representations are considered. In addition, a modality classifier is added to explicitly declare the corresponding modalities of features before fusion and guide the network to enhance discrimination ability. We test GPLDAN on four public datasets. Compared with the state-of-the-art cross-modal retrieval methods, the experimental results demonstrate the performance and competitiveness of GPLDAN.
summary: Cross-modal retrieval aims to enable flexible retrieval experience by combining multimedia data such as image, video, text, and audio. One core of unsupervised approaches is to dig the correlations among different object representations to complete satisfied retrieval performance without requiring expensive labels. In this paper, we propose a Graph Pattern Loss based Diversified Attention Network(GPLDAN) for unsupervised cross-modal retrieval to deeply analyze correlations among representations. First, we propose a diversified attention feature projector by considering the interaction between different representations to generate multiple representations of an instance. Then, we design a novel graph pattern loss to explore the correlations among different representations, in this graph all possible distances between different representations are considered. In addition, a modality classifier is added to explicitly declare the corresponding modalities of features before fusion and guide the network to enhance discrimination ability. We test GPLDAN on four public datasets. Compared with the state-of-the-art cross-modal retrieval methods, the experimental results demonstrate the performance and competitiveness of GPLDAN.
abstract_zh: 跨模态检索旨在通过结合图像、视频、文本、音频等多媒体数据来实现灵活的检索体验。无监督方法的核心之一是挖掘不同对象表示之间的相关性，以完成令人满意的检索性能，而不需要昂贵的标签。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图模式损失的多样化注意力网络（GPLDAN），用于无监督跨模态检索，以深入分析表示之间的相关性。首先，我们通过考虑不同表示之间的交互来提出多样化的注意力特征投影仪，以生成实例的多个表示。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的图模式损失来探索不同表示之间的相关性，在该图中考虑了不同表示之间的所有可能距离。此外，还添加了模态分类器，在融合前明确声明特征对应的模态，指导网络增强判别能力。我们在四个公共数据集上测试 GPLDAN。与最先进的跨模态检索方法相比，实验结果证明了 GPLDAN 的性能和竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图模式损失的多样化注意力网络（GPLDAN），用于无监督跨模态检索，通过深入分析不同表示之间的相关性来提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 跨模态检索需要在无需昂贵标签的情况下挖掘不同模态表示之间的关联性，现有方法在捕捉复杂相关性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计了多样化注意力特征投影器生成多表示，并引入图模式损失计算所有表示间的距离以探索关联性，同时添加模态分类器增强特征判别能力。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上测试表明，GPLDAN相比现有最先进的跨模态检索方法具有竞争力和优越性能。
AI.conclusion: GPLDAN通过图模式损失和多样化注意力机制有效捕捉跨模态关联，为无监督跨模态检索提供了新思路。

Compared with the state-of-the-art cross-modal retrieval methods, the experimental results demonstrate the performance and competitiveness of GPLDAN. 跨模态检索旨在通过结合图像、视频、文本、音频等多媒体数据来实现灵活的检索体验。无监督方法的核心之一是挖掘不同对象表示之间的相关性，以完成令人满意的检索性能，而不需要昂贵的标签。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图模式损失的多样化注意力网络（GPLDAN），用于无监督跨模态检索，以深入分析表示之间的相关性。首先，我们通过考虑不同表示之间的交互来提出多样化的注意力特征投影仪，以生成实例的多个表示。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的图模式损失来探索不同表示之间的相关性，在该图中考虑了不同表示之间的所有可能距离。此外，还添加了模态分类器，在融合前明确声明特征对应的模态，指导网络增强判别能力。我们在四个公共数据集上测试 GPLDAN。与最先进的跨模态检索方法相比，实验结果证明了 GPLDAN 的性能和竞争力。 本文提出了一种基于图模式损失的多样化注意力网络（GPLDAN），用于无监督跨模态检索，通过深入分析不同表示之间的相关性来提升检索性能。 Xueying Chen,Rong Zhang,Yibing Zhan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Gabriel García,Rocío del Amor,Adrián Colomer,Rafael Verdú-Monedero,Juan Morales-Sánchez,Valery Naranjo
title: Circumpapillary OCT-Focused Hybrid Learning for Glaucoma Grading Using Tailored Prototypical Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用定制的原型神经网络进行以环视乳头 OCT 为重点的青光眼分级混合学习
abstract: Glaucoma is one of the leading causes of blindness worldwide and Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) is the quintessential imaging technique for its detection. Unlike most of the state-of-the-art studies focused on glaucoma detection, in this paper, we propose, for the first time, a novel framework for glaucoma grading using raw circumpapillary B-scans. In particular, we set out a new OCT-based hybrid network which combines hand-driven and deep learning algorithms. An OCT-specific descriptor is proposed to extract hand-crafted features related to the retinal nerve fibre layer (RNFL). In parallel, an innovative CNN is developed using skip-connections to include tailored residual and attention modules to refine the automatic features of the latent space. The proposed architecture is used as a backbone to conduct a novel few-shot learning based on static and dynamic prototypical networks. The k-shot paradigm is redefined giving rise to a supervised end-to-end system which provides substantial improvements discriminating between healthy, early and advanced glaucoma samples. The training and evaluation processes of the dynamic prototypical network are addressed from two fused databases acquired via Heidelberg Spectralis system. Validation and testing results reach a categorical accuracy of 0.9459 and 0.8788 for glaucoma grading, respectively. Besides, the high performance reported by the proposed model for glaucoma detection deserves a special mention. The findings from the class activation maps are directly in line with the clinicians' opinion since the heatmaps pointed out the RNFL as the most relevant structure for glaucoma diagnosis.

In particular, we set out a new OCT-based hybrid network which combines hand-driven and deep learning algorithms. An OCT-specific descriptor is proposed to extract hand-crafted features related to the retinal nerve fibre layer (RNFL). In parallel, an innovative CNN is developed using skip-connections to include tailored residual and attention modules to refine the automatic features of the latent space. The proposed architecture is used as a backbone to conduct a novel few-shot learning based on static and dynamic prototypical networks. The k-shot paradigm is redefined giving rise to a supervised end-to-end system which provides substantial improvements discriminating between healthy, early and advanced glaucoma samples. The training and evaluation processes of the dynamic prototypical network are addressed from two fused databases acquired via Heidelberg Spectralis system. Validation and testing results reach a categorical accuracy of 0.9459 and 0.8788 for glaucoma grading, respectively. Besides, the high performance reported by the proposed model for glaucoma detection deserves a special mention. The findings from the class activation maps are directly in line with the clinicians' opinion since the heatmaps pointed out the RNFL as the most relevant structure for glaucoma diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 青光眼是全世界导致失明的主要原因之一，光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是检测青光眼的典型成像技术。与大多数专注于青光眼检测的最先进研究不同，在本文中，我们首次提出了一种使用原始环视乳头 B 扫描进行青光眼分级的新框架。特别是，我们提出了一种新的基于 OCT 的混合网络，它结合了手动驱动和深度学习算法。提出了一种 OCT 特定描述符来提取与视网膜神经纤维层 (RNFL) 相关的手工特征。与此同时，使用跳跃连​​接开发了一种创新的 CNN，其中包括定制的残差和注意力模块，以细化潜在空间的自动特征。所提出的架构用作骨干，以进行基于静态和动态原型网络的新颖的小样本学习。 k-shot范式被重新定义，产生了一个受监督的端到端系统，该系统在区分健康、早期和晚期青光眼样本方面提供了实质性改进。动态原型网络的训练和评估过程通过 Heidelberg Spectralis 系统获取的两个融合数据库进行处理。青光眼分级的验证和测试结果分别达到 0.9459 和 0.8788 的分类准确度。此外，所提出的青光眼检测模型报告的高性能值得特别提及。类激活图的结果与临床医生的观点直接一致，因为热图指出 RNFL 是青光眼诊断最相关的结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合手工特征与深度学习的混合框架，用于基于原始环视盘OCT扫描的青光眼分级。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦青光眼检测而非分级，且缺乏针对环视盘OCT扫描的专门分级方法，需提升分级准确性并结合临床关键结构（如RNFL）特征。
AI.method: 设计OCT特异性描述子提取RNFL手工特征，开发带跳跃连接的CNN网络，集成残差模块与注意力机制，并基于静态/动态原型网络构建少样本学习框架。
AI.result: 验证集和测试集青光眼分级准确率达0.9459和0.8788，检测性能优异，类激活图与临床医生对RNFL的诊断关注点一致。
AI.conclusion: 该混合框架通过融合手工特征与深度学习，在青光眼分级任务中取得显著效果，验证了RNFL结构对诊断的关键性。

title: Connecting Sphere Manifolds Hierarchically for Regularization
title_zh: 分层连接球流形以进行正则化
abstract: This paper considers classification problems with hierarchically organized classes. We force the classifier (hyperplane) of each class to belong to a sphere manifold, whose center is the classifier of its super-class. Then, individual sphere manifolds are connected based on their hierarchical relations. Our technique replaces the last layer of a neural network by combining a spherical fully-connected layer with a hierarchical layer. This regularization is shown to improve the performance of widely used deep neural network architectures (ResNet and DenseNet) on publicly available datasets (CIFAR100, CUB200, Stanford dogs, Stanford cars, and Tiny-ImageNet).
summary: This paper considers classification problems with hierarchically organized classes. We force the classifier (hyperplane) of each class to belong to a sphere manifold, whose center is the classifier of its super-class. Then, individual sphere manifolds are connected based on their hierarchical relations. Our technique replaces the last layer of a neural network by combining a spherical fully-connected layer with a hierarchical layer. This regularization is shown to improve the performance of widely used deep neural network architectures (ResNet and DenseNet) on publicly available datasets (CIFAR100, CUB200, Stanford dogs, Stanford cars, and Tiny-ImageNet).
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了分层组织类的分类问题。我们强制每个类的分类器（超平面）属于一个球流形，其中心是其超类的分类器。然后，各个球流形根据其层次关系进行连接。我们的技术通过将球形全连接层与分层层相结合来取代神经网络的最后一层。这种正则化被证明可以提高广泛使用的深度神经网络架构（ResNet 和 DenseNet）在公开数据集（CIFAR100、CUB200、Stanford dogs、Stanford cars 和 Tiny-ImageNet）上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于球面流形层次连接的正则化方法，用于改进层次化分类任务中的深度神经网络性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法在处理具有层次结构的类别时，难以有效利用类间层次关系，导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 将每个类别的分类器约束在以超类分类器为中心的球面流形上，并通过层次结构连接多个流形；替换神经网络最后一层为球面全连接层与层次层的组合。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100、CUB200等5个公开数据集上，ResNet和DenseNet架构的分类性能均得到显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 层次化球面流形正则化有效增强了深度网络对层次结构数据的建模能力，是一种可行的分类性能优化方法。

title: Improving Human Decisions by Adjusting the Alerting Thresholds for Computer Alerting Tools According to User and Task Characteristics
title_zh: 根据用户和任务特征调整计算机警报工具的警报阈值，改善人类决策
abstract: Objective: To investigate whether performance (number of correct decisions) of humans supported by a computer alerting tool can be improved by tailoring the tool's alerting threshold (sensitivity/specificity combination) according to user ability and task difficulty. Background: Many researchers implicitly assume that for each tool there exists a single ideal threshold. But research shows the effects of alerting tools on decision errors to vary depending on variables such as user ability and task difficulty. These findings motivated our investigation. Method: Forty-seven participants edited text passages, aided by a simulated spell-checker tool. We experimentally manipulated passage difficulty and tool alerting threshold, measured participants' editing and dictation ability, and counted participants' decision errors (false positives + false negatives). We investigated whether alerting threshold, user ability, task difficulty and their interactions affected error count. Results: Which alerting threshold better helped a user depended on an interaction between user ability and passage difficulty. Some effects were large: for higher ability users, a more sensitive threshold reduced errors by 30%, on the easier passages. Participants were not significantly more likely to prefer the alerting threshold with which they performed better. Conclusion: Adjusting alerting thresholds for individual users' ability and task difficulty could substantially improve effects of automated alerts on user decisions. This potential deserves further investigation. Improvement size and rules for adjustment will be application-specific. Application: Computer alerting tools have critical roles in many domains. Designers should assess potential benefits of adjustable alerting thresholds for their specific CAT application. Guidance for choosing thresholds will be essential for realizing these benefits in practice.

Designers should assess potential benefits of adjustable alerting thresholds for their specific CAT application. Guidance for choosing thresholds will be essential for realizing these benefits in practice.
abstract_zh: 目的：调查计算机警报工具支持的人类性能（正确决策的数量）是否可以通过根据用户能力和任务难度定制工具的警报阈值（灵敏度/特异性组合）来提高。背景：许多研究人员隐含地假设每个工具都存在一个理想的阈值。但研究表明，警报工具对决策错误的影响会根据用户能力和任务难度等变量而变化。这些发现激发了我们的调查。方法：四十七名参与者在模拟拼写检查工具的帮助下编辑文本段落。我们通过实验操纵段落难度和工具警报阈值，测量参与者的编辑和听写能力，并计算参与者的决策错误（误报+漏报）。我们调查了警报阈值、用户能力、任务难度及其交互是否影响错误计数。结果：哪个警报阈值可以更好地帮助用户取决于用户能力和通过难度之间的相互作用。有些影响很大：对于能力较高的用户来说，更敏感的阈值可以将较容易的段落的错误减少 30%。参与者并没有明显更倾向于选择表现更好的警报阈值。结论：根据个人用户的能力和任务难度调整警报阈值可以显着改善自动警报对用户决策的影响。这种潜力值得进一步研究。改进规模和调整规则将根据具体应用而定。应用：计算机警报工具在许多领域发挥着关键作用。设计人员应评估可调整警报阈值对其特定 CAT 应用的潜在好处。选择阈值的指南对于在实践中实现这些好处至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨通过根据用户能力和任务难度调整计算机警报工具的警报阈值，能否提升人类决策表现。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为警报工具存在单一最佳阈值，但研究发现用户能力和任务难度会影响警报效果，因此需验证个性化阈值调整的可行性。
AI.method: 47名参与者在不同文本难度下使用模拟拼写检查工具，通过实验操控警报阈值、测量编辑能力并统计错误率，分析阈值、用户能力与任务难度的交互影响。
AI.result: 警报阈值效果取决于用户能力与任务难度的交互：高能力用户在简单任务中使用更敏感阈值可减少30%错误，但用户未显著偏好表现更优的阈值。
AI.conclusion: 根据用户能力和任务难度调整警报阈值可显著提升自动化警报效果，但需针对具体应用场景制定调整规则。

search_text: Improving Human Decisions by Adjusting the Alerting Thresholds for Computer Alerting Tools According to User and Task Characteristics 根据用户和任务特征调整计算机警报工具的警报阈值，改善人类决策 Objective: To investigate whether performance (number of correct decisions) of humans supported by a computer alerting tool can be improved by tailoring the tool's alerting threshold (sensitivity/specificity combination) according to user ability and task difficulty. Background: Many researchers implicitly assume that for each tool there exists a single ideal threshold. But research shows the effects of alerting tools on decision errors to vary depending on variables such as user ability and task difficulty. These findings motivated our investigation. Method: Forty-seven participants edited text passages, aided by a simulated spell-checker tool. We experimentally manipulated passage difficulty and tool alerting threshold, measured participants' editing and dictation ability, and counted participants' decision errors (false positives + false negatives). We investigated whether alerting threshold, user ability, task difficulty and their interactions affected error count. Results: Which alerting threshold better helped a user depended on an interaction between user ability and passage difficulty. Some effects were large: for higher ability users, a more sensitive threshold reduced errors by 30%, on the easier passages. Participants were not significantly more likely to prefer the alerting threshold with which they performed better. Conclusion: Adjusting alerting thresholds for individual users' ability and task difficulty could substantially improve effects of automated alerts on user decisions. This potential deserves further investigation. Improvement size and rules for adjustment will be application-specific. Application: Computer alerting tools have critical roles in many domains. Designers should assess potential benefits of adjustable alerting thresholds for their specific CAT application. Guidance for choosing thresholds will be essential for realizing these benefits in practice. 目的：调查计算机警报工具支持的人类性能（正确决策的数量）是否可以通过根据用户能力和任务难度定制工具的警报阈值（灵敏度/特异性组合）来提高。背景：许多研究人员隐含地假设每个工具都存在一个理想的阈值。但研究表明，警报工具对决策错误的影响会根据用户能力和任务难度等变量而变化。这些发现激发了我们的调查。方法：四十七名参与者在模拟拼写检查工具的帮助下编辑文本段落。我们通过实验操纵段落难度和工具警报阈值，测量参与者的编辑和听写能力，并计算参与者的决策错误（误报+漏报）。我们调查了警报阈值、用户能力、任务难度及其交互是否影响错误计数。结果：哪个警报阈值可以更好地帮助用户取决于用户能力和通过难度之间的相互作用。有些影响很大：对于能力较高的用户来说，更敏感的阈值可以将较容易的段落的错误减少 30%。参与者并没有明显更倾向于选择表现更好的警报阈值。结论：根据个人用户的能力和任务难度调整警报阈值可以显着改善自动警报对用户决策的影响。这种潜力值得进一步研究。改进规模和调整规则将根据具体应用而定。应用：计算机警报工具在许多领域发挥着关键作用。设计人员应评估可调整警报阈值对其特定 CAT 应用的潜在好处。选择阈值的指南对于在实践中实现这些好处至关重要。 本研究探讨通过根据用户能力和任务难度调整计算机警报工具的警报阈值，能否提升人类决策表现。 Marwa Gadala,Lorenzo Strigini,Peter Ayton cs.HC

title: Tensor-based framework for training flexible neural networks
title_zh: 用于训练灵活神经网络的基于张量的框架
abstract: Activation functions (AFs) are an important part of the design of neural networks (NNs), and their choice plays a predominant role in the performance of a NN. In this work, we are particularly interested in the estimation of flexible activation functions using tensor-based solutions, where the AFs are expressed as a weighted sum of predefined basis functions. To do so, we propose a new learning algorithm which solves a constrained coupled matrix-tensor factorization (CMTF) problem. This technique fuses the first and zeroth order information of the NN, where the first-order information is contained in a Jacobian tensor, following a constrained canonical polyadic decomposition (CPD). The proposed algorithm can handle different decomposition bases. The goal of this method is to compress large pretrained NN models, by replacing subnetworks, {\em i.e.,} one or multiple layers of the original network, by a new flexible layer. The approach is applied to a pretrained convolutional neural network (CNN) used for character classification.
summary: Activation functions (AFs) are an important part of the design of neural networks (NNs), and their choice plays a predominant role in the performance of a NN. In this work, we are particularly interested in the estimation of flexible activation functions using tensor-based solutions, where the AFs are expressed as a weighted sum of predefined basis functions. To do so, we propose a new learning algorithm which solves a constrained coupled matrix-tensor factorization (CMTF) problem. This technique fuses the first and zeroth order information of the NN, where the first-order information is contained in a Jacobian tensor, following a constrained canonical polyadic decomposition (CPD). The proposed algorithm can handle different decomposition bases. The goal of this method is to compress large pretrained NN models, by replacing subnetworks, {\em i.e.,} one or multiple layers of the original network, by a new flexible layer. The approach is applied to a pretrained convolutional neural network (CNN) used for character classification.
abstract_zh: 激活函数 (AF) 是神经网络 (NN) 设计的重要组成部分，其选择对神经网络的性能起着主导作用。在这项工作中，我们对使用基于张量的解决方案估计灵活的激活函数特别感兴趣，其中 AF 表示为预定义基函数的加权和。为此，我们提出了一种新的学习算法，可以解决约束耦合矩阵张量分解（CMTF）问题。该技术融合了神经网络的一阶和零阶信息，其中一阶信息包含在雅可比张量中，遵循约束规范多元分解 (CPD)。所提出的算法可以处理不同的分解基础。该方法的目标是通过用新的灵活层替换子网络（即原始网络的一层或多层）来压缩大型预训练神经网络模型。该方法应用于用于字符分类的预训练卷积神经网络 (CNN)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于张量的框架，通过估计灵活激活函数来压缩预训练神经网络模型。
AI.motivation: 激活函数对神经网络性能影响显著，传统方法灵活性不足，需通过张量方法提升灵活性并实现模型压缩。
AI.method: 提出一种解决约束耦合矩阵-张量分解问题的新算法，融合雅可比张量的一阶信息与零阶信息，并通过约束CPD分解处理不同基函数。
AI.result: 在字符分类的预训练CNN上应用，成功压缩模型并保持性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效验证了张量分解在压缩神经网络中的潜力，为灵活激活函数设计提供新思路。

authors_text: M Ganesh Kumar,Cheston Tan,Camilo Libedinsky,Shih-Cheng Yen,Andrew Yong-Yi Tan
title: A nonlinear hidden layer enables actor-critic agents to learn multiple paired association navigation
title_zh: 非线性隐藏层使演员-评论家代理能够学习多对关联导航
abstract: Navigation to multiple cued reward locations has been increasingly used to study rodent learning. Though deep reinforcement learning agents have been shown to be able to learn the task, they are not biologically plausible. Biologically plausible classic actor-critic agents have been shown to learn to navigate to single reward locations, but which biologically plausible agents are able to learn multiple cue-reward location tasks has remained unclear. In this computational study, we show versions of classic agents that learn to navigate to a single reward location, and adapt to reward location displacement, but are not able to learn multiple paired association navigation. The limitation is overcome by an agent in which place cell and cue information are first processed by a feedforward nonlinear hidden layer with synapses to the actor and critic subject to temporal difference error-modulated plasticity. Faster learning is obtained when the feedforward layer is replaced by a recurrent reservoir network.
summary: Navigation to multiple cued reward locations has been increasingly used to study rodent learning. Though deep reinforcement learning agents have been shown to be able to learn the task, they are not biologically plausible. Biologically plausible classic actor-critic agents have been shown to learn to navigate to single reward locations, but which biologically plausible agents are able to learn multiple cue-reward location tasks has remained unclear. In this computational study, we show versions of classic agents that learn to navigate to a single reward location, and adapt to reward location displacement, but are not able to learn multiple paired association navigation. The limitation is overcome by an agent in which place cell and cue information are first processed by a feedforward nonlinear hidden layer with synapses to the actor and critic subject to temporal difference error-modulated plasticity. Faster learning is obtained when the feedforward layer is replaced by a recurrent reservoir network.
abstract_zh: 多个提示奖励位置的导航已越来越多地用于研究啮齿类动物的学习。尽管深度强化学习代理已被证明能够学习该任务，但它们在生物学上并不合理。生物学上合理的经典演员评论家智能体已被证明能够学习导航到单个奖励位置，但哪些生物学上合理的智能体能够学习多个提示奖励位置任务仍不清楚。在这项计算研究中，我们展示了经典代理的版本，它们学习导航到单个奖励位置并适应奖励位置位移，但无法学习多个配对关联导航。该限制由代理克服，其中位置单元和提示信息首先由前馈非线性隐藏层处理，该隐藏层具有到演员和批评者的突触，并受到时间差误差调制可塑性的影响。当前馈层被循环存储网络取代时，可以获得更快的学习速度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过引入非线性隐藏层使经典actor-critic智能体学习多配对关联导航任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法虽能完成多奖励导航任务但缺乏生物合理性，而经典生物合理智能体无法处理多配对关联导航任务。
AI.method: 设计包含前馈非线性隐藏层的智能体，通过时序差分误差调节的可塑性连接actor和critic网络，并对比递归水库网络的效果。
AI.result: 非线性隐藏层使智能体能学习多配对导航任务，且替换为递归网络后学习速度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 非线性隐藏层是实现多配对导航的关键，递归网络结构可进一步加速学习过程。

search_text: A nonlinear hidden layer enables actor-critic agents to learn multiple paired association navigation 非线性隐藏层使演员-评论家代理能够学习多对关联导航 Navigation to multiple cued reward locations has been increasingly used to study rodent learning. Though deep reinforcement learning agents have been shown to be able to learn the task, they are not biologically plausible. Biologically plausible classic actor-critic agents have been shown to learn to navigate to single reward locations, but which biologically plausible agents are able to learn multiple cue-reward location tasks has remained unclear. In this computational study, we show versions of classic agents that learn to navigate to a single reward location, and adapt to reward location displacement, but are not able to learn multiple paired association navigation. The limitation is overcome by an agent in which place cell and cue information are first processed by a feedforward nonlinear hidden layer with synapses to the actor and critic subject to temporal difference error-modulated plasticity. Faster learning is obtained when the feedforward layer is replaced by a recurrent reservoir network. 多个提示奖励位置的导航已越来越多地用于研究啮齿类动物的学习。尽管深度强化学习代理已被证明能够学习该任务，但它们在生物学上并不合理。生物学上合理的经典演员评论家智能体已被证明能够学习导航到单个奖励位置，但哪些生物学上合理的智能体能够学习多个提示奖励位置任务仍不清楚。在这项计算研究中，我们展示了经典代理的版本，它们学习导航到单个奖励位置并适应奖励位置位移，但无法学习多个配对关联导航。该限制由代理克服，其中位置单元和提示信息首先由前馈非线性隐藏层处理，该隐藏层具有到演员和批评者的突触，并受到时间差误差调制可塑性的影响。当前馈层被循环存储网络取代时，可以获得更快的学习速度。 本文研究如何通过引入非线性隐藏层使经典actor-critic智能体学习多配对关联导航任务。 M Ganesh Kumar,Cheston Tan,Camilo Libedinsky,Shih-Cheng Yen,Andrew Yong-Yi Tan cs.NE,q-bio.NC

title: Dealing with Expert Bias in Collective Decision-Making
title_zh: 处理集体决策中的专家偏见
abstract: Quite some real-world problems can be formulated as decision-making problems wherein one must repeatedly make an appropriate choice from a set of alternatives. Multiple expert judgements, whether human or artificial, can help in taking correct decisions, especially when exploration of alternative solutions is costly. As expert opinions might deviate, the problem of finding the right alternative can be approached as a collective decision making problem (CDM) via aggregation of independent judgements. Current state-of-the-art approaches focus on efficiently finding the optimal expert, and thus perform poorly if all experts are not qualified or if they are overly biased, thereby potentially derailing the decision-making process. In this paper, we propose a new algorithmic approach based on contextual multi-armed bandit problems (CMAB) to identify and counteract such biased expertise. We explore homogeneous, heterogeneous and polarised expert groups and show that this approach is able to effectively exploit the collective expertise, outperforming state-of-the-art methods, especially when the quality of the provided expertise degrades. Our novel CMAB-inspired approach achieves a higher final performance and does so while converging more rapidly than previous adaptive algorithms.
summary: Quite some real-world problems can be formulated as decision-making problems wherein one must repeatedly make an appropriate choice from a set of alternatives. Multiple expert judgements, whether human or artificial, can help in taking correct decisions, especially when exploration of alternative solutions is costly. As expert opinions might deviate, the problem of finding the right alternative can be approached as a collective decision making problem (CDM) via aggregation of independent judgements. Current state-of-the-art approaches focus on efficiently finding the optimal expert, and thus perform poorly if all experts are not qualified or if they are overly biased, thereby potentially derailing the decision-making process. In this paper, we propose a new algorithmic approach based on contextual multi-armed bandit problems (CMAB) to identify and counteract such biased expertise. We explore homogeneous, heterogeneous and polarised expert groups and show that this approach is able to effectively exploit the collective expertise, outperforming state-of-the-art methods, especially when the quality of the provided expertise degrades. Our novel CMAB-inspired approach achieves a higher final performance and does so while converging more rapidly than previous adaptive algorithms.
abstract_zh: 相当多的现实世界问题可以被表述为决策问题，其中人们必须反复从一组替代方案中做出适当的选择。多个专家判断，无论是人为的还是人工的，都可以帮助做出正确的决策，特别是当探索替代解决方案成本高昂时。由于专家意见可能会出现偏差，因此可以通过汇总独立判断将找到正确替代方案的问题视为集体决策问题（CDM）。当前最先进的方法侧重于有效地寻找最佳专家，因此，如果所有专家都不合格或过于偏见，则效果会很差，从而可能使决策过程脱轨。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于上下文多臂老虎机问题（CMAB）的新算法方法来识别和抵消这种有偏见的专业知识。我们探索了同质、异质和两极分化的专家组，并表明这种方法能够有效地利用集体专业知识，优于最先进的方法，特别是当所提供的专业知识的质量下降时。我们受 CMAB 启发的新颖方法实现了更高的最终性能，并且比以前的自适应算法收敛得更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文多臂老虎机（CMAB）的算法，用于在集体决策中识别并抵消专家偏见，提升决策质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在专家存在偏见或能力不足时表现不佳，可能导致决策失误，需开发更鲁棒的集体决策框架。
AI.method: 设计CMAB启发式算法，通过动态聚合专家意见，区分并抑制偏差较大的专家影响，适用于同质、异质及极化专家群体。
AI.result: 新方法在专家质量下降时仍能保持较高性能，收敛速度优于现有自适应算法，显著提升集体决策效果。
AI.conclusion: CMAB驱动的算法有效利用集体专家知识，在偏见存在时仍能实现快速收敛与更优决策结果。

title: Deep Residual Echo Suppression with A Tunable Tradeoff Between Signal Distortion and Echo Suppression
title_zh: 深度残余回声抑制，在信号失真和回声抑制之间进行可调权衡
abstract: In this paper, we propose a residual echo suppression method using a UNet neural network that directly maps the outputs of a linear acoustic echo canceler to the desired signal in the spectral domain. This system embeds a design parameter that allows a tunable tradeoff between the desired-signal distortion and residual echo suppression in double-talk scenarios. The system employs 136 thousand parameters, and requires 1.6 Giga floating-point operations per second and 10 Mega-bytes of memory. The implementation satisfies both the timing requirements of the AEC challenge and the computational and memory limitations of on-device applications. Experiments are conducted with 161~h of data from the AEC challenge database and from real independent recordings. We demonstrate the performance of the proposed system in real-life conditions and compare it with two competing methods regarding echo suppression and desired-signal distortion, generalization to various environments, and robustness to high echo levels.
summary: In this paper, we propose a residual echo suppression method using a UNet neural network that directly maps the outputs of a linear acoustic echo canceler to the desired signal in the spectral domain. This system embeds a design parameter that allows a tunable tradeoff between the desired-signal distortion and residual echo suppression in double-talk scenarios. The system employs 136 thousand parameters, and requires 1.6 Giga floating-point operations per second and 10 Mega-bytes of memory. The implementation satisfies both the timing requirements of the AEC challenge and the computational and memory limitations of on-device applications. Experiments are conducted with 161~h of data from the AEC challenge database and from real independent recordings. We demonstrate the performance of the proposed system in real-life conditions and compare it with two competing methods regarding echo suppression and desired-signal distortion, generalization to various environments, and robustness to high echo levels.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 UNet 神经网络的残余回声抑制方法，该方法直接将线性声学回声消除器的输出映射到谱域中的所需信号。该系统嵌入了一个设计参数，允许在双方通话场景中的期望信号失真和残余回声抑制之间进行可调权衡。该系统采用13.6万个参数，需要每秒1.6G浮点运算和10MB内存。该实现既满足了 AEC 挑战的时序要求，又满足了设备上应用程序的计算和内存限制。实验使用来自 AEC 挑战数据库和真实独立记录的 161~h 数据进行。我们展示了所提出的系统在现实条件下的性能，并将其与两种竞争方法进行比较，包括回声抑制和期望信号失真、对各种环境的泛化以及对高回声水平的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于UNet的残差回声抑制方法，在频域中实现信号失真与残余回声抑制的可调权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统回声抑制方法在双讲场景下难以平衡信号失真与回声抑制，且现有方法计算复杂度高，难以满足设备端的实时性和资源限制。
AI.method: 采用UNet神经网络，在频域直接映射线性声学回声消除器输出到期望信号，引入可调参数以平衡信号失真与回声抑制，系统参数量为136k，计算需求为1.6 GFLOPs，内存占用10MB。
AI.result: 实验表明，在真实环境下，该系统在回声抑制效果、信号失真控制、环境泛化能力及高回声鲁棒性方面优于两种对比方法，满足AEC挑战的时间要求和设备端资源限制。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效实现了信号失真与回声抑制的可调平衡，具备低计算复杂度和内存占用，适用于实时设备端回声抑制场景。

We demonstrate the performance of the proposed system in real-life conditions and compare it with two competing methods regarding echo suppression and desired-signal distortion, generalization to various environments, and robustness to high echo levels. 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 UNet 神经网络的残余回声抑制方法，该方法直接将线性声学回声消除器的输出映射到谱域中的所需信号。该系统嵌入了一个设计参数，允许在双方通话场景中的期望信号失真和残余回声抑制之间进行可调权衡。该系统采用13.6万个参数，需要每秒1.6G浮点运算和10MB内存。该实现既满足了 AEC 挑战的时序要求，又满足了设备上应用程序的计算和内存限制。实验使用来自 AEC 挑战数据库和真实独立记录的 161~h 数据进行。我们展示了所提出的系统在现实条件下的性能，并将其与两种竞争方法进行比较，包括回声抑制和期望信号失真、对各种环境的泛化以及对高回声水平的鲁棒性。 提出一种基于UNet的残差回声抑制方法，在频域中实现信号失真与残余回声抑制的可调权衡。 Amir Ivry,Israel Cohen,Baruch Berdugo cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Navigating A Mobile Robot Using Switching Distributed Sensor Networks
title_zh: 使用交换分布式传感器网络导航移动机器人
abstract: This paper proposes a method to navigate a mobile robot by estimating its state over a number of distributed sensor networks (DSNs) such that it can successively accomplish a sequence of tasks, i.e., its state enters each targeted set and stays inside no less than the desired time, under a resource-aware, time-efficient, and computation- and communication-constrained setting.We propose a new robot state estimation and navigation architecture, which integrates an event-triggered task-switching feedback controller for the robot and a two-time-scale distributed state estimator for each sensor. The architecture has three major advantages over existing approaches: First, in each task only one DSN is active for sensing and estimating the robot state, and for different tasks the robot can switch the active DSN by taking resource saving and system performance into account; Second, the robot only needs to communicate with one active sensor at each time to obtain its state information from the active DSN; Third, no online optimization is required. With the controller, the robot is able to accomplish a task by following a reference trajectory and switch to the next task when an event-triggered condition is fulfilled. With the estimator, each active sensor is able to estimate the robot state. Under proper conditions, we prove that the state estimation error and the trajectory tracking deviation are upper bounded by two time-varying sequences respectively, which play an essential role in the event-triggered condition. Furthermore, we find a sufficient condition for accomplishing a task and provide an upper bound of running time for the task. Numerical simulations of an indoor robot's localization and navigation are provided to validate the proposed architecture.
summary: This paper proposes a method to navigate a mobile robot by estimating its state over a number of distributed sensor networks (DSNs) such that it can successively accomplish a sequence of tasks, i.e., its state enters each targeted set and stays inside no less than the desired time, under a resource-aware, time-efficient, and computation- and communication-constrained setting.We propose a new robot state estimation and navigation architecture, which integrates an event-triggered task-switching feedback controller for the robot and a two-time-scale distributed state estimator for each sensor. The architecture has three major advantages over existing approaches: First, in each task only one DSN is active for sensing and estimating the robot state, and for different tasks the robot can switch the active DSN by taking resource saving and system performance into account; Second, the robot only needs to communicate with one active sensor at each time to obtain its state information from the active DSN; Third, no online optimization is required. With the controller, the robot is able to accomplish a task by following a reference trajectory and switch to the next task when an event-triggered condition is fulfilled. With the estimator, each active sensor is able to estimate the robot state. Under proper conditions, we prove that the state estimation error and the trajectory tracking deviation are upper bounded by two time-varying sequences respectively, which play an essential role in the event-triggered condition. Furthermore, we find a sufficient condition for accomplishing a task and provide an upper bound of running time for the task. Numerical simulations of an indoor robot's localization and navigation are provided to validate the proposed architecture.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过在多个分布式传感器网络（DSN）上估计其状态来导航移动机器人的方法，使其能够在资源感知、时间高效、计算和通信受限的设置下连续完成一系列任务，即其状态进入每个目标集并在内部停留不少于期望的时间。我们提出了一种新的机器人状态估计和导航架构，该架构集成了机器人的事件触发任务切换反馈控制器和每个传感器的两个时间尺度的分布式状态估计器。与现有方法相比，该架构具有三个主要优点：第一，每个任务中只有一个DSN处于活动状态，用于感知和估计机器人状态，并且对于不同的任务，机器人可以根据资源节省和系统性能来切换活动DSN；其次，机器人每次只需要与一个主动传感器进行通信，即可从主动 DSN 中获取其状态信息；第三，无需在线优化。通过控制器，机器人能够按照参考轨迹完成任务，并在满足事件触发条件时切换到下一个任务。通过估计器，每个主动传感器都能够估计机器人状态。在适当的条件下，我们证明了状态估计误差和轨迹跟踪偏差分别受两个时变序列的上界限制，这在事件触发条件下起着至关重要的作用。此外，我们找到完成任务的充分条件，并提供任务运行时间的上限。提供了室内机器人定位和导航的数值模拟来验证所提出的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于切换分布式传感器网络（DSN）的移动机器人导航方法，通过状态估计实现任务序列的高效完成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在资源消耗、计算和通信约束下难以实现机器人多任务高效导航，需设计更节能且性能稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出包含事件触发任务切换控制器和双时间尺度分布式状态估计器的架构，通过单DSN激活、单传感器通信及无需在线优化实现资源高效导航。
AI.result: 仿真验证了室内机器人定位与导航的有效性，证明状态估计误差和轨迹偏差受时变序列约束，并给出任务完成时间上界。
AI.conclusion: 该架构在资源受限场景下实现机器人多任务导航，兼具节能性与性能保障，为复杂环境下的自主导航提供新思路。

title: Interactive query expansion for professional search applications
title_zh: 专业搜索应用程序的交互式查询扩展
abstract: Knowledge workers (such as healthcare information professionals, patent agents and recruitment professionals) undertake work tasks where search forms a core part of their duties. In these instances, the search task is often complex and time-consuming and requires specialist expert knowledge to formulate accurate search strategies. Interactive features such as query expansion can play a key role in supporting these tasks. However, generating query suggestions within a professional search context requires that consideration be given to the specialist, structured nature of the search strategies they employ. In this paper, we investigate a variety of query expansion methods applied to a collection of Boolean search strategies used in a variety of real-world professional search tasks. The results demonstrate the utility of context-free distributional language models and the value of using linguistic cues such as ngram order to optimise the balance between precision and recall.
summary: Knowledge workers (such as healthcare information professionals, patent agents and recruitment professionals) undertake work tasks where search forms a core part of their duties. In these instances, the search task is often complex and time-consuming and requires specialist expert knowledge to formulate accurate search strategies. Interactive features such as query expansion can play a key role in supporting these tasks. However, generating query suggestions within a professional search context requires that consideration be given to the specialist, structured nature of the search strategies they employ. In this paper, we investigate a variety of query expansion methods applied to a collection of Boolean search strategies used in a variety of real-world professional search tasks. The results demonstrate the utility of context-free distributional language models and the value of using linguistic cues such as ngram order to optimise the balance between precision and recall.
abstract_zh: 知识工作者（例如医疗信息专业人员、专利代理人和招聘专业人员）承担的工作任务中，搜索是其职责的核心部分。在这些情况下，搜索任务往往复杂且耗时，需要专业知识来制定准确的搜索策略。查询扩展等交互功能可以在支持这些任务方面发挥关键作用。然而，在专业搜索上下文中生成查询建议需要考虑他们所采用的搜索策略的专业性、结构化性质。在本文中，我们研究了应用于各种现实世界专业搜索任务中使用的布尔搜索策略集合的各种查询扩展方法。结果证明了上下文无关分布式语言模型的实用性以及使用 ngram 顺序等语言线索来优化精确度和召回率之间平衡的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在专业搜索场景中通过交互式查询扩展方法提升搜索效果，特别是针对需要专业知识的用户。
AI.motivation: 专业领域的搜索任务复杂且耗时，传统查询方法难以满足精准需求，需探索适配专业场景的查询扩展技术。
AI.method: 分析多种查询扩展方法在布尔搜索策略中的应用，结合无上下文分布语言模型及n-gram顺序等语言线索优化效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用分布语言模型和语言线索能有效平衡搜索结果的精确率与召回率。
AI.conclusion: 交互式查询扩展在专业搜索中具有实用价值，未来可进一步优化模型以适应更多专业领域需求。

title: Multi-Domain Active Learning: Literature Review and Comparative Study
title_zh: 多领域主动学习：文献综述与比较研究
comment: This work has been accepted by IEEE-TETCI
comments: This work has been accepted by IEEE-TETCI
abstract: Multi-domain learning (MDL) refers to learning a set of models simultaneously, where each model is specialized to perform a task in a particular domain. Generally, a high labeling effort is required in MDL, as data needs to be labeled by human experts for every domain. Active learning (AL) can be utilized in MDL to reduce the labeling effort by only using the most informative data. The resultant paradigm is termed multi-domain active learning (MDAL). In this work, we provide an exhaustive literature review for MDAL on the relevant fields, including AL, cross-domain information sharing schemes, and cross-domain instance evaluation approaches. It is found that the few studies which have been directly conducted on MDAL cannot serve as off-the-shelf solutions on more general MDAL tasks. To fill this gap, we construct a pipeline of MDAL and present a comprehensive comparative study of thirty different algorithms, which are established by combining six representative MDL models and five commonly used AL strategies. We evaluate the algorithms on six datasets involving textual and visual classification tasks. In most cases, AL brings notable improvements to MDL, and the naive BvSB (best vs. second best) Uncertainty strategy can perform competitively with the state-of-the-art AL strategies. Besides, BvSB with the MAN (multinomial adversarial networks) model can consistently achieve top or above-average performance on all the datasets. Furthermore, we qualitatively analyze the behaviors of the well-performed strategies and models, shedding light on their superior performance in the comparison. Finally, we recommend using BvSB with the MAN model in the application of MDAL due to their good performance in the experiments.
summary: Multi-domain learning (MDL) refers to learning a set of models simultaneously, where each model is specialized to perform a task in a particular domain. Generally, a high labeling effort is required in MDL, as data needs to be labeled by human experts for every domain. In this work, we provide an exhaustive literature review for MDAL on the relevant fields, including AL, cross-domain information sharing schemes, and cross-domain instance evaluation approaches. It is found that the few studies which have been directly conducted on MDAL cannot serve as off-the-shelf solutions on more general MDAL tasks. To fill this gap, we construct a pipeline of MDAL and present a comprehensive comparative study of thirty different algorithms, which are established by combining six representative MDL models and five commonly used AL strategies. We evaluate the algorithms on six datasets involving textual and visual classification tasks. In most cases, AL brings notable improvements to MDL, and the naive BvSB (best vs. second best) Uncertainty strategy can perform competitively with the state-of-the-art AL strategies. Besides, BvSB with the MAN (multinomial adversarial networks) model can consistently achieve top or above-average performance on all the datasets. Furthermore, we qualitatively analyze the behaviors of the well-performed strategies and models, shedding light on their superior performance in the comparison. Finally, we recommend using BvSB with the MAN model in the application of MDAL due to their good performance in the experiments.
abstract_zh: 多领域学习（MDL）是指同时学习一组模型，其中每个模型专门用于执行特定领域中的任务。一般来说，MDL 需要大量的标记工作，因为每个领域的数据都需要由人类专家进行标记。可以在 MDL 中利用主动学习 (AL)，仅使用信息最丰富的数据来减少标记工作。由此产生的范式被称为多领域主动学习（MDAL）。在这项工作中，我们对相关领域的 MDAL 进行了详尽的文献综述，包括 AL、跨域信息共享方案和跨域实例评估方法。研究发现，直接针对 MDAL 进行的少数研究不能作为更一般的 MDAL 任务的现成解决方案。为了填补这一空白，我们构建了 MDAL 管道，并对 30 种不同的算法进行了全面的比较研究，这些算法是通过结合六种代表性的 MDL 模型和五种常用的 AL 策略而建立的。我们在涉及文本和视觉分类任务的六个数据集上评估算法。在大多数情况下，AL 为 MDL 带来了显着的改进，并且朴素的 BvSB（最佳与次佳）不确定性策略可以与最先进的 AL 策略竞争。此外，具有 MAN（多项对抗网络）模型的 BvSB 可以在所有数据集上始终实现顶级或高于平均水平的性能。此外，我们定性分析了表现良好的策略和模型的行为，揭示了它们在比较中的优越性能。最后，我们建议在 MDAL 的应用中使用 BvSB 和 MAN 模型，因为它们在实验中表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文对多领域主动学习（MDAL）进行文献综述与比较研究，构建MDAL流程并评估30种算法，推荐BvSB与MAN模型组合。
AI.motivation: 现有MDAL研究不足，无法直接应用于通用任务，需系统性比较算法以填补研究空白。
AI.method: 结合六种MDL模型与五种AL策略生成30种算法，在六个多领域数据集上进行实验比较。
AI.result: AL显著提升MDL性能，BvSB策略表现接近SOTA，MAN模型结合BvSB在所有数据集上保持领先。
AI.conclusion: 推荐使用BvSB不确定性策略与MAN模型结合，以实现高效的多领域主动学习。

search_text: Multi-Domain Active Learning: Literature Review and Comparative Study 多领域主动学习：文献综述与比较研究 Multi-domain learning (MDL) refers to learning a set of models simultaneously, where each model is specialized to perform a task in a particular domain. Generally, a high labeling effort is required in MDL, as data needs to be labeled by human experts for every domain. Active learning (AL) can be utilized in MDL to reduce the labeling effort by only using the most informative data. The resultant paradigm is termed multi-domain active learning (MDAL). In this work, we provide an exhaustive literature review for MDAL on the relevant fields, including AL, cross-domain information sharing schemes, and cross-domain instance evaluation approaches. It is found that the few studies which have been directly conducted on MDAL cannot serve as off-the-shelf solutions on more general MDAL tasks. To fill this gap, we construct a pipeline of MDAL and present a comprehensive comparative study of thirty different algorithms, which are established by combining six representative MDL models and five commonly used AL strategies. We evaluate the algorithms on six datasets involving textual and visual classification tasks. In most cases, AL brings notable improvements to MDL, and the naive BvSB (best vs. second best) Uncertainty strategy can perform competitively with the state-of-the-art AL strategies. Besides, BvSB with the MAN (multinomial adversarial networks) model can consistently achieve top or above-average performance on all the datasets. Furthermore, we qualitatively analyze the behaviors of the well-performed strategies and models, shedding light on their superior performance in the comparison. Finally, we recommend using BvSB with the MAN model in the application of MDAL due to their good performance in the experiments. 多领域学习（MDL）是指同时学习一组模型，其中每个模型专门用于执行特定领域中的任务。一般来说，MDL 需要大量的标记工作，因为每个领域的数据都需要由人类专家进行标记。可以在 MDL 中利用主动学习 (AL)，仅使用信息最丰富的数据来减少标记工作。由此产生的范式被称为多领域主动学习（MDAL）。在这项工作中，我们对相关领域的 MDAL 进行了详尽的文献综述，包括 AL、跨域信息共享方案和跨域实例评估方法。研究发现，直接针对 MDAL 进行的少数研究不能作为更一般的 MDAL 任务的现成解决方案。为了填补这一空白，我们构建了 MDAL 管道，并对 30 种不同的算法进行了全面的比较研究，这些算法是通过结合六种代表性的 MDL 模型和五种常用的 AL 策略而建立的。我们在涉及文本和视觉分类任务的六个数据集上评估算法。在大多数情况下，AL 为 MDL 带来了显着的改进，并且朴素的 BvSB（最佳与次佳）不确定性策略可以与最先进的 AL 策略竞争。此外，具有 MAN（多项对抗网络）模型的 BvSB 可以在所有数据集上始终实现顶级或高于平均水平的性能。此外，我们定性分析了表现良好的策略和模型的行为，揭示了它们在比较中的优越性能。最后，我们建议在 MDAL 的应用中使用 BvSB 和 MAN 模型，因为它们在实验中表现良好。 本文对多领域主动学习（MDAL）进行文献综述与比较研究，构建MDAL流程并评估30种算法，推荐BvSB与MAN模型组合。 Rui He,Shengcai Liu,Shan He,Ke Tang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Phoneme-aware and Channel-wise Attentive Learning for Text DependentSpeaker Verification
title_zh: 用于文本相关说话者验证的音素感知和通道式关注学习
abstract: This paper proposes a multi-task learning network with phoneme-aware and channel-wise attentive learning strategies for text-dependent Speaker Verification (SV). In the proposed structure, the frame-level multi-task learning along with the segment-level adversarial learning is adopted for speaker embedding extraction. The phoneme-aware attentive pooling is exploited on frame-level features in the main network for speaker classifier, with the corresponding posterior probability for the phoneme distribution in the auxiliary subnet. Further, the introduction of Squeeze and Excitation (SE-block) performs dynamic channel-wise feature recalibration, which improves the representational ability. The proposed method exploits speaker idiosyncrasies associated with pass-phrases, and is further improved by the phoneme-aware attentive pooling and SE-block from temporal and channel-wise aspects, respectively. The experiments conducted on RSR2015 Part 1 database confirm that the proposed system achieves outstanding results for textdependent SV.
summary: This paper proposes a multi-task learning network with phoneme-aware and channel-wise attentive learning strategies for text-dependent Speaker Verification (SV). In the proposed structure, the frame-level multi-task learning along with the segment-level adversarial learning is adopted for speaker embedding extraction. The phoneme-aware attentive pooling is exploited on frame-level features in the main network for speaker classifier, with the corresponding posterior probability for the phoneme distribution in the auxiliary subnet. Further, the introduction of Squeeze and Excitation (SE-block) performs dynamic channel-wise feature recalibration, which improves the representational ability. The proposed method exploits speaker idiosyncrasies associated with pass-phrases, and is further improved by the phoneme-aware attentive pooling and SE-block from temporal and channel-wise aspects, respectively. The experiments conducted on RSR2015 Part 1 database confirm that the proposed system achieves outstanding results for textdependent SV.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种多任务学习网络，具有音素感知和通道式注意学习策略，用于文本相关的说话人验证（SV）。在所提出的结构中，采用帧级多任务学习和段级对抗性学习来进行说话人嵌入提取。在主网络中的帧级特征上利用音素感知注意池来进行说话者分类，并在辅助子网中为音素分布提供相应的后验概率。此外，挤压和激励（SE-block）的引入执行动态通道特征重新校准，从而提高了表征能力。所提出的方法利用了与密码短语相关的说话者特质，并分别通过音素感知注意力池和 SE 块从时间和通道方面进一步改进。在 RSR2015 第 1 部分数据库上进行的实验证实，所提出的系统在文本相关的 SV 方面取得了出色的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合音素感知与通道注意力机制的多任务学习网络，用于文本相关的说话人验证任务。
AI.motivation: 现有文本相关说话人验证方法难以有效捕捉语音中的时序特征与通道信息，导致验证准确率受限。
AI.method: 采用帧级多任务学习与段级对抗学习提取说话人嵌入，通过音素感知注意力池化建模时序特征，并引入SE块实现通道特征动态校准。
AI.result: 在RSR2015 Part 1数据集实验中，该方法在文本相关说话人验证任务中取得显著优于基线模型的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过音素感知注意力与通道校准机制的协同作用，有效提升了文本相关说话人验证系统的表征能力与验证性能。

title: Littlestone Classes are Privately Online Learnable
title_zh: Littlestone 课程可私下在线学习
abstract: We consider the problem of online classification under a privacy constraint. In this setting a learner observes sequentially a stream of labelled examples $(x_t, y_t)$, for $1 \leq t \leq T$, and returns at each iteration $t$ a hypothesis $h_t$ which is used to predict the label of each new example $x_t$. The learner's performance is measured by her regret against a known hypothesis class $\mathcal{H}$. We require that the algorithm satisfies the following privacy constraint: the sequence $h_1, \ldots, h_T$ of hypotheses output by the algorithm needs to be an $(ε, δ)$-differentially private function of the whole input sequence $(x_1, y_1), \ldots, (x_T, y_T)$. We provide the first non-trivial regret bound for the realizable setting. Specifically, we show that if the class $\mathcal{H}$ has constant Littlestone dimension then, given an oblivious sequence of labelled examples, there is a private learner that makes in expectation at most $O(\log T)$ mistakes -- comparable to the optimal mistake bound in the non-private case, up to a logarithmic factor. Moreover, for general values of the Littlestone dimension $d$, the same mistake bound holds but with a doubly-exponential in $d$ factor. A recent line of work has demonstrated a strong connection between classes that are online learnable and those that are differentially-private learnable. Our results strengthen this connection and show that an online learning algorithm can in fact be directly privatized (in the realizable setting). We also discuss an adaptive setting and provide a sublinear regret bound of $O(\sqrt{T})$.
summary: We consider the problem of online classification under a privacy constraint. In this setting a learner observes sequentially a stream of labelled examples $(x_t, y_t)$, for $1 \leq t \leq T$, and returns at each iteration $t$ a hypothesis $h_t$ which is used to predict the label of each new example $x_t$. The learner's performance is measured by her regret against a known hypothesis class $\mathcal{H}$. We require that the algorithm satisfies the following privacy constraint: the sequence $h_1, \ldots, h_T$ of hypotheses output by the algorithm needs to be an $(ε, δ)$-differentially private function of the whole input sequence $(x_1, y_1), \ldots, (x_T, y_T)$. We provide the first non-trivial regret bound for the realizable setting. Specifically, we show that if the class $\mathcal{H}$ has constant Littlestone dimension then, given an oblivious sequence of labelled examples, there is a private learner that makes in expectation at most $O(\log T)$ mistakes -- comparable to the optimal mistake bound in the non-private case, up to a logarithmic factor. Moreover, for general values of the Littlestone dimension $d$, the same mistake bound holds but with a doubly-exponential in $d$ factor. A recent line of work has demonstrated a strong connection between classes that are online learnable and those that are differentially-private learnable. Our results strengthen this connection and show that an online learning algorithm can in fact be directly privatized (in the realizable setting). We also discuss an adaptive setting and provide a sublinear regret bound of $O(\sqrt{T})$.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑隐私约束下的在线分类问题。在此设置中，学习器顺序观察标记示例流 $(x_t, y_t)$，对于 $1 \leq t \leq T$，并在每次迭代 $t$ 时返回假设 $h_t$，用于预测每个新示例 $x_t$ 的标签。学习者的表现是通过她对已知假设类 $\mathcal{H}$ 的遗憾来衡量的。我们要求算法满足以下隐私约束：算法输出的假设序列$h_1,\ldots,h_T$需要是整个输入序列$(x_1,y_1),\ldots,(x_T,y_T)$的$(ε,δ)$差分隐私函数。我们为可实现的设置提供了第一个重要的遗憾。具体来说，我们表明，如果类 $\mathcal{H}$ 具有恒定的 Littlestone 维数，那么，给定一个不经意的标记示例序列，有一个私人学习器在预期中最多犯 $O(\log T)$ 错误——与非私人情况下的最佳错误界限相当，最多为对数因子。此外，对于 Littlestone 维度 $d$ 的一般值，同样的错误界限成立，但在 $d$ 因子中具有双指数。最近的一系列工作表明，在线可学习的课程与差异化私人可学习的课程之间存在密切的联系。我们的结果加强了这种联系，并表明在线学习算法实际上可以直接私有化（在可实现的环境中）。我们还讨论了自适应设置并提供了 $O(\sqrt{T})$ 的次线性后悔界限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在隐私约束下的在线分类问题，提出了一种满足差分隐私的在线学习算法，使得假设类在可实现设置下具有较低的遗憾和错误率。
AI.motivation: 现有在线学习算法在隐私保护方面存在不足，尤其针对具有有限Littlestone维数的假设类，缺乏有效的隐私保证与性能平衡方法。
AI.method: 通过设计满足(ε, δ)-差分隐私的算法，结合Littlestone维数的性质，对在线学习过程进行隐私化改造，并分析其在固定和自适应序列下的性能。
AI.result: 对于常数Littlestone维数的类，算法在期望下至多产生O(log T)次错误；对于一般维数d，错误率包含双指数因子。自适应设置下获得O(√T)的次线性遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 在线学习算法可直接隐私化，且在可实现设置下保持接近最优的性能，强化了在线可学习性与差分隐私可学习性之间的联系。

ai_content.motivation: 现有在线学习算法在隐私保护方面存在不足，尤其针对具有有限Littlestone维数的假设类，缺乏有效的隐私保证与性能平衡方法。
ai_content.method: 通过设计满足(ε, δ)-差分隐私的算法，结合Littlestone维数的性质，对在线学习过程进行隐私化改造，并分析其在固定和自适应序列下的性能。
ai_content.result: 对于常数Littlestone维数的类，算法在期望下至多产生O(log T)次错误；对于一般维数d，错误率包含双指数因子。自适应设置下获得O(√T)的次线性遗憾。
ai_content.conclusion: 在线学习算法可直接隐私化，且在可实现设置下保持接近最优的性能，强化了在线可学习性与差分隐私可学习性之间的联系。

search_text: Littlestone Classes are Privately Online Learnable Littlestone 课程可私下在线学习 We consider the problem of online classification under a privacy constraint. In this setting a learner observes sequentially a stream of labelled examples $(x_t, y_t)$, for $1 \leq t \leq T$, and returns at each iteration $t$ a hypothesis $h_t$ which is used to predict the label of each new example $x_t$. The learner's performance is measured by her regret against a known hypothesis class $\mathcal{H}$. We require that the algorithm satisfies the following privacy constraint: the sequence $h_1, \ldots, h_T$ of hypotheses output by the algorithm needs to be an $(ε, δ)$-differentially private function of the whole input sequence $(x_1, y_1), \ldots, (x_T, y_T)$. We provide the first non-trivial regret bound for the realizable setting. Specifically, we show that if the class $\mathcal{H}$ has constant Littlestone dimension then, given an oblivious sequence of labelled examples, there is a private learner that makes in expectation at most $O(\log T)$ mistakes -- comparable to the optimal mistake bound in the non-private case, up to a logarithmic factor. Moreover, for general values of the Littlestone dimension $d$, the same mistake bound holds but with a doubly-exponential in $d$ factor. A recent line of work has demonstrated a strong connection between classes that are online learnable and those that are differentially-private learnable. Our results strengthen this connection and show that an online learning algorithm can in fact be directly privatized (in the realizable setting). We also discuss an adaptive setting and provide a sublinear regret bound of $O(\sqrt{T})$. 我们考虑隐私约束下的在线分类问题。在此设置中，学习器顺序观察标记示例流 $(x_t, y_t)$，对于 $1 \leq t \leq T$，并在每次迭代 $t$ 时返回假设 $h_t$，用于预测每个新示例 $x_t$ 的标签。学习者的表现是通过她对已知假设类 $\mathcal{H}$ 的遗憾来衡量的。我们要求算法满足以下隐私约束：算法输出的假设序列$h_1,\ldots,h_T$需要是整个输入序列$(x_1,y_1),\ldots,(x_T,y_T)$的$(ε,δ)$差分隐私函数。我们为可实现的设置提供了第一个重要的遗憾。具体来说，我们表明，如果类 $\mathcal{H}$ 具有恒定的 Littlestone 维数，那么，给定一个不经意的标记示例序列，有一个私人学习器在预期中最多犯 $O(\log T)$ 错误——与非私人情况下的最佳错误界限相当，最多为对数因子。此外，对于 Littlestone 维度 $d$ 的一般值，同样的错误界限成立，但在 $d$ 因子中具有双指数。最近的一系列工作表明，在线可学习的课程与差异化私人可学习的课程之间存在密切的联系。我们的结果加强了这种联系，并表明在线学习算法实际上可以直接私有化（在可实现的环境中）。我们还讨论了自适应设置并提供了 $O(\sqrt{T})$ 的次线性后悔界限。 本文研究了在隐私约束下的在线分类问题，提出了一种满足差分隐私的在线学习算法，使得假设类在可实现设置下具有较低的遗憾和错误率。 Noah Golowich,Roi Livni cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.DS

authors_text: Aparajita Dey-Plissonneau,Hyowon Lee,Vincent Pradier,Michael Scriney,Alan F. Smeaton
title: The L2L System for Second Language Learning Using Visualised Zoom Calls Among Students
title_zh: 利用学生可视化 Zoom Calls 进行第二语言学习的 L2L 系统
comment: 16th European Conference on Technology-Enhanced Learning (EC-TEL), Bozen-Bolzano, Italy (online), September 2021
comments: 16th European Conference on Technology-Enhanced Learning (EC-TEL), Bozen-Bolzano, Italy (online), September 2021
abstract: An important part of second language learning is conversation which is best practised with speakers whose native language is the language being learned. We facilitate this by pairing students from different countries learning each others' native language. Mixed groups of students have Zoom calls, half in one language and half in the other, in order to practice and improve their conversation skills. We use Zoom video recordings with audio transcripts enabled which generates recognised speech from which we extract timestamped utterances and calculate and visualise conversation metrics on a dashboard. A timeline highlights each utterance, colour coded per student, with links to the video in a playback window. L2L was deployed for a semester and recorded almost 250 hours of zoom meetings. The conversation metrics visualised on the dashboard are a beneficial asset for both students and lecturers.
summary: An important part of second language learning is conversation which is best practised with speakers whose native language is the language being learned. We facilitate this by pairing students from different countries learning each others' native language. Mixed groups of students have Zoom calls, half in one language and half in the other, in order to practice and improve their conversation skills. We use Zoom video recordings with audio transcripts enabled which generates recognised speech from which we extract timestamped utterances and calculate and visualise conversation metrics on a dashboard. A timeline highlights each utterance, colour coded per student, with links to the video in a playback window. L2L was deployed for a semester and recorded almost 250 hours of zoom meetings. The conversation metrics visualised on the dashboard are a beneficial asset for both students and lecturers.
abstract_zh: 第二语言学习的一个重要部分是对话，最好与母语是所学语言的说话者进行对话。我们通过将来自不同国家的学生配对学习彼此的母语来促进这一点。混合小组的学生进行 Zoom 通话，一半使用一种语言，一半使用另一种语言，以练习和提高他们的对话技巧。我们使用启用了音频转录的 Zoom 视频录制，生成已识别的语音，我们从中提取带时间戳的话语，并在仪表板上计算和可视化对话指标。时间线突出显示每个学生的每句话，并用颜色编码，并在播放窗口中提供指向视频的链接。 L2L 部署了一个学期并记录了近 250 小时的 Zoom 会议。仪表板上可视化的对话指标对于学生和讲师来说都是有益的资产。

AI.tldr: 开发L2L系统，通过可视化Zoom通话帮助学生进行第二语言对话练习。
AI.motivation: 第二语言学习需大量实际对话练习，传统方法难以提供有效跨语言交流机会和反馈。
AI.method: 配对不同国家学生进行混合语言Zoom通话，记录并转录音频，提取时间戳发言，生成可视化仪表板展示对话指标及视频回放链接。
AI.result: 系统运行一个学期记录近250小时会议，可视化指标为师生提供有价值的对话练习反馈。
AI.conclusion: L2L系统通过结构化跨语言对话和可视化分析，有效提升第二语言学习效果。

title: Evaluation of Deep-Learning-Based Voice Activity Detectors and Room Impulse Response Models in Reverberant Environments
title_zh: 混响环境中基于深度学习的语音活动检测器和房间脉冲响应模型的评估
abstract: State-of-the-art deep-learning-based voice activity detectors (VADs) are often trained with anechoic data. However, real acoustic environments are generally reverberant, which causes the performance to significantly deteriorate. To mitigate this mismatch between training data and real data, we simulate an augmented training set that contains nearly five million utterances. This extension comprises of anechoic utterances and their reverberant modifications, generated by convolutions of the anechoic utterances with a variety of room impulse responses (RIRs). We consider five different models to generate RIRs, and five different VADs that are trained with the augmented training set. We test all trained systems in three different real reverberant environments. Experimental results show $20\%$ increase on average in accuracy, precision and recall for all detectors and response models, compared to anechoic training. Furthermore, one of the RIR models consistently yields better performance than the other models, for all the tested VADs. Additionally, one of the VADs consistently outperformed the other VADs in all experiments.
summary: State-of-the-art deep-learning-based voice activity detectors (VADs) are often trained with anechoic data. However, real acoustic environments are generally reverberant, which causes the performance to significantly deteriorate. To mitigate this mismatch between training data and real data, we simulate an augmented training set that contains nearly five million utterances. This extension comprises of anechoic utterances and their reverberant modifications, generated by convolutions of the anechoic utterances with a variety of room impulse responses (RIRs). We consider five different models to generate RIRs, and five different VADs that are trained with the augmented training set. We test all trained systems in three different real reverberant environments. Experimental results show $20\%$ increase on average in accuracy, precision and recall for all detectors and response models, compared to anechoic training. Furthermore, one of the RIR models consistently yields better performance than the other models, for all the tested VADs. Additionally, one of the VADs consistently outperformed the other VADs in all experiments.
abstract_zh: 最先进的基于深度学习的语音活动检测器 (VAD) 通常使用消声数据进行训练。然而，真实的声学环境通常存在混响，这会导致性能显着恶化。为了减轻训练数据和真实数据之间的不匹配，我们模拟了一个包含近五百万个话语的增强训练集。该扩展包括无回声言语及其混响修改，由无回声言语与各种房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 的卷积生成。我们考虑使用五种不同的模型来生成 RIR，以及使用增强训练集进行训练的五种不同的 VAD。我们在三种不同的真实混响环境中测试所有经过训练的系统。实验结果表明，与消声训练相比，所有检测器和响应模型的准确度、精确度和召回率平均提高了 20\%$。此外，对于所有测试的 VAD，其中一个 RIR 模型始终比其他模型产生更好的性能。此外，在所有实验中，其中一种 VAD 的表现始终优于其他 VAD。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了基于深度学习的语音活动检测器（VADs）和房间脉冲响应（RIR）模型在混响环境中的性能。
AI.motivation: 最先进的基于深度学习的VAD通常使用无混响数据进行训练，但在实际环境中，混响会导致性能显著下降。因此，需要研究如何通过增强训练数据来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 作者通过卷积无混响语音与多种房间脉冲响应生成混响语音，构建了一个包含近五百万条语音的增强训练集。使用五种不同的RIR模型生成混响数据，并训练五种不同的VAD模型，然后在三种真实混响环境中进行测试。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与无混响训练相比，所有检测器和响应模型的准确率、精确率和召回率平均提高了20%。其中一种RIR模型在所有VAD中表现更优，而一种VAD在所有实验中也优于其他VAD。
AI.conclusion: 增强训练数据能够有效提高VAD在混响环境中的性能，同时特定的RIR模型和VAD在实验中表现更优。
