search_text: Evaluation of Deep-Learning-Based Voice Activity Detectors and Room Impulse Response Models in Reverberant Environments 混响环境中基于深度学习的语音活动检测器和房间脉冲响应模型的评估 State-of-the-art deep-learning-based voice activity detectors (VADs) are often trained with anechoic data. However, real acoustic environments are generally reverberant, which causes the performance to significantly deteriorate. To mitigate this mismatch between training data and real data, we simulate an augmented training set that contains nearly five million utterances. This extension comprises of anechoic utterances and their reverberant modifications, generated by convolutions of the anechoic utterances with a variety of room impulse responses (RIRs). We consider five different models to generate RIRs, and five different VADs that are trained with the augmented training set. We test all trained systems in three different real reverberant environments. Experimental results show $20\%$ increase on average in accuracy, precision and recall for all detectors and response models, compared to anechoic training. Furthermore, one of the RIR models consistently yields better performance than the other models, for all the tested VADs. Additionally, one of the VADs consistently outperformed the other VADs in all experiments. 最先进的基于深度学习的语音活动检测器 (VAD) 通常使用消声数据进行训练。然而，真实的声学环境通常存在混响，这会导致性能显着恶化。为了减轻训练数据和真实数据之间的不匹配，我们模拟了一个包含近五百万个话语的增强训练集。该扩展包括无回声言语及其混响修改，由无回声言语与各种房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 的卷积生成。我们考虑使用五种不同的模型来生成 RIR，以及使用增强训练集进行训练的五种不同的 VAD。我们在三种不同的真实混响环境中测试所有经过训练的系统。实验结果表明，与消声训练相比，所有检测器和响应模型的准确度、精确度和召回率平均提高了 20\%$。此外，对于所有测试的 VAD，其中一个 RIR 模型始终比其他模型产生更好的性能。此外，在所有实验中，其中一种 VAD 的表现始终优于其他 VAD。 该论文评估了基于深度学习的语音活动检测器（VADs）和房间脉冲响应（RIR）模型在混响环境中的性能。 Amir Ivry,Israel Cohen,Baruch Berdugo cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Hyowon Lee,Mingming Liu,Michael Scriney,Alan F. Smeaton
title: Usage-based Summaries of Learning Videos
title_zh: 基于使用情况的学习视频摘要
comment: 16th European Conference on Technology-Enhanced Learning (EC-TEL), Bozen-Bolzano, Italy (online), September 2021
comments: 16th European Conference on Technology-Enhanced Learning (EC-TEL), Bozen-Bolzano, Italy (online), September 2021
abstract: Much of the delivery of University education is now by synchronous or asynchronous video. For students, one of the challenges is managing the sheer volume of such video material as video presentations of taught material are difficult to abbreviate and summarise because they do not have highlights which stand out. Apart from video bookmarks there are no tools available to determine which parts of video content should be replayed at revision time or just before examinations. We have developed and deployed a digital library for managing video learning material which has many dozens of hours of short-form video content from a range of taught courses for hundreds of students at undergraduate level. Through a web browser we allow students to access and play these videos and we log their anonymised playback usage. From these logs we score to each segment of each video based on the amount of playback it receives from across all students, whether the segment has been re-wound and re-played in the same student session, whether the on-screen window is the window in focus on the student's desktop/laptop, and speed of playback. We also incorporate negative scoring if a video segment is skipped or fast-forward, and overarching all this we include a decay function based on recency of playback, so the most recent days of playback contribute more to the video segment scores. For each video in the library we present a usage-based graph which allows students to see which parts of each video attract the most playback from their peers, which helps them select material at revision time. Usage of the system is fully anonymised and GDPR-compliant.

Through a web browser we allow students to access and play these videos and we log their anonymised playback usage. We also incorporate negative scoring if a video segment is skipped or fast-forward, and overarching all this we include a decay function based on recency of playback, so the most recent days of playback contribute more to the video segment scores. For each video in the library we present a usage-based graph which allows students to see which parts of each video attract the most playback from their peers, which helps them select material at revision time. Usage of the system is fully anonymised and GDPR-compliant.
abstract_zh: 现在大部分大学教育都是通过同步或异步视频进行的。对于学生来说，挑战之一是管理大量的视频材料，因为教学材料的视频演示很难缩写和总结，因为它们没有突出的亮点。除了视频书签之外，没有任何工具可以确定视频内容的哪些部分应该在复习时或考试前重播。我们开发并部署了一个用于管理视频学习材料的数字图书馆，其中包含来自数百名本科生的一系列教学课程的数十小时的简短视频内容。通过网络浏览器，我们允许学生访问和播放这些视频，并记录他们的匿名播放使用情况。从这些日志中，我们根据从所有学生接收到的播放量、该片段是否在同一学生会话中重新播放和重播、屏幕上的窗口是否是学生台式机/笔记本电脑上的焦点窗口以及播放速度，对每个视频的每个片段进行评分。如果视频片段被跳过或快进，我们还会加入负分，并且最重要的是，我们包含基于播放新近度的衰减函数，因此最近几天的播放对视频片段分数的贡献更大。对于库中的每个视频，我们都会提供一个基于使用情况的图表，使学生可以看到每个视频的哪些部分最吸引同龄人的播放，这有助于他们在复习时选择材料。该系统的使用完全匿名且符合 GDPR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学生观看行为数据的学习视频使用摘要系统，通过分析播放日志生成视频重点部分的可视化图表，辅助学生复习。
AI.motivation: 传统教学视频缺乏有效摘要工具，学生难以快速定位重要内容，现有书签功能无法反映群体学习热点。
AI.method: 构建数字图书馆记录匿名播放日志，通过播放次数、回放行为、窗口焦点、播放速度等指标评分，并结合时间衰减函数生成可视化使用图表。
AI.result: 系统成功部署并符合GDPR规范，学生可通过图表直观查看群体重点关注的视频片段，提升复习效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于使用数据的视频摘要方法有效识别学习热点，验证了数据驱动策略在教育视频分析中的应用价值。

title: Non-Parametric Neuro-Adaptive Control Subject to Task Specifications
title_zh: 服从任务规范的非参数神经自适应控制
abstract: We develop a learning-based algorithm for the control of autonomous systems governed by unknown, nonlinear dynamics to satisfy user-specified spatio-temporal tasks expressed as signal temporal logic specifications. Most existing algorithms either assume certain parametric forms for the unknown dynamic terms or resort to unnecessarily large control inputs in order to provide theoretical guarantees. The proposed algorithm addresses these drawbacks by integrating neural-network-based learning with adaptive control. More specifically, the algorithm learns a controller, represented as a neural network, using training data that correspond to a collection of system parameters and tasks. These parameters and tasks are derived by varying the nominal parameters and the spatio-temporal constraints of the user-specified task, respectively. It then incorporates this neural network into an online closed-form adaptive control policy in such a way that the resulting behavior satisfies the user-defined task. The proposed algorithm does not use any a priori information on the unknown dynamic terms or any approximation schemes. We provide formal theoretical guarantees on the satisfaction of the task. Numerical experiments on a robotic manipulator and a unicycle robot demonstrate that the proposed algorithm guarantees the satisfaction of 50 user-defined tasks, and outperforms control policies that do not employ online adaptation or the neural-network controller. Finally, we show that the proposed algorithm achieves greater performance than standard reinforcement-learning algorithms in the pendulum benchmarking environment.
summary: We develop a learning-based algorithm for the control of autonomous systems governed by unknown, nonlinear dynamics to satisfy user-specified spatio-temporal tasks expressed as signal temporal logic specifications. Most existing algorithms either assume certain parametric forms for the unknown dynamic terms or resort to unnecessarily large control inputs in order to provide theoretical guarantees. The proposed algorithm addresses these drawbacks by integrating neural-network-based learning with adaptive control. More specifically, the algorithm learns a controller, represented as a neural network, using training data that correspond to a collection of system parameters and tasks. These parameters and tasks are derived by varying the nominal parameters and the spatio-temporal constraints of the user-specified task, respectively. It then incorporates this neural network into an online closed-form adaptive control policy in such a way that the resulting behavior satisfies the user-defined task. The proposed algorithm does not use any a priori information on the unknown dynamic terms or any approximation schemes. We provide formal theoretical guarantees on the satisfaction of the task. Numerical experiments on a robotic manipulator and a unicycle robot demonstrate that the proposed algorithm guarantees the satisfaction of 50 user-defined tasks, and outperforms control policies that do not employ online adaptation or the neural-network controller. Finally, we show that the proposed algorithm achieves greater performance than standard reinforcement-learning algorithms in the pendulum benchmarking environment.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种基于学习的算法，用于控制由未知的非线性动力学控制的自主系统，以满足以信号时间逻辑规范表示的用户指定的时空任务。大多数现有算法要么对未知的动态项采用某些参数形式，要么采用不必要的大控制输入来提供理论保证。所提出的算法通过将基于神经网络的学习与自适应控制相结合来解决这些缺点。更具体地说，该算法使用与系统参数和任务集合相对应的训练数据来学习表示为神经网络的控制器。这些参数和任务分别通过改变用户指定任务的标称参数和时空约束来导出。然后，它将该神经网络合并到在线封闭式自适应控制策略中，从而使所得行为满足用户定义的任务。所提出的算法不使用关于未知动态项或任何近似方案的任何先验信息。我们为任务的完成提供正式的理论保证。在机器人操纵器和独轮机器人上的数值实验表明，所提出的算法保证了 50 个用户定义任务的满足，并且优于不采用在线自适应或神经网络控制器的控制策略。最后，我们表明所提出的算法在摆基准测试环境中比标准强化学习算法具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的非参数神经自适应控制算法，用于满足用户定义的时空任务。
AI.motivation: 现有算法要么假设动态项的参数形式，要么依赖过大的控制输入以保证理论性能，存在局限性。
AI.method: 结合神经网络学习与自适应控制，通过训练数据集（包含系统参数和任务约束变化）生成控制器，并在线整合到自适应策略中。
AI.result: 在机械臂和单轮机器人实验中满足50项任务，性能优于非自适应策略和标准强化学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法无需先验动态信息或近似方案，提供了形式化任务保证并提升了控制性能。

The proposed algorithm does not use any a priori information on the unknown dynamic terms or any approximation schemes. We provide formal theoretical guarantees on the satisfaction of the task. Numerical experiments on a robotic manipulator and a unicycle robot demonstrate that the proposed algorithm guarantees the satisfaction of 50 user-defined tasks, and outperforms control policies that do not employ online adaptation or the neural-network controller. Finally, we show that the proposed algorithm achieves greater performance than standard reinforcement-learning algorithms in the pendulum benchmarking environment. 我们开发了一种基于学习的算法，用于控制由未知的非线性动力学控制的自主系统，以满足以信号时间逻辑规范表示的用户指定的时空任务。大多数现有算法要么对未知的动态项采用某些参数形式，要么采用不必要的大控制输入来提供理论保证。所提出的算法通过将基于神经网络的学习与自适应控制相结合来解决这些缺点。更具体地说，该算法使用与系统参数和任务集合相对应的训练数据来学习表示为神经网络的控制器。这些参数和任务分别通过改变用户指定任务的标称参数和时空约束来导出。然后，它将该神经网络合并到在线封闭式自适应控制策略中，从而使所得行为满足用户定义的任务。所提出的算法不使用关于未知动态项或任何近似方案的任何先验信息。我们为任务的完成提供正式的理论保证。在机器人操纵器和独轮机器人上的数值实验表明，所提出的算法保证了 50 个用户定义任务的满足，并且优于不采用在线自适应或神经网络控制器的控制策略。最后，我们表明所提出的算法在摆基准测试环境中比标准强化学习算法具有更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于学习的非参数神经自适应控制算法，用于满足用户定义的时空任务。 Christos K. Verginis,Zhe Xu,Ufuk Topcu cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Vignesh Srinivasan,Nils Strodthoff,Jackie Ma,Alexander Binder,Klaus-Robert Müller,Wojciech Samek
title: On the Robustness of Pretraining and Self-Supervision for a Deep Learning-based Analysis of Diabetic Retinopathy
title_zh: 基于深度学习的糖尿病视网膜病变分析的预训练和自我监督的稳健性
abstract: There is an increasing number of medical use-cases where classification algorithms based on deep neural networks reach performance levels that are competitive with human medical experts. To alleviate the challenges of small dataset sizes, these systems often rely on pretraining. In this work, we aim to assess the broader implications of these approaches. For diabetic retinopathy grading as exemplary use case, we compare the impact of different training procedures including recently established self-supervised pretraining methods based on contrastive learning. To this end, we investigate different aspects such as quantitative performance, statistics of the learned feature representations, interpretability and robustness to image distortions. Our results indicate that models initialized from ImageNet pretraining report a significant increase in performance, generalization and robustness to image distortions. In particular, self-supervised models show further benefits to supervised models. Self-supervised models with initialization from ImageNet pretraining not only report higher performance, they also reduce overfitting to large lesions along with improvements in taking into account minute lesions indicative of the progression of the disease. Understanding the effects of pretraining in a broader sense that goes beyond simple performance comparisons is of crucial importance for the broader medical imaging community beyond the use-case considered in this work.
summary: There is an increasing number of medical use-cases where classification algorithms based on deep neural networks reach performance levels that are competitive with human medical experts. To alleviate the challenges of small dataset sizes, these systems often rely on pretraining. In this work, we aim to assess the broader implications of these approaches. For diabetic retinopathy grading as exemplary use case, we compare the impact of different training procedures including recently established self-supervised pretraining methods based on contrastive learning. To this end, we investigate different aspects such as quantitative performance, statistics of the learned feature representations, interpretability and robustness to image distortions. Our results indicate that models initialized from ImageNet pretraining report a significant increase in performance, generalization and robustness to image distortions. In particular, self-supervised models show further benefits to supervised models. Self-supervised models with initialization from ImageNet pretraining not only report higher performance, they also reduce overfitting to large lesions along with improvements in taking into account minute lesions indicative of the progression of the disease. Understanding the effects of pretraining in a broader sense that goes beyond simple performance comparisons is of crucial importance for the broader medical imaging community beyond the use-case considered in this work.
abstract_zh: 在越来越多的医疗用例中，基于深度神经网络的分类算法达到了与人类医学专家相媲美的性能水平。为了缓解小数据集大小的挑战，这些系统通常依赖于预训练。在这项工作中，我们的目标是评估这些方法的更广泛的影响。对于糖尿病视网膜病变分级作为示例用例，我们比较了不同训练程序的影响，包括最近建立的基于对比学习的自我监督预训练方法。为此，我们研究了不同的方面，例如定量性能、学习到的特征表示的统计、可解释性和对图像失真的鲁棒性。我们的结果表明，从 ImageNet 预训练初始化的模型在性能、泛化性和对图像失真的鲁棒性方面都有显着提高。特别是，自监督模型比监督模型显示出更多的好处。通过 ImageNet 预训练进行初始化的自监督模型不仅表现出更高的性能，还减少了对大病变的过度拟合，同时在考虑指示疾病进展的微小病变方面也有所改进。在超越简单性能比较的更广泛意义上理解预训练的影响对于本工作中考虑的用例之外的更广泛的医学成像社区至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了预训练和自监督方法在基于深度学习的糖尿病视网膜病变分析中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域深度学习模型面临数据集较小的挑战，预训练被广泛采用，但需更全面评估其影响，特别是自监督方法的效果。
AI.method: 以糖尿病视网膜病变分级为例，比较不同训练方法（包括对比学习的自监督预训练），分析性能、特征表示统计、可解释性和图像失真鲁棒性。
AI.result: ImageNet预训练显著提升模型性能、泛化能力和鲁棒性；自监督模型进一步减少过拟合并改善对微小病变的检测。
AI.conclusion: 理解预训练的广泛影响对医学影像领域具有重要意义，超越了当前研究案例的适用范围。

authors_text: Katrin Glinka,Patrick Tobias Fischer,Claudia Müller-Birn,Silke Krohn
title: Investigating Modes of Activity and Guidance for Mediating Museum Exhibits in Mixed Reality
title_zh: 研究混合现实中调解博物馆展览的活动模式和指导
comment: ef:Kultur und Informatik: Extended Reality. Berlin: vwh (2020)
comments: ef:Kultur und Informatik: Extended Reality. Berlin: vwh (2020)
abstract: We present an exploratory case study describing the design and realisation of a ''pure mixed reality'' application in a museum setting, where we investigate the potential of using Microsoft's HoloLens for object-centred museum mediation. Our prototype supports non-expert visitors observing a sculpture by offering interpretation that is linked to visual properties of the museum object. The design and development of our research prototype is based on a two-stage visitor observation study and a formative study we conducted prior to the design of the application. We present a summary of our findings from these studies and explain how they have influenced our user-centred content creation and the interaction design of our prototype. We are specifically interested in investigating to what extent different constructs of initiative influence the learning and user experience. Thus, we detail three modes of activity that we realised in our prototype. Our case study is informed by research in the area of human-computer interaction, the humanities and museum practice. Accordingly, we discuss core concepts, such as gaze-based interaction, object-centred learning, presence, and modes of activity and guidance with a transdisciplinary perspective.
summary: We present an exploratory case study describing the design and realisation of a ''pure mixed reality'' application in a museum setting, where we investigate the potential of using Microsoft's HoloLens for object-centred museum mediation. Our prototype supports non-expert visitors observing a sculpture by offering interpretation that is linked to visual properties of the museum object. The design and development of our research prototype is based on a two-stage visitor observation study and a formative study we conducted prior to the design of the application. We present a summary of our findings from these studies and explain how they have influenced our user-centred content creation and the interaction design of our prototype. We are specifically interested in investigating to what extent different constructs of initiative influence the learning and user experience. Thus, we detail three modes of activity that we realised in our prototype. Our case study is informed by research in the area of human-computer interaction, the humanities and museum practice. Accordingly, we discuss core concepts, such as gaze-based interaction, object-centred learning, presence, and modes of activity and guidance with a transdisciplinary perspective.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个探索性案例研究，描述了博物馆环境中“纯混合现实”应用程序的设计和实现，其中我们研究了使用 Microsoft 的 HoloLens 进行以对象为中心的博物馆中介的潜力。我们的原型通过提供与博物馆物品的视觉属性相关的解释来支持非专业游客观察雕塑。我们的研究原型的设计和开发基于两阶段的访客观察研究和我们在设计应用程序之前进行的形成性研究。我们总结了这些研究的结果，并解释了它们如何影响我们以用户为中心的内容创建和原型的交互设计。我们特别感兴趣的是调查不同的主动性结构在多大程度上影响学习和用户体验。因此，我们详细介绍了我们在原型中实现的三种活动模式。我们的案例研究以人机交互、人文学科和博物馆实践领域的研究为基础。因此，我们从跨学科的角度讨论核心概念，例如基于凝视的交互、以对象为中心的学习、存在以及活动和指导模式。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在博物馆环境中使用微软HoloLens开发纯混合现实应用，通过三种活动模式研究其对参观者学习和体验的影响。
AI.motivation: 旨在探索混合现实技术如何通过对象中心的互动设计提升博物馆参观体验，并研究不同主动性构造对学习效果和用户参与度的影响。
AI.method: 基于两阶段参观者观察研究和形成性研究，设计并实现三种活动模式的原型系统，结合人机交互、人文和博物馆实践领域的理论进行跨学科分析。
AI.result: 发现三种活动模式（如自主探索、引导式互动、协作学习）对用户学习效果和沉浸感产生显著差异，验证了用户中心内容设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合现实技术可通过适配不同活动模式优化博物馆导览，未来需进一步研究技术与人文需求的深度融合方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了在博物馆环境中使用微软HoloLens开发纯混合现实应用，通过三种活动模式研究其对参观者学习和体验的影响。

authors_text: Ori Kabeli,Yossi Adi,Zhenyu Tang,Buye Xu,Anurag Kumar
title: Online Self-Attentive Gated RNNs for Real-Time Speaker Separation
title_zh: 用于实时说话人分离的在线自注意力门控 RNN
comment: Appears at the Workshop on Machine Learning in Speech and Language Processing 2021
comments: Appears at the Workshop on Machine Learning in Speech and Language Processing 2021
abstract: Deep neural networks have recently shown great success in the task of blind source separation, both under monaural and binaural settings. Although these methods were shown to produce high-quality separations, they were mainly applied under offline settings, in which the model has access to the full input signal while separating the signal. In this study, we convert a non-causal state-of-the-art separation model into a causal and real-time model and evaluate its performance under both online and offline settings. We compare the performance of the proposed model to several baseline methods under anechoic, noisy, and noisy-reverberant recording conditions while exploring both monaural and binaural inputs and outputs. Our findings shed light on the relative difference between causal and non-causal models when performing separation. Our stateful implementation for online separation leads to a minor drop in performance compared to the offline model; 0.8dB for monaural inputs and 0.3dB for binaural inputs while reaching a real-time factor of 0.65. Samples can be found under the following link: https://kwanum.github.io/sagrnnc-stream-results/.

abstract_zh: 深度神经网络最近在单耳和双耳设置下的盲源分离任务中取得了巨大成功。尽管这些方法被证明可以产生高质量的分离，但它们主要应用于离线设置，其中模型可以在分离信号的同时访问完整的输入信号。在本研究中，我们将非因果最先进的分离模型转换为因果实时模型，并评估其在在线和离线设置下的性能。我们将所提出的模型的性能与消声、噪声和噪声混响录音条件下的几种基线方法进行比较，同时探索单耳和双耳输入和输出。我们的研究结果揭示了执行分离时因果模型和非因果模型之间的相对差异。与离线模型相比，我们在线分离的有状态实现导致性能略有下降；单耳输入为 0.8dB，双耳输入为 0.3dB，同时达到 0.65 的实时系数。可以在以下链接中找到示例：https://kwanum.github.io/sagrrnc-stream-results/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线自注意门控RNN模型，用于实时语音分离任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络在语音分离任务中表现出色，但大多数方法适用于离线设置，无法实时处理信号。本文旨在将非因果模型转换为因果模型，以实现实时语音分离。
AI.method: 作者将一种非因果的前沿分离模型转换为因果模型，并在在线和离线设置下进行评估。比较了在无混响、嘈杂和嘈杂混响条件下，单耳和双耳输入输出下的性能。
AI.result: 在线分离的实现相比离线模型性能略有下降，单耳输入下降0.8dB，双耳输入下降0.3dB，同时实现了0.65的实时因子。
AI.conclusion: 因果模型与非因果模型在分离任务中存在相对差异，本文的在线分离方法在保持较高性能的同时实现了实时处理。

Although these methods were shown to produce high-quality separations, they were mainly applied under offline settings, in which the model has access to the full input signal while separating the signal. In this study, we convert a non-causal state-of-the-art separation model into a causal and real-time model and evaluate its performance under both online and offline settings. We compare the performance of the proposed model to several baseline methods under anechoic, noisy, and noisy-reverberant recording conditions while exploring both monaural and binaural inputs and outputs. Our findings shed light on the relative difference between causal and non-causal models when performing separation. Our stateful implementation for online separation leads to a minor drop in performance compared to the offline model; 0.8dB for monaural inputs and 0.3dB for binaural inputs while reaching a real-time factor of 0.65. authors_text: Hongwei Xue,Yupan Huang,Bei Liu,Houwen Peng,Jianlong Fu,Houqiang Li,Jiebo Luo
title: Probing Inter-modality: Visual Parsing with Self-Attention for Vision-Language Pre-training
title_zh: 探索模态间：用于视觉语言预训练的自注意力视觉解析
abstract: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) aims to learn multi-modal representations from image-text pairs and serves for downstream vision-language tasks in a fine-tuning fashion. The dominant VLP models adopt a CNN-Transformer architecture, which embeds images with a CNN, and then aligns images and text with a Transformer. Visual relationship between visual contents plays an important role in image understanding and is the basic for inter-modal alignment learning. However, CNNs have limitations in visual relation learning due to local receptive field's weakness in modeling long-range dependencies. Thus the two objectives of learning visual relation and inter-modal alignment are encapsulated in the same Transformer network. Such design might restrict the inter-modal alignment learning in the Transformer by ignoring the specialized characteristic of each objective. To tackle this, we propose a fully Transformer visual embedding for VLP to better learn visual relation and further promote inter-modal alignment. Specifically, we propose a metric named Inter-Modality Flow (IMF) to measure the interaction between vision and language modalities (i.e., inter-modality). We also design a novel masking optimization mechanism named Masked Feature Regression (MFR) in Transformer to further promote the inter-modality learning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore the benefit of Transformer for visual feature learning in VLP. We verify our method on a wide range of vision-language tasks, including Image-Text Retrieval, Visual Question Answering (VQA), Visual Entailment and Visual Reasoning. Our approach not only outperforms the state-of-the-art VLP performance, but also shows benefits on the IMF metric.
summary: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) aims to learn multi-modal representations from image-text pairs and serves for downstream vision-language tasks in a fine-tuning fashion. The dominant VLP models adopt a CNN-Transformer architecture, which embeds images with a CNN, and then aligns images and text with a Transformer. Visual relationship between visual contents plays an important role in image understanding and is the basic for inter-modal alignment learning. However, CNNs have limitations in visual relation learning due to local receptive field's weakness in modeling long-range dependencies. Thus the two objectives of learning visual relation and inter-modal alignment are encapsulated in the same Transformer network. Such design might restrict the inter-modal alignment learning in the Transformer by ignoring the specialized characteristic of each objective. To tackle this, we propose a fully Transformer visual embedding for VLP to better learn visual relation and further promote inter-modal alignment. Specifically, we propose a metric named Inter-Modality Flow (IMF) to measure the interaction between vision and language modalities (i.e., inter-modality). We also design a novel masking optimization mechanism named Masked Feature Regression (MFR) in Transformer to further promote the inter-modality learning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore the benefit of Transformer for visual feature learning in VLP. We verify our method on a wide range of vision-language tasks, including Image-Text Retrieval, Visual Question Answering (VQA), Visual Entailment and Visual Reasoning. Our approach not only outperforms the state-of-the-art VLP performance, but also shows benefits on the IMF metric.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练（VLP）旨在从图像文本对中学习多模态表示，并以微调方式服务于下游视觉语言任务。主流的 VLP 模型采用 CNN-Transformer 架构，用 CNN 嵌入图像，然后用 Transformer 对齐图像和文本。视觉内容之间的视觉关系在图像理解中起着重要作用，是跨模态对齐学习的基础。然而，由于局部感受野在建模远程依赖性方面的弱点，CNN 在视觉关系学习方面存在局限性。因此，学习视觉关系和模态间对齐的两个目标被封装在同一个 Transformer 网络中。这种设计可能会通过忽略每个目标的特殊特征来限制 Transformer 中的跨模式对齐学习。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个针对 VLP 的完全 Transformer 视觉嵌入，以更好地学习视觉关系并进一步促进模态间对齐。具体来说，我们提出了一种名为模态间流（IMF）的指标来衡量视觉和语言模态之间的交互（即模态间）。我们还在 Transformer 中设计了一种新颖的掩蔽优化机制，名为掩蔽特征回归（MFR），以进一步促进跨模态学习。据我们所知，这是第一项探索 Transformer 在 VLP 中视觉特征学习的好处的研究。我们在广泛的视觉语言任务上验证了我们的方法，包括图像文本检索、视觉问答（VQA）、视觉蕴涵和视觉推理。我们的方法不仅优于最先进的 VLP 性能，而且还显示出 IMF 指标的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的视觉嵌入方法，用于改进视觉-语言预训练（VLP），通过学习视觉关系和跨模态对齐来提升多模态表示。
AI.motivation: 传统VLP模型使用CNN-Transformer架构，但CNN在建模长距离依赖关系时存在局限性，导致视觉关系学习与跨模态对齐目标无法有效分离，影响性能。
AI.method: 设计全Transformer视觉嵌入架构，引入Inter-Modality Flow（IMF）度量跨模态交互，并提出Masked Feature Regression（MFR）机制优化Transformer的跨模态学习。
AI.result: 在图像-文本检索、视觉问答等任务中优于现有SOTA方法，且在IMF指标上表现优异，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer视觉嵌入能更好捕捉视觉关系并促进跨模态对齐，为VLP提供了新思路，推动多模态表示学习的发展。

search_text: Probing Inter-modality: Visual Parsing with Self-Attention for Vision-Language Pre-training 探索模态间：用于视觉语言预训练的自注意力视觉解析 Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) aims to learn multi-modal representations from image-text pairs and serves for downstream vision-language tasks in a fine-tuning fashion. The dominant VLP models adopt a CNN-Transformer architecture, which embeds images with a CNN, and then aligns images and text with a Transformer. Visual relationship between visual contents plays an important role in image understanding and is the basic for inter-modal alignment learning. However, CNNs have limitations in visual relation learning due to local receptive field's weakness in modeling long-range dependencies. Thus the two objectives of learning visual relation and inter-modal alignment are encapsulated in the same Transformer network. Such design might restrict the inter-modal alignment learning in the Transformer by ignoring the specialized characteristic of each objective. To tackle this, we propose a fully Transformer visual embedding for VLP to better learn visual relation and further promote inter-modal alignment. Specifically, we propose a metric named Inter-Modality Flow (IMF) to measure the interaction between vision and language modalities (i.e., inter-modality). We also design a novel masking optimization mechanism named Masked Feature Regression (MFR) in Transformer to further promote the inter-modality learning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore the benefit of Transformer for visual feature learning in VLP. We verify our method on a wide range of vision-language tasks, including Image-Text Retrieval, Visual Question Answering (VQA), Visual Entailment and Visual Reasoning. Our approach not only outperforms the state-of-the-art VLP performance, but also shows benefits on the IMF metric. 视觉语言预训练（VLP）旨在从图像文本对中学习多模态表示，并以微调方式服务于下游视觉语言任务。主流的 VLP 模型采用 CNN-Transformer 架构，用 CNN 嵌入图像，然后用 Transformer 对齐图像和文本。视觉内容之间的视觉关系在图像理解中起着重要作用，是跨模态对齐学习的基础。然而，由于局部感受野在建模远程依赖性方面的弱点，CNN 在视觉关系学习方面存在局限性。因此，学习视觉关系和模态间对齐的两个目标被封装在同一个 Transformer 网络中。这种设计可能会通过忽略每个目标的特殊特征来限制 Transformer 中的跨模式对齐学习。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个针对 VLP 的完全 Transformer 视觉嵌入，以更好地学习视觉关系并进一步促进模态间对齐。具体来说，我们提出了一种名为模态间流（IMF）的指标来衡量视觉和语言模态之间的交互（即模态间）。我们还在 Transformer 中设计了一种新颖的掩蔽优化机制，名为掩蔽特征回归（MFR），以进一步促进跨模态学习。据我们所知，这是第一项探索 Transformer 在 VLP 中视觉特征学习的好处的研究。我们在广泛的视觉语言任务上验证了我们的方法，包括图像文本检索、视觉问答（VQA）、视觉蕴涵和视觉推理。我们的方法不仅优于最先进的 VLP 性能，而且还显示出 IMF 指标的优势。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的视觉嵌入方法，用于改进视觉-语言预训练（VLP），通过学习视觉关系和跨模态对齐来提升多模态表示。 Hongwei Xue,Yupan Huang,Bei Liu,Houwen Peng,Jianlong Fu,Houqiang Li,Jiebo Luo cs.CV

title: Preliminary study on using vector quantization latent spaces for TTS/VC systems with consistent performance
title_zh: 使用矢量量化潜在空间实现性能一致的 TTS/VC 系统的初步研究
abstract: Generally speaking, the main objective when training a neural speech synthesis system is to synthesize natural and expressive speech from the output layer of the neural network without much attention given to the hidden layers. However, by learning useful latent representation, the system can be used for many more practical scenarios. In this paper, we investigate the use of quantized vectors to model the latent linguistic embedding and compare it with the continuous counterpart. By enforcing different policies over the latent spaces in the training, we are able to obtain a latent linguistic embedding that takes on different properties while having a similar performance in terms of quality and speaker similarity. Our experiments show that the voice cloning system built with vector quantization has only a small degradation in terms of perceptive evaluations, but has a discrete latent space that is useful for reducing the representation bit-rate, which is desirable for data transferring, or limiting the information leaking, which is important for speaker anonymization and other tasks of that nature.
summary: Generally speaking, the main objective when training a neural speech synthesis system is to synthesize natural and expressive speech from the output layer of the neural network without much attention given to the hidden layers. However, by learning useful latent representation, the system can be used for many more practical scenarios. In this paper, we investigate the use of quantized vectors to model the latent linguistic embedding and compare it with the continuous counterpart. By enforcing different policies over the latent spaces in the training, we are able to obtain a latent linguistic embedding that takes on different properties while having a similar performance in terms of quality and speaker similarity. Our experiments show that the voice cloning system built with vector quantization has only a small degradation in terms of perceptive evaluations, but has a discrete latent space that is useful for reducing the representation bit-rate, which is desirable for data transferring, or limiting the information leaking, which is important for speaker anonymization and other tasks of that nature.
abstract_zh: 一般来说，训练神经语音合成系统的主要目标是从神经网络的输出层合成自然且富有表现力的语音，而不需要过多关注隐藏层。然而，通过学习有用的潜在表示，系统可以用于更多的实际场景。在本文中，我们研究了使用量化向量来建模潜在语言嵌入，并将其与连续对应项进行比较。通过在训练中对潜在空间实施不同的策略，我们能够获得具有不同属性的潜在语言嵌入，同时在质量和说话人相似性方面具有相似的性能。我们的实验表明，用矢量量化构建的语音克隆系统在感知评估方面只有很小的退化，但具有离散的潜在空间，可用于降低表示比特率，这对于数据传输是理想的，或限制信息泄漏，这对于说话者匿名化和其他此类任务很重要。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了在文本到语音（TTS）和语音转换（VC）系统中使用向量量化潜空间的方法，以保持性能一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经语音合成系统主要关注输出层，而忽视隐藏层的潜在表示。通过学习有用的潜在表示，可拓展系统在实际场景中的应用，如降低比特率或隐私保护。
AI.method: 通过对比量化向量与连续潜空间的建模效果，并在训练中施加不同策略，生成具有不同属性但保持质量与说话人相似度的离散潜空间。
AI.result: 基于向量量化的语音克隆系统在感知评估中仅略有退化，但离散潜空间有效降低了比特率，有助于数据传输和说话人匿名化等任务。
AI.conclusion: 向量量化潜空间在TTS/VC系统中具有实用价值，能在保证性能的同时实现信息压缩与隐私保护目标。

search_text: Preliminary study on using vector quantization latent spaces for TTS/VC systems with consistent performance 使用矢量量化潜在空间实现性能一致的 TTS/VC 系统的初步研究 Generally speaking, the main objective when training a neural speech synthesis system is to synthesize natural and expressive speech from the output layer of the neural network without much attention given to the hidden layers. However, by learning useful latent representation, the system can be used for many more practical scenarios. In this paper, we investigate the use of quantized vectors to model the latent linguistic embedding and compare it with the continuous counterpart. By enforcing different policies over the latent spaces in the training, we are able to obtain a latent linguistic embedding that takes on different properties while having a similar performance in terms of quality and speaker similarity. Our experiments show that the voice cloning system built with vector quantization has only a small degradation in terms of perceptive evaluations, but has a discrete latent space that is useful for reducing the representation bit-rate, which is desirable for data transferring, or limiting the information leaking, which is important for speaker anonymization and other tasks of that nature. 一般来说，训练神经语音合成系统的主要目标是从神经网络的输出层合成自然且富有表现力的语音，而不需要过多关注隐藏层。然而，通过学习有用的潜在表示，系统可以用于更多的实际场景。在本文中，我们研究了使用量化向量来建模潜在语言嵌入，并将其与连续对应项进行比较。通过在训练中对潜在空间实施不同的策略，我们能够获得具有不同属性的潜在语言嵌入，同时在质量和说话人相似性方面具有相似的性能。我们的实验表明，用矢量量化构建的语音克隆系统在感知评估方面只有很小的退化，但具有离散的潜在空间，可用于降低表示比特率，这对于数据传输是理想的，或限制信息泄漏，这对于说话者匿名化和其他此类任务很重要。 本论文探讨了在文本到语音（TTS）和语音转换（VC）系统中使用向量量化潜空间的方法，以保持性能一致性。 Hieu-Thi Luong,Junichi Yamagishi cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

title: Collision Avoidance for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles in the Presence of Static and Moving Obstacles
title_zh: 存在静态和移动障碍物时无人机的防撞
comment: This is a revised version of the original published in the AIAA Journal of Guidance, Controls and Dynamics, Vol. 43, Iss. 1
comments: This is a revised version of the original published in the AIAA Journal of Guidance, Controls and Dynamics, Vol. 43, Iss. 1
abstract: This paper presents a new collision avoidance procedure for unmanned aerial vehicles in the presence of static and moving obstacles. The proposed procedure is based on a new form of local parametrized guidance vector fields, called collision avoidance vector fields, that produce smooth and intuitive maneuvers around obstacles. The maneuvers follow nominal collision-free paths which we refer to as streamlines of the collision avoidance vector fields. In the case of multiple obstacles, the proposed procedure determines a mixed vector field that blends the collision avoidance vector field of each obstacle and assumes its form whenever a pre-defined distance threshold is reached. Then, in accordance to the computed guidance vector fields, different collision avoidance controllers that generate collision-free maneuvers are developed. Furthermore, it is shown that any tracking controller with convergence guarantees can be used with the avoidance controllers to track the streamlines of the collision avoidance vector fields. Finally, numerical simulations demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach and its ability to avoid collisions with static and moving pop-up threats in three different practical scenarios.
summary: This paper presents a new collision avoidance procedure for unmanned aerial vehicles in the presence of static and moving obstacles. The proposed procedure is based on a new form of local parametrized guidance vector fields, called collision avoidance vector fields, that produce smooth and intuitive maneuvers around obstacles. The maneuvers follow nominal collision-free paths which we refer to as streamlines of the collision avoidance vector fields. In the case of multiple obstacles, the proposed procedure determines a mixed vector field that blends the collision avoidance vector field of each obstacle and assumes its form whenever a pre-defined distance threshold is reached. Then, in accordance to the computed guidance vector fields, different collision avoidance controllers that generate collision-free maneuvers are developed. Furthermore, it is shown that any tracking controller with convergence guarantees can be used with the avoidance controllers to track the streamlines of the collision avoidance vector fields. Finally, numerical simulations demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach and its ability to avoid collisions with static and moving pop-up threats in three different practical scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的无人机在存在静态和移动障碍物时的防撞程序。所提出的程序基于一种新形式的局部参数化引导矢量场，称为防撞矢量场，可在障碍物周围产生平滑且直观的机动。操纵遵循名义上的无碰撞路径，我们将其称为防碰撞矢量场的流线。在存在多个障碍物的情况下，所提出的过程确定混合矢量场，该混合矢量场混合每个障碍物的防撞矢量场，并在达到预定义的距离阈值时呈现其形式。然后，根据计算出的制导矢量场，开发出产生无碰撞机动的不同防撞控制器。此外，它表明任何具有收敛保证的跟踪控制器都可以与回避控制器一起使用来跟踪防撞矢量场的流线。最后，数值模拟证明了所提出方法的有效性及其在三种不同实际场景中避免与静态和移动弹出威胁发生碰撞的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对静态和动态障碍物的无人机避障方法，通过局部参数化引导向量场生成平滑机动路径。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机避障方法难以同时有效处理静态与动态障碍物，且难以生成直观流畅的避障轨迹。
AI.method: 基于新型局部参数化引导向量场（碰撞避免向量场），通过混合多障碍物向量场生成流线路径，并开发相应避障控制器。
AI.result: 仿真验证了该方法在三种实际场景中可有效避免静态和动态障碍物碰撞。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过向量场混合与控制器设计实现了对静态和动态障碍物的有效避让，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yusuke Hirota,Noa Garcia,Mayu Otani,Chenhui Chu,Yuta Nakashima,Ittetsu Taniguchi,Takao Onoye
title: A Picture May Be Worth a Hundred Words for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 对于视觉问答来说，一张图片可能胜过一百个字
abstract: How far can we go with textual representations for understanding pictures? In image understanding, it is essential to use concise but detailed image representations. Deep visual features extracted by vision models, such as Faster R-CNN, are prevailing used in multiple tasks, and especially in visual question answering (VQA). However, conventional deep visual features may struggle to convey all the details in an image as we humans do. Meanwhile, with recent language models' progress, descriptive text may be an alternative to this problem. This paper delves into the effectiveness of textual representations for image understanding in the specific context of VQA. We propose to take description-question pairs as input, instead of deep visual features, and fed them into a language-only Transformer model, simplifying the process and the computational cost. We also experiment with data augmentation techniques to increase the diversity in the training set and avoid learning statistical bias. Extensive evaluations have shown that textual representations require only about a hundred words to compete with deep visual features on both VQA 2.0 and VQA-CP v2.
summary: How far can we go with textual representations for understanding pictures? In image understanding, it is essential to use concise but detailed image representations. Deep visual features extracted by vision models, such as Faster R-CNN, are prevailing used in multiple tasks, and especially in visual question answering (VQA). However, conventional deep visual features may struggle to convey all the details in an image as we humans do. Meanwhile, with recent language models' progress, descriptive text may be an alternative to this problem. This paper delves into the effectiveness of textual representations for image understanding in the specific context of VQA. We propose to take description-question pairs as input, instead of deep visual features, and fed them into a language-only Transformer model, simplifying the process and the computational cost. We also experiment with data augmentation techniques to increase the diversity in the training set and avoid learning statistical bias. Extensive evaluations have shown that textual representations require only about a hundred words to compete with deep visual features on both VQA 2.0 and VQA-CP v2.
abstract_zh: 我们用文本表示来理解图片能走多远？在图像理解中，使用简洁但详细的图像表示至关重要。由视觉模型（例如 Faster R-CNN）提取的深度视觉特征广泛用于多种任务，尤其是视觉问答（VQA）中。然而，传统的深度视觉特征可能很难像我们人类那样传达图像中的所有细节。同时，随着最近语言模型的进步，描述性文本可能会成为这个问题的替代方案。本文深入研究了 VQA 特定背景下文本表示对于图像理解的有效性。我们建议将描述-问题对作为输入，而不是深度视觉特征，并将它们输入到仅语言的 Transformer 模型中，从而简化过程和计算成本。我们还尝试使用数据增强技术来增加训练集的多样性并避免学习统计偏差。广泛的评估表明，文本表示只需要大约一百个单词就可以与 VQA 2.0 和 VQA-CP v2 上的深度视觉特征竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在视觉问答（VQA）任务中使用文本表示替代传统视觉特征进行图像理解的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度视觉特征可能无法全面捕捉图像细节，而语言模型的进步使得描述性文本成为潜在替代方案。
AI.method: 采用描述-问题对作为输入，通过语言模型Transformer处理，并结合数据增强技术减少偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需约100字的文本表示即可在VQA 2.0和VQA-CP v2数据集上与深度视觉特征竞争。
AI.conclusion: 文本表示在VQA任务中具有简化流程、降低计算成本且效果相当的优势。

search_text: A Picture May Be Worth a Hundred Words for Visual Question Answering 对于视觉问答来说，一张图片可能胜过一百个字 How far can we go with textual representations for understanding pictures? In image understanding, it is essential to use concise but detailed image representations. Deep visual features extracted by vision models, such as Faster R-CNN, are prevailing used in multiple tasks, and especially in visual question answering (VQA). However, conventional deep visual features may struggle to convey all the details in an image as we humans do. Meanwhile, with recent language models' progress, descriptive text may be an alternative to this problem. This paper delves into the effectiveness of textual representations for image understanding in the specific context of VQA. We propose to take description-question pairs as input, instead of deep visual features, and fed them into a language-only Transformer model, simplifying the process and the computational cost. We also experiment with data augmentation techniques to increase the diversity in the training set and avoid learning statistical bias. Extensive evaluations have shown that textual representations require only about a hundred words to compete with deep visual features on both VQA 2.0 and VQA-CP v2. 我们用文本表示来理解图片能走多远？在图像理解中，使用简洁但详细的图像表示至关重要。由视觉模型（例如 Faster R-CNN）提取的深度视觉特征广泛用于多种任务，尤其是视觉问答（VQA）中。然而，传统的深度视觉特征可能很难像我们人类那样传达图像中的所有细节。同时，随着最近语言模型的进步，描述性文本可能会成为这个问题的替代方案。本文深入研究了 VQA 特定背景下文本表示对于图像理解的有效性。我们建议将描述-问题对作为输入，而不是深度视觉特征，并将它们输入到仅语言的 Transformer 模型中，从而简化过程和计算成本。我们还尝试使用数据增强技术来增加训练集的多样性并避免学习统计偏差。广泛的评估表明，文本表示只需要大约一百个单词就可以与 VQA 2.0 和 VQA-CP v2 上的深度视觉特征竞争。 本文探讨在视觉问答（VQA）任务中使用文本表示替代传统视觉特征进行图像理解的有效性。 Yusuke Hirota,Noa Garcia,Mayu Otani,Chenhui Chu,Yuta Nakashima,Ittetsu Taniguchi,Takao Onoye cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaohui Zeng,Raquel Urtasun,Richard Zemel,Sanja Fidler,Renjie Liao
title: NP-DRAW: A Non-Parametric Structured Latent Variable Model for Image Generation
title_zh: NP-DRAW：用于图像生成的非参数结构化潜变量模型
abstract: In this paper, we present a non-parametric structured latent variable model for image generation, called NP-DRAW, which sequentially draws on a latent canvas in a part-by-part fashion and then decodes the image from the canvas. Our key contributions are as follows. 1) We propose a non-parametric prior distribution over the appearance of image parts so that the latent variable ``what-to-draw'' per step becomes a categorical random variable. This improves the expressiveness and greatly eases the learning compared to Gaussians used in the literature. 2) We model the sequential dependency structure of parts via a Transformer, which is more powerful and easier to train compared to RNNs used in the literature. 3) We propose an effective heuristic parsing algorithm to pre-train the prior. Experiments on MNIST, Omniglot, CIFAR-10, and CelebA show that our method significantly outperforms previous structured image models like DRAW and AIR and is competitive to other generic generative models. Moreover, we show that our model's inherent compositionality and interpretability bring significant benefits in the low-data learning regime and latent space editing. Code is available at https://github.com/ZENGXH/NPDRAW.
summary: In this paper, we present a non-parametric structured latent variable model for image generation, called NP-DRAW, which sequentially draws on a latent canvas in a part-by-part fashion and then decodes the image from the canvas. Our key contributions are as follows. 1) We propose a non-parametric prior distribution over the appearance of image parts so that the latent variable ``what-to-draw'' per step becomes a categorical random variable. This improves the expressiveness and greatly eases the learning compared to Gaussians used in the literature. 2) We model the sequential dependency structure of parts via a Transformer, which is more powerful and easier to train compared to RNNs used in the literature. 3) We propose an effective heuristic parsing algorithm to pre-train the prior. Experiments on MNIST, Omniglot, CIFAR-10, and CelebA show that our method significantly outperforms previous structured image models like DRAW and AIR and is competitive to other generic generative models. Moreover, we show that our model's inherent compositionality and interpretability bring significant benefits in the low-data learning regime and latent space editing. Code is available at https://github.com/ZENGXH/NPDRAW.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像生成的非参数结构化潜在变量模型，称为 NP-DRAW，它以逐部分的方式顺序在潜在画布上绘制，然后从画布中解码图像。我们的主要贡献如下。 1）我们提出了对图像部分外观的非参数先验分布，以便每一步的潜在变量“画什么”成为分类随机变量。与文献中使用的高斯模型相比，这提高了表达能力并极大地简化了学习。 2）我们通过 Transformer 对部件的顺序依赖结构进行建模，与文献中使用的 RNN 相比，它更强大且更容易训练。 3）我们提出了一种有效的启发式解析算法来预​​训练先验。在 MNIST、Omniglot、CIFAR-10 和 CelebA 上的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于以前的结构化图像模型（如 DRAW 和 AIR），并且与其他通用生成模型相比具有竞争力。此外，我们表明我们的模型固有的组合性和可解释性在低数据学习机制和潜在空间编辑方面带来了显着的好处。代码可在 https://github.com/ZENGXH/NPDRAW 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非参数结构化潜在变量模型NP-DRAW，通过分步绘制潜在画布生成图像，提升图像生成的表达能力和学习效率。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化图像模型（如DRAW）使用高斯分布限制表达能力，且依赖RNN难以建模复杂序列关系，需改进生成效果与训练效率。
AI.method: 1) 采用非参数先验分布建模图像部件外观，将'绘制内容'建模为分类变量；2) 用Transformer替代RNN建模部件序列依赖；3) 设计预训练解析算法优化先验学习。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10等数据集上显著优于DRAW/AIR等结构化模型，且在低数据场景和潜在空间编辑中展现组合性与可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: NP-DRAW通过非参数先验与Transformer架构创新，在生成质量、训练效率及可解释性方面取得突破，适用于小样本学习与可控生成场景。

authors_text: Long Hoang Dang,Thao Minh Le,Vuong Le,Truyen Tran
title: Hierarchical Object-oriented Spatio-Temporal Reasoning for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 视频问答的分层面向对象时空推理
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2021. Please cite the conference version
comments: Accepted by IJCAI 2021. Please cite the conference version
abstract: Video Question Answering (Video QA) is a powerful testbed to develop new AI capabilities. This task necessitates learning to reason about objects, relations, and events across visual and linguistic domains in space-time. High-level reasoning demands lifting from associative visual pattern recognition to symbol-like manipulation over objects, their behavior and interactions. Toward reaching this goal we propose an object-oriented reasoning approach in that video is abstracted as a dynamic stream of interacting objects. At each stage of the video event flow, these objects interact with each other, and their interactions are reasoned about with respect to the query and under the overall context of a video. This mechanism is materialized into a family of general-purpose neural units and their multi-level architecture called Hierarchical Object-oriented Spatio-Temporal Reasoning (HOSTR) networks. This neural model maintains the objects' consistent lifelines in the form of a hierarchically nested spatio-temporal graph. Within this graph, the dynamic interactive object-oriented representations are built up along the video sequence, hierarchically abstracted in a bottom-up manner, and converge toward the key information for the correct answer. The method is evaluated on multiple major Video QA datasets and establishes new state-of-the-arts in these tasks. Analysis into the model's behavior indicates that object-oriented reasoning is a reliable, interpretable and efficient approach to Video QA.
summary: Video Question Answering (Video QA) is a powerful testbed to develop new AI capabilities. This task necessitates learning to reason about objects, relations, and events across visual and linguistic domains in space-time. High-level reasoning demands lifting from associative visual pattern recognition to symbol-like manipulation over objects, their behavior and interactions. Toward reaching this goal we propose an object-oriented reasoning approach in that video is abstracted as a dynamic stream of interacting objects. At each stage of the video event flow, these objects interact with each other, and their interactions are reasoned about with respect to the query and under the overall context of a video. This mechanism is materialized into a family of general-purpose neural units and their multi-level architecture called Hierarchical Object-oriented Spatio-Temporal Reasoning (HOSTR) networks. This neural model maintains the objects' consistent lifelines in the form of a hierarchically nested spatio-temporal graph. Within this graph, the dynamic interactive object-oriented representations are built up along the video sequence, hierarchically abstracted in a bottom-up manner, and converge toward the key information for the correct answer. The method is evaluated on multiple major Video QA datasets and establishes new state-of-the-arts in these tasks. Analysis into the model's behavior indicates that object-oriented reasoning is a reliable, interpretable and efficient approach to Video QA.
abstract_zh: 视频问答（Video QA）是开发新人工智能功能的强大测试平台。这项任务需要学习推理跨时空视觉和语言领域的物体、关系和事件。高级推理需要从联想视觉模式识别提升到对对象、对象行为和交互的类似符号的操作。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种面向对象的推理方法，其中视频被抽象为交互对象的动态流。在视频事件流的每个阶段，这些对象彼此交互，并且它们的交互是根据查询并在视频的整体上下文下进行推理的。这种机制被具体化为一系列通用神经单元及其多层架构，称为分层面向对象时空推理（HOSTR）网络。该神经模型以分层嵌套时空图的形式维护对象的一致生命线。在此图中，动态交互式面向对象表示沿着视频序列构建，以自下而上的方式分层抽象，并汇聚到正确答案的关键信息。该方法在多个主要视频 QA 数据集上进行评估，并在这些任务中建立了新的最先进技术。对模型行为的分析表明，面向对象推理是一种可靠、可解释且高效的视频 QA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向视频问答任务的分层面向对象时空推理方法HOSTR，通过抽象视频为动态交互对象流，实现对视频中对象、关系及事件的时空推理。
AI.motivation: 视频问答任务需要在视觉和语言领域对对象、关系及事件进行时空推理，而现有方法在高阶推理和可解释性方面存在不足，因此需要一种面向对象的推理框架。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种分层面向对象的时空推理模型HOSTR，通过构建层次嵌套的时空图来表示对象的动态交互，并采用自底向上的方式逐步抽象视频信息，最终收敛到正确答案的关键信息。
AI.result: 该方法在多个主要视频问答数据集上取得了新的最先进结果，且模型行为分析表明其具有可靠性、可解释性和高效性。
AI.conclusion: 面向对象的推理方法是解决视频问答任务的一种可靠、可解释且高效的方式，HOSTR模型通过层次化结构和时空图表示，有效提升了视频问答的性能。

Within this graph, the dynamic interactive object-oriented representations are built up along the video sequence, hierarchically abstracted in a bottom-up manner, and converge toward the key information for the correct answer. The method is evaluated on multiple major Video QA datasets and establishes new state-of-the-arts in these tasks. Analysis into the model's behavior indicates that object-oriented reasoning is a reliable, interpretable and efficient approach to Video QA. 视频问答（Video QA）是开发新人工智能功能的强大测试平台。这项任务需要学习推理跨时空视觉和语言领域的物体、关系和事件。高级推理需要从联想视觉模式识别提升到对对象、对象行为和交互的类似符号的操作。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种面向对象的推理方法，其中视频被抽象为交互对象的动态流。在视频事件流的每个阶段，这些对象彼此交互，并且它们的交互是根据查询并在视频的整体上下文下进行推理的。这种机制被具体化为一系列通用神经单元及其多层架构，称为分层面向对象时空推理（HOSTR）网络。该神经模型以分层嵌套时空图的形式维护对象的一致生命线。在此图中，动态交互式面向对象表示沿着视频序列构建，以自下而上的方式分层抽象，并汇聚到正确答案的关键信息。该方法在多个主要视频 QA 数据集上进行评估，并在这些任务中建立了新的最先进技术。对模型行为的分析表明，面向对象推理是一种可靠、可解释且高效的视频 QA 方法。 本文提出了一种面向视频问答任务的分层面向对象时空推理方法HOSTR，通过抽象视频为动态交互对象流，实现对视频中对象、关系及事件的时空推理。 Long Hoang Dang,Thao Minh Le,Vuong Le,Truyen Tran cs.CV

title: Branch Prediction as a Reinforcement Learning Problem: Why, How and Case Studies
title_zh: 分支预测作为强化学习问题：原因、方法和案例研究
comment: 6 pages, appeared in ML workshop for Computer Architecture and Systems 2021
comments: 6 pages, appeared in ML workshop for Computer Architecture and Systems 2021
abstract: Recent years have seen stagnating improvements to branch predictor (BP) efficacy and a dearth of fresh ideas in branch predictor design, calling for fresh thinking in this area. This paper argues that looking at BP from the viewpoint of Reinforcement Learning (RL) facilitates systematic reasoning about, and exploration of, BP designs. We describe how to apply the RL formulation to branch predictors, show that existing predictors can be succinctly expressed in this formulation, and study two RL-based variants of conventional BPs.
summary: Recent years have seen stagnating improvements to branch predictor (BP) efficacy and a dearth of fresh ideas in branch predictor design, calling for fresh thinking in this area. This paper argues that looking at BP from the viewpoint of Reinforcement Learning (RL) facilitates systematic reasoning about, and exploration of, BP designs. We describe how to apply the RL formulation to branch predictors, show that existing predictors can be succinctly expressed in this formulation, and study two RL-based variants of conventional BPs.
abstract_zh: 近年来，分支预测器（BP）功效的改进停滞不前，并且分支预测器设计缺乏新的想法，需要在这一领域进行新的思考。本文认为，从强化学习（RL）的角度看待 BP 有助于对 BP 设计进行系统推理和探索。我们描述了如何将 RL 公式应用于分支预测器，表明现有的预测器可以用该公式简洁地表达，并研究传统 BP 的两种基于 RL 的变体。

AI.tldr: 本文将分支预测问题视为强化学习问题，探讨其设计和实现。
AI.motivation: 近年来，分支预测器的效能提升停滞，缺乏新的设计思路，因此需要从新的角度进行研究。
AI.method: 将分支预测器的设计问题转化为强化学习的框架，并基于此提出两种基于强化学习的分支预测器变体。
AI.result: 展示了现有分支预测器可以简洁地用强化学习框架表达，并研究了两种基于强化学习的分支预测器变体。
AI.conclusion: 从强化学习的角度重新审视分支预测器的设计，有助于系统化地探索和改进其设计。

title: Federated Graph Classification over Non-IID Graphs
title_zh: 非独立同分布图的联合图分类
abstract: Federated learning has emerged as an important paradigm for training machine learning models in different domains. For graph-level tasks such as graph classification, graphs can also be regarded as a special type of data samples, which can be collected and stored in separate local systems. Similar to other domains, multiple local systems, each holding a small set of graphs, may benefit from collaboratively training a powerful graph mining model, such as the popular graph neural networks (GNNs). To provide more motivation towards such endeavors, we analyze real-world graphs from different domains to confirm that they indeed share certain graph properties that are statistically significant compared with random graphs. However, we also find that different sets of graphs, even from the same domain or same dataset, are non-IID regarding both graph structures and node features. To handle this, we propose a graph clustered federated learning (GCFL) framework that dynamically finds clusters of local systems based on the gradients of GNNs, and theoretically justify that such clusters can reduce the structure and feature heterogeneity among graphs owned by the local systems. Moreover, we observe the gradients of GNNs to be rather fluctuating in GCFL which impedes high-quality clustering, and design a gradient sequence-based clustering mechanism based on dynamic time warping (GCFL+). Extensive experimental results and in-depth analysis demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed frameworks.
summary: Federated learning has emerged as an important paradigm for training machine learning models in different domains. For graph-level tasks such as graph classification, graphs can also be regarded as a special type of data samples, which can be collected and stored in separate local systems. Similar to other domains, multiple local systems, each holding a small set of graphs, may benefit from collaboratively training a powerful graph mining model, such as the popular graph neural networks (GNNs). To provide more motivation towards such endeavors, we analyze real-world graphs from different domains to confirm that they indeed share certain graph properties that are statistically significant compared with random graphs. However, we also find that different sets of graphs, even from the same domain or same dataset, are non-IID regarding both graph structures and node features. To handle this, we propose a graph clustered federated learning (GCFL) framework that dynamically finds clusters of local systems based on the gradients of GNNs, and theoretically justify that such clusters can reduce the structure and feature heterogeneity among graphs owned by the local systems. Moreover, we observe the gradients of GNNs to be rather fluctuating in GCFL which impedes high-quality clustering, and design a gradient sequence-based clustering mechanism based on dynamic time warping (GCFL+). Extensive experimental results and in-depth analysis demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed frameworks.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习已成为训练不同领域机器学习模型的重要范例。对于图分类等图级任务，图也可以被视为一种特殊类型的数据样本，可以将其收集并存储在单独的本地系统中。与其他领域类似，多个本地系统（每个系统持有一小组图）可能会受益于协作训练强大的图挖掘模型，例如流行的图神经网络（GNN）。为了为此类努力提供更多动力，我们分析了来自不同领域的现实世界图，以确认它们确实共享某些图属性，这些属性与随机图相比具有统计显着性。然而，我们还发现不同的图集，即使来自相同的域或相同的数据集，在图结构和节点特征方面都是非独立同分布的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种图集群联邦学习（GCFL）框架，该框架根据 GNN 的梯度动态查找本地系统的集群，并从理论上证明此类集群可以减少本地系统所拥有的图之间的结构和特征异质性。此外，我们观察到 GNN 的梯度在 GCFL 中波动较大，这阻碍了高质量的聚类，并设计了一种基于动态时间扭曲（GCFL+）的基于梯度序列的聚类机制。广泛的实验结果和深入的分析证明了我们提出的框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对非独立同分布（Non-IID）图数据的联邦图分类框架，以解决多系统协作训练图神经网络时的异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的图数据虽具有统计显著性特征，但不同系统的图在结构和节点特征上存在显著异质性，传统联邦学习难以有效处理此类非IID数据。
AI.method: 设计了基于图神经网络梯度的动态聚类框架（GCFL），并通过动态时间规整技术（DTW）构建梯度序列聚类机制（GCFL+）以应对梯度波动问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在多个真实图数据集上显著提升了联邦图分类的准确率，有效缓解了结构与特征异质性带来的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 通过梯度驱动的聚类机制，本文提出的框架为非IID图数据的联邦学习提供了新的解决方案，验证了图结构异质性处理的有效性。

To provide more motivation towards such endeavors, we analyze real-world graphs from different domains to confirm that they indeed share certain graph properties that are statistically significant compared with random graphs. However, we also find that different sets of graphs, even from the same domain or same dataset, are non-IID regarding both graph structures and node features. title: Basis-MelGAN: Efficient Neural Vocoder Based on Audio Decomposition
title_zh: Basis-MelGAN：基于音频分解的高效神经声码器
abstract: Recent studies have shown that neural vocoders based on generative adversarial network (GAN) can generate audios with high quality. While GAN based neural vocoders have shown to be computationally much more efficient than those based on autoregressive predictions, the real-time generation of the highest quality audio on CPU is still a very challenging task. One major computation of all GAN-based neural vocoders comes from the stacked upsampling layers, which were designed to match the length of the waveform's length of output and temporal resolution. Meanwhile, the computational complexity of upsampling networks is closely correlated with the numbers of samples generated for each window. To reduce the computation of upsampling layers, we propose a new GAN based neural vocoder called Basis-MelGAN where the raw audio samples are decomposed with a learned basis and their associated weights. As the prediction targets of Basis-MelGAN are the weight values associated with each learned basis instead of the raw audio samples, the upsampling layers in Basis-MelGAN can be designed with much simpler networks. Compared with other GAN based neural vocoders, the proposed Basis-MelGAN could produce comparable high-quality audio but significantly reduced computational complexity from HiFi-GAN V1's 17.74 GFLOPs to 7.95 GFLOPs.
summary: Recent studies have shown that neural vocoders based on generative adversarial network (GAN) can generate audios with high quality. While GAN based neural vocoders have shown to be computationally much more efficient than those based on autoregressive predictions, the real-time generation of the highest quality audio on CPU is still a very challenging task. One major computation of all GAN-based neural vocoders comes from the stacked upsampling layers, which were designed to match the length of the waveform's length of output and temporal resolution. Meanwhile, the computational complexity of upsampling networks is closely correlated with the numbers of samples generated for each window. To reduce the computation of upsampling layers, we propose a new GAN based neural vocoder called Basis-MelGAN where the raw audio samples are decomposed with a learned basis and their associated weights. As the prediction targets of Basis-MelGAN are the weight values associated with each learned basis instead of the raw audio samples, the upsampling layers in Basis-MelGAN can be designed with much simpler networks. Compared with other GAN based neural vocoders, the proposed Basis-MelGAN could produce comparable high-quality audio but significantly reduced computational complexity from HiFi-GAN V1's 17.74 GFLOPs to 7.95 GFLOPs.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的神经声码器可以生成高质量的音频。虽然基于 GAN 的神经声码器在计算上比基于自回归预测的神经声码器要高效得多，但在 CPU 上实时生成最高质量的音频仍然是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。所有基于 GAN 的神经声码器的一项主要计算来自堆叠的上采样层，这些上采样层旨在匹配输出波形长度和时间分辨率。同时，上采样网络的计算复杂度与每个窗口生成的样本数量密切相关。为了减少上采样层的计算，我们提出了一种新的基于 GAN 的神经声码器，称为 Basis-MelGAN，其中原始音频样本通过学习的基础及其相关权重进行分解。由于 Basis-MelGAN 的预测目标是与每个学习基础相关的权重值，而不是原始音频样本，因此 Basis-MelGAN 中的上采样层可以使用更简单的网络进行设计。与其他基于 GAN 的神经声码器相比，所提出的 Basis-MelGAN 可以产生相当的高质量音频，但计算复杂度从 HiFi-GAN V1 的 17.74 GFLOP 显着降低到 7.95 GFLOP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频分解的高效GAN神经声码器Basis-MelGAN，通过降低上采样层计算复杂度实现高质量音频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN声码器在CPU上实时生成高质量音频时面临上采样层计算量大的挑战，传统方法的计算复杂度（如HiFi-GAN V1的17.74 GFLOPs）限制了效率。
AI.method: 通过学习音频的基函数分解，将原始音频样本转换为基函数权重进行预测，从而简化上采样网络结构，避免直接生成原始音频样本。
AI.result: Basis-MelGAN将计算复杂度降低至7.95 GFLOPs，在保持音频质量的同时显著提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: Basis-MelGAN通过音频分解方法有效降低了GAN声码器的计算负担，为高效实时音频生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Basis-MelGAN: Efficient Neural Vocoder Based on Audio Decomposition Basis-MelGAN：基于音频分解的高效神经声码器 Recent studies have shown that neural vocoders based on generative adversarial network (GAN) can generate audios with high quality. While GAN based neural vocoders have shown to be computationally much more efficient than those based on autoregressive predictions, the real-time generation of the highest quality audio on CPU is still a very challenging task. One major computation of all GAN-based neural vocoders comes from the stacked upsampling layers, which were designed to match the length of the waveform's length of output and temporal resolution. Meanwhile, the computational complexity of upsampling networks is closely correlated with the numbers of samples generated for each window. To reduce the computation of upsampling layers, we propose a new GAN based neural vocoder called Basis-MelGAN where the raw audio samples are decomposed with a learned basis and their associated weights. As the prediction targets of Basis-MelGAN are the weight values associated with each learned basis instead of the raw audio samples, the upsampling layers in Basis-MelGAN can be designed with much simpler networks. Compared with other GAN based neural vocoders, the proposed Basis-MelGAN could produce comparable high-quality audio but significantly reduced computational complexity from HiFi-GAN V1's 17.74 GFLOPs to 7.95 GFLOPs. 最近的研究表明，基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的神经声码器可以生成高质量的音频。虽然基于 GAN 的神经声码器在计算上比基于自回归预测的神经声码器要高效得多，但在 CPU 上实时生成最高质量的音频仍然是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。所有基于 GAN 的神经声码器的一项主要计算来自堆叠的上采样层，这些上采样层旨在匹配输出波形长度和时间分辨率。同时，上采样网络的计算复杂度与每个窗口生成的样本数量密切相关。为了减少上采样层的计算，我们提出了一种新的基于 GAN 的神经声码器，称为 Basis-MelGAN，其中原始音频样本通过学习的基础及其相关权重进行分解。由于 Basis-MelGAN 的预测目标是与每个学习基础相关的权重值，而不是原始音频样本，因此 Basis-MelGAN 中的上采样层可以使用更简单的网络进行设计。与其他基于 GAN 的神经声码器相比，所提出的 Basis-MelGAN 可以产生相当的高质量音频，但计算复杂度从 HiFi-GAN V1 的 17.74 GFLOP 显着降低到 7.95 GFLOP。 本文提出了一种基于音频分解的高效GAN神经声码器Basis-MelGAN，通过降低上采样层计算复杂度实现高质量音频生成。 Zhengxi Liu,Yanmin Qian cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Diversifying Semantic Image Synthesis and Editing via Class- and Layer-wise VAEs
title_zh: 通过类和分层 VAE 实现语义图像合成和编辑多样化
comment: Accepted to Pacific Graphics 2020, codes available at https://github.com/endo-yuki-t/DiversifyingSMIS
comments: Accepted to Pacific Graphics 2020, codes available at https://github.com/endo-yuki-t/DiversifyingSMIS
abstract: Semantic image synthesis is a process for generating photorealistic images from a single semantic mask. To enrich the diversity of multimodal image synthesis, previous methods have controlled the global appearance of an output image by learning a single latent space. However, a single latent code is often insufficient for capturing various object styles because object appearance depends on multiple factors. To handle individual factors that determine object styles, we propose a class- and layer-wise extension to the variational autoencoder (VAE) framework that allows flexible control over each object class at the local to global levels by learning multiple latent spaces. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method generates images that are both plausible and more diverse compared to state-of-the-art methods via extensive experiments with real and synthetic datasets inthree different domains. We also show that our method enables a wide range of applications in image synthesis and editing tasks.
summary: Semantic image synthesis is a process for generating photorealistic images from a single semantic mask. To enrich the diversity of multimodal image synthesis, previous methods have controlled the global appearance of an output image by learning a single latent space. However, a single latent code is often insufficient for capturing various object styles because object appearance depends on multiple factors. To handle individual factors that determine object styles, we propose a class- and layer-wise extension to the variational autoencoder (VAE) framework that allows flexible control over each object class at the local to global levels by learning multiple latent spaces. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method generates images that are both plausible and more diverse compared to state-of-the-art methods via extensive experiments with real and synthetic datasets inthree different domains. We also show that our method enables a wide range of applications in image synthesis and editing tasks.
abstract_zh: 语义图像合成是从单个语义掩模生成逼真图像的过程。为了丰富多模态图像合成的多样性，以前的方法通过学习单个潜在空间来控制输出图像的全局外观。然而，单个潜在代码通常不足以捕获各种对象样式，因为对象外观取决于多种因素。为了处理决定对象样式的个体因素，我们提出了对变分自动编码器（VAE）框架的类和层扩展，该框架允许通过学习多个潜在空间在局部到全局级别上灵活控制每个对象类。此外，我们通过在三个不同领域的真实和合成数据集进行广泛的实验，证明我们的方法生成的图像与最先进的方法相比既合理又更加多样化。我们还表明，我们的方法可以在图像合成和编辑任务中广泛应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类和分层变分自编码器（VAE）的框架，通过多潜在空间学习实现更灵活的语义图像合成与编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统单潜在空间的VAE难以捕捉物体样式多因素影响，导致生成图像多样性不足。
AI.method: 扩展VAE框架，引入类和分层结构，为每个物体类学习多个潜在空间，实现局部到全局的灵活控制。
AI.result: 在三个领域的真实和合成数据集上，生成图像比现有方法更合理且多样化，并支持多种图像编辑应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多潜在空间设计有效提升了语义图像合成的多样性与控制精度，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Building Intelligent Autonomous Navigation Agents
title_zh: 构建智能自主导航代理
comment: CMU Ph.D. Thesis, March 2021. For more details see http://devendrachaplot.github.io/
comments: CMU Ph.D. Thesis, March 2021. For more details see http://devendrachaplot.github.io/
abstract: Breakthroughs in machine learning in the last decade have led to `digital intelligence', i.e. machine learning models capable of learning from vast amounts of labeled data to perform several digital tasks such as speech recognition, face recognition, machine translation and so on. The goal of this thesis is to make progress towards designing algorithms capable of `physical intelligence', i.e. building intelligent autonomous navigation agents capable of learning to perform complex navigation tasks in the physical world involving visual perception, natural language understanding, reasoning, planning, and sequential decision making. Despite several advances in classical navigation methods in the last few decades, current navigation agents struggle at long-term semantic navigation tasks. In the first part of the thesis, we discuss our work on short-term navigation using end-to-end reinforcement learning to tackle challenges such as obstacle avoidance, semantic perception, language grounding, and reasoning. In the second part, we present a new class of navigation methods based on modular learning and structured explicit map representations, which leverage the strengths of both classical and end-to-end learning methods, to tackle long-term navigation tasks. We show that these methods are able to effectively tackle challenges such as localization, mapping, long-term planning, exploration and learning semantic priors. These modular learning methods are capable of long-term spatial and semantic understanding and achieve state-of-the-art results on various navigation tasks.
summary: Breakthroughs in machine learning in the last decade have led to `digital intelligence', i.e. machine learning models capable of learning from vast amounts of labeled data to perform several digital tasks such as speech recognition, face recognition, machine translation and so on. The goal of this thesis is to make progress towards designing algorithms capable of `physical intelligence', i.e. building intelligent autonomous navigation agents capable of learning to perform complex navigation tasks in the physical world involving visual perception, natural language understanding, reasoning, planning, and sequential decision making. Despite several advances in classical navigation methods in the last few decades, current navigation agents struggle at long-term semantic navigation tasks. In the first part of the thesis, we discuss our work on short-term navigation using end-to-end reinforcement learning to tackle challenges such as obstacle avoidance, semantic perception, language grounding, and reasoning. In the second part, we present a new class of navigation methods based on modular learning and structured explicit map representations, which leverage the strengths of both classical and end-to-end learning methods, to tackle long-term navigation tasks. We show that these methods are able to effectively tackle challenges such as localization, mapping, long-term planning, exploration and learning semantic priors. These modular learning methods are capable of long-term spatial and semantic understanding and achieve state-of-the-art results on various navigation tasks.
abstract_zh: 过去十年机器学习的突破带来了“数字智能”，即机器学习模型能够从大量标记数据中学习，以执行语音识别、人脸识别、机器翻译等多项数字任务。本论文的目标是在设计具有“物理智能”能力的算法方面取得进展，即构建能够学习在物理世界中执行复杂导航任务的智能自主导航代理，这些任务涉及视觉感知、自然语言理解、推理、规划和顺序决策。尽管过去几十年来经典导航方法取得了一些进展，但当前的导航代理在长期语义导航任务上仍举步维艰。在论文的第一部分，我们讨论了使用端到端强化学习来解决避障、语义感知、语言基础和推理等挑战的短期导航工作。在第二部分中，我们提出了一类基于模块化学习和结构化显式地图表示的新型导航方法，该方法利用经典学习方法和端到端学习方法的优势来解决长期导航任务。我们证明这些方法能够有效地解决诸如定位、映射、长期规划、探索和学习语义先验等挑战。这些模块化学习方法能够进行长期的空间和语义理解，并在各种导航任务上取得最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计能够执行复杂物理世界导航任务的智能自主代理，结合数字智能与物理智能的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有导航代理在长期语义导航任务中表现不足，需融合经典方法与深度学习优势以解决定位、地图构建与长期规划等挑战。
AI.method: 分两阶段：第一阶段采用端到端强化学习处理短期导航（如避障与语义感知）；第二阶段提出模块化学习框架，结合结构化显式地图表示以应对长期任务。
AI.result: 模块化方法在定位、长期规划与语义先验学习等任务中达到最先进水平，实现复杂环境下的空间与语义理解。
AI.conclusion: 模块化学习有效整合经典与深度学习优势，为物理智能的自主导航代理提供了可扩展的解决方案。

In the first part of the thesis, we discuss our work on short-term navigation using end-to-end reinforcement learning to tackle challenges such as obstacle avoidance, semantic perception, language grounding, and reasoning. In the second part, we present a new class of navigation methods based on modular learning and structured explicit map representations, which leverage the strengths of both classical and end-to-end learning methods, to tackle long-term navigation tasks. We show that these methods are able to effectively tackle challenges such as localization, mapping, long-term planning, exploration and learning semantic priors. These modular learning methods are capable of long-term spatial and semantic understanding and achieve state-of-the-art results on various navigation tasks. 过去十年机器学习的突破带来了“数字智能”，即机器学习模型能够从大量标记数据中学习，以执行语音识别、人脸识别、机器翻译等多项数字任务。本论文的目标是在设计具有“物理智能”能力的算法方面取得进展，即构建能够学习在物理世界中执行复杂导航任务的智能自主导航代理，这些任务涉及视觉感知、自然语言理解、推理、规划和顺序决策。尽管过去几十年来经典导航方法取得了一些进展，但当前的导航代理在长期语义导航任务上仍举步维艰。在论文的第一部分，我们讨论了使用端到端强化学习来解决避障、语义感知、语言基础和推理等挑战的短期导航工作。在第二部分中，我们提出了一类基于模块化学习和结构化显式地图表示的新型导航方法，该方法利用经典学习方法和端到端学习方法的优势来解决长期导航任务。我们证明这些方法能够有效地解决诸如定位、映射、长期规划、探索和学习语义先验等挑战。这些模块化学习方法能够进行长期的空间和语义理解，并在各种导航任务上取得最先进的结果。 本文旨在设计能够执行复杂物理世界导航任务的智能自主代理，结合数字智能与物理智能的优势。 Devendra Singh Chaplot cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO
